authors_text: Marcus Hoerger,Hanna Kurniawati,Dirk Kroese,Nan Ye
title: Adaptive Discretization using Voronoi Trees for Continuous POMDPs
title_zh: 使用 Voronoi 树进行连续 POMDP 的自适应离散化
comment: Submitted to The International Journal of Robotics Research (IJRR). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2209.05733
comments: Submitted to The International Journal of Robotics Research (IJRR). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2209.05733
abstract: Solving continuous Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes (POMDPs) is challenging, particularly for high-dimensional continuous action spaces. To alleviate this difficulty, we propose a new sampling-based online POMDP solver, called Adaptive Discretization using Voronoi Trees (ADVT). It uses Monte Carlo Tree Search in combination with an adaptive discretization of the action space as well as optimistic optimization to efficiently sample high-dimensional continuous action spaces and compute the best action to perform. Specifically, we adaptively discretize the action space for each sampled belief using a hierarchical partition called Voronoi tree, which is a Binary Space Partitioning that implicitly maintains the partition of a cell as the Voronoi diagram of two points sampled from the cell. ADVT uses the estimated diameters of the cells to form an upper-confidence bound on the action value function within the cell, guiding the Monte Carlo Tree Search expansion and further discretization of the action space. This enables ADVT to better exploit local information with respect to the action value function, allowing faster identification of the most promising regions in the action space, compared to existing solvers. Voronoi trees keep the cost of partitioning and estimating the diameter of each cell low, even in high-dimensional spaces where many sampled points are required to cover the space well. ADVT additionally handles continuous observation spaces, by adopting an observation progressive widening strategy, along with a weighted particle representation of beliefs. Experimental results indicate that ADVT scales substantially better to high-dimensional continuous action spaces, compared to state-of-the-art methods.

To alleviate this difficulty, we propose a new sampling-based online POMDP solver, called Adaptive Discretization using Voronoi Trees (ADVT). It uses Monte Carlo Tree Search in combination with an adaptive discretization of the action space as well as optimistic optimization to efficiently sample high-dimensional continuous action spaces and compute the best action to perform. Specifically, we adaptively discretize the action space for each sampled belief using a hierarchical partition called Voronoi tree, which is a Binary Space Partitioning that implicitly maintains the partition of a cell as the Voronoi diagram of two points sampled from the cell. ADVT uses the estimated diameters of the cells to form an upper-confidence bound on the action value function within the cell, guiding the Monte Carlo Tree Search expansion and further discretization of the action space. This enables ADVT to better exploit local information with respect to the action value function, allowing faster identification of the most promising regions in the action space, compared to existing solvers. Voronoi trees keep the cost of partitioning and estimating the diameter of each cell low, even in high-dimensional spaces where many sampled points are required to cover the space well. ADVT additionally handles continuous observation spaces, by adopting an observation progressive widening strategy, along with a weighted particle representation of beliefs. Experimental results indicate that ADVT scales substantially better to high-dimensional continuous action spaces, compared to state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 解决连续部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）具有挑战性，特别是对于高维连续动作空间。为了缓解这一困难，我们提出了一种新的基于采样的在线 POMDP 求解器，称为使用 Voronoi 树的自适应离散化 (ADVT)。它使用蒙特卡洛树搜索与动作空间的自适应离散化以及乐观优化相结合，以有效地采样高维连续动作空间并计算要执行的最佳动作。具体来说，我们使用称为 Voronoi 树的分层分区自适应地离散每个采样信念的动作空间，Voronoi 树是一种二元空间分区，隐式地将单元格的分区维护为从单元格采样的两个点的 Voronoi 图。 ADVT 使用估计的单元直径来形成单元内动作值函数的置信上限，指导蒙特卡罗树搜索扩展和动作空间的进一步离散化。与现有的求解器相比，这使得 ADVT 能够更好地利用与动作值函数相关的局部信息，从而更快地识别动作空间中最有希望的区域。即使在需要许多采样点才能很好地覆盖空间的高维空间中，Voronoi 树也能降低划分和估计每个单元直径的成本。 ADVT还通过采用观察渐进扩大策略以及信念的加权粒子表示来处理连续观察空间。实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，ADVT 能够更好地适应高维连续动作空间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Voronoi树的自适应离散化方法ADVT，用于解决高维连续动作空间的连续部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）问题。
AI.motivation: 高维连续动作空间的POMDP求解面临计算复杂度高、动作空间难以有效采样的挑战，现有方法在可扩展性和效率上存在不足。
AI.method: 结合蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）与Voronoi树自适应离散化，通过二叉空间划分生成Voronoi图，利用单元格直径估计构建置信上界指导搜索扩展，并采用观测渐进扩展策略与加权粒子表示信念。
AI.result: 实验表明ADVT在高维连续动作空间上的扩展性显著优于现有最先进方法，能更高效识别动作空间中的潜在最优区域。
AI.conclusion: ADVT通过自适应离散化与高效分区机制，有效解决了高维连续POMDP的求解难题，为复杂决策问题提供了可扩展的解决方案。

authors_text: Chuyang Zhou,Jiajun Huang,Daochang Liu,Chengbin Du,Siqi Ma,Surya Nepal,Chang Xu
title: Two-in-one Knowledge Distillation for Efficient Facial Forgery Detection
title_zh: 二合一知识蒸馏，实现高效的人脸伪造检测
abstract: Facial forgery detection is a crucial but extremely challenging topic, with the fast development of forgery techniques making the synthetic artefact highly indistinguishable. Prior works show that by mining both spatial and frequency information the forgery detection performance of deep learning models can be vastly improved. However, leveraging multiple types of information usually requires more than one branch in the neural network, which makes the model heavy and cumbersome. Knowledge distillation, as an important technique for efficient modelling, could be a possible remedy. We find that existing knowledge distillation methods have difficulties distilling a dual-branch model into a single-branch model. More specifically, knowledge distillation on both the spatial and frequency branches has degraded performance than distillation only on the spatial branch. To handle such problem, we propose a novel two-in-one knowledge distillation framework which can smoothly merge the information from a large dual-branch network into a small single-branch network, with the help of different dedicated feature projectors and the gradient homogenization technique. Experimental analysis on two datasets, FaceForensics++ and Celeb-DF, shows that our proposed framework achieves superior performance for facial forgery detection with much fewer parameters.
summary: Facial forgery detection is a crucial but extremely challenging topic, with the fast development of forgery techniques making the synthetic artefact highly indistinguishable. Prior works show that by mining both spatial and frequency information the forgery detection performance of deep learning models can be vastly improved. However, leveraging multiple types of information usually requires more than one branch in the neural network, which makes the model heavy and cumbersome. Knowledge distillation, as an important technique for efficient modelling, could be a possible remedy. We find that existing knowledge distillation methods have difficulties distilling a dual-branch model into a single-branch model. More specifically, knowledge distillation on both the spatial and frequency branches has degraded performance than distillation only on the spatial branch. To handle such problem, we propose a novel two-in-one knowledge distillation framework which can smoothly merge the information from a large dual-branch network into a small single-branch network, with the help of different dedicated feature projectors and the gradient homogenization technique. Experimental analysis on two datasets, FaceForensics++ and Celeb-DF, shows that our proposed framework achieves superior performance for facial forgery detection with much fewer parameters.
abstract_zh: 面部伪造检测是一个至关重要但极具挑战性的课题，随着伪造技术的快速发展，使得合成人工制品高度难以区分。先前的工作表明，通过挖掘空间和频率信息，可以极大地提高深度学习模型的伪造检测性能。然而，利用多种类型的信息通常需要神经网络中多个分支，这使得模型变得笨重。知识蒸馏作为高效建模的重要技术，可能是一种可能的补救措施。我们发现现有的知识蒸馏方法很难将双分支模型蒸馏为单分支模型。更具体地说，与仅在空间分支上进行知识蒸馏相比，在空间和频率分支上进行知识蒸馏会降低性能。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的二合一知识蒸馏框架，借助不同的专用特征投影仪和梯度均质化技术，可以将大型双分支网络的信息平滑地合并到小型单分支网络中。对两个数据集 FaceForensics++ 和 Celeb-DF 的实验分析表明，我们提出的框架以更少的参数实现了面部伪造检测的卓越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双分支知识蒸馏框架，将复杂的人脸伪造检测模型压缩为轻量单分支模型，提升检测效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过多分支网络融合空间与频率信息提升检测性能，但模型复杂度高；传统知识蒸馏难以有效压缩双分支模型，导致性能下降。
AI.method: 设计专用特征投影器与梯度同质化技术，将双分支网络的知识统一映射到单分支模型，实现信息高效融合。
AI.result: 在FaceForensics++和Celeb-DF数据集上，参数量减少的情况下检测性能优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了双分支模型压缩难题，在保持高性能的同时显著降低计算复杂度。

authors_text: Di Wang,Yao Wang,Shao-Bo Lin
title: Kernel-Based Distributed Q-Learning: A Scalable Reinforcement Learning Approach for Dynamic Treatment Regimes
title_zh: 基于内核的分布式 Q-Learning：一种用于动态治疗方案的可扩展强化学习方法
abstract: In recent years, large amounts of electronic health records (EHRs) concerning chronic diseases have been collected to facilitate medical diagnosis. Modeling the dynamic properties of EHRs related to chronic diseases can be efficiently done using dynamic treatment regimes (DTRs). While reinforcement learning (RL) is a widely used method for creating DTRs, there is ongoing research in developing RL algorithms that can effectively handle large amounts of data. In this paper, we present a scalable kernel-based distributed Q-learning algorithm for generating DTRs. We perform both theoretical assessments and numerical analysis for the proposed approach. The results demonstrate that our algorithm significantly reduces the computational complexity associated with the state-of-the-art deep reinforcement learning methods, while maintaining comparable generalization performance in terms of accumulated rewards across stages, such as survival time or cumulative survival probability.
summary: In recent years, large amounts of electronic health records (EHRs) concerning chronic diseases have been collected to facilitate medical diagnosis. Modeling the dynamic properties of EHRs related to chronic diseases can be efficiently done using dynamic treatment regimes (DTRs). While reinforcement learning (RL) is a widely used method for creating DTRs, there is ongoing research in developing RL algorithms that can effectively handle large amounts of data. In this paper, we present a scalable kernel-based distributed Q-learning algorithm for generating DTRs. We perform both theoretical assessments and numerical analysis for the proposed approach. The results demonstrate that our algorithm significantly reduces the computational complexity associated with the state-of-the-art deep reinforcement learning methods, while maintaining comparable generalization performance in terms of accumulated rewards across stages, such as survival time or cumulative survival probability.
abstract_zh: 近年来，人们收集了大量有关慢性病的电子健康记录（EHR）以方便医疗诊断。使用动态治疗方案 (DTR) 可以有效地对与慢性疾病相关的 EHR 的动态特性进行建模。虽然强化学习 (RL) 是一种广泛使用的创建 DTR 的方法，但人们仍在不断研究开发能够有效处理大量数据的 RL 算法。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于生成 DTR 的可扩展的基于内核的分布式 Q 学习算法。我们对所提出的方法进行了理论评估和数值分析。结果表明，我们的算法显着降低了与最先进的深度强化学习方法相关的计算复杂性，同时在跨阶段的累积奖励（例如生存时间或累积生存概率）方面保持了可比较的泛化性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于核的分布式Q学习算法，用于生成动态治疗方案（DTRs），以处理慢性病电子健康记录（EHRs）的动态特性。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法在处理大规模EHR数据时计算复杂度高，需开发更高效且可扩展的算法以应对实际医疗数据需求。
AI.method: 设计基于核方法的分布式Q学习框架，结合分布式计算与核函数映射，降低计算复杂度并保持模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 实验表明该算法相比深度强化学习方法显著降低计算复杂度，同时在累积奖励（如生存时间）等指标上保持可比性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的分布式Q学习方法为大规模EHR数据下的动态治疗方案优化提供了高效可行的解决方案。

search_text: Kernel-Based Distributed Q-Learning: A Scalable Reinforcement Learning Approach for Dynamic Treatment Regimes 基于内核的分布式 Q-Learning：一种用于动态治疗方案的可扩展强化学习方法 In recent years, large amounts of electronic health records (EHRs) concerning chronic diseases have been collected to facilitate medical diagnosis. Modeling the dynamic properties of EHRs related to chronic diseases can be efficiently done using dynamic treatment regimes (DTRs). While reinforcement learning (RL) is a widely used method for creating DTRs, there is ongoing research in developing RL algorithms that can effectively handle large amounts of data. In this paper, we present a scalable kernel-based distributed Q-learning algorithm for generating DTRs. We perform both theoretical assessments and numerical analysis for the proposed approach. The results demonstrate that our algorithm significantly reduces the computational complexity associated with the state-of-the-art deep reinforcement learning methods, while maintaining comparable generalization performance in terms of accumulated rewards across stages, such as survival time or cumulative survival probability. 近年来，人们收集了大量有关慢性病的电子健康记录（EHR）以方便医疗诊断。使用动态治疗方案 (DTR) 可以有效地对与慢性疾病相关的 EHR 的动态特性进行建模。虽然强化学习 (RL) 是一种广泛使用的创建 DTR 的方法，但人们仍在不断研究开发能够有效处理大量数据的 RL 算法。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于生成 DTR 的可扩展的基于内核的分布式 Q 学习算法。我们对所提出的方法进行了理论评估和数值分析。结果表明，我们的算法显着降低了与最先进的深度强化学习方法相关的计算复杂性，同时在跨阶段的累积奖励（例如生存时间或累积生存概率）方面保持了可比较的泛化性能。 本文提出一种基于核的分布式Q学习算法，用于生成动态治疗方案（DTRs），以处理慢性病电子健康记录（EHRs）的动态特性。 Di Wang,Yao Wang,Shao-Bo Lin cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Daniel Ordonez-Apraez,Mario Martin,Antonio Agudo,Francesc Moreno-Noguer
title: On discrete symmetries of robotics systems: A group-theoretic and data-driven analysis
title_zh: 关于机器人系统的离散对称性：群论和数据驱动的分析
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures, 7 optional appendix pages, 4 appendix figures
comments: 8 pages, 4 figures, 7 optional appendix pages, 4 appendix figures
abstract: We present a comprehensive study on discrete morphological symmetries of dynamical systems, which are commonly observed in biological and artificial locomoting systems, such as legged, swimming, and flying animals/robots/virtual characters. These symmetries arise from the presence of one or more planes/axis of symmetry in the system's morphology, resulting in harmonious duplication and distribution of body parts. Significantly, we characterize how morphological symmetries extend to symmetries in the system's dynamics, optimal control policies, and in all proprioceptive and exteroceptive measurements related to the system's dynamics evolution. In the context of data-driven methods, symmetry represents an inductive bias that justifies the use of data augmentation or symmetric function approximators. To tackle this, we present a theoretical and practical framework for identifying the system's morphological symmetry group $\G$ and characterizing the symmetries in proprioceptive and exteroceptive data measurements. We then exploit these symmetries using data augmentation and $\G$-equivariant neural networks. Our experiments on both synthetic and real-world applications provide empirical evidence of the advantageous outcomes resulting from the exploitation of these symmetries, including improved sample efficiency, enhanced generalization, and reduction of trainable parameters.
summary: We present a comprehensive study on discrete morphological symmetries of dynamical systems, which are commonly observed in biological and artificial locomoting systems, such as legged, swimming, and flying animals/robots/virtual characters. These symmetries arise from the presence of one or more planes/axis of symmetry in the system's morphology, resulting in harmonious duplication and distribution of body parts. Significantly, we characterize how morphological symmetries extend to symmetries in the system's dynamics, optimal control policies, and in all proprioceptive and exteroceptive measurements related to the system's dynamics evolution. In the context of data-driven methods, symmetry represents an inductive bias that justifies the use of data augmentation or symmetric function approximators. To tackle this, we present a theoretical and practical framework for identifying the system's morphological symmetry group $\G$ and characterizing the symmetries in proprioceptive and exteroceptive data measurements. We then exploit these symmetries using data augmentation and $\G$-equivariant neural networks. Our experiments on both synthetic and real-world applications provide empirical evidence of the advantageous outcomes resulting from the exploitation of these symmetries, including improved sample efficiency, enhanced generalization, and reduction of trainable parameters.
abstract_zh: 我们对动力系统的离散形态对称性进行了全面的研究，这种对称性在生物和人工运动系统中很常见，例如有腿、游泳和飞行的动物/机器人/虚拟角色。这些对称性源于系统形态中存在一个或多个对称平面/轴，从而导致身体部位的和谐复制和分布。值得注意的是，我们描述了形态对称性如何扩展到系统动力学、最优控制策略以及与系统动力学演化相关的所有本体感受和外感受测量中的对称性。在数据驱动方法的背景下，对称性代表了一种归纳偏差，证明了使用数据增强或对称函数逼近器的合理性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个理论和实践框架，用于识别系统的形态对称群 $\G$ 并表征本体感受和外感受数据测量的对称性。然后，我们使用数据增强和 $\G$ 等变神经网络来利用这些对称性。我们对合成和现实世界应用的实验提供了利用这些对称性所产生的有利结果的经验证据，包括提高样本效率、增强泛化性和减少可训练参数。

AI.tldr: 本文研究机器人系统的离散形态对称性，分析其在动力学、控制策略及感知数据中的对称性扩展，并通过数据增强与等变神经网络利用这些对称性提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 形态对称性广泛存在于生物与人工运动系统中，但如何将其作为归纳偏置应用于数据驱动方法（如数据增强、神经网络设计）以提高效率与泛化能力仍需深入探索。
AI.method: 提出理论与实践框架识别系统形态对称群$\\G$，并利用数据增强与$\\G$-等变神经网络表征和利用对称性。
AI.result: 在合成与现实应用中验证了对称性利用的有效性，包括提升样本效率、增强泛化能力及减少可训练参数。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为机器人系统的数据驱动方法提供了新的理论工具与实践路径，有效结合了群论与数据驱动技术。

authors_text: Dayong Tian,Feifei Li,Yiwen Wei
title: Interval Type-2 Fuzzy Neural Networks for Multi-Label Classification
title_zh: 用于多标签分类的区间 2 型模糊神经网络
abstract: Prediction of multi-dimensional labels plays an important role in machine learning problems. We found that the classical binary labels could not reflect the contents and their relationships in an instance. Hence, we propose a multi-label classification model based on interval type-2 fuzzy logic. In the proposed model, we use a deep neural network to predict the type-1 fuzzy membership of an instance and another one to predict the fuzzifiers of the membership to generate interval type-2 fuzzy memberships. We also propose a loss function to measure the similarities between binary labels in datasets and interval type-2 fuzzy memberships generated by our model. The experiments validate that our approach outperforms baselines on multi-label classification benchmarks.
summary: Prediction of multi-dimensional labels plays an important role in machine learning problems. We found that the classical binary labels could not reflect the contents and their relationships in an instance. Hence, we propose a multi-label classification model based on interval type-2 fuzzy logic. In the proposed model, we use a deep neural network to predict the type-1 fuzzy membership of an instance and another one to predict the fuzzifiers of the membership to generate interval type-2 fuzzy memberships. We also propose a loss function to measure the similarities between binary labels in datasets and interval type-2 fuzzy memberships generated by our model. The experiments validate that our approach outperforms baselines on multi-label classification benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 多维标签的预测在机器学习问题中起着重要作用。我们发现经典的二元标签无法反映实例中的内容及其关系。因此，我们提出了一种基于区间2型模糊逻辑的多标签分类模型。在所提出的模型中，我们使用深度神经网络来预测实例的 1 类模糊隶属度，并使用另一个深度神经网络来预测隶属度的模糊器，以生成区间 2 类模糊隶属度。我们还提出了一个损失函数来衡量数据集中的二进制标签与我们的模型生成的区间类型 2 模糊隶属度之间的相似性。实验验证了我们的方法优于多标签分类基准的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于区间类型-2模糊逻辑的多标签分类模型，用于更准确地预测多维标签关系。
AI.motivation: 传统二元标签无法有效反映实例内容及其复杂关系，需更灵活的模型处理多标签分类中的不确定性。
AI.method: 采用深度神经网络预测类型-1模糊成员及模糊化参数生成区间类型-2模糊成员，并设计损失函数衡量标签与模糊成员相似性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多标签分类基准数据集上优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 区间类型-2模糊神经网络能有效建模多标签间的不确定性关系，提升分类性能。

search_text: Interval Type-2 Fuzzy Neural Networks for Multi-Label Classification 用于多标签分类的区间 2 型模糊神经网络 Prediction of multi-dimensional labels plays an important role in machine learning problems. We found that the classical binary labels could not reflect the contents and their relationships in an instance. Hence, we propose a multi-label classification model based on interval type-2 fuzzy logic. In the proposed model, we use a deep neural network to predict the type-1 fuzzy membership of an instance and another one to predict the fuzzifiers of the membership to generate interval type-2 fuzzy memberships. We also propose a loss function to measure the similarities between binary labels in datasets and interval type-2 fuzzy memberships generated by our model. The experiments validate that our approach outperforms baselines on multi-label classification benchmarks. 多维标签的预测在机器学习问题中起着重要作用。我们发现经典的二元标签无法反映实例中的内容及其关系。因此，我们提出了一种基于区间2型模糊逻辑的多标签分类模型。在所提出的模型中，我们使用深度神经网络来预测实例的 1 类模糊隶属度，并使用另一个深度神经网络来预测隶属度的模糊器，以生成区间 2 类模糊隶属度。我们还提出了一个损失函数来衡量数据集中的二进制标签与我们的模型生成的区间类型 2 模糊隶属度之间的相似性。实验验证了我们的方法优于多标签分类基准的基线。 本文提出一种基于区间类型-2模糊逻辑的多标签分类模型，用于更准确地预测多维标签关系。 Dayong Tian,Feifei Li,Yiwen Wei cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Hao Wang,Zhiyu Wang,Yunlong Niu,Zhaoran Liu,Haozhe Li,Yilin Liao,Yuxin Huang,Xinggao Liu
title: An Accurate and Interpretable Framework for Trustworthy Process Monitoring
title_zh: 准确且可解释的可信过程监控框架
abstract: Trustworthy process monitoring seeks to build an accurate and interpretable monitoring framework, which is critical for ensuring the safety of energy conversion plant (ECP) that operates under extreme working conditions such as high pressure and temperature. Contemporary self-attentive models, however, fall short in this domain for two main reasons. First, they rely on step-wise correlations that fail to involve physically meaningful semantics in ECP logs, resulting in suboptimal accuracy and interpretability. Second, attention matrices are frequently cluttered with spurious correlations that obscure physically meaningful ones, further impeding effective interpretation. To overcome these issues, we propose AttentionMixer, a framework aimed at improving both accuracy and interpretability of existing methods and establish a trustworthy ECP monitoring framework. Specifically, to tackle the first issue, we employ a spatial adaptive message passing block to capture variate-wise correlations. This block is coupled with a temporal adaptive message passing block through an \textit{mixing} operator, yielding a multi-faceted representation of ECP logs accounting for both step-wise and variate-wise correlations. Concurrently, to tackle the second issue, we employ a sparse message passing regularizer to filter out spurious correlations. We validate the efficacy of AttentionMixer using two real-world datasets from the radiation monitoring network for Chinese nuclear power plants.
summary: Trustworthy process monitoring seeks to build an accurate and interpretable monitoring framework, which is critical for ensuring the safety of energy conversion plant (ECP) that operates under extreme working conditions such as high pressure and temperature. Contemporary self-attentive models, however, fall short in this domain for two main reasons. First, they rely on step-wise correlations that fail to involve physically meaningful semantics in ECP logs, resulting in suboptimal accuracy and interpretability. Second, attention matrices are frequently cluttered with spurious correlations that obscure physically meaningful ones, further impeding effective interpretation. To overcome these issues, we propose AttentionMixer, a framework aimed at improving both accuracy and interpretability of existing methods and establish a trustworthy ECP monitoring framework. Specifically, to tackle the first issue, we employ a spatial adaptive message passing block to capture variate-wise correlations. This block is coupled with a temporal adaptive message passing block through an \textit{mixing} operator, yielding a multi-faceted representation of ECP logs accounting for both step-wise and variate-wise correlations. Concurrently, to tackle the second issue, we employ a sparse message passing regularizer to filter out spurious correlations. We validate the efficacy of AttentionMixer using two real-world datasets from the radiation monitoring network for Chinese nuclear power plants.
abstract_zh: 值得信赖的过程监控旨在建立一个准确且可解释的监控框架，这对于确保在高压和高温等极端工作条件下运行的能源转换工厂（ECP）的安全至关重要。然而，当代的自我关注模型在这一领域存在不足，主要原因有两个。首先，它们依赖于逐步关联，而这些关联未能涉及 ECP 日志中具有物理意义的语义，从而导致准确性和可解释性不佳。其次，注意力矩阵经常充斥着虚假的相关性，这些相关性掩盖了物理上有意义的相关性，进一步阻碍了有效的解释。为了克服这些问题，我们提出了 AttentionMixer，一个旨在提高现有方法的准确性和可解释性的框架，并建立一个值得信赖的 ECP 监控框架。具体来说，为了解决第一个问题，我们采用空间自适应消息传递块来捕获变量相关性。该块通过 \textit{mixing} 运算符与时间自适应消息传递块耦合，产生 ECP 日志的多方面表示，同时考虑了逐步相关性和变量相关性。同时，为了解决第二个问题，我们采用稀疏消息传递正则化器来过滤掉虚假相关性。我们使用来自中国核电厂辐射监测网络的两个真实数据集验证了 AttentionMixer 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AttentionMixer框架，旨在提升能源转换厂（ECP）过程监控的准确性和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有自注意模型在ECP监控中因忽略物理语义和存在虚假相关性，导致准确率与可解释性不足。
AI.method: 设计空间-时间自适应消息传递模块并通过混合运算符融合，结合稀疏正则化器过滤虚假相关性。
AI.result: 在中核电厂辐射监测数据集上验证，AttentionMixer显著提升监控框架的准确率与可解释性。
AI.conclusion: AttentionMixer有效解决了ECP监控中语义缺失与虚假关联问题，建立了可信的工业监控新范式。

authors_text: Chao Qi,Jianqin Yin,Jinghang Xu,Pengxiang Ding
title: Instance-incremental Scene Graph Generation from Real-world Point Clouds via Normalizing Flows
title_zh: 通过标准化流从现实世界点云生成实例增量场景图
comment: Accepted by IEEE TCSVT. The supplementary material is available in the media column of the journal version of the article
comments: Accepted by IEEE TCSVT. The supplementary material is available in the media column of the journal version of the article
abstract: This work introduces a new task of instance-incremental scene graph generation: Given a scene of the point cloud, representing it as a graph and automatically increasing novel instances. A graph denoting the object layout of the scene is finally generated. It is an important task since it helps to guide the insertion of novel 3D objects into a real-world scene in vision-based applications like augmented reality. It is also challenging because the complexity of the real-world point cloud brings difficulties in learning object layout experiences from the observation data (non-empty rooms with labeled semantics). We model this task as a conditional generation problem and propose a 3D autoregressive framework based on normalizing flows (3D-ANF) to address it. First, we represent the point cloud as a graph by extracting the label semantics and contextual relationships. Next, a model based on normalizing flows is introduced to map the conditional generation of graphic elements into the Gaussian process. The mapping is invertible. Thus, the real-world experiences represented in the observation data can be modeled in the training phase, and novel instances can be autoregressively generated based on the Gaussian process in the testing phase. To evaluate the performance of our method sufficiently, we implement this new task on the indoor benchmark dataset 3DSSG-O27R16 and our newly proposed graphical dataset of outdoor scenes GPL3D. Experiments show that our method generates reliable novel graphs from the real-world point cloud and achieves state-of-the-art performance on the datasets.
summary: This work introduces a new task of instance-incremental scene graph generation: Given a scene of the point cloud, representing it as a graph and automatically increasing novel instances. A graph denoting the object layout of the scene is finally generated. It is an important task since it helps to guide the insertion of novel 3D objects into a real-world scene in vision-based applications like augmented reality. It is also challenging because the complexity of the real-world point cloud brings difficulties in learning object layout experiences from the observation data (non-empty rooms with labeled semantics). We model this task as a conditional generation problem and propose a 3D autoregressive framework based on normalizing flows (3D-ANF) to address it. First, we represent the point cloud as a graph by extracting the label semantics and contextual relationships. Next, a model based on normalizing flows is introduced to map the conditional generation of graphic elements into the Gaussian process. The mapping is invertible. Thus, the real-world experiences represented in the observation data can be modeled in the training phase, and novel instances can be autoregressively generated based on the Gaussian process in the testing phase. To evaluate the performance of our method sufficiently, we implement this new task on the indoor benchmark dataset 3DSSG-O27R16 and our newly proposed graphical dataset of outdoor scenes GPL3D. Experiments show that our method generates reliable novel graphs from the real-world point cloud and achieves state-of-the-art performance on the datasets.
abstract_zh: 这项工作引入了实例增量场景图生成的新任务：给定点云场景，将其表示为图并自动增加新实例。最终生成表示场景的对象布局的图表。这是一项重要的任务，因为它有助于指导将新颖的 3D 对象插入到增强现实等基于视觉的应用程序中的真实世界场景中。这也具有挑战性，因为现实世界点云的复杂性给从观察数据（具有标记语义的非空房间）学习对象布局体验带来了困难。我们将此任务建模为条件生成问题，并提出基于标准化流 (3D-ANF) 的 3D 自回归框架来解决该问题。首先，我们通过提取标签语义和上下文关系将点云表示为图。接下来，引入基于归一化流的模型，将图形元素的条件生成映射到高斯过程。映射是可逆的。因此，可以在训练阶段对观察数据中表示的现实世界经验进行建模，并且可以在测试阶段基于高斯过程自回归生成新实例。为了充分评估我们方法的性能，我们在室内基准数据集 3DSSG-O27R16 和我们新提出的室外场景图形数据集 GPL3D 上实现了这项新任务。实验表明，我们的方法从现实世界的点云生成可靠的新颖图，并在数据集上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于归一化流的3D自回归框架（3D-ANF），用于从真实世界的点云数据中生成实例增量场景图。
AI.motivation: 在增强现实等应用中，需要将新3D物体插入真实场景，但真实点云的复杂性使得从观测数据中学习物体布局具有挑战性。
AI.method: 通过提取点云的语义标签和上下文关系构建图结构，利用归一化流将图形元素的条件生成映射到高斯过程，并实现可逆映射以支持训练和测试阶段的增量生成。
AI.result: 在室内基准数据集3DSSG-O27R16和新提出的室外场景图数据集GPL3D上，方法生成的场景图可靠且达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 3D-ANF框架有效解决了真实点云场景图生成的挑战，在多个数据集上验证了其优越性。

authors_text: Chengxi Han,Chen Wu,Bo Du
title: HCGMNET: A Hierarchical Change Guiding Map Network For Change Detection
title_zh: HCGMNET：用于变更检测的分层变更引导图网络
abstract: Very-high-resolution (VHR) remote sensing (RS) image change detection (CD) has been a challenging task for its very rich spatial information and sample imbalance problem. In this paper, we have proposed a hierarchical change guiding map network (HCGMNet) for change detection. The model uses hierarchical convolution operations to extract multiscale features, continuously merges multi-scale features layer by layer to improve the expression of global and local information, and guides the model to gradually refine edge features and comprehensive performance by a change guide module (CGM), which is a self-attention with changing guide map. Extensive experiments on two CD datasets show that the proposed HCGMNet architecture achieves better CD performance than existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) CD methods.
summary: Very-high-resolution (VHR) remote sensing (RS) image change detection (CD) has been a challenging task for its very rich spatial information and sample imbalance problem. In this paper, we have proposed a hierarchical change guiding map network (HCGMNet) for change detection. The model uses hierarchical convolution operations to extract multiscale features, continuously merges multi-scale features layer by layer to improve the expression of global and local information, and guides the model to gradually refine edge features and comprehensive performance by a change guide module (CGM), which is a self-attention with changing guide map. Extensive experiments on two CD datasets show that the proposed HCGMNet architecture achieves better CD performance than existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) CD methods.
abstract_zh: 超高分辨率（VHR）遥感（RS）图像变化检测（CD）因其非常丰富的空间信息和样本不平衡问题而成为一项具有挑战性的任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于变化检测的分层变化引导地图网络（HCGMNet）。该模型利用分层卷积运算提取多尺度特征，逐层不断融合多尺度特征以改善全局和局部信息的表达，并通过变化引导模块（CGM）引导模型逐步细化边缘特征和综合性能，这是一种具有变化引导图的自注意力机制。对两个 CD 数据集的大量实验表明，所提出的 HCGMNet 架构比现有最先进的 (SOTA) CD 方法实现了更好的 CD 性能。

AI.tldr: 提出HCGMNet网络以解决高分辨率遥感图像变化检测中的空间信息丰富与样本不平衡问题
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效处理高分辨率遥感图像中的多尺度特征及样本不平衡问题，需更高效的特征融合与变化引导机制
AI.method: 采用分层卷积提取多尺度特征，逐层融合以增强全局与局部信息，并引入基于自注意力的变化引导模块（CGM）优化边缘特征
AI.result: 在两个变化检测数据集上，HCGMNet的性能优于现有最先进方法
AI.conclusion: HCGMNet通过分层特征融合与变化引导机制，有效提升了高分辨率遥感图像变化检测的准确性和鲁棒性

authors_text: Tong Zhang,Jiajie Yu,Jiaqi Li,Minghui Pang
title: A Heuristic Autonomous Exploration Method Based on Environmental Information Gain During Quadrotor Flight
title_zh: 一种基于四旋翼飞行环境信息增益的启发式自主探索方法
abstract: Autonomous exploration is a widely studied fundamental application in the field of quadrotors, which requires them to automatically explore unknown space to obtain complete information about the environment. The frontier-based method, which is one of the representative works on autonomous exploration, drives autonomous determination by the definition of frontier information, so that complete information about the environment is available to the quadrotor. However, existing frontier-based methods are able to accomplish the task but still suffer from inefficient exploration. How to improve the efficiency of autonomous exploration is the focus of current research. Typical problems include slow frontier generation, which affects real-time viewpoint determination, and insufficient determination methods that affect the quality of viewpoints. Therefore, to overcome these problems, this paper proposes a two-level viewpoint determination method for frontier-based autonomous exploration. Firstly, a sampling-based frontier detection method is presented for faster frontier generation, which improves the immediacy of environmental representation compared to traditional traversal-based methods. Secondly, we consider the access to environmental information during flight for the first time and design an innovative heuristic evaluation function to decide on a high-quality viewpoint as the next local navigation target in each exploration iteration. We conducted extensive benchmark and real-world tests to validate our method. The results confirm that our method optimizes the frontier search time by 85%, the exploration time by around 20-30%, and the exploration path by 25-35%.

The frontier-based method, which is one of the representative works on autonomous exploration, drives autonomous determination by the definition of frontier information, so that complete information about the environment is available to the quadrotor. However, existing frontier-based methods are able to accomplish the task but still suffer from inefficient exploration. How to improve the efficiency of autonomous exploration is the focus of current research. Typical problems include slow frontier generation, which affects real-time viewpoint determination, and insufficient determination methods that affect the quality of viewpoints. Therefore, to overcome these problems, this paper proposes a two-level viewpoint determination method for frontier-based autonomous exploration. Firstly, a sampling-based frontier detection method is presented for faster frontier generation, which improves the immediacy of environmental representation compared to traditional traversal-based methods. Secondly, we consider the access to environmental information during flight for the first time and design an innovative heuristic evaluation function to decide on a high-quality viewpoint as the next local navigation target in each exploration iteration. We conducted extensive benchmark and real-world tests to validate our method. The results confirm that our method optimizes the frontier search time by 85%, the exploration time by around 20-30%, and the exploration path by 25-35%.
abstract_zh: 自主探索是四旋翼飞行器领域广泛研究的基础应用，这要求它们自动探索未知空间以获得有关环境的完整信息。基于前沿的方法是自主探索的代表作品之一，它通过前沿信息的定义来驱动自主确定，从而使四旋翼飞行器能够获得完整的环境信息。然而，现有的基于前沿的方法能够完成任务，但仍然存在探索效率低下的问题。如何提高自主探索的效率是当前研究的重点。典型问题包括边界生成速度慢，影响视点确定的实时性；确定方法不足，影响视点质量。因此，为了克服这些问题，本文提出了一种基于前沿自主探索的两级视点确定方法。首先，提出了一种基于采样的边界检测方法，以实现更快的边界生成，与传统的基于遍历的方法相比，提高了环境表示的即时性。其次，我们首次考虑了飞行过程中环境信息的获取，并设计了一种创新的启发式评估函数，以决定高质量的视点作为每次探索迭代中的下一个本地导航目标。我们进行了广泛的基准测试和实际测试来验证我们的方法。结果证实，我们的方法将前沿搜索时间优化了 85%，探索时间优化了 20-30% 左右，探索路径优化了 25-35%。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于环境信息增益的启发式自主探索方法，以提高四旋翼飞行器在未知环境中的探索效率。
AI.motivation: 现有前沿方法存在探索效率低、前沿生成速度慢及观点确定方法不足的问题，亟需提升自主探索的实时性和路径质量。
AI.method: 提出两级观点确定方法：基于采样的前沿检测加速环境表示，以及结合飞行中环境信息增益的启发式评估函数优化导航目标选择。
AI.result: 实验表明，方法使前沿搜索时间减少85%，探索时间缩短20-30%，探索路径缩短25-35%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了四旋翼飞行器自主探索的实时性与路径质量，为高效环境探索提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yongsheng Mei,Hanhan Zhou,Tian Lan,Guru Venkataramani,Peng Wei
title: MAC-PO: Multi-Agent Experience Replay via Collective Priority Optimization
title_zh: MAC-PO：通过集体优先级优化进行多代理体验重放
comment: The 22nd International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems (AAMAS 2023). arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2302.05593
comments: The 22nd International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems (AAMAS 2023). arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2302.05593
abstract: Experience replay is crucial for off-policy reinforcement learning (RL) methods. By remembering and reusing the experiences from past different policies, experience replay significantly improves the training efficiency and stability of RL algorithms. Many decision-making problems in practice naturally involve multiple agents and require multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) under centralized training decentralized execution paradigm. Nevertheless, existing MARL algorithms often adopt standard experience replay where the transitions are uniformly sampled regardless of their importance. Finding prioritized sampling weights that are optimized for MARL experience replay has yet to be explored. To this end, we propose MAC-PO, which formulates optimal prioritized experience replay for multi-agent problems as a regret minimization over the sampling weights of transitions. Such optimization is relaxed and solved using the Lagrangian multiplier approach to obtain the close-form optimal sampling weights. By minimizing the resulting policy regret, we can narrow the gap between the current policy and a nominal optimal policy, thus acquiring an improved prioritization scheme for multi-agent tasks. Our experimental results on Predator-Prey and StarCraft Multi-Agent Challenge environments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, having a better ability to replay important transitions and outperforming other state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: Experience replay is crucial for off-policy reinforcement learning (RL) methods. By remembering and reusing the experiences from past different policies, experience replay significantly improves the training efficiency and stability of RL algorithms. Many decision-making problems in practice naturally involve multiple agents and require multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) under centralized training decentralized execution paradigm. Nevertheless, existing MARL algorithms often adopt standard experience replay where the transitions are uniformly sampled regardless of their importance. Finding prioritized sampling weights that are optimized for MARL experience replay has yet to be explored. To this end, we propose MAC-PO, which formulates optimal prioritized experience replay for multi-agent problems as a regret minimization over the sampling weights of transitions. Such optimization is relaxed and solved using the Lagrangian multiplier approach to obtain the close-form optimal sampling weights. By minimizing the resulting policy regret, we can narrow the gap between the current policy and a nominal optimal policy, thus acquiring an improved prioritization scheme for multi-agent tasks. Our experimental results on Predator-Prey and StarCraft Multi-Agent Challenge environments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, having a better ability to replay important transitions and outperforming other state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 经验回放对于离策略强化学习（RL）方法至关重要。通过记住和重用过去不同策略的经验，经验回放显着提高了 RL 算法的训练效率和稳定性。实践中的许多决策问题自然涉及多个智能体，需要集中训练分散执行范式下的多智能体强化学习（MARL）。然而，现有的 MARL 算法通常采用标准的经验重放，其中无论其重要性如何，都会对转换进行统一采样。寻找针对 MARL 体验回放进行优化的优先采样权重仍有待探索。为此，我们提出了 MAC-PO，它为多智能体问题制定最佳优先经验重放，作为转换采样权重的遗憾最小化。这种优化可以使用拉格朗日乘子方法进行松弛和求解，以获得近似形式的最优采样权重。通过最小化由此产生的政策遗憾，我们可以缩小当前政策与名义最优政策之间的差距，从而获得改进的多智能体任务优先级方案。我们在“捕食者-猎物”和“星际争霸多智能体挑战”环境中的实验结果证明了我们方法的有效性，具有更好的重放重要过渡的能力，并且优于其他最先进的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MAC-PO方法，通过集体优先优化实现多智能体强化学习中的经验回放。
AI.motivation: 现有MARL算法采用标准经验回放，忽略转移的重要性差异，导致训练效率低下。需探索优化的优先采样权重以提升多智能体任务性能。
AI.method: 将多智能体经验回放的最优优先采样建模为采样权重的遗憾最小化问题，利用拉格朗日乘数法求解闭式最优采样权重。
AI.result: 在Predator-Prey和StarCraft多智能体环境中验证，MAC-PO能更有效地重放关键转移，优于现有先进基线方法。
AI.conclusion: MAC-PO通过优化采样权重缩小当前策略与理想最优策略的差距，为多智能体任务提供改进的优先级方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出MAC-PO方法，通过集体优先优化实现多智能体强化学习中的经验回放。
ai_content.motivation: 现有MARL算法采用标准经验回放，忽略转移的重要性差异，导致训练效率低下。需探索优化的优先采样权重以提升多智能体任务性能。

search_text: MAC-PO: Multi-Agent Experience Replay via Collective Priority Optimization MAC-PO：通过集体优先级优化进行多代理体验重放 Experience replay is crucial for off-policy reinforcement learning (RL) methods. By remembering and reusing the experiences from past different policies, experience replay significantly improves the training efficiency and stability of RL algorithms. Many decision-making problems in practice naturally involve multiple agents and require multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) under centralized training decentralized execution paradigm. Nevertheless, existing MARL algorithms often adopt standard experience replay where the transitions are uniformly sampled regardless of their importance. Finding prioritized sampling weights that are optimized for MARL experience replay has yet to be explored. To this end, we propose MAC-PO, which formulates optimal prioritized experience replay for multi-agent problems as a regret minimization over the sampling weights of transitions. Such optimization is relaxed and solved using the Lagrangian multiplier approach to obtain the close-form optimal sampling weights. By minimizing the resulting policy regret, we can narrow the gap between the current policy and a nominal optimal policy, thus acquiring an improved prioritization scheme for multi-agent tasks. Our experimental results on Predator-Prey and StarCraft Multi-Agent Challenge environments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, having a better ability to replay important transitions and outperforming other state-of-the-art baselines. 经验回放对于离策略强化学习（RL）方法至关重要。通过记住和重用过去不同策略的经验，经验回放显着提高了 RL 算法的训练效率和稳定性。实践中的许多决策问题自然涉及多个智能体，需要集中训练分散执行范式下的多智能体强化学习（MARL）。然而，现有的 MARL 算法通常采用标准的经验重放，其中无论其重要性如何，都会对转换进行统一采样。寻找针对 MARL 体验回放进行优化的优先采样权重仍有待探索。为此，我们提出了 MAC-PO，它为多智能体问题制定最佳优先经验重放，作为转换采样权重的遗憾最小化。这种优化可以使用拉格朗日乘子方法进行松弛和求解，以获得近似形式的最优采样权重。通过最小化由此产生的政策遗憾，我们可以缩小当前政策与名义最优政策之间的差距，从而获得改进的多智能体任务优先级方案。我们在“捕食者-猎物”和“星际争霸多智能体挑战”环境中的实验结果证明了我们方法的有效性，具有更好的重放重要过渡的能力，并且优于其他最先进的基线。 本文提出MAC-PO方法，通过集体优先优化实现多智能体强化学习中的经验回放。 Yongsheng Mei,Hanhan Zhou,Tian Lan,Guru Venkataramani,Peng Wei cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.MA

authors_text: Shipeng Zhu,Zuoyan Zhao,Pengfei Fang,Hui Xue
title: Improving Scene Text Image Super-resolution via Dual Prior Modulation Network
title_zh: 通过双先验调制网络提高场景文本图像超分辨率
abstract: Scene text image super-resolution (STISR) aims to simultaneously increase the resolution and legibility of the text images, and the resulting images will significantly affect the performance of downstream tasks. Although numerous progress has been made, existing approaches raise two crucial issues: (1) They neglect the global structure of the text, which bounds the semantic determinism of the scene text. (2) The priors, e.g., text prior or stroke prior, employed in existing works, are extracted from pre-trained text recognizers. That said, such priors suffer from the domain gap including low resolution and blurriness caused by poor imaging conditions, leading to incorrect guidance. Our work addresses these gaps and proposes a plug-and-play module dubbed Dual Prior Modulation Network (DPMN), which leverages dual image-level priors to bring performance gain over existing approaches. Specifically, two types of prior-guided refinement modules, each using the text mask or graphic recognition result of the low-quality SR image from the preceding layer, are designed to improve the structural clarity and semantic accuracy of the text, respectively. The following attention mechanism hence modulates two quality-enhanced images to attain a superior SR result. Extensive experiments validate that our method improves the image quality and boosts the performance of downstream tasks over five typical approaches on the benchmark. Substantial visualizations and ablation studies demonstrate the advantages of the proposed DPMN. Code is available at: https://github.com/jdfxzzy/DPMN.
summary: Scene text image super-resolution (STISR) aims to simultaneously increase the resolution and legibility of the text images, and the resulting images will significantly affect the performance of downstream tasks. Although numerous progress has been made, existing approaches raise two crucial issues: (1) They neglect the global structure of the text, which bounds the semantic determinism of the scene text. (2) The priors, e.g., text prior or stroke prior, employed in existing works, are extracted from pre-trained text recognizers. That said, such priors suffer from the domain gap including low resolution and blurriness caused by poor imaging conditions, leading to incorrect guidance. Our work addresses these gaps and proposes a plug-and-play module dubbed Dual Prior Modulation Network (DPMN), which leverages dual image-level priors to bring performance gain over existing approaches. Specifically, two types of prior-guided refinement modules, each using the text mask or graphic recognition result of the low-quality SR image from the preceding layer, are designed to improve the structural clarity and semantic accuracy of the text, respectively. The following attention mechanism hence modulates two quality-enhanced images to attain a superior SR result. Extensive experiments validate that our method improves the image quality and boosts the performance of downstream tasks over five typical approaches on the benchmark. Substantial visualizations and ablation studies demonstrate the advantages of the proposed DPMN. Code is available at: https://github.com/jdfxzzy/DPMN.
abstract_zh: 场景文本图像超分辨率（STISR）旨在同时提高文本图像的分辨率和易读性，所得图像将显着影响下游任务的性能。尽管已经取得了许多进展，但现有的方法提出了两个关键问题：（1）它们忽略了文本的全局结构，这限制了场景文本的语义决定论。 （2）现有作品中使用的先验，例如文本先验或笔画先验，是从预先训练的文本识别器中提取的。也就是说，此类先验会受到域差距的影响，包括由于成像条件较差而导致的低分辨率和模糊，从而导致错误的引导。我们的工作解决了这些差距，并提出了一种称为双先验调制网络（DPMN）的即插即用模块，它利用双图像级先验来比现有方法带来性能增益。具体来说，设计了两种类型的先验引导细化模块，每种模块都使用前一层低质量SR图像的文本掩模或图形识别结果，分别提高文本的结构清晰度和语义准确性。因此，以下注意力机制会调整两个质量增强的图像以获得出色的 SR 结果。大量的实验验证了我们的方法比基准上的五种典型方法提高了图像质量并提高了下游任务的性能。大量的可视化和消融研究证明了所提出的 DPMN 的优点。代码位于：https://github.com/jdfxzzy/DPMN。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双先验调制网络（DPMN），用于提升场景文本图像超分辨率（STISR）的质量和可读性。
AI.motivation: 现有STISR方法存在两个关键问题：忽视文本全局结构导致语义不确定性，以及依赖预训练识别器提取的先验信息存在领域差距（如低分辨率和模糊问题），从而影响超分辨率效果。
AI.method: 设计双先验引导细化模块，分别利用文本掩码和图形识别结果优化低质量超分图像的结构清晰度与语义准确性，并通过注意力机制融合两种增强图像以获得更优结果。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上，DPMN相比五种典型方法显著提升图像质量及下游任务性能，可视化与消融实验证明其有效性。
AI.conclusion: DPMN通过双先验调制有效解决了STISR中的结构模糊与领域差距问题，为文本图像超分提供了实用且高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Nang Hung Nguyen,Duc Long Nguyen,Trong Bang Nguyen,Thanh-Hung Nguyen,Huy Hieu Pham,Truong Thao Nguyen,Phi Le Nguyen
title: CADIS: Handling Cluster-skewed Non-IID Data in Federated Learning with Clustered Aggregation and Knowledge DIStilled Regularization
title_zh: CADIS：使用集群聚合和知识蒸馏正则化处理联邦学习中集群倾斜的非独立同分布数据
comment: Accepted for presentation at the 23rd International Symposium on Cluster, Cloud and Internet Computing (CCGrid 2023)
comments: Accepted for presentation at the 23rd International Symposium on Cluster, Cloud and Internet Computing (CCGrid 2023)
abstract: Federated learning enables edge devices to train a global model collaboratively without exposing their data. Despite achieving outstanding advantages in computing efficiency and privacy protection, federated learning faces a significant challenge when dealing with non-IID data, i.e., data generated by clients that are typically not independent and identically distributed. In this paper, we tackle a new type of Non-IID data, called cluster-skewed non-IID, discovered in actual data sets. The cluster-skewed non-IID is a phenomenon in which clients can be grouped into clusters with similar data distributions. By performing an in-depth analysis of the behavior of a classification model's penultimate layer, we introduce a metric that quantifies the similarity between two clients' data distributions without violating their privacy. We then propose an aggregation scheme that guarantees equality between clusters. In addition, we offer a novel local training regularization based on the knowledge-distillation technique that reduces the overfitting problem at clients and dramatically boosts the training scheme's performance. We theoretically prove the superiority of the proposed aggregation over the benchmark FedAvg. Extensive experimental results on both standard public datasets and our in-house real-world dataset demonstrate that the proposed approach improves accuracy by up to 16% compared to the FedAvg algorithm.
summary: Federated learning enables edge devices to train a global model collaboratively without exposing their data. Despite achieving outstanding advantages in computing efficiency and privacy protection, federated learning faces a significant challenge when dealing with non-IID data, i.e., data generated by clients that are typically not independent and identically distributed. In this paper, we tackle a new type of Non-IID data, called cluster-skewed non-IID, discovered in actual data sets. The cluster-skewed non-IID is a phenomenon in which clients can be grouped into clusters with similar data distributions. By performing an in-depth analysis of the behavior of a classification model's penultimate layer, we introduce a metric that quantifies the similarity between two clients' data distributions without violating their privacy. We then propose an aggregation scheme that guarantees equality between clusters. In addition, we offer a novel local training regularization based on the knowledge-distillation technique that reduces the overfitting problem at clients and dramatically boosts the training scheme's performance. We theoretically prove the superiority of the proposed aggregation over the benchmark FedAvg. Extensive experimental results on both standard public datasets and our in-house real-world dataset demonstrate that the proposed approach improves accuracy by up to 16% compared to the FedAvg algorithm.
abstract_zh: 联合学习使边缘设备能够协作训练全局模型，而无需暴露其数据。尽管联邦学习在计算效率和隐私保护方面取得了突出的优势，但在处理非独立同分布数据（即客户端生成的数据通常不是独立且同分布的数据）时面临着重大挑战。在本文中，我们解决了在实际数据集中发现的一种新型非独立同分布数据，称为簇倾斜非独立同分布数据。集群偏斜非独立同分布是一种客户端可以被分组为具有相似数据分布的集群的现象。通过对分类模型倒数第二层的行为进行深入分析，我们引入了一种指标，可以在不侵犯客户隐私的情况下量化两个客户数据分布之间的相似性。然后，我们提出了一种保证集群之间平等的聚合方案。此外，我们提供了一种基于知识蒸馏技术的新颖的局部训练正则化，可以减少客户的过度拟合问题并显着提高训练方案的性能。我们从理论上证明了所提出的聚合相对于基准 FedAvg 的优越性。标准公共数据集和我们内部真实世界数据集的大量实验结果表明，与 FedAvg 算法相比，所提出的方法将准确性提高了 16%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CADIS方法，通过簇聚合和知识蒸馏正则化解决联邦学习中簇偏斜非独立同分布（Non-IID）数据的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习在处理非独立同分布数据时表现不佳，尤其当数据呈现簇偏斜特性时，导致模型准确率下降和训练不稳定。
AI.method: 通过分析分类模型倒数第二层行为量化客户端数据分布相似性，设计簇公平聚合方案，并引入基于知识蒸馏的本地正则化以减少过拟合。
AI.result: 在标准数据集和真实数据集上，CADIS相比FedAvg算法准确率提升最高达16%。
AI.conclusion: CADIS通过理论分析与实验验证，有效解决了簇偏斜Non-IID数据下的联邦学习问题，显著提升了模型性能。

tldr: 本文提出CADIS方法，通过簇聚合和知识蒸馏正则化解决联邦学习中簇偏斜非独立同分布（Non-IID）数据的挑战。
motivation: 现有联邦学习在处理非独立同分布数据时表现不佳，尤其当数据呈现簇偏斜特性时，导致模型准确率下降和训练不稳定。
method: 通过分析分类模型倒数第二层行为量化客户端数据分布相似性，设计簇公平聚合方案，并引入基于知识蒸馏的本地正则化以减少过拟合。
result: 在标准数据集和真实数据集上，CADIS相比FedAvg算法准确率提升最高达16%。
conclusion: CADIS通过理论分析与实验验证，有效解决了簇偏斜Non-IID数据下的联邦学习问题，显著提升了模型性能。
search_text: CADIS: Handling Cluster-skewed Non-IID Data in Federated Learning with Clustered Aggregation and Knowledge DIStilled Regularization CADIS：使用集群聚合和知识蒸馏正则化处理联邦学习中集群倾斜的非独立同分布数据 Federated learning enables edge devices to train a global model collaboratively without exposing their data. Despite achieving outstanding advantages in computing efficiency and privacy protection, federated learning faces a significant challenge when dealing with non-IID data, i.e., data generated by clients that are typically not independent and identically distributed. In this paper, we tackle a new type of Non-IID data, called cluster-skewed non-IID, discovered in actual data sets. The cluster-skewed non-IID is a phenomenon in which clients can be grouped into clusters with similar data distributions. By performing an in-depth analysis of the behavior of a classification model's penultimate layer, we introduce a metric that quantifies the similarity between two clients' data distributions without violating their privacy. We then propose an aggregation scheme that guarantees equality between clusters. In addition, we offer a novel local training regularization based on the knowledge-distillation technique that reduces the overfitting problem at clients and dramatically boosts the training scheme's performance. We theoretically prove the superiority of the proposed aggregation over the benchmark FedAvg. Extensive experimental results on both standard public datasets and our in-house real-world dataset demonstrate that the proposed approach improves accuracy by up to 16% compared to the FedAvg algorithm. 联合学习使边缘设备能够协作训练全局模型，而无需暴露其数据。尽管联邦学习在计算效率和隐私保护方面取得了突出的优势，但在处理非独立同分布数据（即客户端生成的数据通常不是独立且同分布的数据）时面临着重大挑战。在本文中，我们解决了在实际数据集中发现的一种新型非独立同分布数据，称为簇倾斜非独立同分布数据。集群偏斜非独立同分布是一种客户端可以被分组为具有相似数据分布的集群的现象。通过对分类模型倒数第二层的行为进行深入分析，我们引入了一种指标，可以在不侵犯客户隐私的情况下量化两个客户数据分布之间的相似性。然后，我们提出了一种保证集群之间平等的聚合方案。此外，我们提供了一种基于知识蒸馏技术的新颖的局部训练正则化，可以减少客户的过度拟合问题并显着提高训练方案的性能。我们从理论上证明了所提出的聚合相对于基准 FedAvg 的优越性。标准公共数据集和我们内部真实世界数据集的大量实验结果表明，与 FedAvg 算法相比，所提出的方法将准确性提高了 16%。 本文提出CADIS方法，通过簇聚合和知识蒸馏正则化解决联邦学习中簇偏斜非独立同分布（Non-IID）数据的挑战。 Nang Hung Nguyen,Duc Long Nguyen,Trong Bang Nguyen,Thanh-Hung Nguyen,Huy Hieu Pham,Truong Thao Nguyen,Phi Le Nguyen cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Weihu Song,Heng Yu
title: Non-pooling Network for medical image segmentation
title_zh: 用于医学图像分割的非池化网络
abstract: Existing studies tend tofocus onmodel modifications and integration with higher accuracy, which improve performance but also carry huge computational costs, resulting in longer detection times. Inmedical imaging, the use of time is extremely sensitive. And at present most of the semantic segmentation models have encoder-decoder structure or double branch structure. Their several times of the pooling use with high-level semantic information extraction operation cause information loss although there si a reverse pooling or other similar action to restore information loss of pooling operation. In addition, we notice that visual attention mechanism has superior performance on a variety of tasks. Given this, this paper proposes non-pooling network(NPNet), non-pooling commendably reduces the loss of information and attention enhancement m o d u l e ( A M ) effectively increases the weight of useful information. The method greatly reduces the number of parametersand computation costs by the shallow neural network structure. We evaluate the semantic segmentation model of our NPNet on three benchmark datasets comparing w i t h multiple current state-of-the-art(SOTA) models, and the implementation results show thatour NPNetachieves SOTA performance, with an excellent balance between accuracyand speed.
summary: Existing studies tend tofocus onmodel modifications and integration with higher accuracy, which improve performance but also carry huge computational costs, resulting in longer detection times. Inmedical imaging, the use of time is extremely sensitive. And at present most of the semantic segmentation models have encoder-decoder structure or double branch structure. Their several times of the pooling use with high-level semantic information extraction operation cause information loss although there si a reverse pooling or other similar action to restore information loss of pooling operation. In addition, we notice that visual attention mechanism has superior performance on a variety of tasks. Given this, this paper proposes non-pooling network(NPNet), non-pooling commendably reduces the loss of information and attention enhancement m o d u l e ( A M ) effectively increases the weight of useful information. The method greatly reduces the number of parametersand computation costs by the shallow neural network structure. We evaluate the semantic segmentation model of our NPNet on three benchmark datasets comparing w i t h multiple current state-of-the-art(SOTA) models, and the implementation results show thatour NPNetachieves SOTA performance, with an excellent balance between accuracyand speed.
abstract_zh: 现有的研究往往侧重于更高精度的模型修改和集成，这提高了性能，但也带来了巨大的计算成本，导致检测时间更长。在医学成像中，时间的使用极其敏感。目前大多数语义分割模型都具有编码器-解码器结构或双分支结构。尽管存在反向池化或其他类似操作来恢复池化操作的信息丢失，但它们与高级语义信息提取操作的多次池化使用导致信息丢失。此外，我们注意到视觉注意机制在各种任务上都具有优越的性能。鉴于此，本文提出非池化网络（NPNet），非池化显着减少了信息损失，注意力增强模块（AM）有效增加了有用信息的权重。该方法通过浅层神经网络结构大大减少了参数数量和计算成本。我们在三个基准数据集上评估了我们的 NPNet 的语义分割模型，并与多个当前最先进的（SOTA）模型进行比较，实现结果表明我们的 NPNet 实现了 SOTA 性能，在准确性和速度之间取得了良好的平衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种非池化网络（NPNet），用于医学图像分割，旨在减少信息损失并提升计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有医学图像分割模型依赖池化操作导致信息丢失且计算成本高，而医学影像对时间敏感，需在精度与速度间取得平衡。
AI.method: 设计非池化网络结构，结合注意力增强模块（AM）保留关键信息，并通过浅层网络降低参数量与计算量。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上，NPNet在保持高精度的同时显著提升推理速度，达到当前最优（SOTA）性能。
AI.conclusion: NPNet通过消除池化操作与引入注意力机制，有效解决了信息损失与计算效率问题，为医学图像分割提供新思路。

authors_text: Yuchen Wang,Jinghui Zhang,Zhengjie Huang,Weibin Li,Shikun Feng,Ziheng Ma,Yu Sun,Dianhai Yu,Fang Dong,Jiahui Jin,Beilun Wang,Junzhou Luo
title: Label Information Enhanced Fraud Detection against Low Homophily in Graphs
title_zh: 标签信息增强了针对图表中低同质性的欺诈检测
abstract: Node classification is a substantial problem in graph-based fraud detection. Many existing works adopt Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) to enhance fraud detectors. While promising, currently most GNN-based fraud detectors fail to generalize to the low homophily setting. Besides, label utilization has been proved to be significant factor for node classification problem. But we find they are less effective in fraud detection tasks due to the low homophily in graphs. In this work, we propose GAGA, a novel Group AGgregation enhanced TrAnsformer, to tackle the above challenges. Specifically, the group aggregation provides a portable method to cope with the low homophily issue. Such an aggregation explicitly integrates the label information to generate distinguishable neighborhood information. Along with group aggregation, an attempt towards end-to-end trainable group encoding is proposed which augments the original feature space with the class labels. Meanwhile, we devise two additional learnable encodings to recognize the structural and relational context. Then, we combine the group aggregation and the learnable encodings into a Transformer encoder to capture the semantic information. Experimental results clearly show that GAGA outperforms other competitive graph-based fraud detectors by up to 24.39% on two trending public datasets and a real-world industrial dataset from Anonymous. Even more, the group aggregation is demonstrated to outperform other label utilization methods (e.g., C&S, BoT/UniMP) in the low homophily setting.
summary: Node classification is a substantial problem in graph-based fraud detection. Many existing works adopt Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) to enhance fraud detectors. While promising, currently most GNN-based fraud detectors fail to generalize to the low homophily setting. Besides, label utilization has been proved to be significant factor for node classification problem. But we find they are less effective in fraud detection tasks due to the low homophily in graphs. In this work, we propose GAGA, a novel Group AGgregation enhanced TrAnsformer, to tackle the above challenges. Specifically, the group aggregation provides a portable method to cope with the low homophily issue. Such an aggregation explicitly integrates the label information to generate distinguishable neighborhood information. Along with group aggregation, an attempt towards end-to-end trainable group encoding is proposed which augments the original feature space with the class labels. Meanwhile, we devise two additional learnable encodings to recognize the structural and relational context. Then, we combine the group aggregation and the learnable encodings into a Transformer encoder to capture the semantic information. Experimental results clearly show that GAGA outperforms other competitive graph-based fraud detectors by up to 24.39% on two trending public datasets and a real-world industrial dataset from Anonymous. Even more, the group aggregation is demonstrated to outperform other label utilization methods (e.g., C&S, BoT/UniMP) in the low homophily setting.
abstract_zh: 节点分类是基于图的欺诈检测中的一个重要问题。许多现有的工作采用图神经网络（GNN）来增强欺诈检测器。虽然很有希望，但目前大多数基于 GNN 的欺诈检测器无法泛化到低同质性设置。此外，标签利用率已被证明是节点分类问题的重要因素。但我们发现，由于图表的同质性较低，它们在欺诈检测任务中效率较低。在这项工作中，我们提出了 GAGA，一种新型的 Group AGgregation 增强型 TrAnsformer，来应对上述挑战。具体来说，组聚合提供了一种可移植的方法来解决低同质性问题。这种聚合显式地集成标签信息以生成可区分的邻域信息。除了组聚合之外，还提出了一种端到端可训练组编码的尝试，该编码通过类标签增强了原始特征空间。同时，我们设计了两种额外的可学习编码来识别结构和关系上下文。然后，我们将组聚合和可学习编码结合到 Transformer 编码器中以捕获语义信息。实验结果清楚地表明，GAGA 在两个趋势公共数据集和来自 Anonymous 的真实工业数据集上的性能比其他基于图的欺诈检测器高出 24.39%。更重要的是，在低同质性设置中，组聚合被证明优于其他标签利用方法（例如 C&S、BoT/UniMP）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于标签信息增强的图欺诈检测方法GAGA，以解决低同质性图中欺诈检测的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图神经网络的欺诈检测方法在低同质性图中表现不佳，且标签信息利用不足，难以有效提升检测性能。
AI.method: 设计GAGA模型，通过组聚合整合标签信息生成可区分的邻域特征，并结合端到端可训练的组编码与结构/关系编码，集成至Transformer编码器中。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集和一个工业数据集上，GAGA相较其他方法提升最高达24.39%，且组聚合在低同质性场景下优于现有标签利用方法。
AI.conclusion: GAGA通过有效利用标签信息和结构特征，显著提升了低同质性图中欺诈检测的性能。

Then, we combine the group aggregation and the learnable encodings into a Transformer encoder to capture the semantic information. Even more, the group aggregation is demonstrated to outperform other label utilization methods (e.g., C&S, BoT/UniMP) in the low homophily setting. 节点分类是基于图的欺诈检测中的一个重要问题。许多现有的工作采用图神经网络（GNN）来增强欺诈检测器。虽然很有希望，但目前大多数基于 GNN 的欺诈检测器无法泛化到低同质性设置。此外，标签利用率已被证明是节点分类问题的重要因素。但我们发现，由于图表的同质性较低，它们在欺诈检测任务中效率较低。在这项工作中，我们提出了 GAGA，一种新型的 Group AGgregation 增强型 TrAnsformer，来应对上述挑战。具体来说，组聚合提供了一种可移植的方法来解决低同质性问题。这种聚合显式地集成标签信息以生成可区分的邻域信息。除了组聚合之外，还提出了一种端到端可训练组编码的尝试，该编码通过类标签增强了原始特征空间。同时，我们设计了两种额外的可学习编码来识别结构和关系上下文。然后，我们将组聚合和可学习编码结合到 Transformer 编码器中以捕获语义信息。实验结果清楚地表明，GAGA 在两个趋势公共数据集和来自 Anonymous 的真实工业数据集上的性能比其他基于图的欺诈检测器高出 24.39%。更重要的是，在低同质性设置中，组聚合被证明优于其他标签利用方法（例如 C&S、BoT/UniMP）。 本文提出一种基于标签信息增强的图欺诈检测方法GAGA，以解决低同质性图中欺诈检测的挑战。 Yuchen Wang,Jinghui Zhang,Zhengjie Huang,Weibin Li,Shikun Feng,Ziheng Ma,Yu Sun,Dianhai Yu,Fang Dong,Jiahui Jin,Beilun Wang,Junzhou Luo cs.AI

authors_text: Min Cen,Xingyu Li,Bangwei Guo,Jitendra Jonnagaddala,Hong Zhang,Xu Steven Xu
title: Time to Embrace Natural Language Processing (NLP)-based Digital Pathology: Benchmarking NLP- and Convolutional Neural Network-based Deep Learning Pipelines
title_zh: 是时候拥抱基于自然语言处理 (NLP) 的数字病理学了：对基于 NLP 和卷积神经网络的深度学习管道进行基准测试
abstract: NLP-based computer vision models, particularly vision transformers, have been shown to outperform CNN models in many imaging tasks. However, most digital pathology artificial-intelligence models are based on CNN architectures, probably owing to a lack of data regarding NLP models for pathology images. In this study, we developed digital pathology pipelines to benchmark the five most recently proposed NLP models (vision transformer (ViT), Swin Transformer, MobileViT, CMT, and Sequencer2D) and four popular CNN models (ResNet18, ResNet50, MobileNetV2, and EfficientNet) to predict biomarkers in colorectal cancer (microsatellite instability, CpG island methylator phenotype, and BRAF mutation). Hematoxylin and eosin-stained whole-slide images from Molecular and Cellular Oncology and The Cancer Genome Atlas were used as training and external validation datasets, respectively. Cross-study external validations revealed that the NLP-based models significantly outperformed the CNN-based models in biomarker prediction tasks, improving the overall prediction and precision up to approximately 10% and 26%, respectively. Notably, compared with existing models in the current literature using large training datasets, our NLP models achieved state-of-the-art predictions for all three biomarkers using a relatively small training dataset, suggesting that large training datasets are not a prerequisite for NLP models or transformers, and NLP may be more suitable for clinical studies in which small training datasets are commonly collected. The superior performance of Sequencer2D suggests that further research and innovation on both transformer and bidirectional long short-term memory architectures are warranted in the field of digital pathology. NLP models can replace classic CNN architectures and become the new workhorse backbone in the field of digital pathology.
summary: NLP-based computer vision models, particularly vision transformers, have been shown to outperform CNN models in many imaging tasks. However, most digital pathology artificial-intelligence models are based on CNN architectures, probably owing to a lack of data regarding NLP models for pathology images. In this study, we developed digital pathology pipelines to benchmark the five most recently proposed NLP models (vision transformer (ViT), Swin Transformer, MobileViT, CMT, and Sequencer2D) and four popular CNN models (ResNet18, ResNet50, MobileNetV2, and EfficientNet) to predict biomarkers in colorectal cancer (microsatellite instability, CpG island methylator phenotype, and BRAF mutation). Hematoxylin and eosin-stained whole-slide images from Molecular and Cellular Oncology and The Cancer Genome Atlas were used as training and external validation datasets, respectively. Cross-study external validations revealed that the NLP-based models significantly outperformed the CNN-based models in biomarker prediction tasks, improving the overall prediction and precision up to approximately 10% and 26%, respectively. Notably, compared with existing models in the current literature using large training datasets, our NLP models achieved state-of-the-art predictions for all three biomarkers using a relatively small training dataset, suggesting that large training datasets are not a prerequisite for NLP models or transformers, and NLP may be more suitable for clinical studies in which small training datasets are commonly collected. The superior performance of Sequencer2D suggests that further research and innovation on both transformer and bidirectional long short-term memory architectures are warranted in the field of digital pathology. NLP models can replace classic CNN architectures and become the new workhorse backbone in the field of digital pathology.
abstract_zh: 基于 NLP 的计算机视觉模型，特别是视觉 Transformer，已被证明在许多成像任务中优于 CNN 模型。然而，大多数数字病理人工智能模型都是基于 CNN 架构，这可能是由于缺乏有关病理图像 NLP 模型的数据。在这项研究中，我们开发了数字病理学流程，对最近提出的五种 NLP 模型（Vision Transformer (ViT)、Swin Transformer、MobileViT、CMT 和 Sequencer2D）和四种流行的 CNN 模型（ResNet18、ResNet50、MobileNetV2 和 EfficientNet）进行基准测试，以预测结直肠癌的生物标志物（微卫星不稳定性、CpG 岛甲基化表型和 BRAF 突变）。来自《分子和细胞肿瘤学》和《癌症基因组图谱》的苏木精和曙红染色的全玻片图像分别用作训练和外部验证数据集。交叉研究外部验证表明，基于 NLP 的模型在生物标志物预测任务中显着优于基于 CNN 的模型，将整体预测和精度分别提高了约 10% 和 26%。值得注意的是，与当前文献中使用大型训练数据集的现有模型相比，我们的 NLP 模型使用相对较小的训练数据集对所有三种生物标志物实现了最先进的预测，这表明大型训练数据集并不是 NLP 模型或 Transformer 的先决条件，并且 NLP 可能更适合通常收集小型训练数据集的临床研究。 Sequencer2D 的卓越性能表明，在数字病理学领域有必要对变压器和双向长短期记忆架构进行进一步的研究和创新。 NLP 模型可以取代经典的 CNN 架构，成为数字病理学领域新的主力骨干。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了基于自然语言处理（NLP）的模型与卷积神经网络（CNN）在数字病理学中的性能，验证NLP模型在生物标志物预测任务中的优越性。
AI.motivation: 尽管NLP模型（如视觉变换器）在图像任务中表现优于CNN，但数字病理学领域仍主要依赖CNN，可能因缺乏针对病理图像的NLP模型数据。
AI.method: 开发数字病理学流程，基准测试五种NLP模型（ViT、Swin Transformer等）和四种CNN模型（ResNet、MobileNet等），使用两个数据集预测结直肠癌的三个生物标志物。
AI.result: NLP模型在预测任务中整体准确率提升10%，精度提升26%；小数据集下仍达最优效果，且Sequencer2D模型表现尤为突出。
AI.conclusion: NLP模型可替代传统CNN成为数字病理学新主力架构，尤其适合小数据集的临床研究，需进一步探索Transformer与双向LSTM的创新应用。

authors_text: Dhaval Vyas,Awais Hameed Khan,Anabelle Cooper
title: Democratizing Making: Scaffolding Participation Using e-Waste to Engage Under-resourced Communities in Technology Design
title_zh: 民主化制造：利用电子垃圾搭建参与方式，让资源贫乏的社区参与技术设计
abstract: Maker culture and DIY practices are central to democratizing the design of technology; enabling non-designers (future end-users) to actively participate in the design process. However, little is known about how individuals from under-resourced communities and low socioeconomic status (SES) backgrounds, can practically leverage maker practices to design technology, creating value for themselves or their communities. To investigate this, we collaborated with an e-waste recycling centre, involving 24 participants (staff and low-SES volunteers) in two participatory maker workshop activities. Participants were provided with a generative e-waste toolkit, through which they repurposed e-waste materials and developed novel technology prototypes that created value from their perspectives and agendas. Our findings unpack three factors that influenced their making: balancing personal and community needs; incorporating convenience and productivity; and re-thinking sustainability and connection; and discuss strategies for scaffolding participation and engagement of under-resourced communities in making using an e-waste generative toolkit to democratize technology design.
summary: Maker culture and DIY practices are central to democratizing the design of technology; enabling non-designers (future end-users) to actively participate in the design process. However, little is known about how individuals from under-resourced communities and low socioeconomic status (SES) backgrounds, can practically leverage maker practices to design technology, creating value for themselves or their communities. To investigate this, we collaborated with an e-waste recycling centre, involving 24 participants (staff and low-SES volunteers) in two participatory maker workshop activities. Participants were provided with a generative e-waste toolkit, through which they repurposed e-waste materials and developed novel technology prototypes that created value from their perspectives and agendas. Our findings unpack three factors that influenced their making: balancing personal and community needs; incorporating convenience and productivity; and re-thinking sustainability and connection; and discuss strategies for scaffolding participation and engagement of under-resourced communities in making using an e-waste generative toolkit to democratize technology design.
abstract_zh: 创客文化和 DIY 实践是技术设计民主化的核心；使非设计师（未来的最终用户）能够积极参与设计过程。然而，对于来自资源贫乏社区和低社会经济地位 (SES) 背景的个人如何能够实际利用创客实践来设计技术，为自己或社区创造价值，人们知之甚少。为了调查这一问题，我们与电子废物回收中心合作，有 24 名参与者（工作人员和低 SES 志愿者）参加了两项参与式创客研讨会活动。参与者获得了一个生成性电子废物工具包，通过该工具包，他们可以重新利用电子废物材料，并开发出新颖的技术原型，从他们的观点和议程中创造价值。我们的研究结果揭示了影响其制作的三个因素：平衡个人和社区需求；结合便利性和生产力；并重新思考可持续性和联系；并讨论资源贫乏社区利用电子废物生成工具包实现技术设计民主化的支架参与和参与策略。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何通过电子垃圾工具包促进资源匮乏社区参与技术设计，推动技术民主化。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对低收入社区如何利用创客实践设计技术以创造自身价值的了解，需探索可行方法。
AI.method: 与电子垃圾回收中心合作，开展两个参与式工作坊，提供生成性电子垃圾工具包，让参与者改造材料并开发技术原型。
AI.result: 发现影响制作的三大因素：平衡个人与社区需求、便利性与生产力、可持续性与连接，并提出促进参与的策略。
AI.conclusion: 使用电子垃圾工具包及相应策略可有效促进低资源社区参与技术设计，推动民主化。

To investigate this, we collaborated with an e-waste recycling centre, involving 24 participants (staff and low-SES volunteers) in two participatory maker workshop activities. Participants were provided with a generative e-waste toolkit, through which they repurposed e-waste materials and developed novel technology prototypes that created value from their perspectives and agendas. Our findings unpack three factors that influenced their making: balancing personal and community needs; incorporating convenience and productivity; and re-thinking sustainability and connection; and discuss strategies for scaffolding participation and engagement of under-resourced communities in making using an e-waste generative toolkit to democratize technology design. 创客文化和 DIY 实践是技术设计民主化的核心；使非设计师（未来的最终用户）能够积极参与设计过程。然而，对于来自资源贫乏社区和低社会经济地位 (SES) 背景的个人如何能够实际利用创客实践来设计技术，为自己或社区创造价值，人们知之甚少。为了调查这一问题，我们与电子废物回收中心合作，有 24 名参与者（工作人员和低 SES 志愿者）参加了两项参与式创客研讨会活动。参与者获得了一个生成性电子废物工具包，通过该工具包，他们可以重新利用电子废物材料，并开发出新颖的技术原型，从他们的观点和议程中创造价值。我们的研究结果揭示了影响其制作的三个因素：平衡个人和社区需求；结合便利性和生产力；并重新思考可持续性和联系；并讨论资源贫乏社区利用电子废物生成工具包实现技术设计民主化的支架参与和参与策略。 本文探讨如何通过电子垃圾工具包促进资源匮乏社区参与技术设计，推动技术民主化。 Dhaval Vyas,Awais Hameed Khan,Anabelle Cooper cs.HC

authors_text: Anh-Dzung Doan,Bach Long Nguyen,Surabhi Gupta,Ian Reid,Markus Wagner,Tat-Jun Chin
title: Assessing Domain Gap for Continual Domain Adaptation in Object Detection
title_zh: 评估目标检测中持续域适应的域间隙
abstract: To ensure reliable object detection in autonomous systems, the detector must be able to adapt to changes in appearance caused by environmental factors such as time of day, weather, and seasons. Continually adapting the detector to incorporate these changes is a promising solution, but it can be computationally costly. Our proposed approach is to selectively adapt the detector only when necessary, using new data that does not have the same distribution as the current training data. To this end, we investigate three popular metrics for domain gap evaluation and find that there is a correlation between the domain gap and detection accuracy. Therefore, we apply the domain gap as a criterion to decide when to adapt the detector. Our experiments show that our approach has the potential to improve the efficiency of the detector's operation in real-world scenarios, where environmental conditions change in a cyclical manner, without sacrificing the overall performance of the detector. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/dadung/DGE-CDA.
summary: To ensure reliable object detection in autonomous systems, the detector must be able to adapt to changes in appearance caused by environmental factors such as time of day, weather, and seasons. Continually adapting the detector to incorporate these changes is a promising solution, but it can be computationally costly. Our proposed approach is to selectively adapt the detector only when necessary, using new data that does not have the same distribution as the current training data. To this end, we investigate three popular metrics for domain gap evaluation and find that there is a correlation between the domain gap and detection accuracy. Therefore, we apply the domain gap as a criterion to decide when to adapt the detector. Our experiments show that our approach has the potential to improve the efficiency of the detector's operation in real-world scenarios, where environmental conditions change in a cyclical manner, without sacrificing the overall performance of the detector. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/dadung/DGE-CDA.
abstract_zh: 为了确保自主系统中可靠的物体检测，探测器必须能够适应由环境因素（例如时间、天气和季节）引起的外观变化。不断调整探测器以适应这些变化是一个有前途的解决方案，但计算成本可能很高。我们提出的方法是仅在必要时使用与当前训练数据分布不同的新数据选择性地调整检测器。为此，我们研究了域差距评估的三个流行指标，发现域差距和检测精度之间存在相关性。因此，我们应用域间隙作为决定何时调整检测器的标准。我们的实验表明，我们的方法有可能提高探测器在环境条件以循环方式变化的现实场景中的运行效率，而不会牺牲探测器的整体性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/dadung/DGE-CDA 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于领域差距评估的持续领域适应方法，用于在目标检测中高效应对环境变化带来的外观差异。
AI.motivation: 自主系统需适应环境因素（如天气、时间）导致的外观变化，但持续适应检测器计算成本高，需寻找高效解决方案。
AI.method: 通过评估三种领域差距指标，发现其与检测准确率相关性，据此制定选择性适应策略：仅当领域差距超过阈值时触发模型适应。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在现实场景中可提升检测效率，尤其适用于环境条件周期性变化的场景，且不牺牲整体性能。
AI.conclusion: 基于领域差距的适应机制能有效平衡计算成本与性能，为持续领域适应提供实用解决方案。

ai_content.conclusion: 基于领域差距的适应机制能有效平衡计算成本与性能，为持续领域适应提供实用解决方案。

authors_text: Q. Vera Liao,Hariharan Subramonyam,Jennifer Wang,Jennifer Wortman Vaughan
title: Designerly Understanding: Information Needs for Model Transparency to Support Design Ideation for AI-Powered User Experience
title_zh: 设计性理解：模型透明度的信息需求，以支持人工智能驱动的用户体验的设计理念
comment: Accepted at ACM CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI 2023)
comments: Accepted at ACM CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI 2023)
abstract: Despite the widespread use of artificial intelligence (AI), designing user experiences (UX) for AI-powered systems remains challenging. UX designers face hurdles understanding AI technologies, such as pre-trained language models, as design materials. This limits their ability to ideate and make decisions about whether, where, and how to use AI. To address this problem, we bridge the literature on AI design and AI transparency to explore whether and how frameworks for transparent model reporting can support design ideation with pre-trained models. By interviewing 23 UX practitioners, we find that practitioners frequently work with pre-trained models, but lack support for UX-led ideation. Through a scenario-based design task, we identify common goals that designers seek model understanding for and pinpoint their model transparency information needs. Our study highlights the pivotal role that UX designers can play in Responsible AI and calls for supporting their understanding of AI limitations through model transparency and interrogation.
summary: Despite the widespread use of artificial intelligence (AI), designing user experiences (UX) for AI-powered systems remains challenging. UX designers face hurdles understanding AI technologies, such as pre-trained language models, as design materials. This limits their ability to ideate and make decisions about whether, where, and how to use AI. To address this problem, we bridge the literature on AI design and AI transparency to explore whether and how frameworks for transparent model reporting can support design ideation with pre-trained models. By interviewing 23 UX practitioners, we find that practitioners frequently work with pre-trained models, but lack support for UX-led ideation. Through a scenario-based design task, we identify common goals that designers seek model understanding for and pinpoint their model transparency information needs. Our study highlights the pivotal role that UX designers can play in Responsible AI and calls for supporting their understanding of AI limitations through model transparency and interrogation.
abstract_zh: 尽管人工智能 (AI) 得到广泛使用，但为人工智能驱动的系统设计用户体验 (UX) 仍然具有挑战性。用户体验设计师在理解人工智能技术（例如预先训练的语言模型）作为设计材料时面临着障碍。这限制了他们思考和决定是否、在何处以及如何使用人工智能的能力。为了解决这个问题，我们将有关人工智能设计和人工智能透明度的文献结合起来，探讨透明模型报告框架是否以及如何支持预训练模型的设计构思。通过采访 23 位用户体验从业者，我们发现从业者经常使用预先训练的模型，但缺乏对用户体验主导的构思的支持。通过基于场景的设计任务，我们确定了设计人员寻求模型理解的共同目标，并确定了他们的模型透明度信息需求。我们的研究强调了用户体验设计师在负责任的人工智能中可以发挥的关键作用，并呼吁通过模型透明度和询问来支持他们对人工智能局限性的理解。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了如何通过模型透明度框架支持设计师在AI驱动的用户体验设计中的构思过程。
AI.motivation: 尽管AI应用广泛，但用户体验设计师在理解预训练语言模型等AI技术时面临挑战，缺乏支持以AI为中心的设计构思工具。
AI.method: 通过访谈23名UX从业者并结合情景化设计任务，识别设计师在模型理解中的信息需求与目标。
AI.result: 发现从业者普遍使用预训练模型但缺乏UX主导的构思支持，并明确了设计师在模型透明度方面的关键信息需求。
AI.conclusion: 呼吁通过模型透明度与可解释性增强设计师对AI局限性的理解，强调UX设计师在负责任AI中的核心作用。
