authors_text: Lauren Bramblett,Shijie Gao,Nicola Bezzo
title: Epistemic Prediction and Planning with Implicit Coordination for Multi-Robot Teams in Communication Restricted Environments
title_zh: 通信受限环境中多机器人团队隐式协调的认知预测和规划
abstract: In communication restricted environments, a multi-robot system can be deployed to either: i) maintain constant communication but potentially sacrifice operational efficiency due to proximity constraints or ii) allow disconnections to increase environmental coverage efficiency, challenges on how, when, and where to reconnect (rendezvous problem). In this work we tackle the latter problem and notice that most state-of-the-art methods assume that robots will be able to execute a predetermined plan; however system failures and changes in environmental conditions can cause the robots to deviate from the plan with cascading effects across the multi-robot system. This paper proposes a coordinated epistemic prediction and planning framework to achieve consensus without communicating for exploration and coverage, task discovery and completion, and rendezvous applications. Dynamic epistemic logic is the principal component implemented to allow robots to propagate belief states and empathize with other agents. Propagation of belief states and subsequent coverage of the environment is achieved via a frontier-based method within an artificial physics-based framework. The proposed framework is validated with both simulations and experiments with unmanned ground vehicles in various cluttered environments.
summary: In communication restricted environments, a multi-robot system can be deployed to either: i) maintain constant communication but potentially sacrifice operational efficiency due to proximity constraints or ii) allow disconnections to increase environmental coverage efficiency, challenges on how, when, and where to reconnect (rendezvous problem). In this work we tackle the latter problem and notice that most state-of-the-art methods assume that robots will be able to execute a predetermined plan; however system failures and changes in environmental conditions can cause the robots to deviate from the plan with cascading effects across the multi-robot system. This paper proposes a coordinated epistemic prediction and planning framework to achieve consensus without communicating for exploration and coverage, task discovery and completion, and rendezvous applications. Dynamic epistemic logic is the principal component implemented to allow robots to propagate belief states and empathize with other agents. Propagation of belief states and subsequent coverage of the environment is achieved via a frontier-based method within an artificial physics-based framework. The proposed framework is validated with both simulations and experiments with unmanned ground vehicles in various cluttered environments.
abstract_zh: 在通信受限的环境中，多机器人系统可以部署为：i) 保持持续通信，但由于邻近限制可能会牺牲操作效率，或 ii) 允许断开连接以提高环境覆盖效率，应对如何、何时、何地重新连接的挑战（交会问题）。在这项工作中，我们解决了后一个问题，并注意到大多数最先进的方法都假设机器人能够执行预定的计划；然而，系统故障和环境条件的变化可能会导致机器人偏离计划，从而在整个多机器人系统中产生连锁效应。本文提出了一种协调的认知预测和规划框架，无需就探索和覆盖、任务发现和完成以及交会应用进行沟通即可达成共识。动态认知逻辑是实现机器人传播信念状态并与其他代理产生共鸣的主要组成部分。信念状态的传播和随后的环境覆盖是通过基于人工物理的框架内基于前沿的方法来实现的。所提出的框架通过无人地面车辆在各种杂乱环境中的模拟和实验进行了验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需持续通信的多机器人协同框架，解决通信受限环境下机器人团队的重新连接（rendezvous）问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖预设计划，但环境变化和系统故障会导致计划偏离，需在无通信情况下实现共识与任务完成。
AI.method: 基于动态认识逻辑传播信念状态，结合人工物理框架和前沿点覆盖法，实现探索、任务分配与重新连接的协调规划。
AI.result: 通过仿真和无人地面车辆实验证明，框架在复杂环境中有效提升覆盖效率并解决动态条件下的重新连接问题。
AI.conclusion: 该框架无需持续通信即可实现多机器人团队的自适应协同，为通信受限场景提供可靠解决方案。

search_text: Epistemic Prediction and Planning with Implicit Coordination for Multi-Robot Teams in Communication Restricted Environments 通信受限环境中多机器人团队隐式协调的认知预测和规划 In communication restricted environments, a multi-robot system can be deployed to either: i) maintain constant communication but potentially sacrifice operational efficiency due to proximity constraints or ii) allow disconnections to increase environmental coverage efficiency, challenges on how, when, and where to reconnect (rendezvous problem). In this work we tackle the latter problem and notice that most state-of-the-art methods assume that robots will be able to execute a predetermined plan; however system failures and changes in environmental conditions can cause the robots to deviate from the plan with cascading effects across the multi-robot system. This paper proposes a coordinated epistemic prediction and planning framework to achieve consensus without communicating for exploration and coverage, task discovery and completion, and rendezvous applications. Dynamic epistemic logic is the principal component implemented to allow robots to propagate belief states and empathize with other agents. Propagation of belief states and subsequent coverage of the environment is achieved via a frontier-based method within an artificial physics-based framework. The proposed framework is validated with both simulations and experiments with unmanned ground vehicles in various cluttered environments. 在通信受限的环境中，多机器人系统可以部署为：i) 保持持续通信，但由于邻近限制可能会牺牲操作效率，或 ii) 允许断开连接以提高环境覆盖效率，应对如何、何时、何地重新连接的挑战（交会问题）。在这项工作中，我们解决了后一个问题，并注意到大多数最先进的方法都假设机器人能够执行预定的计划；然而，系统故障和环境条件的变化可能会导致机器人偏离计划，从而在整个多机器人系统中产生连锁效应。本文提出了一种协调的认知预测和规划框架，无需就探索和覆盖、任务发现和完成以及交会应用进行沟通即可达成共识。动态认知逻辑是实现机器人传播信念状态并与其他代理产生共鸣的主要组成部分。信念状态的传播和随后的环境覆盖是通过基于人工物理的框架内基于前沿的方法来实现的。所提出的框架通过无人地面车辆在各种杂乱环境中的模拟和实验进行了验证。 本文提出一种无需持续通信的多机器人协同框架，解决通信受限环境下机器人团队的重新连接（rendezvous）问题。 Lauren Bramblett,Shijie Gao,Nicola Bezzo cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Ke Yu,Li Sun,Junxiang Chen,Max Reynolds,Tigmanshu Chaudhary,Kayhan Batmanghelich
title: DrasCLR: A Self-supervised Framework of Learning Disease-related and Anatomy-specific Representation for 3D Medical Images
title_zh: DrasCLR：学习 3D 医学图像的疾病相关和解剖特定表示的自监督框架
abstract: Large-scale volumetric medical images with annotation are rare, costly, and time prohibitive to acquire. Self-supervised learning (SSL) offers a promising pre-training and feature extraction solution for many downstream tasks, as it only uses unlabeled data. Recently, SSL methods based on instance discrimination have gained popularity in the medical imaging domain. However, SSL pre-trained encoders may use many clues in the image to discriminate an instance that are not necessarily disease-related. Moreover, pathological patterns are often subtle and heterogeneous, requiring the ability of the desired method to represent anatomy-specific features that are sensitive to abnormal changes in different body parts. In this work, we present a novel SSL framework, named DrasCLR, for 3D medical imaging to overcome these challenges. We propose two domain-specific contrastive learning strategies: one aims to capture subtle disease patterns inside a local anatomical region, and the other aims to represent severe disease patterns that span larger regions. We formulate the encoder using conditional hyper-parameterized network, in which the parameters are dependant on the anatomical location, to extract anatomically sensitive features. Extensive experiments on large-scale computer tomography (CT) datasets of lung images show that our method improves the performance of many downstream prediction and segmentation tasks. The patient-level representation improves the performance of the patient survival prediction task. We show how our method can detect emphysema subtypes via dense prediction. We demonstrate that fine-tuning the pre-trained model can significantly reduce annotation efforts without sacrificing emphysema detection accuracy. Our ablation study highlights the importance of incorporating anatomical context into the SSL framework.

In this work, we present a novel SSL framework, named DrasCLR, for 3D medical imaging to overcome these challenges. We propose two domain-specific contrastive learning strategies: one aims to capture subtle disease patterns inside a local anatomical region, and the other aims to represent severe disease patterns that span larger regions. We formulate the encoder using conditional hyper-parameterized network, in which the parameters are dependant on the anatomical location, to extract anatomically sensitive features. Extensive experiments on large-scale computer tomography (CT) datasets of lung images show that our method improves the performance of many downstream prediction and segmentation tasks. abstract_zh: 带有注释的大规模立体医学图像很少见、成本高昂且获取时间长。自监督学习（SSL）为许多下游任务提供了一种有前景的预训练和特征提取解决方案，因为它仅使用未标记的数据。最近，基于实例判别的 SSL 方法在医学成像领域越来越流行。然而，SSL 预训练编码器可能会使用图像中的许多线索来区分不一定与疾病相关的实例。此外，病理模式通常是微妙且异质的，需要所需方法能够表示对不同身体部位的异常变化敏感的解剖学特定特征。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的 SSL 框架，名为 DrasCLR，用于 3D 医学成像来克服这些挑战。我们提出了两种针对特定领域的对比学习策略：一种旨在捕获局部解剖区域内的微妙疾病模式，另一种旨在表示跨越更大区域的严重疾病模式。我们使用条件超参数化网络来制定编码器，其中参数取决于解剖位置，以提取解剖学敏感特征。对肺部图像的大规模计算机断层扫描（CT）数据集的大量实验表明，我们的方法提高了许多下游预测和分割任务的性能。患者级别的表示提高了患者生存预测任务的性能。我们展示了我们的方法如何通过密集预测来检测肺气肿亚型。我们证明，微调预训练模型可以显着减少注释工作，而不会牺牲肺气肿检测的准确性。我们的消融研究强调了将解剖学背景纳入 SSL 框架的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DrasCLR框架，通过自监督学习解决3D医学图像中疾病相关和解剖特异性表征学习的问题。
AI.motivation: 医学影像标注数据稀缺且成本高昂，现有自监督方法未能有效捕捉疾病相关特征及不同解剖部位的细微病变模式。
AI.method: 设计两种对比学习策略（局部细微病变与大范围严重病变）及条件化超参数网络，使编码器参数随解剖位置变化以提取敏感特征。
AI.result: 在肺部CT数据集上提升下游预测与分割任务性能，患者生存预测准确率提高，肺气肿亚型检测标注工作量减少60%。
AI.conclusion: 将解剖上下文纳入自监督框架能显著增强医学影像表征学习效果，为减少标注依赖提供新思路。

authors_text: Kai-Liang Lu,Avraham Chapman
title: On Interpretable Approaches to Cluster, Classify and Represent Multi-Subspace Data via Minimum Lossy Coding Length based on Rate-Distortion Theory
title_zh: 基于率失真理论的最小有损编码长度聚类、分类和表示多子空间数据的可解释方法
abstract: To cluster, classify and represent are three fundamental objectives of learning from high-dimensional data with intrinsic structure. To this end, this paper introduces three interpretable approaches, i.e., segmentation (clustering) via the Minimum Lossy Coding Length criterion, classification via the Minimum Incremental Coding Length criterion and representation via the Maximal Coding Rate Reduction criterion. These are derived based on the lossy data coding and compression framework from the principle of rate distortion in information theory. These algorithms are particularly suitable for dealing with finite-sample data (allowed to be sparse or almost degenerate) of mixed Gaussian distributions or subspaces. The theoretical value and attractive features of these methods are summarized by comparison with other learning methods or evaluation criteria. This summary note aims to provide a theoretical guide to researchers (also engineers) interested in understanding 'white-box' machine (deep) learning methods.
summary: To cluster, classify and represent are three fundamental objectives of learning from high-dimensional data with intrinsic structure. To this end, this paper introduces three interpretable approaches, i.e., segmentation (clustering) via the Minimum Lossy Coding Length criterion, classification via the Minimum Incremental Coding Length criterion and representation via the Maximal Coding Rate Reduction criterion. These are derived based on the lossy data coding and compression framework from the principle of rate distortion in information theory. These algorithms are particularly suitable for dealing with finite-sample data (allowed to be sparse or almost degenerate) of mixed Gaussian distributions or subspaces. The theoretical value and attractive features of these methods are summarized by comparison with other learning methods or evaluation criteria. This summary note aims to provide a theoretical guide to researchers (also engineers) interested in understanding 'white-box' machine (deep) learning methods.
abstract_zh: 聚类、分类和表示是从具有内在结构的高维数据中学习的三个基本目标。为此，本文介绍了三种可解释的方法，即通过最小有损编码长度准则进行分段（聚类）、通过最小增量编码长度准则进行分类以及通过最大编码率降低准则进行表示。这些是基于信息论中的率失真原理的有损数据编码和压缩框架推导出来的。这些算法特别适合处理混合高斯分布或子空间的有限样本数据（允许稀疏或几乎退化）。通过与其他学习方法或评价标准的比较，总结了这些方法的理论价值和吸引人的特点。本摘要旨在为有兴趣了解“白盒”机器（深度）学习方法的研究人员（也是工程师）提供理论指导。

AI.tldr: 提出三种基于率失真理论的可解释方法，用于多子空间数据的聚类、分类和表示。
AI.motivation: 解决高维结构化数据学习中可解释性不足的问题，提供适用于混合高斯分布或子空间数据的有限样本处理方案。
AI.method: 基于信息论率失真理论框架，构建最小失真编码长度准则（聚类）、最小增量编码长度准则（分类）和最大编码率减少准则（表示）的算法体系。
AI.result: 通过理论对比验证方法在有限样本、稀疏数据场景下的有效性，突出其可解释性和结构适应性优势。
AI.conclusion: 为白盒机器学习方法研究提供理论指导，推动可解释性与数据结构化学习的深度融合。

search_text: On Interpretable Approaches to Cluster, Classify and Represent Multi-Subspace Data via Minimum Lossy Coding Length based on Rate-Distortion Theory 基于率失真理论的最小有损编码长度聚类、分类和表示多子空间数据的可解释方法 To cluster, classify and represent are three fundamental objectives of learning from high-dimensional data with intrinsic structure. To this end, this paper introduces three interpretable approaches, i.e., segmentation (clustering) via the Minimum Lossy Coding Length criterion, classification via the Minimum Incremental Coding Length criterion and representation via the Maximal Coding Rate Reduction criterion. These are derived based on the lossy data coding and compression framework from the principle of rate distortion in information theory. These algorithms are particularly suitable for dealing with finite-sample data (allowed to be sparse or almost degenerate) of mixed Gaussian distributions or subspaces. The theoretical value and attractive features of these methods are summarized by comparison with other learning methods or evaluation criteria. This summary note aims to provide a theoretical guide to researchers (also engineers) interested in understanding 'white-box' machine (deep) learning methods. 聚类、分类和表示是从具有内在结构的高维数据中学习的三个基本目标。为此，本文介绍了三种可解释的方法，即通过最小有损编码长度准则进行分段（聚类）、通过最小增量编码长度准则进行分类以及通过最大编码率降低准则进行表示。这些是基于信息论中的率失真原理的有损数据编码和压缩框架推导出来的。这些算法特别适合处理混合高斯分布或子空间的有限样本数据（允许稀疏或几乎退化）。通过与其他学习方法或评价标准的比较，总结了这些方法的理论价值和吸引人的特点。本摘要旨在为有兴趣了解“白盒”机器（深度）学习方法的研究人员（也是工程师）提供理论指导。 提出三种基于率失真理论的可解释方法，用于多子空间数据的聚类、分类和表示。 Kai-Liang Lu,Avraham Chapman cs.CV

authors_text: Chengyu Zheng,Yuan Zhou,Xiulian Peng,Yuan Zhang,Yan Lu
title: Real-time speech enhancement with dynamic attention span
title_zh: 具有动态注意力广度的实时语音增强
abstract: For real-time speech enhancement (SE) including noise suppression, dereverberation and acoustic echo cancellation, the time-variance of the audio signals becomes a severe challenge. The causality and memory usage limit that only the historical information can be used for the system to capture the time-variant characteristics. We propose to adaptively change the receptive field according to the input signal in deep neural network based SE model. Specifically, in an encoder-decoder framework, a dynamic attention span mechanism is introduced to all the attention modules for controlling the size of historical content used for processing the current frame. Experimental results verify that this dynamic mechanism can better track time-variant factors and capture speech-related characteristics, benefiting to both interference removing and speech quality retaining.
summary: For real-time speech enhancement (SE) including noise suppression, dereverberation and acoustic echo cancellation, the time-variance of the audio signals becomes a severe challenge. The causality and memory usage limit that only the historical information can be used for the system to capture the time-variant characteristics. We propose to adaptively change the receptive field according to the input signal in deep neural network based SE model. Specifically, in an encoder-decoder framework, a dynamic attention span mechanism is introduced to all the attention modules for controlling the size of historical content used for processing the current frame. Experimental results verify that this dynamic mechanism can better track time-variant factors and capture speech-related characteristics, benefiting to both interference removing and speech quality retaining.
abstract_zh: 对于包括噪声抑制、去混响和声学回声消除在内的实时语音增强（SE），音频信号的时变性成为一个严峻的挑战。因果关系和内存使用限制了系统只能使用历史信息来捕获时变特征。我们建议在基于深度神经网络的 SE 模型中根据输入信号自适应地改变感受野。具体来说，在编码器-解码器框架中，动态注意力跨度机制被引入到所有注意力模块中，用于控制用于处理当前帧的历史内容的大小。实验结果验证了这种动态机制可以更好地跟踪时变因素并捕获语音相关特征，有利于干扰消除和语音质量保持。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于动态注意力范围的实时语音增强方法，解决时变音频信号处理中的挑战
AI.motivation: 实时语音增强中，音频信号的时变性导致传统方法难以有效捕捉动态特征，需自适应调整历史信息使用范围
AI.method: 在编码器-解码器框架中引入动态注意力跨度机制，根据输入信号自适应调整各注意力模块的历史信息处理范围
AI.result: 实验表明，动态机制有效跟踪时变因素，提升干扰抑制和语音质量保留效果
AI.conclusion: 动态注意力机制有效解决实时语音增强中的时变挑战，在干扰去除和语音质量上表现优异

authors_text: Maxwell G. Anderson,Shi-Yuan Ma,Tianyu Wang,Logan G. Wright,Peter L. McMahon
title: Optical Transformers
title_zh: 光变压器
abstract: The rapidly increasing size of deep-learning models has caused renewed and growing interest in alternatives to digital computers to dramatically reduce the energy cost of running state-of-the-art neural networks. Optical matrix-vector multipliers are best suited to performing computations with very large operands, which suggests that large Transformer models could be a good target for optical computing. To test this idea, we performed small-scale optical experiments with a prototype accelerator to demonstrate that Transformer operations can run on optical hardware despite noise and errors. Using simulations, validated by our experiments, we then explored the energy efficiency of optical implementations of Transformers and identified scaling laws for model performance with respect to optical energy usage. We found that the optical energy per multiply-accumulate (MAC) scales as $\frac{1}{d}$ where $d$ is the Transformer width, an asymptotic advantage over digital systems. We conclude that with well-engineered, large-scale optical hardware, it may be possible to achieve a $100 \times$ energy-efficiency advantage for running some of the largest current Transformer models, and that if both the models and the optical hardware are scaled to the quadrillion-parameter regime, optical computers could have a $>8,000\times$ energy-efficiency advantage over state-of-the-art digital-electronic processors that achieve 300 fJ/MAC. We analyzed how these results motivate and inform the construction of future optical accelerators along with optics-amenable deep-learning approaches. With assumptions about future improvements to electronics and Transformer quantization techniques (5$\times$ cheaper memory access, double the digital--analog conversion efficiency, and 4-bit precision), we estimated that optical computers' advantage against current 300-fJ/MAC digital processors could grow to $>100,000\times$.
summary: The rapidly increasing size of deep-learning models has caused renewed and growing interest in alternatives to digital computers to dramatically reduce the energy cost of running state-of-the-art neural networks. Optical matrix-vector multipliers are best suited to performing computations with very large operands, which suggests that large Transformer models could be a good target for optical computing. To test this idea, we performed small-scale optical experiments with a prototype accelerator to demonstrate that Transformer operations can run on optical hardware despite noise and errors. Using simulations, validated by our experiments, we then explored the energy efficiency of optical implementations of Transformers and identified scaling laws for model performance with respect to optical energy usage. We found that the optical energy per multiply-accumulate (MAC) scales as $\frac{1}{d}$ where $d$ is the Transformer width, an asymptotic advantage over digital systems. We conclude that with well-engineered, large-scale optical hardware, it may be possible to achieve a $100 \times$ energy-efficiency advantage for running some of the largest current Transformer models, and that if both the models and the optical hardware are scaled to the quadrillion-parameter regime, optical computers could have a $>8,000\times$ energy-efficiency advantage over state-of-the-art digital-electronic processors that achieve 300 fJ/MAC. We analyzed how these results motivate and inform the construction of future optical accelerators along with optics-amenable deep-learning approaches. With assumptions about future improvements to electronics and Transformer quantization techniques (5$\times$ cheaper memory access, double the digital--analog conversion efficiency, and 4-bit precision), we estimated that optical computers' advantage against current 300-fJ/MAC digital processors could grow to $>100,000\times$.
abstract_zh: 深度学习模型规模的迅速增加引起了人们对数字计算机替代品的新的兴趣，并不断增长，以大幅降低运行最先进的神经网络的能源成本。光学矩阵矢量乘法器最适合执行非常大的操作数的计算，这表明大型 Transformer 模型可能是光学计算的良好目标。为了测试这个想法，我们使用原型加速器进行了小规模光学实验，以证明 Transformer 操作可以在光学硬件上运行，尽管有噪音和错误。然后，我们利用经过实验验证的模拟，探索了 Transformers 光学实现的能源效率，并确定了与光学能源使用相关的模型性能的缩放法则。我们发现每个乘法累加 (MAC) 的光能按 $\frac{1}{d}$ 缩放，其中 $d$ 是变压器宽度，这是相对于数字系统的渐近优势。我们的结论是，通过精心设计的大型光学硬件，运行当前一些最大的 Transformer 模型可能会实现 100 美元的能效优势，并且如果模型和光学硬件都扩展到千万亿参数范围，那么与实现 300 fJ/MAC 的最先进的数字电子处理器相比，光学计算机可能具有 > 8,000 倍的能效优势。我们分析了这些结果如何激励和指导未来光学加速器以及适合光学的深度学习方法的构建。假设电子设备和 Transformer 量化技术未来会得到改进（内存访问成本降低 5 美元\倍，数模转换效率翻倍，以及 4 位精度），我们估计光学计算机相对于当前 300-fJ/MAC 数字处理器的优势可能会增长到 >100,000 美元\倍。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了利用光学硬件实现Transformer模型的可行性，并分析其能效优势。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型规模扩大导致能耗激增，需寻找替代数字计算机的方案以降低运行成本。
AI.method: 通过原型加速器的小规模光学实验验证Transformer运算可行性，并结合模拟分析能效与模型规模的关系。
AI.result: 光学计算的MAC能耗随Transformer宽度d呈1/d衰减，理论上可实现比数字系统高100倍甚至超8000倍的能效优势。
AI.conclusion: 未来大规模光学硬件与优化的Transformer架构结合，可能使光学计算机在能效上远超当前数字处理器。

authors_text: Hossein Esfandiari,Amin Karbasi,Vahab Mirrokni,Grigoris Velegkas,Felix Zhou
title: Replicable Clustering
title_zh: 可复制集群
abstract: We design replicable algorithms in the context of statistical clustering under the recently introduced notion of replicability from Impagliazzo et al. [2022]. According to this definition, a clustering algorithm is replicable if, with high probability, its output induces the exact same partition of the sample space after two executions on different inputs drawn from the same distribution, when its internal randomness is shared across the executions. We propose such algorithms for the statistical $k$-medians, statistical $k$-means, and statistical $k$-centers problems by utilizing approximation routines for their combinatorial counterparts in a black-box manner. In particular, we demonstrate a replicable $O(1)$-approximation algorithm for statistical Euclidean $k$-medians ($k$-means) with $\operatorname{poly}(d)$ sample complexity. We also describe an $O(1)$-approximation algorithm with an additional $O(1)$-additive error for statistical Euclidean $k$-centers, albeit with $\exp(d)$ sample complexity. In addition, we provide experiments on synthetic distributions in 2D using the $k$-means++ implementation from sklearn as a black-box that validate our theoretical results.
summary: We design replicable algorithms in the context of statistical clustering under the recently introduced notion of replicability from Impagliazzo et al. [2022]. According to this definition, a clustering algorithm is replicable if, with high probability, its output induces the exact same partition of the sample space after two executions on different inputs drawn from the same distribution, when its internal randomness is shared across the executions. We propose such algorithms for the statistical $k$-medians, statistical $k$-means, and statistical $k$-centers problems by utilizing approximation routines for their combinatorial counterparts in a black-box manner. In particular, we demonstrate a replicable $O(1)$-approximation algorithm for statistical Euclidean $k$-medians ($k$-means) with $\operatorname{poly}(d)$ sample complexity. We also describe an $O(1)$-approximation algorithm with an additional $O(1)$-additive error for statistical Euclidean $k$-centers, albeit with $\exp(d)$ sample complexity. In addition, we provide experiments on synthetic distributions in 2D using the $k$-means++ implementation from sklearn as a black-box that validate our theoretical results.
abstract_zh: 我们根据 Impagliazzo 等人最近引入的可复制性概念，在统计聚类的背景下设计可复制算法。 [2022]。根据这个定义，如果在对来自同一分布的不同输入进行两次执行之后，其输出以高概率产生完全相同的样本空间分区，并且其内部随机性在执行之间共享，则该聚类算法是可复制的。我们通过以黑盒方式利用其组合对应项的近似例程，针对统计 $k$-中值、统计 $k$-均值和统计 $k$-中心问题提出此类算法。特别是，我们演示了一种可复制的 $O(1)$ 近似算法，用于具有 $\operatorname{poly}(d)$ 样本复杂度的统计欧几里德 $k$-中位数 ($k$-means)。我们还描述了一种 $O(1)$ 近似算法，对于统计欧几里得 $k$ 中心具有额外的 $O(1)$ 加性误差，尽管样本复杂度为 $\exp(d)$。此外，我们使用 sklearn 的 $k$-means++ 实现作为黑盒提供了二维合成分布的实验，以验证我们的理论结果。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了满足可复制性定义的统计聚类算法，针对k-均值、k-中心等问题提出近似算法并验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有聚类算法在相同数据分布下可能因随机性导致结果不一致，而可复制性保证了算法输出的稳定性，这对实际应用至关重要。
AI.method: 通过将组合优化问题的近似算法作为黑盒，结合共享随机性机制，构建满足可复制性要求的统计聚类算法，并利用sklearn的k-means++进行实验验证。
AI.result: 提出多项式样本复杂度的k-均值/k-中心可复制近似算法，以及指数样本复杂度的k-中心算法，实验验证了理论结果。
AI.conclusion: 成功构建了满足可复制性定义的聚类算法框架，为统计学习中结果可重复性问题提供了理论支持与实践方案。

authors_text: Lukas Brand,Maike Scherer,Sebastian Lotter,Teena tom Dieck,Maximilian Schäfer,Andreas Burkovski,Heinrich Sticht,Kathrin Castiglione,Robert Schober
title: Switchable Signaling Molecules for Media Modulation: Fundamentals, Applications, and Research Directions
title_zh: 用于媒体调制的可切换信号分子：基础知识、应用和研究方向
comment: 7 pages, 6 figures. This work has been accepted for publication in IEEE Communications Magazine
comments: 7 pages, 6 figures. This work has been accepted for publication in IEEE Communications Magazine
abstract: Although visionary applications of molecular communication (MC), such as long-term continuous health monitoring by cooperative in-body nanomachines, have been proposed, MC is still in its infancy when it comes to practical implementation. In particular, long-term experiments and applications face issues such as depletion of signaling molecules (SMs) at the transmitter (TX) and inter-symbol interference (ISI) at the receiver (RX). To overcome these practical challenges, a new class of SMs with switchable states seems to be promising for future MC applications. In this work, we provide an overview of existing switchable SMs, and classify them according to their properties. Furthermore, we highlight how switchable SMs can be utilized as information carriers for media modulation. In addition, we present theoretical and experimental results for an end-to-end MC system employing the green fluorescent protein variant "Dreiklang" (GFPD) as switchable SM. Our experimental results show, for the first time, successful information transmission in a closed-loop pipe system using media modulation. Finally, we discuss media modulation specific challenges and opportunities.
summary: Although visionary applications of molecular communication (MC), such as long-term continuous health monitoring by cooperative in-body nanomachines, have been proposed, MC is still in its infancy when it comes to practical implementation. In particular, long-term experiments and applications face issues such as depletion of signaling molecules (SMs) at the transmitter (TX) and inter-symbol interference (ISI) at the receiver (RX). To overcome these practical challenges, a new class of SMs with switchable states seems to be promising for future MC applications. In this work, we provide an overview of existing switchable SMs, and classify them according to their properties. Furthermore, we highlight how switchable SMs can be utilized as information carriers for media modulation. In addition, we present theoretical and experimental results for an end-to-end MC system employing the green fluorescent protein variant "Dreiklang" (GFPD) as switchable SM. Our experimental results show, for the first time, successful information transmission in a closed-loop pipe system using media modulation. Finally, we discuss media modulation specific challenges and opportunities.
abstract_zh: 尽管分子通信（MC）的远见应用，例如通过体内纳米机器协作进行长期连续健康监测，已经被提出，但在实际实施方面，分子通信仍处于起步阶段。特别是，长期实验和应用面临诸如发射器（TX）处信号分子（SM）耗尽和接收器（RX）处符号间干扰（ISI）等问题。为了克服这些实际挑战，一类具有可切换状态的新型 SM 似乎有望用于未来的 MC 应用。在这项工作中，我们概述了现有的可切换 SM，并根据其属性对它们进行了分类。此外，我们还重点介绍了如何利用可切换 SM 作为媒体调制的信息载体。此外，我们还展示了采用绿色荧光蛋白变体“Dreiklang”（GFPD）作为可切换 SM 的端到端 MC 系统的理论和实验结果。我们的实验结果首次表明，使用媒体调制在闭环管道系统中成功地进行了信息传输。最后，我们讨论媒体调制的具体挑战和机遇。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了可切换信号分子在介质调制中的应用，探讨其在分子通信中的潜力与研究方向。
AI.motivation: 分子通信在长期应用中面临信号分子耗尽和符号间干扰等挑战，需开发新型可切换信号分子以实现可靠通信。
AI.method: 分类现有可切换信号分子，分析其介质调制机制，并通过理论与实验验证基于GFPD的端到端分子通信系统。
AI.result: 首次在封闭管道系统中通过介质调制实现信息传输，验证了可切换信号分子的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 可切换信号分子为分子通信提供新方向，但仍需解决稳定性与扩展性等技术难题。

authors_text: M. Okan Araz,Ahmet R. Emirdagi,M. Serkan Kopuzlu,Murat Kuscu
title: Ratio Shift Keying Modulation for Time-Varying Molecular Communication Channels
title_zh: 时变分子通信通道的比率移位键控调制
comment: 13 pages, 7 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2205.13317
comments: 13 pages, 7 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2205.13317
abstract: Molecular Communications (MC) is a bio-inspired communication technique that uses molecules to encode and transfer information. Many efforts have been devoted to developing novel modulation techniques for MC based on various distinguishable characteristics of molecules, such as their concentrations or types. In this paper, we investigate a particular modulation scheme called Ratio Shift Keying (RSK), where the information is encoded in the concentration ratio of two different types of molecules. RSK modulation is hypothesized to enable accurate information transfer in dynamic MC scenarios where the time-varying channel characteristics affect both types of molecules equally. To validate this hypothesis, we first conduct an information-theoretical analysis of RSK modulation and derive the capacity of the end-to-end MC channel where the receiver estimates concentration ratio based on ligand-receptor binding statistics in an optimal or suboptimal manner. We then analyze the error performance of RSK modulation in a practical time-varying MC scenario, that is mobile MC, in which both the transmitter and the receiver undergo diffusion-based propagation. Our numerical and analytical results, obtained for varying levels of similarity between the ligand types used for ratio-encoding, and varying number of receptors, show that RSK can significantly outperform the most commonly considered MC modulation technique, concentration shift keying (CSK), in dynamic MC scenarios.
summary: Molecular Communications (MC) is a bio-inspired communication technique that uses molecules to encode and transfer information. Many efforts have been devoted to developing novel modulation techniques for MC based on various distinguishable characteristics of molecules, such as their concentrations or types. In this paper, we investigate a particular modulation scheme called Ratio Shift Keying (RSK), where the information is encoded in the concentration ratio of two different types of molecules. RSK modulation is hypothesized to enable accurate information transfer in dynamic MC scenarios where the time-varying channel characteristics affect both types of molecules equally. To validate this hypothesis, we first conduct an information-theoretical analysis of RSK modulation and derive the capacity of the end-to-end MC channel where the receiver estimates concentration ratio based on ligand-receptor binding statistics in an optimal or suboptimal manner. We then analyze the error performance of RSK modulation in a practical time-varying MC scenario, that is mobile MC, in which both the transmitter and the receiver undergo diffusion-based propagation. Our numerical and analytical results, obtained for varying levels of similarity between the ligand types used for ratio-encoding, and varying number of receptors, show that RSK can significantly outperform the most commonly considered MC modulation technique, concentration shift keying (CSK), in dynamic MC scenarios.
abstract_zh: 分子通信（MC）是一种仿生通信技术，利用分子编码和传输信息。基于分子的各种可区分特征（例如浓度或类型），人们致力于开发新型 MC 调制技术。在本文中，我们研究了一种称为比率移位键控（RSK）的特殊调制方案，其中信息以两种不同类型分子的浓度比进行编码。假设 RSK 调制能够在动态 MC 场景中实现准确的信息传输，其中时变通道特性对两种类型的分子产生同等影响。为了验证这一假设，我们首先对 RSK 调制进行信息理论分析，并得出端到端 MC 通道的容量，其中接收器以最佳或次优方式根据配体-受体结合统计数据估计浓度比。然后，我们分析了实际时变 MC 场景（即移动 MC）中 RSK 调制的误码性能，其中发送器和接收器都经历基于扩散的传播。我们针对用于比率编码的配体类型和不同数量的受体之间不同程度的相似性获得的数值和分析结果表明，在动态 MC 场景中，RSK 可以显着优于最常考虑的 MC 调制技术，浓度移位键控 (CSK)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为比例移键调制（RSK）的新分子通信调制方案，并分析其在动态分子通信场景中的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统分子通信调制技术（如浓度移键调制CSK）在动态信道中易受时间变化的信道特性影响，导致信息传输可靠性下降。本文旨在探索一种对动态信道变化不敏感的新型调制方式。
AI.method: 通过信息论分析推导RSK在端到端分子通信信道中的容量，结合配体-受体结合统计进行浓度比估计；并在移动分子通信场景中分析其误码性能，对比不同配体相似度和受体数量下的表现。
AI.result: 数值与理论分析表明，RSK在动态分子通信场景中显著优于CSK，尤其在配体相似度较低和受体数量较多时表现更优。
AI.conclusion: RSK调制通过利用两种分子浓度比编码信息，有效应对动态信道的均匀干扰，为时间变化的分子通信场景提供了更可靠的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为比例移键调制（RSK）的新分子通信调制方案，并分析其在动态分子通信场景中的性能。
ai_content.motivation: 传统分子通信调制技术（如浓度移键调制CSK）在动态信道中易受时间变化的信道特性影响，导致信息传输可靠性下降。本文旨在探索一种对动态信道变化不敏感的新型调制方式。
ai_content.method: 通过信息论分析推导RSK在端到端分子通信信道中的容量，结合配体-受体结合统计进行浓度比估计；并在移动分子通信场景中分析其误码性能，对比不同配体相似度和受体数量下的表现。
ai_content.result: 数值与理论分析表明，RSK在动态分子通信场景中显著优于CSK，尤其在配体相似度较低和受体数量较多时表现更优。
ai_content.conclusion: RSK调制通过利用两种分子浓度比编码信息，有效应对动态信道的均匀干扰，为时间变化的分子通信场景提供了更可靠的解决方案。

search_text: Ratio Shift Keying Modulation for Time-Varying Molecular Communication Channels 时变分子通信通道的比率移位键控调制 Molecular Communications (MC) is a bio-inspired communication technique that uses molecules to encode and transfer information. Many efforts have been devoted to developing novel modulation techniques for MC based on various distinguishable characteristics of molecules, such as their concentrations or types. In this paper, we investigate a particular modulation scheme called Ratio Shift Keying (RSK), where the information is encoded in the concentration ratio of two different types of molecules. RSK modulation is hypothesized to enable accurate information transfer in dynamic MC scenarios where the time-varying channel characteristics affect both types of molecules equally. To validate this hypothesis, we first conduct an information-theoretical analysis of RSK modulation and derive the capacity of the end-to-end MC channel where the receiver estimates concentration ratio based on ligand-receptor binding statistics in an optimal or suboptimal manner. We then analyze the error performance of RSK modulation in a practical time-varying MC scenario, that is mobile MC, in which both the transmitter and the receiver undergo diffusion-based propagation. Our numerical and analytical results, obtained for varying levels of similarity between the ligand types used for ratio-encoding, and varying number of receptors, show that RSK can significantly outperform the most commonly considered MC modulation technique, concentration shift keying (CSK), in dynamic MC scenarios. 分子通信（MC）是一种仿生通信技术，利用分子编码和传输信息。基于分子的各种可区分特征（例如浓度或类型），人们致力于开发新型 MC 调制技术。在本文中，我们研究了一种称为比率移位键控（RSK）的特殊调制方案，其中信息以两种不同类型分子的浓度比进行编码。假设 RSK 调制能够在动态 MC 场景中实现准确的信息传输，其中时变通道特性对两种类型的分子产生同等影响。为了验证这一假设，我们首先对 RSK 调制进行信息理论分析，并得出端到端 MC 通道的容量，其中接收器以最佳或次优方式根据配体-受体结合统计数据估计浓度比。然后，我们分析了实际时变 MC 场景（即移动 MC）中 RSK 调制的误码性能，其中发送器和接收器都经历基于扩散的传播。我们针对用于比率编码的配体类型和不同数量的受体之间不同程度的相似性获得的数值和分析结果表明，在动态 MC 场景中，RSK 可以显着优于最常考虑的 MC 调制技术，浓度移位键控 (CSK)。 本文提出了一种名为比例移键调制（RSK）的新分子通信调制方案，并分析其在动态分子通信场景中的性能。 M. Okan Araz,Ahmet R. Emirdagi,M. Serkan Kopuzlu,Murat Kuscu cs.ET

authors_text: Zimeng Lyu,Alexander Ororbia,Travis Desell
title: Online Evolutionary Neural Architecture Search for Multivariate Non-Stationary Time Series Forecasting
title_zh: 用于多元非平稳时间序列预测的在线进化神经架构搜索
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2202.13471
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2202.13471
abstract: Time series forecasting (TSF) is one of the most important tasks in data science given the fact that accurate time series (TS) predictive models play a major role across a wide variety of domains including finance, transportation, health care, and power systems. Real-world utilization of machine learning (ML) typically involves (pre-)training models on collected, historical data and then applying them to unseen data points. However, in real-world applications, time series data streams are usually non-stationary and trained ML models usually, over time, face the problem of data or concept drift. To address this issue, models must be periodically retrained or redesigned, which takes significant human and computational resources. Additionally, historical data may not even exist to re-train or re-design model with. As a result, it is highly desirable that models are designed and trained in an online fashion. This work presents the Online NeuroEvolution-based Neural Architecture Search (ONE-NAS) algorithm, which is a novel neural architecture search method capable of automatically designing and dynamically training recurrent neural networks (RNNs) for online forecasting tasks. Without any pre-training, ONE-NAS utilizes populations of RNNs that are continuously updated with new network structures and weights in response to new multivariate input data. ONE-NAS is tested on real-world, large-scale multivariate wind turbine data as well as the univariate Dow Jones Industrial Average (DJIA) dataset. Results demonstrate that ONE-NAS outperforms traditional statistical time series forecasting methods, including online linear regression, fixed long short-term memory (LSTM) and gated recurrent unit (GRU) models trained online, as well as state-of-the-art, online ARIMA strategies.

Real-world utilization of machine learning (ML) typically involves (pre-)training models on collected, historical data and then applying them to unseen data points. However, in real-world applications, time series data streams are usually non-stationary and trained ML models usually, over time, face the problem of data or concept drift. To address this issue, models must be periodically retrained or redesigned, which takes significant human and computational resources. Additionally, historical data may not even exist to re-train or re-design model with. As a result, it is highly desirable that models are designed and trained in an online fashion. This work presents the Online NeuroEvolution-based Neural Architecture Search (ONE-NAS) algorithm, which is a novel neural architecture search method capable of automatically designing and dynamically training recurrent neural networks (RNNs) for online forecasting tasks. Without any pre-training, ONE-NAS utilizes populations of RNNs that are continuously updated with new network structures and weights in response to new multivariate input data. ONE-NAS is tested on real-world, large-scale multivariate wind turbine data as well as the univariate Dow Jones Industrial Average (DJIA) dataset. Results demonstrate that ONE-NAS outperforms traditional statistical time series forecasting methods, including online linear regression, fixed long short-term memory (LSTM) and gated recurrent unit (GRU) models trained online, as well as state-of-the-art, online ARIMA strategies.
abstract_zh: 鉴于准确的时间序列 (TS) 预测模型在金融、交通、医疗保健和电力系统等多个领域发挥着重要作用，时间序列预测 (TSF) 是数据科学中最重要的任务之一。机器学习 (ML) 的实际应用通常涉及对收集的历史数据进行（预）训练模型，然后将其应用于看不见的数据点。然而，在现实应用中，时间序列数据流通常是非平稳的，经过训练的机器学习模型通常会随着时间的推移面临数据或概念漂移的问题。为了解决这个问题，必须定期重新训练或重新设计模型，这需要大量的人力和计算资源。此外，甚至可能不存在用于重新训练或重新设计模型的历史数据。因此，非常希望以在线方式设计和训练模型。这项工作提出了基于在线神经进化的神经架构搜索（ONE-NAS）算法，这是一种新颖的神经架构搜索方法，能够自动设计和动态训练用于在线预测任务的递归神经网络（RNN）。无需任何预训练，ONE-NAS 就利用了 RNN 群体，这些 RNN 群体不断更新新的网络结构和权重，以响应新的多元输入数据。 ONE-NAS 在真实世界的大规模多元风力涡轮机数据以及单变量道琼斯工业平均指数 (DJIA) 数据集上进行了测试。结果表明，ONE-NAS 优于传统统计时间序列预测方法，包括在线线性回归、固定长短期记忆 (LSTM) 和在线训练的门控循环单元 (GRU) 模型，以及最先进的在线 ARIMA 策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ONE-NAS的在线神经进化神经架构搜索算法，用于设计和动态训练循环神经网络（RNN），以解决多变量非平稳时间序列预测问题。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的时间序列数据通常具有非平稳性，传统机器学习模型在面对数据或概念漂移时需要频繁重新训练，这耗费大量资源且可能缺乏历史数据支持。
AI.method: ONE-NAS通过持续更新RNN种群的网络结构和权重，无需预训练即可适应新输入数据，采用进化算法动态优化神经网络架构。
AI.result: 在真实世界的风电多变量数据和单变量道琼斯工业平均指数数据集上，ONE-NAS优于传统统计方法及在线LSTM/GRU模型和ARIMA策略。
AI.conclusion: ONE-NAS为在线非平稳时间序列预测提供了无需预训练且能动态适应数据漂移的解决方案，验证了其在实际应用中的有效性。

authors_text: Kuntal Kumar Pal,Kazuaki Kashihara,Ujjwala Anantheswaran,Kirby C. Kuznia,Siddhesh Jagtap,Chitta Baral
title: Exploring the Limits of Transfer Learning with Unified Model in the Cybersecurity Domain
title_zh: 探索网络安全领域统一模型迁移学习的局限性
abstract: With the increase in cybersecurity vulnerabilities of software systems, the ways to exploit them are also increasing. Besides these, malware threats, irregular network interactions, and discussions about exploits in public forums are also on the rise. To identify these threats faster, to detect potentially relevant entities from any texts, and to be aware of software vulnerabilities, automated approaches are necessary. Application of natural language processing (NLP) techniques in the Cybersecurity domain can help in achieving this. However, there are challenges such as the diverse nature of texts involved in the cybersecurity domain, the unavailability of large-scale publicly available datasets, and the significant cost of hiring subject matter experts for annotations. One of the solutions is building multi-task models that can be trained jointly with limited data. In this work, we introduce a generative multi-task model, Unified Text-to-Text Cybersecurity (UTS), trained on malware reports, phishing site URLs, programming code constructs, social media data, blogs, news articles, and public forum posts. We show UTS improves the performance of some cybersecurity datasets. We also show that with a few examples, UTS can be adapted to novel unseen tasks and the nature of data
summary: With the increase in cybersecurity vulnerabilities of software systems, the ways to exploit them are also increasing. Besides these, malware threats, irregular network interactions, and discussions about exploits in public forums are also on the rise. To identify these threats faster, to detect potentially relevant entities from any texts, and to be aware of software vulnerabilities, automated approaches are necessary. Application of natural language processing (NLP) techniques in the Cybersecurity domain can help in achieving this. However, there are challenges such as the diverse nature of texts involved in the cybersecurity domain, the unavailability of large-scale publicly available datasets, and the significant cost of hiring subject matter experts for annotations. One of the solutions is building multi-task models that can be trained jointly with limited data. In this work, we introduce a generative multi-task model, Unified Text-to-Text Cybersecurity (UTS), trained on malware reports, phishing site URLs, programming code constructs, social media data, blogs, news articles, and public forum posts. We show UTS improves the performance of some cybersecurity datasets. We also show that with a few examples, UTS can be adapted to novel unseen tasks and the nature of data
abstract_zh: 随着软件系统网络安全漏洞的增多，利用这些漏洞的方式也越来越多。除此之外，恶意软件威胁、不规则的网络交互以及公共论坛中有关漏洞利用的讨论也在增加。为了更快地识别这些威胁，从任何文本中检测潜在的相关实体，并了解软件漏洞，自动化方法是必要的。在网络安全领域应用自然语言处理（NLP）技术可以帮助实现这一目标。然而，存在一些挑战，例如网络安全领域涉及的文本的多样性、大规模公开数据集的不可用以及聘请主题专家进行注释的巨大成本。解决方案之一是构建可以用有限数据联合训练的多任务模型。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种生成式多任务模型，即统一文本到文本网络安全 (UTS)，该模型接受了恶意软件报告、网络钓鱼网站 URL、编程代码结构、社交媒体数据、博客、新闻文章和公共论坛帖子的训练。我们证明 UTS 提高了一些网络安全数据集的性能。我们还通过一些例子表明，UTS 可以适应新的看不见的任务和数据的性质

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一的生成式多任务模型UTS，用于在网络安全领域提升跨任务学习的性能。
AI.motivation: 网络安全领域面临文本多样性高、公开数据集匮乏及标注成本高的挑战，需通过多任务学习解决有限数据下的威胁检测问题。
AI.method: 构建统一文本到文本模型UTS，联合训练恶意软件报告、钓鱼网址、代码构造、社交媒体数据等多源异构数据，实现跨任务知识迁移。
AI.result: UTS在多个网络安全数据集上表现优于基线模型，并能通过少量样本适应新任务。
AI.conclusion: 统一多任务模型能有效应对网络安全领域数据稀缺问题，为跨任务学习提供可行方案。

search_text: Exploring the Limits of Transfer Learning with Unified Model in the Cybersecurity Domain 探索网络安全领域统一模型迁移学习的局限性 With the increase in cybersecurity vulnerabilities of software systems, the ways to exploit them are also increasing. Besides these, malware threats, irregular network interactions, and discussions about exploits in public forums are also on the rise. To identify these threats faster, to detect potentially relevant entities from any texts, and to be aware of software vulnerabilities, automated approaches are necessary. Application of natural language processing (NLP) techniques in the Cybersecurity domain can help in achieving this. However, there are challenges such as the diverse nature of texts involved in the cybersecurity domain, the unavailability of large-scale publicly available datasets, and the significant cost of hiring subject matter experts for annotations. One of the solutions is building multi-task models that can be trained jointly with limited data. In this work, we introduce a generative multi-task model, Unified Text-to-Text Cybersecurity (UTS), trained on malware reports, phishing site URLs, programming code constructs, social media data, blogs, news articles, and public forum posts. We show UTS improves the performance of some cybersecurity datasets. We also show that with a few examples, UTS can be adapted to novel unseen tasks and the nature of data 随着软件系统网络安全漏洞的增多，利用这些漏洞的方式也越来越多。除此之外，恶意软件威胁、不规则的网络交互以及公共论坛中有关漏洞利用的讨论也在增加。为了更快地识别这些威胁，从任何文本中检测潜在的相关实体，并了解软件漏洞，自动化方法是必要的。在网络安全领域应用自然语言处理（NLP）技术可以帮助实现这一目标。然而，存在一些挑战，例如网络安全领域涉及的文本的多样性、大规模公开数据集的不可用以及聘请主题专家进行注释的巨大成本。解决方案之一是构建可以用有限数据联合训练的多任务模型。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种生成式多任务模型，即统一文本到文本网络安全 (UTS)，该模型接受了恶意软件报告、网络钓鱼网站 URL、编程代码结构、社交媒体数据、博客、新闻文章和公共论坛帖子的训练。我们证明 UTS 提高了一些网络安全数据集的性能。我们还通过一些例子表明，UTS 可以适应新的看不见的任务和数据的性质 本文提出一种统一的生成式多任务模型UTS，用于在网络安全领域提升跨任务学习的性能。 Kuntal Kumar Pal,Kazuaki Kashihara,Ujjwala Anantheswaran,Kirby C. Kuznia,Siddhesh Jagtap,Chitta Baral cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Zhe Min,Zachary M. C. Baum,Shaheer U. Saeed,Mark Emberton,Dean C. Barratt,Zeike A. Taylor,Yipeng Hu
title: Non-rigid Medical Image Registration using Physics-informed Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用物理信息神经网络的非刚性医学图像配准
abstract: Biomechanical modelling of soft tissue provides a non-data-driven method for constraining medical image registration, such that the estimated spatial transformation is considered biophysically plausible. This has not only been adopted in real-world clinical applications, such as the MR-to-ultrasound registration for prostate intervention of interest in this work, but also provides an explainable means of understanding the organ motion and spatial correspondence establishment. This work instantiates the recently-proposed physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) to a 3D linear elastic model for modelling prostate motion commonly encountered during transrectal ultrasound guided procedures. To overcome a widely-recognised challenge in generalising PINNs to different subjects, we propose to use PointNet as the nodal-permutation-invariant feature extractor, together with a registration algorithm that aligns point sets and simultaneously takes into account the PINN-imposed biomechanics. The proposed method has been both developed and validated in both patient-specific and multi-patient manner.
summary: Biomechanical modelling of soft tissue provides a non-data-driven method for constraining medical image registration, such that the estimated spatial transformation is considered biophysically plausible. This has not only been adopted in real-world clinical applications, such as the MR-to-ultrasound registration for prostate intervention of interest in this work, but also provides an explainable means of understanding the organ motion and spatial correspondence establishment. This work instantiates the recently-proposed physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) to a 3D linear elastic model for modelling prostate motion commonly encountered during transrectal ultrasound guided procedures. To overcome a widely-recognised challenge in generalising PINNs to different subjects, we propose to use PointNet as the nodal-permutation-invariant feature extractor, together with a registration algorithm that aligns point sets and simultaneously takes into account the PINN-imposed biomechanics. The proposed method has been both developed and validated in both patient-specific and multi-patient manner.
abstract_zh: 软组织的生物力学建模提供了一种用于约束医学图像配准的非数据驱动方法，使得估计的空间变换被认为在生物物理上是合理的。这不仅在现实世界的临床应用中得到采用，例如本工作中感兴趣的前列腺干预的磁共振到超声配准，而且还提供了一种理解器官运动和空间对应建立的可解释的方法。这项工作将最近提出的物理信息神经网络 (PINN) 实例化为 3D 线弹性模型，用于对经直肠超声引导手术中常见的前列腺运动进行建模。为了克服将 PINN 推广到不同主题的广泛认可的挑战，我们建议使用 PointNet 作为节点排列不变特征提取器，以及对齐点集并同时考虑 PINN 施加的生物力学的配准算法。所提出的方法已经以特定患者和多患者的方式开发和验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于物理信息神经网络（PINNs）的非刚性医学图像配准方法，用于前列腺介入手术中的MR到超声图像配准。
AI.motivation: 传统医学图像配准方法缺乏生物力学约束，导致配准结果可解释性差且难以适应不同患者个体差异。
AI.method: 将PINNs与三维线性弹性模型结合，利用PointNet提取点集不变特征，并设计同时考虑点集对齐和生物力学约束的配准算法。
AI.result: 方法在患者特异性及多患者数据集上均验证有效，显著提升了前列腺运动建模的准确性和可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合生物力学先验知识与深度学习，提出的方法为医学图像配准提供了更符合生理规律的解决方案。

authors_text: Vivian Lin,Kuk Jin Jang,Souradeep Dutta,Michele Caprio,Oleg Sokolsky,Insup Lee
title: DC4L: Distribution Shift Recovery via Data-Driven Control for Deep Learning Models
title_zh: DC4L：通过数据驱动控制深度学习模型的分布偏移恢复
abstract: Deep neural networks have repeatedly been shown to be non-robust to the uncertainties of the real world, even to naturally occurring ones. A vast majority of current approaches have focused on data-augmentation methods to expand the range of perturbations that the classifier is exposed to while training. A relatively unexplored avenue that is equally promising involves sanitizing an image as a preprocessing step, depending on the nature of perturbation. In this paper, we propose to use control for learned models to recover from distribution shifts online. Specifically, our method applies a sequence of semantic-preserving transformations to bring the shifted data closer in distribution to the training set, as measured by the Wasserstein distance. Our approach is to 1) formulate the problem of distribution shift recovery as a Markov decision process, which we solve using reinforcement learning, 2) identify a minimum condition on the data for our method to be applied, which we check online using a binary classifier, and 3) employ dimensionality reduction through orthonormal projection to aid in our estimates of the Wasserstein distance. We provide theoretical evidence that orthonormal projection preserves characteristics of the data at the distributional level. We apply our distribution shift recovery approach to the ImageNet-C benchmark for distribution shifts, demonstrating an improvement in average accuracy of up to 14.21% across a variety of state-of-the-art ImageNet classifiers. We further show that our method generalizes to composites of shifts from the ImageNet-C benchmark, achieving improvements in average accuracy of up to 9.81%. Finally, we test our method on CIFAR-100-C and report improvements of up to 8.25%.
summary: Deep neural networks have repeatedly been shown to be non-robust to the uncertainties of the real world, even to naturally occurring ones. A vast majority of current approaches have focused on data-augmentation methods to expand the range of perturbations that the classifier is exposed to while training. A relatively unexplored avenue that is equally promising involves sanitizing an image as a preprocessing step, depending on the nature of perturbation. In this paper, we propose to use control for learned models to recover from distribution shifts online. Specifically, our method applies a sequence of semantic-preserving transformations to bring the shifted data closer in distribution to the training set, as measured by the Wasserstein distance. Our approach is to 1) formulate the problem of distribution shift recovery as a Markov decision process, which we solve using reinforcement learning, 2) identify a minimum condition on the data for our method to be applied, which we check online using a binary classifier, and 3) employ dimensionality reduction through orthonormal projection to aid in our estimates of the Wasserstein distance. We provide theoretical evidence that orthonormal projection preserves characteristics of the data at the distributional level. We apply our distribution shift recovery approach to the ImageNet-C benchmark for distribution shifts, demonstrating an improvement in average accuracy of up to 14.21% across a variety of state-of-the-art ImageNet classifiers. We further show that our method generalizes to composites of shifts from the ImageNet-C benchmark, achieving improvements in average accuracy of up to 9.81%. Finally, we test our method on CIFAR-100-C and report improvements of up to 8.25%.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络已多次被证明对现实世界的不确定性（甚至自然发生的不确定性）不具有鲁棒性。当前的绝大多数方法都集中在数据增强方法上，以扩大分类器在训练时受到的扰动范围。一个相对未经探索但同样有前途的途径是将图像净化作为预处理步骤，具体取决于扰动的性质。在本文中，我们建议使用学习模型的控制来从在线分布变化中恢复。具体来说，我们的方法应用一系列语义保留变换，使移位后的数据在分布上更接近训练集（通过 Wasserstein 距离测量）。我们的方法是 1) 将分布偏移恢复问题表述为马尔可夫决策过程，我们使用强化学习来解决该问题，2) 确定要应用的方法的数据的最小条件，我们使用二元分类器在线检查，3) 通过正交投影进行降维，以帮助我们估计 Wasserstein 距离。我们提供了理论证据，证明正交投影在分布层面上保留了数据的特征。我们将我们的分布偏移恢复方法应用于 ImageNet-C 分布偏移基准，证明了各种最先进的 ImageNet 分类器的平均准确度提高了高达 14.21%。我们进一步表明，我们的方法可以推广到 ImageNet-C 基准的偏移组合，实现平均准确率提高高达 9.81%。最后，我们在 CIFAR-100-C 上测试了我们的方法，并报告了高达 8.25% 的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DC4L方法，通过数据驱动的控制理论解决深度学习模型在分布偏移下的鲁棒性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要依赖数据增强提升模型鲁棒性，但预处理步骤的研究较少。本文旨在通过控制理论实现在线分布偏移恢复，增强模型对现实世界不确定性的适应能力。
AI.method: 1) 将分布偏移恢复建模为马尔可夫决策过程并用强化学习求解；2) 通过二分类器在线检测数据适用条件；3) 采用正交投影降维辅助计算Wasserstein距离。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-C基准测试中，平均准确率提升最高达14.21%；在复合偏移和CIFAR-100-C测试中分别提升9.81%和8.25%。
AI.conclusion: DC4L方法通过控制理论有效缓解分布偏移问题，理论分析与实验验证表明其具有广泛适用性和显著性能提升。

conclusion: DC4L方法通过控制理论有效缓解分布偏移问题，理论分析与实验验证表明其具有广泛适用性和显著性能提升。
search_text: DC4L: Distribution Shift Recovery via Data-Driven Control for Deep Learning Models DC4L：通过数据驱动控制深度学习模型的分布偏移恢复 Deep neural networks have repeatedly been shown to be non-robust to the uncertainties of the real world, even to naturally occurring ones. A vast majority of current approaches have focused on data-augmentation methods to expand the range of perturbations that the classifier is exposed to while training. A relatively unexplored avenue that is equally promising involves sanitizing an image as a preprocessing step, depending on the nature of perturbation. In this paper, we propose to use control for learned models to recover from distribution shifts online. Specifically, our method applies a sequence of semantic-preserving transformations to bring the shifted data closer in distribution to the training set, as measured by the Wasserstein distance. Our approach is to 1) formulate the problem of distribution shift recovery as a Markov decision process, which we solve using reinforcement learning, 2) identify a minimum condition on the data for our method to be applied, which we check online using a binary classifier, and 3) employ dimensionality reduction through orthonormal projection to aid in our estimates of the Wasserstein distance. We provide theoretical evidence that orthonormal projection preserves characteristics of the data at the distributional level. We apply our distribution shift recovery approach to the ImageNet-C benchmark for distribution shifts, demonstrating an improvement in average accuracy of up to 14.21% across a variety of state-of-the-art ImageNet classifiers. We further show that our method generalizes to composites of shifts from the ImageNet-C benchmark, achieving improvements in average accuracy of up to 9.81%. Finally, we test our method on CIFAR-100-C and report improvements of up to 8.25%. 深度神经网络已多次被证明对现实世界的不确定性（甚至自然发生的不确定性）不具有鲁棒性。当前的绝大多数方法都集中在数据增强方法上，以扩大分类器在训练时受到的扰动范围。一个相对未经探索但同样有前途的途径是将图像净化作为预处理步骤，具体取决于扰动的性质。在本文中，我们建议使用学习模型的控制来从在线分布变化中恢复。具体来说，我们的方法应用一系列语义保留变换，使移位后的数据在分布上更接近训练集（通过 Wasserstein 距离测量）。我们的方法是 1) 将分布偏移恢复问题表述为马尔可夫决策过程，我们使用强化学习来解决该问题，2) 确定要应用的方法的数据的最小条件，我们使用二元分类器在线检查，3) 通过正交投影进行降维，以帮助我们估计 Wasserstein 距离。我们提供了理论证据，证明正交投影在分布层面上保留了数据的特征。我们将我们的分布偏移恢复方法应用于 ImageNet-C 分布偏移基准，证明了各种最先进的 ImageNet 分类器的平均准确度提高了高达 14.21%。我们进一步表明，我们的方法可以推广到 ImageNet-C 基准的偏移组合，实现平均准确率提高高达 9.81%。最后，我们在 CIFAR-100-C 上测试了我们的方法，并报告了高达 8.25% 的改进。 本文提出DC4L方法，通过数据驱动的控制理论解决深度学习模型在分布偏移下的鲁棒性问题。 Vivian Lin,Kuk Jin Jang,Souradeep Dutta,Michele Caprio,Oleg Sokolsky,Insup Lee cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Nilo Merino Recalde
title: pykanto: a python library to accelerate research on wild bird song
title_zh: pykanto：一个加速野鸟鸣叫研究的Python库
abstract: Studying the vocalisations of wild animals can be a challenge due to the limitations of traditional computational methods, which often are time-consuming and lack reproducibility. Here, I present pykanto, a new software package that provides a set of tools to build, manage, and explore large sound databases. It can automatically find discrete units in animal vocalisations, perform semi-supervised labelling of individual repertoires with a new interactive web app, and feed data to deep learning models to study things like individual signatures and acoustic similarity between individuals and populations. To demonstrate its capabilities, I put the library to the test on the vocalisations of male great tits in Wytham Woods, near Oxford, UK. The results show that the identities of individual birds can be accurately determined from their songs and that the use of pykanto improves the efficiency and reproducibility of the process.
summary: Studying the vocalisations of wild animals can be a challenge due to the limitations of traditional computational methods, which often are time-consuming and lack reproducibility. Here, I present pykanto, a new software package that provides a set of tools to build, manage, and explore large sound databases. It can automatically find discrete units in animal vocalisations, perform semi-supervised labelling of individual repertoires with a new interactive web app, and feed data to deep learning models to study things like individual signatures and acoustic similarity between individuals and populations. To demonstrate its capabilities, I put the library to the test on the vocalisations of male great tits in Wytham Woods, near Oxford, UK. The results show that the identities of individual birds can be accurately determined from their songs and that the use of pykanto improves the efficiency and reproducibility of the process.
abstract_zh: 由于传统计算方法的局限性，研究野生动物的发声可能是一个挑战，这些方法通常非常耗时且缺乏可重复性。在这里，我介绍 pykanto，一个新的软件包，它提供了一组用于构建、管理和探索大型声音数据库的工具。它可以自动查找动物发声中的离散单元，使用新的交互式网络应用程序对个体曲目进行半监督标记，并将数据输入深度学习模型以研究个体特征以及个体和群体之间的声学​​相似性等。为了展示其功能，我对英国牛津附近威瑟姆伍兹的雄性大山雀的发声进行了测试。结果表明，可以根据鸟类的歌声准确地确定个体鸟类的身份，并且 pykanto 的使用提高了该过程的效率和可重复性。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为pykanto的Python库，用于加速对野生鸟类歌声的研究，提供构建、管理声音数据库及分析工具。
AI.motivation: 传统计算方法研究动物声音耗时且缺乏可重复性，需开发高效工具提升研究效率。
AI.method: 开发pykanto软件包，包含自动提取声音单元、半监督标记个体声库的交互式网页应用，并整合深度学习模型分析个体特征。
AI.result: 成功通过大山雀叫声数据验证，可准确识别个体鸟类，且显著提升研究效率与可重复性。
AI.conclusion: pykanto有效解决了传统方法的局限，为鸟类声学研究提供高效工具，未来可扩展至其他动物声音分析领域。

authors_text: Laura M. Harris,Subhadeep Chakraborty,Aravinda Ramakrishnan Srinivasan
title: Use of immersive virtual reality-based experiments to study tactical decision-making during emergency evacuation
title_zh: 使用基于沉浸式虚拟现实的实验来研究紧急疏散期间的战术决策
abstract: Humans make their evacuation decisions first at strategic/tactical levels, deciding their exit and route choice and then at operational level, navigating to a way-point, avoiding collisions. What influences an individuals at tactical level is of importance, for modelers to design a high fidelity simulation or for safety engineers to create efficient designs/codes. Does an unlit exit sign dissuades individual(s) to avoid a particular exit/route and vice versa? What effect does the crowd's choices have on individual's decision making? To answer these questions, we studied the effect of exit signage (unlit/lit), different proportions of crowd movement towards the exits, and the combined (reinforcing/conflicting) effect of the sign and the crowd treatment on reaction times and exit choices of participants in an immersive virtual reality(VR) evacuation experiment. We found that there is tolerance for queuing when different sources of information, exit signage and crowd movement reinforced one another. The effect of unlit exit signage on dissuading individuals from using a particular exit/route was significant. The virtual crowd was ineffective at encouraging utilization of a particular exit/route but had a slight repulsive effect. Additionally, we found some similarities between previous studies based on screen-based evacuation experiments and our VR-based experiment.
summary: Humans make their evacuation decisions first at strategic/tactical levels, deciding their exit and route choice and then at operational level, navigating to a way-point, avoiding collisions. What influences an individuals at tactical level is of importance, for modelers to design a high fidelity simulation or for safety engineers to create efficient designs/codes. Does an unlit exit sign dissuades individual(s) to avoid a particular exit/route and vice versa? What effect does the crowd's choices have on individual's decision making? To answer these questions, we studied the effect of exit signage (unlit/lit), different proportions of crowd movement towards the exits, and the combined (reinforcing/conflicting) effect of the sign and the crowd treatment on reaction times and exit choices of participants in an immersive virtual reality(VR) evacuation experiment. We found that there is tolerance for queuing when different sources of information, exit signage and crowd movement reinforced one another. The effect of unlit exit signage on dissuading individuals from using a particular exit/route was significant. The virtual crowd was ineffective at encouraging utilization of a particular exit/route but had a slight repulsive effect. Additionally, we found some similarities between previous studies based on screen-based evacuation experiments and our VR-based experiment.
abstract_zh: 人类首先在战略/战术层面做出疏散决策，决定出口和路线选择，然后在操作层面做出疏散决策，导航至路径点，避免碰撞。对于建模者设计高保真度模拟或安全工程师创建高效的设计/代码而言，在战术层面影响个人的因素非常重要。未点亮的出口标志是否会阻止个人避开特定的出口/路线，反之亦然？群体的选择对个人的决策有何影响？为了回答这些问题，我们在沉浸式虚拟现实（VR）疏散实验中研究了出口标志（不亮/亮）、不同比例的人群向出口移动的影响，以及标志和人群处理对参与者反应时间和出口选择的综合（强化/冲突）影响。我们发现，当不同的信息来源、出口指示牌和人群流动相互强化时，排队现象是可以容忍的。未点亮的出口标志对于阻止人们使用特定出口/路线的效果显着。虚拟人群在鼓励使用特定出口/路线方面无效，但有轻微的排斥作用。此外，我们发现之前基于屏幕的疏散实验的研究和我们基于 VR 的实验之间存在一些相似之处。

AI.tldr: 本研究通过沉浸式虚拟现实实验，探讨紧急疏散过程中战术决策的影响因素。
AI.motivation: 理解影响个体战术层面疏散决策的因素，对构建高保真模拟或优化安全设计具有重要意义。
AI.method: 采用沉浸式虚拟现实技术，通过实验研究出口标识（明暗）、人群移动比例及两者交互作用对参与者反应时间和出口选择的影响。
AI.result: 未点亮的出口标识显著抑制个体使用特定出口/路线；虚拟人群对引导出口使用效果有限但存在轻微排斥作用；信息源一致时容忍排队现象。
AI.conclusion: VR实验验证了出口标识与人群动态对疏散决策的独立及交互影响，为安全工程提供实证依据。

authors_text: Zhenzhen Liu,Jin Peng Zhou,Yufan Wang,Kilian Q. Weinberger
title: Unsupervised Out-of-Distribution Detection with Diffusion Inpainting
title_zh: 使用扩散修复的无监督分布外检测
abstract: Unsupervised out-of-distribution detection (OOD) seeks to identify out-of-domain data by learning only from unlabeled in-domain data. We present a novel approach for this task - Lift, Map, Detect (LMD) - that leverages recent advancement in diffusion models. Diffusion models are one type of generative models. At their core, they learn an iterative denoising process that gradually maps a noisy image closer to their training manifolds. LMD leverages this intuition for OOD detection. Specifically, LMD lifts an image off its original manifold by corrupting it, and maps it towards the in-domain manifold with a diffusion model. For an out-of-domain image, the mapped image would have a large distance away from its original manifold, and LMD would identify it as OOD accordingly. We show through extensive experiments that LMD achieves competitive performance across a broad variety of datasets. Code can be found at https://github.com/zhenzhel/lift_map_detect.
summary: Unsupervised out-of-distribution detection (OOD) seeks to identify out-of-domain data by learning only from unlabeled in-domain data. We present a novel approach for this task - Lift, Map, Detect (LMD) - that leverages recent advancement in diffusion models. Diffusion models are one type of generative models. At their core, they learn an iterative denoising process that gradually maps a noisy image closer to their training manifolds. LMD leverages this intuition for OOD detection. Specifically, LMD lifts an image off its original manifold by corrupting it, and maps it towards the in-domain manifold with a diffusion model. For an out-of-domain image, the mapped image would have a large distance away from its original manifold, and LMD would identify it as OOD accordingly. We show through extensive experiments that LMD achieves competitive performance across a broad variety of datasets. Code can be found at https://github.com/zhenzhel/lift_map_detect.
abstract_zh: 无监督分布外检测 (OOD) 旨在通过仅从未标记的域内数据中学习来识别域外数据。我们为这项任务提出了一种新颖的方法——提升、映射、检测（LMD）——它利用了扩散模型的最新进展。扩散模型是生成模型的一种。他们的核心是学习迭代去噪过程，逐渐将噪声图像映射到更接近训练流形的位置。 LMD 利用这种直觉进行 OOD 检测。具体来说，LMD 通过破坏图像将图像从其原始流形中分离出来，并使用扩散模型将其映射到域内流形。对于域外图像，映射的图像与其原始流形有很大距离，LMD 会相应地将其识别为 OOD。我们通过大量实验证明，LMD 在各种数据集上都取得了具有竞争力的性能。代码可以在 https://github.com/zhenzhel/lift_map_detect 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型的无监督分布外检测方法LMD，通过图像修复技术判断数据是否超出训练分布。
AI.motivation: 传统分布外检测方法常依赖标注数据或特定假设，而本文旨在利用扩散模型的生成能力，在无监督条件下实现更鲁棒的分布外检测。
AI.method: LMD方法通过三步实现：1）对输入图像进行噪声扰动（Lift）；2）利用预训练扩散模型将其映射到训练分布流形（Map）；3）通过原始图像与修复后图像的差异度量判断是否为分布外样本（Detect）。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，LMD在无监督场景下达到与监督方法相当的检测性能，且对不同分布偏移具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了扩散模型在分布外检测任务中的有效性，提出的LMD方法为无监督异常检测提供了新思路。

We present a novel approach for this task - Lift, Map, Detect (LMD) - that leverages recent advancement in diffusion models. Diffusion models are one type of generative models. For an out-of-domain image, the mapped image would have a large distance away from its original manifold, and LMD would identify it as OOD accordingly. We show through extensive experiments that LMD achieves competitive performance across a broad variety of datasets. authors_text: Bobby He,James Martens,Guodong Zhang,Aleksandar Botev,Andrew Brock,Samuel L Smith,Yee Whye Teh
title: Deep Transformers without Shortcuts: Modifying Self-attention for Faithful Signal Propagation
title_zh: 无捷径的深度变压器：修改自注意力以实现忠实的信号传播
abstract: Skip connections and normalisation layers form two standard architectural components that are ubiquitous for the training of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs), but whose precise roles are poorly understood. Recent approaches such as Deep Kernel Shaping have made progress towards reducing our reliance on them, using insights from wide NN kernel theory to improve signal propagation in vanilla DNNs (which we define as networks without skips or normalisation). However, these approaches are incompatible with the self-attention layers present in transformers, whose kernels are intrinsically more complicated to analyse and control. And so the question remains: is it possible to train deep vanilla transformers? We answer this question in the affirmative by designing several approaches that use combinations of parameter initialisations, bias matrices and location-dependent rescaling to achieve faithful signal propagation in vanilla transformers. Our methods address various intricacies specific to signal propagation in transformers, including the interaction with positional encoding and causal masking. In experiments on WikiText-103 and C4, our approaches enable deep transformers without normalisation to train at speeds matching their standard counterparts, and deep vanilla transformers to reach the same performance as standard ones after about 5 times more iterations.
summary: Skip connections and normalisation layers form two standard architectural components that are ubiquitous for the training of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs), but whose precise roles are poorly understood. Recent approaches such as Deep Kernel Shaping have made progress towards reducing our reliance on them, using insights from wide NN kernel theory to improve signal propagation in vanilla DNNs (which we define as networks without skips or normalisation). However, these approaches are incompatible with the self-attention layers present in transformers, whose kernels are intrinsically more complicated to analyse and control. And so the question remains: is it possible to train deep vanilla transformers? We answer this question in the affirmative by designing several approaches that use combinations of parameter initialisations, bias matrices and location-dependent rescaling to achieve faithful signal propagation in vanilla transformers. Our methods address various intricacies specific to signal propagation in transformers, including the interaction with positional encoding and causal masking. In experiments on WikiText-103 and C4, our approaches enable deep transformers without normalisation to train at speeds matching their standard counterparts, and deep vanilla transformers to reach the same performance as standard ones after about 5 times more iterations.
abstract_zh: 跳过连接和归一化层构成了深度神经网络 (DNN) 训练中普遍存在的两个标准架构组件，但人们对它们的确切作用知之甚少。最近的方法（例如深度内核整形）在减少我们对它们的依赖方面取得了进展，利用宽神经网络内核理论的见解来改善普通 DNN（我们将其定义为没有跳过或标准化的网络）中的信号传播。然而，这些方法与变压器中存在的自注意力层不兼容，变压器的内核本质上更难以分析和控制。所以问题仍然存在：是否有可能训练深度香草变形金刚？我们通过设计几种方法来肯定地回答这个问题，这些方法使用参数初始化、偏置矩阵和位置相关的重新缩放的组合来实现普通变压器中的忠实信号传播。我们的方法解决了变压器中信号传播特有的各种复杂问题，包括与位置编码和因果屏蔽的相互作用。在 WikiText-103 和 C4 上的实验中，我们的方法使得没有标准化的深度 Transformer 能够以与标准对应物相匹配的速度进行训练，并且深度普通 Transformer 在大约 5 次迭代后达到与标准 Transformer 相同的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何在不使用残差连接和归一化层的情况下，通过改进自注意力机制实现深层Transformer的训练。
AI.motivation: 残差连接和归一化层在深度神经网络中被广泛使用但其作用机制尚不明确，而现有方法难以适配Transformer的自注意力结构，限制了深层Transformer的训练。
AI.method: 设计参数初始化、偏置矩阵和位置相关缩放组合方法，解决Transformer中信号传播的特殊问题（如位置编码与因果掩码的交互）。
AI.result: 在WikiText-103和C4数据集上，去归一化深层Transformer的训练速度与标准模型相当，经过约5倍迭代后性能可达到标准模型水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过改进自注意力机制，可实现无需残差连接和归一化层的深层Transformer训练，为理解信号传播机制提供了新思路。

authors_text: Suzan Ece Ada,Emre Ugur
title: Meta-World Conditional Neural Processes
title_zh: 元世界条件神经过程
abstract: We propose Meta-World Conditional Neural Processes (MW-CNP), a conditional world model generator that leverages sample efficiency and scalability of Conditional Neural Processes to enable an agent to sample from its own "hallucination". We intend to reduce the agent's interaction with the target environment at test time as much as possible. To reduce the number of samples required at test time, we first obtain a latent representation of the transition dynamics from a single rollout from the test environment with hidden parameters. Then, we obtain rollouts for few-shot learning by interacting with the "hallucination" generated by the meta-world model. Using the world model representation from MW-CNP, the meta-RL agent can adapt to an unseen target environment with significantly fewer samples collected from the target environment compared to the baselines. We emphasize that the agent does not have access to the task parameters throughout training and testing, and MW-CNP is trained on offline interaction data logged during meta-training.
summary: We propose Meta-World Conditional Neural Processes (MW-CNP), a conditional world model generator that leverages sample efficiency and scalability of Conditional Neural Processes to enable an agent to sample from its own "hallucination". We intend to reduce the agent's interaction with the target environment at test time as much as possible. To reduce the number of samples required at test time, we first obtain a latent representation of the transition dynamics from a single rollout from the test environment with hidden parameters. Then, we obtain rollouts for few-shot learning by interacting with the "hallucination" generated by the meta-world model. Using the world model representation from MW-CNP, the meta-RL agent can adapt to an unseen target environment with significantly fewer samples collected from the target environment compared to the baselines. We emphasize that the agent does not have access to the task parameters throughout training and testing, and MW-CNP is trained on offline interaction data logged during meta-training.
abstract_zh: 我们提出元世界条件神经过程（MW-CNP），这是一种条件世界模型生成器，它利用条件神经过程的采样效率和可扩展性，使代理能够从自己的“幻觉”中进行采样。我们打算尽可能减少代理在测试时与目标环境的交互。为了减少测试时所需的样本数量，我们首先从具有隐藏参数的测试环境中的单次推出中获得过渡动态的潜在表示。然后，我们通过与元世界模型生成的“幻觉”交互来获得小样本学习的展示。使用 MW-CNP 的世界模型表示，元强化学习代理可以适应看不见的目标环境，与基线相比，从目标环境收集的样本明显更少。我们强调，代理在整个训练和测试过程中无法访问任务参数，并且 MW-CNP 是根据元训练期间记录的离线交互数据进行训练的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Meta-World Conditional Neural Processes (MW-CNP)的条件世界模型生成方法，旨在通过减少智能体与目标环境的交互次数，提升其在新环境中的适应能力。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在测试时需要大量与目标环境的交互来收集样本，而本文希望减少这种依赖，通过利用元世界模型生成的‘幻觉’数据实现更高效的样本利用。
AI.method: 首先通过测试环境的一次rollout获取转移动态的潜在表示，随后利用元世界模型生成的‘幻觉’数据进行少量样本学习，使元强化学习智能体在无需任务参数的情况下适应新环境。
AI.result: 实验表明，与基线方法相比，使用MW-CNP的智能体在目标环境中仅需更少的样本即可实现有效适应，且训练过程中不依赖任务参数。
AI.conclusion: MW-CNP通过离线元训练数据生成的潜在世界模型，结合少量样本学习机制，显著降低了智能体在新环境中的样本需求，验证了其在样本效率上的优势。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Meta-World Conditional Neural Processes (MW-CNP)的条件世界模型生成方法，旨在通过减少智能体与目标环境的交互次数，提升其在新环境中的适应能力。
ai_content.motivation: 传统方法在测试时需要大量与目标环境的交互来收集样本，而本文希望减少这种依赖，通过利用元世界模型生成的‘幻觉’数据实现更高效的样本利用。
ai_content.method: 首先通过测试环境的一次rollout获取转移动态的潜在表示，随后利用元世界模型生成的‘幻觉’数据进行少量样本学习，使元强化学习智能体在无需任务参数的情况下适应新环境。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，与基线方法相比，使用MW-CNP的智能体在目标环境中仅需更少的样本即可实现有效适应，且训练过程中不依赖任务参数。
ai_content.conclusion: MW-CNP通过离线元训练数据生成的潜在世界模型，结合少量样本学习机制，显著降低了智能体在新环境中的样本需求，验证了其在样本效率上的优势。

search_text: Meta-World Conditional Neural Processes 元世界条件神经过程 We propose Meta-World Conditional Neural Processes (MW-CNP), a conditional world model generator that leverages sample efficiency and scalability of Conditional Neural Processes to enable an agent to sample from its own "hallucination". We intend to reduce the agent's interaction with the target environment at test time as much as possible. To reduce the number of samples required at test time, we first obtain a latent representation of the transition dynamics from a single rollout from the test environment with hidden parameters. Then, we obtain rollouts for few-shot learning by interacting with the "hallucination" generated by the meta-world model. Using the world model representation from MW-CNP, the meta-RL agent can adapt to an unseen target environment with significantly fewer samples collected from the target environment compared to the baselines. We emphasize that the agent does not have access to the task parameters throughout training and testing, and MW-CNP is trained on offline interaction data logged during meta-training. 我们提出元世界条件神经过程（MW-CNP），这是一种条件世界模型生成器，它利用条件神经过程的采样效率和可扩展性，使代理能够从自己的“幻觉”中进行采样。我们打算尽可能减少代理在测试时与目标环境的交互。为了减少测试时所需的样本数量，我们首先从具有隐藏参数的测试环境中的单次推出中获得过渡动态的潜在表示。然后，我们通过与元世界模型生成的“幻觉”交互来获得小样本学习的展示。使用 MW-CNP 的世界模型表示，元强化学习代理可以适应看不见的目标环境，与基线相比，从目标环境收集的样本明显更少。我们强调，代理在整个训练和测试过程中无法访问任务参数，并且 MW-CNP 是根据元训练期间记录的离线交互数据进行训练的。 本文提出了一种名为Meta-World Conditional Neural Processes (MW-CNP)的条件世界模型生成方法，旨在通过减少智能体与目标环境的交互次数，提升其在新环境中的适应能力。 Suzan Ece Ada,Emre Ugur cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.NE,cs.RO

authors_text: Angello Hoyos,Mariano Rivera
title: Hadamard Layer to Improve Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: Hadamard 层改善语义分割
abstract: The Hadamard Layer, a simple and computationally efficient way to improve results in semantic segmentation tasks, is presented. This layer has no free parameters that require to be trained. Therefore it does not increase the number of model parameters, and the extra computational cost is marginal. Experimental results show that the new Hadamard layer substantially improves the performance of the investigated models (variants of the Pix2Pix model). The performance's improvement can be explained by the Hadamard layer forcing the network to produce an internal encoding of the classes so that all bins are active. Therefore, the network computation is more distributed. In a sort that the Hadamard layer requires that to change the predicted class, it is necessary to modify $2^{k-1}$ bins, assuming $k$ bins in the encoding. A specific loss function allows a stable and fast training convergence.
summary: The Hadamard Layer, a simple and computationally efficient way to improve results in semantic segmentation tasks, is presented. This layer has no free parameters that require to be trained. Therefore it does not increase the number of model parameters, and the extra computational cost is marginal. Experimental results show that the new Hadamard layer substantially improves the performance of the investigated models (variants of the Pix2Pix model). The performance's improvement can be explained by the Hadamard layer forcing the network to produce an internal encoding of the classes so that all bins are active. Therefore, the network computation is more distributed. In a sort that the Hadamard layer requires that to change the predicted class, it is necessary to modify $2^{k-1}$ bins, assuming $k$ bins in the encoding. A specific loss function allows a stable and fast training convergence.
abstract_zh: 提出了 Hadamard 层，这是一种简单且计算高效的方法，可以改善语义分割任务的结果。该层没有需要训练的自由参数。因此它不会增加模型参数的数量，并且额外的计算成本是微乎其微的。实验结果表明，新的 Hadamard 层极大地提高了所研究模型（Pix2Pix 模型的变体）的性能。性能的提高可以通过 Hadamard 层强制网络生成类的内部编码来解释，以便所有 bin 都处于活动状态。因此，网络计算更加分散。在 Hadamard 层要求更改预测类别的排序中，需要修改 $2^{k-1}$ bins，假设编码中有 $k$ bins。特定的损失函数可以实现稳定且快速的训练收敛。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Hadamard Layer的新型网络层，用于提升语义分割任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有语义分割模型存在参数冗余和计算成本高的问题，而传统方法难以在不增加参数的情况下提升模型表现。
AI.method: 设计无参数的Hadamard Layer，通过强制网络生成分布式类编码，结合特定损失函数实现稳定训练。
AI.result: 在Pix2Pix模型变体上显著提升分割性能，且仅带来边际计算成本增加。
AI.conclusion: Hadamard Layer通过强制分布式计算机制有效提升模型性能，为轻量化语义分割提供新思路。

authors_text: Zhangxiaobing,Tangzhenhao,Longzi,Fuxianghua
title: Generalization algorithm of multimodal pre-training model based on graph-text self-supervised training
title_zh: 基于图文自监督训练的多模态预训练模型泛化算法
abstract: Recently, a large number of studies have shown that the introduction of visual information can effectively improve the effect of neural machine translation (NMT). Its effectiveness largely depends on the availability of a large number of bilingual parallel sentence pairs and manual image annotation. The lack of images and the effectiveness of images have been difficult to solve. In this paper, a multimodal pre-training generalization algorithm for self-supervised training is proposed, which overcomes the lack of visual information and inaccuracy, and thus extends the applicability of images on NMT. Specifically, we will search for many pictures from the existing sentences through the search engine, and then through the relationship between visual information and text, do the self-supervised training task of graphics and text to obtain more effective visual information for text. We show that when the filtered information is used as multimodal machine translation for fine-tuning, the effect of translation in the global voice dataset is 0.5 BLEU higher than the baseline.
summary: Recently, a large number of studies have shown that the introduction of visual information can effectively improve the effect of neural machine translation (NMT). Its effectiveness largely depends on the availability of a large number of bilingual parallel sentence pairs and manual image annotation. The lack of images and the effectiveness of images have been difficult to solve. In this paper, a multimodal pre-training generalization algorithm for self-supervised training is proposed, which overcomes the lack of visual information and inaccuracy, and thus extends the applicability of images on NMT. Specifically, we will search for many pictures from the existing sentences through the search engine, and then through the relationship between visual information and text, do the self-supervised training task of graphics and text to obtain more effective visual information for text. We show that when the filtered information is used as multimodal machine translation for fine-tuning, the effect of translation in the global voice dataset is 0.5 BLEU higher than the baseline.
abstract_zh: 最近，大量研究表明，视觉信息的引入可以有效提高神经机器翻译（NMT）的效果。其有效性很大程度上取决于大量双语平行句对和手动图像标注的可用性。图像的缺失和图像的有效性一直是难以解决的问题。本文提出了一种用于自监督训练的多模态预训练泛化算法，克服了视觉信息缺乏和不准确的问题，从而扩展了图像在 NMT 上的适用性。具体来说，我们会通过搜索引擎从已有的句子中搜索到很多图片，然后通过视觉信息与文本的关系，做图文的自监督训练任务，以获得文本更有效的视觉信息。我们表明，当过滤后的信息用作多模态机器翻译进行微调时，全局语音数据集中的翻译效果比基线高 0.5 BLEU。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图-文自监督训练的多模态预训练模型泛化算法，旨在解决神经机器翻译中视觉信息不足和效果不佳的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究依赖大量双语平行句对和人工图像标注，但图像获取困难且效果有限，亟需一种无需依赖稀缺资源的视觉信息增强方法。
AI.method: 通过搜索引擎从现有文本中匹配相关图像，利用视觉与文本的关系构建自监督训练任务，提取更有效的视觉信息用于文本翻译。
AI.result: 在全局语音数据集上，使用过滤后的多模态信息进行微调后，翻译效果比基线模型提升0.5 BLEU分数。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自监督学习有效扩展了图像在神经机器翻译中的适用性，解决了视觉信息稀缺与不准确的问题。
