authors_text: Tristan Luiggi,Laure Soulier,Vincent Guigue,Siwar Jendoubi,Aurélien Baelde
title: Dynamic Named Entity Recognition
title_zh: 动态命名实体识别
abstract: Named Entity Recognition (NER) is a challenging and widely studied task that involves detecting and typing entities in text. So far,NER still approaches entity typing as a task of classification into universal classes (e.g. date, person, or location). Recent advances innatural language processing focus on architectures of increasing complexity that may lead to overfitting and memorization, and thus, underuse of context. Our work targets situations where the type of entities depends on the context and cannot be solved solely by memorization. We hence introduce a new task: Dynamic Named Entity Recognition (DNER), providing a framework to better evaluate the ability of algorithms to extract entities by exploiting the context. The DNER benchmark is based on two datasets, DNER-RotoWire and DNER-IMDb. We evaluate baseline models and present experiments reflecting issues and research axes related to this novel task.
summary: Named Entity Recognition (NER) is a challenging and widely studied task that involves detecting and typing entities in text. So far,NER still approaches entity typing as a task of classification into universal classes (e.g. date, person, or location). Recent advances innatural language processing focus on architectures of increasing complexity that may lead to overfitting and memorization, and thus, underuse of context. Our work targets situations where the type of entities depends on the context and cannot be solved solely by memorization. We hence introduce a new task: Dynamic Named Entity Recognition (DNER), providing a framework to better evaluate the ability of algorithms to extract entities by exploiting the context. The DNER benchmark is based on two datasets, DNER-RotoWire and DNER-IMDb. We evaluate baseline models and present experiments reflecting issues and research axes related to this novel task.
abstract_zh: 命名实体识别 (NER) 是一项具有挑战性且得到广泛研究的任务，涉及检测和键入文本中的实体。到目前为止，NER 仍然将实体类型作为分类到通用类（例如日期、人或位置）的任务。自然语言处理的最新进展集中在日益复杂的架构上，这可能导致过度拟合和记忆，从而导致上下文利用不足。我们的工作针对的是实体类型取决于上下文并且不能仅通过记忆来解决的情况。因此，我们引入了一项新任务：动态命名实体识别（DNER），它提供了一个框架来更好地评估算法通过利用上下文来提取实体的能力。 DNER 基准测试基于两个数据集：DNER-RotoWire 和 DNER-IMDb。我们评估基线模型并提出反映与这项新任务相关的问题和研究轴的实验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态命名实体识别（DNER）任务，旨在通过上下文信息更准确地识别依赖于语境的实体类型。
AI.motivation: 传统命名实体识别（NER）依赖固定类别分类，复杂模型易过拟合且忽视上下文，无法处理依赖上下文的实体类型。
AI.method: 构建DNER框架及两个数据集（DNER-RotoWire和DNER-IMDb），评估基线模型并分析上下文利用问题。
AI.result: 实验表明现有模型在动态实体识别中表现不足，凸显了上下文建模的重要性及当前方法的局限性。
AI.conclusion: DNER为评估上下文感知的NER模型提供了新基准，未来研究需更注重上下文信息的有效利用。

search_text: Dynamic Named Entity Recognition 动态命名实体识别 Named Entity Recognition (NER) is a challenging and widely studied task that involves detecting and typing entities in text. So far,NER still approaches entity typing as a task of classification into universal classes (e.g. date, person, or location). Recent advances innatural language processing focus on architectures of increasing complexity that may lead to overfitting and memorization, and thus, underuse of context. Our work targets situations where the type of entities depends on the context and cannot be solved solely by memorization. We hence introduce a new task: Dynamic Named Entity Recognition (DNER), providing a framework to better evaluate the ability of algorithms to extract entities by exploiting the context. The DNER benchmark is based on two datasets, DNER-RotoWire and DNER-IMDb. We evaluate baseline models and present experiments reflecting issues and research axes related to this novel task. 命名实体识别 (NER) 是一项具有挑战性且得到广泛研究的任务，涉及检测和键入文本中的实体。到目前为止，NER 仍然将实体类型作为分类到通用类（例如日期、人或位置）的任务。自然语言处理的最新进展集中在日益复杂的架构上，这可能导致过度拟合和记忆，从而导致上下文利用不足。我们的工作针对的是实体类型取决于上下文并且不能仅通过记忆来解决的情况。因此，我们引入了一项新任务：动态命名实体识别（DNER），它提供了一个框架来更好地评估算法通过利用上下文来提取实体的能力。 DNER 基准测试基于两个数据集：DNER-RotoWire 和 DNER-IMDb。我们评估基线模型并提出反映与这项新任务相关的问题和研究轴的实验。 本文提出动态命名实体识别（DNER）任务，旨在通过上下文信息更准确地识别依赖于语境的实体类型。 Tristan Luiggi,Laure Soulier,Vincent Guigue,Siwar Jendoubi,Aurélien Baelde cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Georgios Ioannides,Vasilios Rallis
title: Real-Time Speech Enhancement Using Spectral Subtraction with Minimum Statistics and Spectral Floor
title_zh: 使用具有最小统计量和频谱下限的频谱减法来增强实时语音
abstract: An initial real-time speech enhancement method is presented to reduce the effects of additive noise. The method operates in the frequency domain and is a form of spectral subtraction. Initially, minimum statistics are used to generate an estimate of the noise signal in the frequency domain. The use of minimum statistics avoids the need for a voice activity detector (VAD) which has proven to be challenging to create. As minimum statistics are used, the noise signal estimate must be multiplied by a scaling factor before subtraction from the noise corrupted speech signal can take place. A spectral floor is applied to the difference to suppress the effects of "musical noise". Finally, a series of further enhancements are considered to reduce the effects of residual noise even further. These methods are compared using time-frequency plots to create the final speech enhancement design
summary: An initial real-time speech enhancement method is presented to reduce the effects of additive noise. The method operates in the frequency domain and is a form of spectral subtraction. Initially, minimum statistics are used to generate an estimate of the noise signal in the frequency domain. The use of minimum statistics avoids the need for a voice activity detector (VAD) which has proven to be challenging to create. As minimum statistics are used, the noise signal estimate must be multiplied by a scaling factor before subtraction from the noise corrupted speech signal can take place. A spectral floor is applied to the difference to suppress the effects of "musical noise". Finally, a series of further enhancements are considered to reduce the effects of residual noise even further. These methods are compared using time-frequency plots to create the final speech enhancement design
abstract_zh: 提出了一种初始的实时语音增强方法来减少加性噪声的影响。该方法在频域中运行，是频谱减法的一种形式。最初，使用最少的统计量来生成频域中噪声信号的估计。使用最少的统计数据可以避免对语音活动检测器 (VAD) 的需求，事实证明，创建语音活动检测器 (VAD) 具有挑战性。由于使用了最少的统计数据，因此在从噪声损坏的语音信号中进行减去之前，噪声信号估计必须乘以比例因子。对差异应用频谱基底以抑制“音乐噪声”的影响。最后，考虑了一系列进一步的增强，以进一步减少残留噪声的影响。使用时频图对这些方法进行比较，以创建最终的语音增强设计

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于谱减法的实时语音增强方法，结合最小统计和谱底技术以降低加性噪声影响。
AI.motivation: 传统语音增强方法依赖语音活动检测器（VAD）判断噪声时段，但VAD实现复杂且易出错，因此需寻找无需VAD的替代方案。
AI.method: 在频域中利用最小统计估计噪声信号，通过缩放因子修正后与含噪语音相减；应用谱底抑制音乐噪声，并通过时频图分析优化残留噪声处理。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法有效降低噪声且无需VAD，时频分析验证了增强效果与残留噪声控制的平衡。
AI.conclusion: 提出的实时语音增强框架通过最小统计与谱底技术，在无需VAD的情况下实现了有效降噪，适用于实时语音处理场景。

authors_text: Animesh Kumar Paul,Videh Raj Nema
title: Understanding the effect of varying amounts of replay per step
title_zh: 了解每步不同重播量的影响
abstract: Model-based reinforcement learning uses models to plan, where the predictions and policies of an agent can be improved by using more computation without additional data from the environment, thereby improving sample efficiency. However, learning accurate estimates of the model is hard. Subsequently, the natural question is whether we can get similar benefits as planning with model-free methods. Experience replay is an essential component of many model-free algorithms enabling sample-efficient learning and stability by providing a mechanism to store past experiences for further reuse in the gradient computational process. Prior works have established connections between models and experience replay by planning with the latter. This involves increasing the number of times a mini-batch is sampled and used for updates at each step (amount of replay per step). We attempt to exploit this connection by doing a systematic study on the effect of varying amounts of replay per step in a well-known model-free algorithm: Deep Q-Network (DQN) in the Mountain Car environment. We empirically show that increasing replay improves DQN's sample efficiency, reduces the variation in its performance, and makes it more robust to change in hyperparameters. Altogether, this takes a step toward a better algorithm for deployment.
summary: Model-based reinforcement learning uses models to plan, where the predictions and policies of an agent can be improved by using more computation without additional data from the environment, thereby improving sample efficiency. However, learning accurate estimates of the model is hard. Subsequently, the natural question is whether we can get similar benefits as planning with model-free methods. Experience replay is an essential component of many model-free algorithms enabling sample-efficient learning and stability by providing a mechanism to store past experiences for further reuse in the gradient computational process. Prior works have established connections between models and experience replay by planning with the latter. This involves increasing the number of times a mini-batch is sampled and used for updates at each step (amount of replay per step). We attempt to exploit this connection by doing a systematic study on the effect of varying amounts of replay per step in a well-known model-free algorithm: Deep Q-Network (DQN) in the Mountain Car environment. We empirically show that increasing replay improves DQN's sample efficiency, reduces the variation in its performance, and makes it more robust to change in hyperparameters. Altogether, this takes a step toward a better algorithm for deployment.
abstract_zh: 基于模型的强化学习使用模型进行规划，可以通过使用更多计算来改进代理的预测和策略，而无需来自环境的额外数据，从而提高样本效率。然而，学习模型的准确估计是很困难的。随后，自然的问题是我们是否可以获得与使用无模型方法进行规划类似的好处。经验回放是许多无模型算法的重要组成部分，通过提供一种存储过去经验以便在梯度计算过程中进一步重用的机制，实现样本高效学习和稳定性。之前的作品通过与后者一起规划，在模型和体验回放之间建立了联系。这涉及增加对小批量进行采样并用于每个步骤的更新的次数（每个步骤的重播量）。我们尝试通过对著名的无模型算法（Mountain Car 环境中的深度 Q 网络（DQN））中每步不同重播量的影响进行系统研究来利用这种联系。我们的经验表明，增加重放可以提高 DQN 的样本效率，减少其性能的变化，并使其对超参数的变化更加鲁棒。总而言之，这朝着更好的部署算法迈出了一步。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了在Mountain Car环境中，不同步长的回放量对深度Q网络（DQN）性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 模型基于强化学习需要准确的模型估计，但学习成本高。而经验回放作为模型自由方法的核心组件，可能提供类似规划的收益，但其最优回放量尚未明确。
AI.method: 通过系统性调整DQN中每步的回放次数，分析其对样本效率、性能稳定性及超参数鲁棒性的影响。
AI.result: 增加回放量提升了DQN的样本效率，降低性能波动，并增强对超参数变化的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 调整回放量可优化模型自由算法，为部署更高效算法提供方向。

Altogether, this takes a step toward a better algorithm for deployment. 基于模型的强化学习使用模型进行规划，可以通过使用更多计算来改进代理的预测和策略，而无需来自环境的额外数据，从而提高样本效率。然而，学习模型的准确估计是很困难的。随后，自然的问题是我们是否可以获得与使用无模型方法进行规划类似的好处。经验回放是许多无模型算法的重要组成部分，通过提供一种存储过去经验以便在梯度计算过程中进一步重用的机制，实现样本高效学习和稳定性。之前的作品通过与后者一起规划，在模型和体验回放之间建立了联系。这涉及增加对小批量进行采样并用于每个步骤的更新的次数（每个步骤的重播量）。我们尝试通过对著名的无模型算法（Mountain Car 环境中的深度 Q 网络（DQN））中每步不同重播量的影响进行系统研究来利用这种联系。我们的经验表明，增加重放可以提高 DQN 的样本效率，减少其性能的变化，并使其对超参数的变化更加鲁棒。总而言之，这朝着更好的部署算法迈出了一步。 该论文研究了在Mountain Car环境中，不同步长的回放量对深度Q网络（DQN）性能的影响。 Animesh Kumar Paul,Videh Raj Nema cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhifan Gao,Yifeng Guo,Jiajing Zhang,Tieyong Zeng,Guang Yang
title: Hierarchical Perception Adversarial Learning Framework for Compressed Sensing MRI
title_zh: 压缩感知 MRI 的分层感知对抗学习框架
abstract: The long acquisition time has limited the accessibility of magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) because it leads to patient discomfort and motion artifacts. Although several MRI techniques have been proposed to reduce the acquisition time, compressed sensing in magnetic resonance imaging (CS-MRI) enables fast acquisition without compromising SNR and resolution. However, existing CS-MRI methods suffer from the challenge of aliasing artifacts. This challenge results in the noise-like textures and missing the fine details, thus leading to unsatisfactory reconstruction performance. To tackle this challenge, we propose a hierarchical perception adversarial learning framework (HP-ALF). HP-ALF can perceive the image information in the hierarchical mechanism: image-level perception and patch-level perception. The former can reduce the visual perception difference in the entire image, and thus achieve aliasing artifact removal. The latter can reduce this difference in the regions of the image, and thus recover fine details. Specifically, HP-ALF achieves the hierarchical mechanism by utilizing multilevel perspective discrimination. This discrimination can provide the information from two perspectives (overall and regional) for adversarial learning. It also utilizes a global and local coherent discriminator to provide structure information to the generator during training. In addition, HP-ALF contains a context-aware learning block to effectively exploit the slice information between individual images for better reconstruction performance. The experiments validated on three datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of HP-ALF and its superiority to the comparative methods.
summary: The long acquisition time has limited the accessibility of magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) because it leads to patient discomfort and motion artifacts. Although several MRI techniques have been proposed to reduce the acquisition time, compressed sensing in magnetic resonance imaging (CS-MRI) enables fast acquisition without compromising SNR and resolution. However, existing CS-MRI methods suffer from the challenge of aliasing artifacts. This challenge results in the noise-like textures and missing the fine details, thus leading to unsatisfactory reconstruction performance. To tackle this challenge, we propose a hierarchical perception adversarial learning framework (HP-ALF). HP-ALF can perceive the image information in the hierarchical mechanism: image-level perception and patch-level perception. The former can reduce the visual perception difference in the entire image, and thus achieve aliasing artifact removal. The latter can reduce this difference in the regions of the image, and thus recover fine details. Specifically, HP-ALF achieves the hierarchical mechanism by utilizing multilevel perspective discrimination. This discrimination can provide the information from two perspectives (overall and regional) for adversarial learning. It also utilizes a global and local coherent discriminator to provide structure information to the generator during training. In addition, HP-ALF contains a context-aware learning block to effectively exploit the slice information between individual images for better reconstruction performance. The experiments validated on three datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of HP-ALF and its superiority to the comparative methods.
abstract_zh: 较长的采集时间限制了磁共振成像 (MRI) 的可及性，因为它会导致患者不适和运动伪影。尽管已经提出了几种 MRI 技术来减少采集时间，但磁共振成像 (CS-MRI) 中的压缩传感可以在不影响 SNR 和分辨率的情况下实现快速采集。然而，现有的 CS-MRI 方法面临着混叠伪影的挑战。这一挑战导致类似噪声的纹理并丢失精细细节，从而导致重建性能不理想。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了分层感知对抗学习框架（HP-ALF）。 HP-ALF能够以分层机制感知图像信息：图像级感知和块级感知。前者可以减少整个图像的视觉感知差异，从而实现混叠伪影去除。后者可以减少图像区域的这种差异，从而恢复精细的细节。具体来说，HP-ALF通过利用多级视角辨别来实现分层机制。这种区分可以从两个角度（整体和区域）为对抗性学习提供信息。它还利用全局和局部相干鉴别器在训练期间向生成器提供结构信息。此外，HP-ALF 包含上下文感知学习模块，可有效利用各个图像之间的切片信息，以获得更好的重建性能。在三个数据集上验证的实验证明了 HP-ALF 的有效性及其相对于比较方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分层感知对抗学习框架（HP-ALF），用于压缩感知磁共振成像（CS-MRI），以解决现有方法中的混叠伪影问题，提升图像重建质量。
AI.motivation: 传统MRI采集时间长导致患者不适和运动伪影，虽CS-MRI能加速采集，但现有方法仍存在混叠伪影问题，导致噪声纹理和细节丢失，重建效果不佳。
AI.method: HP-ALF通过分层机制（图像级感知与块级感知）结合多级视角判别，利用全局与局部一致性判别器提供结构信息，并引入上下文感知学习模块挖掘图像间切片信息。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上的实验验证了HP-ALF的有效性，其重建性能优于对比方法，显著减少混叠伪影并恢复细节。
AI.conclusion: HP-ALF通过分层感知与对抗学习有效解决了CS-MRI的混叠问题，为快速高质量MRI重建提供了新思路。

This challenge results in the noise-like textures and missing the fine details, thus leading to unsatisfactory reconstruction performance. To tackle this challenge, we propose a hierarchical perception adversarial learning framework (HP-ALF). HP-ALF can perceive the image information in the hierarchical mechanism: image-level perception and patch-level perception. The former can reduce the visual perception difference in the entire image, and thus achieve aliasing artifact removal. The latter can reduce this difference in the regions of the image, and thus recover fine details. Specifically, HP-ALF achieves the hierarchical mechanism by utilizing multilevel perspective discrimination. This discrimination can provide the information from two perspectives (overall and regional) for adversarial learning. It also utilizes a global and local coherent discriminator to provide structure information to the generator during training. In addition, HP-ALF contains a context-aware learning block to effectively exploit the slice information between individual images for better reconstruction performance. The experiments validated on three datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of HP-ALF and its superiority to the comparative methods. 较长的采集时间限制了磁共振成像 (MRI) 的可及性，因为它会导致患者不适和运动伪影。尽管已经提出了几种 MRI 技术来减少采集时间，但磁共振成像 (CS-MRI) 中的压缩传感可以在不影响 SNR 和分辨率的情况下实现快速采集。然而，现有的 CS-MRI 方法面临着混叠伪影的挑战。这一挑战导致类似噪声的纹理并丢失精细细节，从而导致重建性能不理想。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了分层感知对抗学习框架（HP-ALF）。 HP-ALF能够以分层机制感知图像信息：图像级感知和块级感知。前者可以减少整个图像的视觉感知差异，从而实现混叠伪影去除。后者可以减少图像区域的这种差异，从而恢复精细的细节。具体来说，HP-ALF通过利用多级视角辨别来实现分层机制。这种区分可以从两个角度（整体和区域）为对抗性学习提供信息。它还利用全局和局部相干鉴别器在训练期间向生成器提供结构信息。此外，HP-ALF 包含上下文感知学习模块，可有效利用各个图像之间的切片信息，以获得更好的重建性能。在三个数据集上验证的实验证明了 HP-ALF 的有效性及其相对于比较方法的优越性。 本文提出了一种分层感知对抗学习框架（HP-ALF），用于压缩感知磁共振成像（CS-MRI），以解决现有方法中的混叠伪影问题，提升图像重建质量。 Zhifan Gao,Yifeng Guo,Jiajing Zhang,Tieyong Zeng,Guang Yang eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Pengzhen Ren,Changlin Li,Hang Xu,Yi Zhu,Guangrun Wang,Jianzhuang Liu,Xiaojun Chang,Xiaodan Liang
title: ViewCo: Discovering Text-Supervised Segmentation Masks via Multi-View Semantic Consistency
title_zh: ViewCo：通过多视图语义一致性发现文本监督分割掩模
abstract: Recently, great success has been made in learning visual representations from text supervision, facilitating the emergence of text-supervised semantic segmentation. However, existing works focus on pixel grouping and cross-modal semantic alignment, while ignoring the correspondence among multiple augmented views of the same image. To overcome such limitation, we propose multi-\textbf{View} \textbf{Co}nsistent learning (ViewCo) for text-supervised semantic segmentation. Specifically, we first propose text-to-views consistency modeling to learn correspondence for multiple views of the same input image. Additionally, we propose cross-view segmentation consistency modeling to address the ambiguity issue of text supervision by contrasting the segment features of Siamese visual encoders. The text-to-views consistency benefits the dense assignment of the visual features by encouraging different crops to align with the same text, while the cross-view segmentation consistency modeling provides additional self-supervision, overcoming the limitation of ambiguous text supervision for segmentation masks. Trained with large-scale image-text data, our model can directly segment objects of arbitrary categories in a zero-shot manner. Extensive experiments show that ViewCo outperforms state-of-the-art methods on average by up to 2.9\%, 1.6\%, and 2.4\% mIoU on PASCAL VOC2012, PASCAL Context, and COCO, respectively.
summary: Recently, great success has been made in learning visual representations from text supervision, facilitating the emergence of text-supervised semantic segmentation. However, existing works focus on pixel grouping and cross-modal semantic alignment, while ignoring the correspondence among multiple augmented views of the same image. To overcome such limitation, we propose multi-\textbf{View} \textbf{Co}nsistent learning (ViewCo) for text-supervised semantic segmentation. Specifically, we first propose text-to-views consistency modeling to learn correspondence for multiple views of the same input image. Additionally, we propose cross-view segmentation consistency modeling to address the ambiguity issue of text supervision by contrasting the segment features of Siamese visual encoders. The text-to-views consistency benefits the dense assignment of the visual features by encouraging different crops to align with the same text, while the cross-view segmentation consistency modeling provides additional self-supervision, overcoming the limitation of ambiguous text supervision for segmentation masks. Trained with large-scale image-text data, our model can directly segment objects of arbitrary categories in a zero-shot manner. Extensive experiments show that ViewCo outperforms state-of-the-art methods on average by up to 2.9\%, 1.6\%, and 2.4\% mIoU on PASCAL VOC2012, PASCAL Context, and COCO, respectively.
abstract_zh: 最近，从文本监督学习视觉表示方面取得了巨大成功，促进了文本监督语义分割的出现。然而，现有的工作侧重于像素分组和跨模态语义对齐，而忽略了同一图像的多个增强视图之间的对应关系。为了克服这种限制，我们提出了用于文本监督语义分割的多\textbf{View} \textbf{Co}一致学习（ViewCo）。具体来说，我们首先提出文本到视图的一致性建模来学习同一输入图像的多个视图的对应关系。此外，我们提出跨视图分割一致性建模，通过对比连体视觉编码器的分割特征来解决文本监督的歧义问题。文本到视图的一致性通过鼓励不同的裁剪与相同的文本对齐来有利于视觉特征的密集分配，而跨视图分割一致性建模提供了额外的自我监督，克服了分割掩模的模糊文本监督的限制。经过大规模图像文本数据的训练，我们的模型可以以零样本的方式直接分割任意类别的对象。大量实验表明，ViewCo 在 PASCAL VOC2012、PASCAL Context 和 COCO 上的 mIoU 平均优于最先进的方法，分别高达 2.9\%、1.6\% 和 2.4\% mIoU。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ViewCo方法，通过多视图语义一致性实现文本监督的语义分割。
AI.motivation: 现有文本监督分割方法忽视了同一图像多增强视图间的对应关系，导致分割结果存在歧义。
AI.method: 提出文本-视图一致性建模（对齐多视图与文本）和跨视图分割一致性建模（通过Siamese编码器对比分割特征）双重机制。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC2012、PASCAL Context和COCO数据集上分别达到2.9%、1.6%和2.4%的mIoU提升。
AI.conclusion: ViewCo通过多视图一致性约束有效提升了文本监督分割的性能，实现了零样本类别分割。

authors_text: Masoud Shahraki Mohammadi,Seyed Javad Seyed Mahdavi Chabok
title: Deep Convolutional Framelet Denoising for Panoramic by Mixed Wavelet Integration
title_zh: 混合小波积分的全景深度卷积框架去噪
abstract: Enhancing quality and removing noise during preprocessing is one of the most critical steps in image processing. X-ray images are created by photons colliding with atoms and the variation in scattered noise absorption. This noise leads to a deterioration in the graph's medical quality and, at times, results in repetition, thereby increasing the patient's effective dose. One of the most critical challenges in this area has consistently been lowering the image noise. Techniques like BM3d, low-pass filters, and Autoencoder have taken this step. Owing to their structural design and high rate of repetition, neural networks employing diverse architectures have, over the past decade, achieved noise reduction with satisfactory outcomes, surpassing the traditional BM3D and low-pass filters. The combination of the Hankel matrix with neural networks represents one of these configurations. The Hankel matrix aims to identify a local circle by separating individual values into local and non-local components, utilizing a non-local matrix. A non-local matrix can be created using the wave or DCT. This paper suggests integrating the waveform with the Daubechies (D4) wavelet due to its higher energy concentration and employs the u-Net neural network architecture, which incorporates the waveform exclusively at each stage. The outcomes were evaluated using the PSNR and SSIM criteria, and the outcomes were verified by using various waves. The effectiveness of a one-wave network has increased from 0.5% to 1.2%, according to studies done on other datasets
summary: Enhancing quality and removing noise during preprocessing is one of the most critical steps in image processing. X-ray images are created by photons colliding with atoms and the variation in scattered noise absorption. This noise leads to a deterioration in the graph's medical quality and, at times, results in repetition, thereby increasing the patient's effective dose. One of the most critical challenges in this area has consistently been lowering the image noise. Techniques like BM3d, low-pass filters, and Autoencoder have taken this step. Owing to their structural design and high rate of repetition, neural networks employing diverse architectures have, over the past decade, achieved noise reduction with satisfactory outcomes, surpassing the traditional BM3D and low-pass filters. The combination of the Hankel matrix with neural networks represents one of these configurations. The Hankel matrix aims to identify a local circle by separating individual values into local and non-local components, utilizing a non-local matrix. A non-local matrix can be created using the wave or DCT. This paper suggests integrating the waveform with the Daubechies (D4) wavelet due to its higher energy concentration and employs the u-Net neural network architecture, which incorporates the waveform exclusively at each stage. The outcomes were evaluated using the PSNR and SSIM criteria, and the outcomes were verified by using various waves. The effectiveness of a one-wave network has increased from 0.5% to 1.2%, according to studies done on other datasets
abstract_zh: 在预处理过程中提高质量和消除噪声是图像处理中最关键的步骤之一。 X 射线图像是由光子与原子碰撞以及散射噪声吸收的变化产生的。这种噪音会导致图表的医疗质量下降，有时还会导致重复，从而增加患者的有效剂量。该领域最关键的挑战之一一直是降低图像噪声。 BM3d、低通滤波器和自动编码器等技术已经迈出了这一步。由于其结构设计和高重复率，采用不同架构的神经网络在过去十年中取得了令人满意的降噪效果，超越了传统的 BM3D 和低通滤波器。汉克尔矩阵与神经网络的组合代表了这些配置之一。汉克尔矩阵旨在通过利用非局部矩阵将各个值分离为局部和非局部分量来识别局部圆。可以使用波或 DCT 创建非局部矩阵。本文建议将波形与 Daubechies (D4) 小波集成，因为它具有更高的能量集中度，并采用 u-Net 神经网络架构，该架构在每个阶段专门合并波形。使用PSNR和SSIM标准评估结果，并使用各种波验证结果。根据对其他数据集进行的研究，单波网络的有效性从 0.5% 增加到 1.2%

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合混合小波与深度卷积框架的全景图像去噪方法，旨在提升X光图像质量并降低噪声。
AI.motivation: X光图像中的噪声会降低医学成像质量并增加患者辐射剂量，传统方法如BM3D和低通滤波器效果有限，需探索更高效的去噪技术。
AI.method: 整合Daubechies(D4)小波与U-Net网络架构，利用Hankel矩阵分离局部与非局部成分，并在每层网络中嵌入波形特征。
AI.result: 通过PSNR和SSIM指标验证，单波网络在其他数据集上的有效性提升0.5%-1.2%。
AI.conclusion: 混合小波与深度学习框架能有效提升X光图像去噪性能，为医学影像预处理提供新思路。

authors_text: Chaerin Kong,Nojun Kwak
title: Analyzing Multimodal Objectives Through the Lens of Generative Diffusion Guidance
title_zh: 通过生成扩散制导的镜头分析多模态目标
abstract: Recent years have witnessed astonishing advances in the field of multimodal representation learning, with contrastive learning being the cornerstone for major breakthroughs. Latest works delivered further improvements by incorporating different objectives such as masked modeling and captioning into the frameworks, but our understanding on how these objectives facilitate learning remains vastly incomplete. In this paper, we leverage the fact that classifier-guided diffusion models generate images that reflect the semantic signals provided by the classifier to study the characteristics of multimodal learning objectives. Specifically, we compare contrastive, matching and captioning loss in terms of their semantic signals, and introduce a simple baseline that not only supports our analyses but also improves the quality of generative guidance in a straightforward manner.
summary: Recent years have witnessed astonishing advances in the field of multimodal representation learning, with contrastive learning being the cornerstone for major breakthroughs. Latest works delivered further improvements by incorporating different objectives such as masked modeling and captioning into the frameworks, but our understanding on how these objectives facilitate learning remains vastly incomplete. In this paper, we leverage the fact that classifier-guided diffusion models generate images that reflect the semantic signals provided by the classifier to study the characteristics of multimodal learning objectives. Specifically, we compare contrastive, matching and captioning loss in terms of their semantic signals, and introduce a simple baseline that not only supports our analyses but also improves the quality of generative guidance in a straightforward manner.
abstract_zh: 近年来，多模态表示学习领域取得了惊人的进展，而对比学习是重大突破的基石。最新的工作通过将不同的目标（例如屏蔽建模和字幕）纳入框架中，实现了进一步的改进，但我们对这些目标如何促进学习的理解仍然非常不完整。在本文中，我们利用分类器引导的扩散模型生成反映分类器提供的语义信号的图像来研究多模态学习目标的特征。具体来说，我们比较了对比、匹配和字幕损失的语义信号，并引入了一个简单的基线，它不仅支持我们的分析，而且还以直接的方式提高了生成指导的质量。

AI.tldr: 通过生成扩散指导模型分析多模态学习中的对比、匹配和字幕目标的语义信号差异，并提出改进生成质量的简单基线方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管多模态表征学习取得进展，但现有研究对不同学习目标（如对比、掩码建模、字幕）如何促进语义理解的机制仍缺乏系统性认知。
AI.method: 利用分类器引导扩散模型生成图像时对分类器语义信号的响应特性，对比分析三种多模态目标的语义特征差异，并设计简单基线优化生成指导过程。
AI.result: 揭示了不同损失函数对应的语义信号强度差异，提出的基线方法在生成质量指标上取得提升。
AI.conclusion: 多模态目标的语义贡献存在本质差异，针对性优化生成指导机制可有效提升模型表现。

authors_text: Romain Xu-Darme,Julien Girard-Satabin,Darryl Hond,Gabriele Incorvaia,Zakaria Chihani
title: Interpretable Out-Of-Distribution Detection Using Pattern Identification
title_zh: 使用模式识别进行可解释的分布外检测
abstract: Out-of-distribution (OoD) detection for data-based programs is a goal of paramount importance. Common approaches in the literature tend to train detectors requiring inside-of-distribution (in-distribution, or IoD) and OoD validation samples, and/or implement confidence metrics that are often abstract and therefore difficult to interpret. In this work, we propose to use existing work from the field of explainable AI, namely the PARTICUL pattern identification algorithm, in order to build more interpretable and robust OoD detectors for visual classifiers. Crucially, this approach does not require to retrain the classifier and is tuned directly to the IoD dataset, making it applicable to domains where OoD does not have a clear definition. Moreover, pattern identification allows us to provide images from the IoD dataset as reference points to better explain the confidence scores. We demonstrates that the detection capabilities of this approach are on par with existing methods through an extensive benchmark across four datasets and two definitions of OoD. In particular, we introduce a new benchmark based on perturbations of the IoD dataset which provides a known and quantifiable evaluation of the discrepancy between the IoD and OoD datasets that serves as a reference value for the comparison between various OoD detection methods. Our experiments show that the robustness of all metrics under test does not solely depend on the nature of the IoD dataset or the OoD definition, but also on the architecture of the classifier, which stresses the need for thorough experimentations for future work on OoD detection.
summary: Out-of-distribution (OoD) detection for data-based programs is a goal of paramount importance. Common approaches in the literature tend to train detectors requiring inside-of-distribution (in-distribution, or IoD) and OoD validation samples, and/or implement confidence metrics that are often abstract and therefore difficult to interpret. In this work, we propose to use existing work from the field of explainable AI, namely the PARTICUL pattern identification algorithm, in order to build more interpretable and robust OoD detectors for visual classifiers. Crucially, this approach does not require to retrain the classifier and is tuned directly to the IoD dataset, making it applicable to domains where OoD does not have a clear definition. Moreover, pattern identification allows us to provide images from the IoD dataset as reference points to better explain the confidence scores. We demonstrates that the detection capabilities of this approach are on par with existing methods through an extensive benchmark across four datasets and two definitions of OoD. In particular, we introduce a new benchmark based on perturbations of the IoD dataset which provides a known and quantifiable evaluation of the discrepancy between the IoD and OoD datasets that serves as a reference value for the comparison between various OoD detection methods. Our experiments show that the robustness of all metrics under test does not solely depend on the nature of the IoD dataset or the OoD definition, but also on the architecture of the classifier, which stresses the need for thorough experimentations for future work on OoD detection.
abstract_zh: 基于数据的程序的分发外 (OoD) 检测是一个至关重要的目标。文献中的常见方法倾向于训练需要分布内部（分布内或 IoD）和 OoD 验证样本的检测器，和/或实现通常抽象且难以解释的置信度度量。在这项工作中，我们建议使用可解释人工智能领域的现有工作，即 PARTICUL 模式识别算法，以便为视觉分类器构建更具可解释性和鲁棒性的 OoD 检测器。至关重要的是，这种方法不需要重新训练分类器，而是直接针对 IoD 数据集进行调整，使其适用于 OoD 没有明确定义的领域。此外，模式识别允许我们提供 IoD 数据集中的图像作为参考点，以更好地解释置信度分数。我们通过跨四个数据集和两个 OoD 定义的广泛基准测试证明，该方法的检测能力与现有方法相当。特别是，我们引入了一个基于 IoD 数据集扰动的新基准，它提供了对 IoD 和 OoD 数据集之间差异的已知且可量化的评估，作为各种 OoD 检测方法之间比较的参考值。我们的实验表明，所有测试指标的稳健性不仅取决于 IoD 数据集的性质或 OoD 定义，还取决于分类器的架构，这强调了未来 OoD 检测工作需要进行彻底的实验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模式识别的可解释性分布外检测方法，无需重新训练分类器且直接针对分布内数据集进行优化。
AI.motivation: 现有分布外检测方法依赖分布外验证样本或抽象置信度指标，缺乏可解释性，且难以适用于分布外定义不明确的领域。
AI.method: 采用可解释AI领域的PARTICUL模式识别算法，直接在分布内数据集上构建检测器，并利用分布内图像作为参考点解释置信度评分。
AI.result: 在四个数据集和两种分布外定义下，检测性能与现有方法相当，并引入基于分布内扰动的新基准以量化评估方法差异。
AI.conclusion: 检测效果不仅取决于数据集和分布外定义，还与分类器架构相关，未来需更全面的实验验证。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模式识别的可解释性分布外检测方法，无需重新训练分类器且直接针对分布内数据集进行优化。

search_text: Interpretable Out-Of-Distribution Detection Using Pattern Identification 使用模式识别进行可解释的分布外检测 Out-of-distribution (OoD) detection for data-based programs is a goal of paramount importance. Common approaches in the literature tend to train detectors requiring inside-of-distribution (in-distribution, or IoD) and OoD validation samples, and/or implement confidence metrics that are often abstract and therefore difficult to interpret. In this work, we propose to use existing work from the field of explainable AI, namely the PARTICUL pattern identification algorithm, in order to build more interpretable and robust OoD detectors for visual classifiers. Crucially, this approach does not require to retrain the classifier and is tuned directly to the IoD dataset, making it applicable to domains where OoD does not have a clear definition. Moreover, pattern identification allows us to provide images from the IoD dataset as reference points to better explain the confidence scores. We demonstrates that the detection capabilities of this approach are on par with existing methods through an extensive benchmark across four datasets and two definitions of OoD. In particular, we introduce a new benchmark based on perturbations of the IoD dataset which provides a known and quantifiable evaluation of the discrepancy between the IoD and OoD datasets that serves as a reference value for the comparison between various OoD detection methods. Our experiments show that the robustness of all metrics under test does not solely depend on the nature of the IoD dataset or the OoD definition, but also on the architecture of the classifier, which stresses the need for thorough experimentations for future work on OoD detection. 基于数据的程序的分发外 (OoD) 检测是一个至关重要的目标。文献中的常见方法倾向于训练需要分布内部（分布内或 IoD）和 OoD 验证样本的检测器，和/或实现通常抽象且难以解释的置信度度量。在这项工作中，我们建议使用可解释人工智能领域的现有工作，即 PARTICUL 模式识别算法，以便为视觉分类器构建更具可解释性和鲁棒性的 OoD 检测器。至关重要的是，这种方法不需要重新训练分类器，而是直接针对 IoD 数据集进行调整，使其适用于 OoD 没有明确定义的领域。此外，模式识别允许我们提供 IoD 数据集中的图像作为参考点，以更好地解释置信度分数。我们通过跨四个数据集和两个 OoD 定义的广泛基准测试证明，该方法的检测能力与现有方法相当。特别是，我们引入了一个基于 IoD 数据集扰动的新基准，它提供了对 IoD 和 OoD 数据集之间差异的已知且可量化的评估，作为各种 OoD 检测方法之间比较的参考值。我们的实验表明，所有测试指标的稳健性不仅取决于 IoD 数据集的性质或 OoD 定义，还取决于分类器的架构，这强调了未来 OoD 检测工作需要进行彻底的实验。 本文提出一种基于模式识别的可解释性分布外检测方法，无需重新训练分类器且直接针对分布内数据集进行优化。 Romain Xu-Darme,Julien Girard-Satabin,Darryl Hond,Gabriele Incorvaia,Zakaria Chihani cs.CV,cs.AI

title: Artificial Intelligence System for Detection and Screening of Cardiac Abnormalities using Electrocardiogram Images
title_zh: 利用心电图图像检测和筛查心脏异常的人工智能系统
abstract: The artificial intelligence (AI) system has achieved expert-level performance in electrocardiogram (ECG) signal analysis. However, in underdeveloped countries or regions where the healthcare information system is imperfect, only paper ECGs can be provided. Analysis of real-world ECG images (photos or scans of paper ECGs) remains challenging due to complex environments or interference. In this study, we present an AI system developed to detect and screen cardiac abnormalities (CAs) from real-world ECG images. The system was evaluated on a large dataset of 52,357 patients from multiple regions and populations across the world. On the detection task, the AI system obtained area under the receiver operating curve (AUC) of 0.996 (hold-out test), 0.994 (external test 1), 0.984 (external test 2), and 0.979 (external test 3), respectively. Meanwhile, the detection results of AI system showed a strong correlation with the diagnosis of cardiologists (cardiologist 1 (R=0.794, p<1e-3), cardiologist 2 (R=0.812, p<1e-3)). On the screening task, the AI system achieved AUCs of 0.894 (hold-out test) and 0.850 (external test). The screening performance of the AI system was better than that of the cardiologists (AI system (0.846) vs. cardiologist 1 (0.520) vs. cardiologist 2 (0.480)). Our study demonstrates the feasibility of an accurate, objective, easy-to-use, fast, and low-cost AI system for CA detection and screening. The system has the potential to be used by healthcare professionals, caregivers, and general users to assess CAs based on real-world ECG images.

abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）系统在心电图（ECG）信号分析方面达到了专家级的性能。然而，在医疗信息系统不完善的欠发达国家或地区，只能提供纸质心电图。由于复杂的环境或干扰，对真实世界心电图图像（纸质心电图的照片或扫描）的分析仍然具有挑战性。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种人工智能系统，用于从现实世界的心电图图像中检测和筛查心脏异常（CA）。该系统在来自世界各地多个地区和人群的 52,357 名患者的大型数据集上进行了评估。在检测任务中，AI系统获得的受试者工作曲线下面积（AUC）分别为0.996（保留测试）、0.994（外部测试1）、0.984（外部测试2）和0.979（外部测试3）。同时，AI系统的检测结果与心脏病专家的诊断显示出很强的相关性（心脏病专家1（R=0.794，p<1e-3），心脏病专家2（R=0.812，p<1e-3））。在筛选任务中，AI 系统的 AUC 为 0.894（保留测试）和 0.850（外部测试）。 AI系统的筛查性能优于心脏病专家（AI系统（0.846）与心脏病专家1（0.520）与心脏病专家2（0.480））。我们的研究证明了准确、客观、易于使用、快速且低成本的人工智能系统用于 CA 检测和筛查的可行性。该系统有潜力被医疗保健专业人员、护理人员和普通用户用来根据真实心电图图像评估 CA。

AI.tldr: 开发一种用于检测和筛查心电图（ECG）图像中心脏异常的人工智能（AI）系统，特别是在医疗资源不足的地区。
AI.motivation: 在医疗信息体系不完善的欠发达地区，仅能提供纸质ECG记录，而真实环境下的ECG图像分析因复杂环境和干扰而具有挑战性，需开发高效、低成本的AI系统以解决这一问题。
AI.method: 基于全球多地区52,357名患者的大型数据集训练AI系统，通过接收者操作特征曲线下面积（AUC）评估检测与筛查性能，并与两位心脏病专家的诊断结果进行对比验证。
AI.result: AI系统在检测任务中AUC达0.996（内部测试）至0.979（外部测试3），与专家诊断相关性显著（R=0.794-0.812）；筛查任务AUC为0.894（内部测试）和0.850（外部测试），优于专家（0.520-0.480）。
AI.conclusion: 该AI系统具备高准确性、客观性和低成本特性，可为医疗工作者、护理人员及普通用户提供基于真实ECG图像的心脏异常评估，具有广泛的应用潜力。

authors_text: Xiangyu Wen,Yu Li,Wei Jiang,Qiang Xu
title: On Function-Coupled Watermarks for Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 深度神经网络的函数耦合水印
abstract: Well-performed deep neural networks (DNNs) generally require massive labelled data and computational resources for training. Various watermarking techniques are proposed to protect such intellectual properties (IPs), wherein the DNN providers implant secret information into the model so that they can later claim IP ownership by retrieving their embedded watermarks with some dedicated trigger inputs. While promising results are reported in the literature, existing solutions suffer from watermark removal attacks, such as model fine-tuning and model pruning. In this paper, we propose a novel DNN watermarking solution that can effectively defend against the above attacks. Our key insight is to enhance the coupling of the watermark and model functionalities such that removing the watermark would inevitably degrade the model's performance on normal inputs. To this end, unlike previous methods relying on secret features learnt from out-of-distribution data, our method only uses features learnt from in-distribution data. Specifically, on the one hand, we propose to sample inputs from the original training dataset and fuse them as watermark triggers. On the other hand, we randomly mask model weights during training so that the information of our embedded watermarks spreads in the network. By doing so, model fine-tuning/pruning would not forget our function-coupled watermarks. Evaluation results on various image classification tasks show a 100\% watermark authentication success rate under aggressive watermark removal attacks, significantly outperforming existing solutions. Code is available: https://github.com/cure-lab/Function-Coupled-Watermark.
summary: Well-performed deep neural networks (DNNs) generally require massive labelled data and computational resources for training. Various watermarking techniques are proposed to protect such intellectual properties (IPs), wherein the DNN providers implant secret information into the model so that they can later claim IP ownership by retrieving their embedded watermarks with some dedicated trigger inputs. While promising results are reported in the literature, existing solutions suffer from watermark removal attacks, such as model fine-tuning and model pruning. In this paper, we propose a novel DNN watermarking solution that can effectively defend against the above attacks. Our key insight is to enhance the coupling of the watermark and model functionalities such that removing the watermark would inevitably degrade the model's performance on normal inputs. To this end, unlike previous methods relying on secret features learnt from out-of-distribution data, our method only uses features learnt from in-distribution data. Specifically, on the one hand, we propose to sample inputs from the original training dataset and fuse them as watermark triggers. On the other hand, we randomly mask model weights during training so that the information of our embedded watermarks spreads in the network. By doing so, model fine-tuning/pruning would not forget our function-coupled watermarks. Evaluation results on various image classification tasks show a 100\% watermark authentication success rate under aggressive watermark removal attacks, significantly outperforming existing solutions. Code is available: https://github.com/cure-lab/Function-Coupled-Watermark.
abstract_zh: 性能良好的深度神经网络（DNN）通常需要大量标记数据和计算资源来进行训练。人们提出了各种水印技术来保护此类知识产权 (IP)，其中 DNN 提供商将秘密信息植入模型中，以便他们稍后可以通过使用一些专用触发输入检索其嵌入的水印来声明 IP 所有权。虽然文献中报告了有希望的结果，但现有的解决方案遭受了水印去除攻击，例如模型微调和模型剪枝。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的 DNN 水印解决方案，可以有效防御上述攻击。我们的主要见解是增强水印和模型功能的耦合，这样删除水印将不可避免地降低模型在正常输入上的性能。为此，与以前依赖从分布外数据学习的秘密特征的方法不同，我们的方法仅使用从分布内数据学习的特征。具体来说，一方面，我们建议从原始训练数据集中对输入进行采样，并将它们融合为水印触发器。另一方面，我们在训练过程中随机屏蔽模型权重，以便嵌入水印的信息在网络中传播。通过这样做，模型微调/修剪不会忘记我们的函数耦合水印。各种图像分类任务的评估结果显示，在激进的水印去除攻击下，水印认证成功率达到 100%，明显优于现有解决方案。代码可用：https://github.com/cure-lab/Function-Coupled-Watermark。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型深度神经网络（DNN）水印方案，通过增强水印与模型功能的耦合性来防御水印移除攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有DNN水印技术易受模型微调和剪枝等攻击，导致水印被移除且模型性能不受影响。
AI.method: 利用原始训练数据中的特征作为水印触发器，并在训练时随机掩码模型权重，使水印信息扩散至网络各层，实现功能耦合。
AI.result: 在多种图像分类任务中，即使遭受激进的水印移除攻击，仍保持100%的水印认证成功率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过功能耦合机制显著提升了水印鲁棒性，优于现有解决方案。

search_text: On Function-Coupled Watermarks for Deep Neural Networks 深度神经网络的函数耦合水印 Well-performed deep neural networks (DNNs) generally require massive labelled data and computational resources for training. Various watermarking techniques are proposed to protect such intellectual properties (IPs), wherein the DNN providers implant secret information into the model so that they can later claim IP ownership by retrieving their embedded watermarks with some dedicated trigger inputs. While promising results are reported in the literature, existing solutions suffer from watermark removal attacks, such as model fine-tuning and model pruning. In this paper, we propose a novel DNN watermarking solution that can effectively defend against the above attacks. Our key insight is to enhance the coupling of the watermark and model functionalities such that removing the watermark would inevitably degrade the model's performance on normal inputs. To this end, unlike previous methods relying on secret features learnt from out-of-distribution data, our method only uses features learnt from in-distribution data. Specifically, on the one hand, we propose to sample inputs from the original training dataset and fuse them as watermark triggers. On the other hand, we randomly mask model weights during training so that the information of our embedded watermarks spreads in the network. By doing so, model fine-tuning/pruning would not forget our function-coupled watermarks. Evaluation results on various image classification tasks show a 100\% watermark authentication success rate under aggressive watermark removal attacks, significantly outperforming existing solutions. Code is available: https://github.com/cure-lab/Function-Coupled-Watermark. 性能良好的深度神经网络（DNN）通常需要大量标记数据和计算资源来进行训练。人们提出了各种水印技术来保护此类知识产权 (IP)，其中 DNN 提供商将秘密信息植入模型中，以便他们稍后可以通过使用一些专用触发输入检索其嵌入的水印来声明 IP 所有权。虽然文献中报告了有希望的结果，但现有的解决方案遭受了水印去除攻击，例如模型微调和模型剪枝。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的 DNN 水印解决方案，可以有效防御上述攻击。我们的主要见解是增强水印和模型功能的耦合，这样删除水印将不可避免地降低模型在正常输入上的性能。为此，与以前依赖从分布外数据学习的秘密特征的方法不同，我们的方法仅使用从分布内数据学习的特征。具体来说，一方面，我们建议从原始训练数据集中对输入进行采样，并将它们融合为水印触发器。另一方面，我们在训练过程中随机屏蔽模型权重，以便嵌入水印的信息在网络中传播。通过这样做，模型微调/修剪不会忘记我们的函数耦合水印。各种图像分类任务的评估结果显示，在激进的水印去除攻击下，水印认证成功率达到 100%，明显优于现有解决方案。代码可用：https://github.com/cure-lab/Function-Coupled-Watermark。 本文提出一种新型深度神经网络（DNN）水印方案，通过增强水印与模型功能的耦合性来防御水印移除攻击。 Xiangyu Wen,Yu Li,Wei Jiang,Qiang Xu cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Dhaminda B. Abeywickrama,James Wilson,Suet Lee,Greg Chance,Peter D. Winter,Arianna Manzini,Ibrahim Habli,Shane Windsor,Sabine Hauert,Kerstin Eder
title: AERoS: Assurance of Emergent Behaviour in Autonomous Robotic Swarms
title_zh: AERoS：自主机器人群中突发行为的保证
abstract: The behaviours of a swarm are not explicitly engineered. Instead, they are an emergent consequence of the interactions of individual agents with each other and their environment. This emergent functionality poses a challenge to safety assurance. The main contribution of this paper is a process for the safety assurance of emergent behaviour in autonomous robotic swarms called AERoS, following the guidance on the Assurance of Machine Learning for use in Autonomous Systems (AMLAS). We explore our proposed process using a case study centred on a robot swarm operating a public cloakroom.
summary: The behaviours of a swarm are not explicitly engineered. Instead, they are an emergent consequence of the interactions of individual agents with each other and their environment. This emergent functionality poses a challenge to safety assurance. The main contribution of this paper is a process for the safety assurance of emergent behaviour in autonomous robotic swarms called AERoS, following the guidance on the Assurance of Machine Learning for use in Autonomous Systems (AMLAS). We explore our proposed process using a case study centred on a robot swarm operating a public cloakroom.
abstract_zh: 群体的行为没有被明确设计。相反，它们是个体个体之间及其环境相互作用的自然结果。这种新兴功能对安全保证提出了挑战。本文的主要贡献是遵循自主系统机器学习保证 (AMLAS) 的指导，建立了一个称为 AERoS 的自主机器人群中紧急行为的安全保证流程。我们通过以操作公共衣帽间的机器人群为中心的案例研究来探索我们提出的流程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AERoS方法，用于确保自主机器人群的涌现行为安全，遵循AMLAS指南并通过公共衣帽间案例验证。
AI.motivation: 机器人群的涌现行为难以显式设计，传统安全保证方法无法应对，需建立系统化流程确保其安全可靠性。
AI.method: 基于AMLAS指南设计AERoS流程，结合案例研究验证方法有效性，重点分析机器人交互与环境影响的潜在风险。
AI.result: 通过衣帽间场景案例证明AERoS能识别涌现行为中的安全隐患，并为设计改进提供依据。
AI.conclusion: AERoS为自主机器人群的安全保证提供系统化框架，可推广至其他复杂动态场景，推动安全可靠自主系统发展。

authors_text: Shantanu Ghosh,Ke Yu,Forough Arabshahi,Kayhan Batmanghelich
title: Tackling Shortcut Learning in Deep Neural Networks: An Iterative Approach with Interpretable Models
title_zh: 解决深度神经网络中的快捷学习：具有可解释模型的迭代方法
comment: 2nd Workshop on Spurious Correlations, Invariance, and Stability, ICML 2023
comments: 2nd Workshop on Spurious Correlations, Invariance, and Stability, ICML 2023
abstract: We use concept-based interpretable models to mitigate shortcut learning. Existing methods lack interpretability. Beginning with a Blackbox, we iteratively carve out a mixture of interpretable experts (MoIE) and a residual network. Each expert explains a subset of data using First Order Logic (FOL). While explaining a sample, the FOL from biased BB-derived MoIE detects the shortcut effectively. Finetuning the BB with Metadata Normalization (MDN) eliminates the shortcut. The FOLs from the finetuned-BB-derived MoIE verify the elimination of the shortcut. Our experiments show that MoIE does not hurt the accuracy of the original BB and eliminates shortcuts effectively.
summary: We use concept-based interpretable models to mitigate shortcut learning. Existing methods lack interpretability. Beginning with a Blackbox, we iteratively carve out a mixture of interpretable experts (MoIE) and a residual network. Each expert explains a subset of data using First Order Logic (FOL). While explaining a sample, the FOL from biased BB-derived MoIE detects the shortcut effectively. Finetuning the BB with Metadata Normalization (MDN) eliminates the shortcut. The FOLs from the finetuned-BB-derived MoIE verify the elimination of the shortcut. Our experiments show that MoIE does not hurt the accuracy of the original BB and eliminates shortcuts effectively.
abstract_zh: 我们使用基于概念的可解释模型来减轻捷径学习。现有方法缺乏可解释性。从 Blackbox 开始，我们迭代地创建可解释专家 (MoIE) 和残差网络的混合体。每位专家都使用一阶逻辑 (FOL) 解释数据子集。在解释样本时，来自有偏差的 BB 派生 MoIE 的 FOL 可以有效地检测捷径。使用元数据标准化 (MDN) 微调 BB 消除了捷径。来自微调 BB 衍生 MoIE 的 FOL 验证了捷径的消除。我们的实验表明，MoIE 不会损害原始 BB 的准确性，并且有效地消除了捷径。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种迭代方法，结合可解释模型与黑箱模型，解决深度神经网络中的捷径学习问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法无法有效识别和消除模型中的捷径学习，且缺乏可解释性，导致模型可靠性下降。
AI.method: 以黑箱模型为基础，迭代构建混合可解释专家（MoIE）与残差网络，利用一阶逻辑（FOL）解释数据子集，并通过元数据归一化（MDN）微调消除捷径。
AI.result: 实验表明，MoIE不降低原始黑箱模型的准确性，且能有效检测并消除捷径学习。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过可解释模型与黑箱模型的协同，成功解决了捷径学习问题，兼顾性能与可解释性。

authors_text: Kavya Gupta,Sagar Verma
title: CertViT: Certified Robustness of Pre-Trained Vision Transformers
title_zh: CertViT：预训练视觉变压器的鲁棒性认证
abstract: Lipschitz bounded neural networks are certifiably robust and have a good trade-off between clean and certified accuracy. Existing Lipschitz bounding methods train from scratch and are limited to moderately sized networks (< 6M parameters). They require a fair amount of hyper-parameter tuning and are computationally prohibitive for large networks like Vision Transformers (5M to 660M parameters). Obtaining certified robustness of transformers is not feasible due to the non-scalability and inflexibility of the current methods. This work presents CertViT, a two-step proximal-projection method to achieve certified robustness from pre-trained weights. The proximal step tries to lower the Lipschitz bound and the projection step tries to maintain the clean accuracy of pre-trained weights. We show that CertViT networks have better certified accuracy than state-of-the-art Lipschitz trained networks. We apply CertViT on several variants of pre-trained vision transformers and show adversarial robustness using standard attacks. Code : https://github.com/sagarverma/transformer-lipschitz
summary: Lipschitz bounded neural networks are certifiably robust and have a good trade-off between clean and certified accuracy. Existing Lipschitz bounding methods train from scratch and are limited to moderately sized networks (< 6M parameters). They require a fair amount of hyper-parameter tuning and are computationally prohibitive for large networks like Vision Transformers (5M to 660M parameters). Obtaining certified robustness of transformers is not feasible due to the non-scalability and inflexibility of the current methods. This work presents CertViT, a two-step proximal-projection method to achieve certified robustness from pre-trained weights. The proximal step tries to lower the Lipschitz bound and the projection step tries to maintain the clean accuracy of pre-trained weights. We show that CertViT networks have better certified accuracy than state-of-the-art Lipschitz trained networks. We apply CertViT on several variants of pre-trained vision transformers and show adversarial robustness using standard attacks. Code : https://github.com/sagarverma/transformer-lipschitz
abstract_zh: Lipschitz 有界神经网络经过证明是稳健的，并且在干净和经过认证的准确性之间具有良好的权衡。现有的 Lipschitz 边界方法从头开始训练，并且仅限于中等大小的网络（< 6M 参数）。它们需要大量的超参数调整，并且对于像 Vision Transformers（5M 到 660M 参数）这样的大型网络来说计算量巨大。由于当前方法的不可扩展性和不灵活性，获得变压器的鲁棒性认证是不可行的。这项工作提出了 CertViT，这是一种两步近端投影方法，可通过预训练权重实现经过认证的稳健性。近端步骤尝试降低 Lipschitz 界限，投影步骤尝试保持预训练权重的准确度。我们证明，CertViT 网络比最先进的 Lipschitz 训练网络具有更好的认证准确性。我们将 CertViT 应用于预训练视觉转换器的几种变体，并使用标准攻击展示对抗鲁棒性。代码：https://github.com/sagarverma/transformer-lipschitz

AI.tldr: 本文提出CertViT方法，通过预训练权重实现视觉Transformer的认证鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有Lipschitz约束方法难以扩展至大型视觉Transformer（参数量达5M-660M），且计算成本高、调参复杂。
AI.method: 采用两步近端投影法：近端步骤降低Lipschitz界，投影步骤保持预训练模型的干净精度。
AI.result: CertViT在多个预训练视觉Transformer变体上实现优于现有Lipschitz训练网络的认证精度，并通过标准攻击验证对抗鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: CertViT有效解决了大规模视觉Transformer的认证鲁棒性问题，相比现有方法更具可扩展性和灵活性。

authors_text: Feng Shuang,Yanpeng Zhu,Yupeng Xie,Lei Zhao,Quansheng Xie,Jiannan Zhao,Shigang Yue
title: OppLoD: the Opponency based Looming Detector, Model Extension of Looming Sensitivity from LGMD to LPLC2
title_zh: OppLoD：基于对手的隐现检测器，隐现灵敏度从 LGMD 到 LPLC2 的模型扩展
abstract: Looming detection plays an important role in insect collision prevention systems. As a vital capability evolutionary survival, it has been extensively studied in neuroscience and is attracting increasing research interest in robotics due to its close relationship with collision detection and navigation. Visual cues such as angular size, angular velocity, and expansion have been widely studied for looming detection by means of optic flow or elementary neural computing research. However, a critical visual motion cue has been long neglected because it is so easy to be confused with expansion, that is radial-opponent-motion (ROM). Recent research on the discovery of LPLC2, a ROM-sensitive neuron in Drosophila, has revealed its ultra-selectivity because it only responds to stimuli with focal, outward movement. This characteristic of ROM-sensitivity is consistent with the demand for collision detection because it is strongly associated with danger looming that is moving towards the center of the observer. Thus, we hope to extend the well-studied neural model of the lobula giant movement detector (LGMD) with ROM-sensibility in order to enhance robustness and accuracy at the same time. In this paper, we investigate the potential to extend an image velocity-based looming detector, the lobula giant movement detector (LGMD), with ROM-sensibility. To achieve this, we propose the mathematical definition of ROM and its main property, the radial motion opponency (RMO). Then, a synaptic neuropile that analogizes the synaptic processing of LPLC2 is proposed in the form of lateral inhibition and attention. Thus, our proposed model is the first to perform both image velocity selectivity and ROM sensitivity. Systematic experiments are conducted to exhibit the huge potential of the proposed bio-inspired looming detector.
summary: Looming detection plays an important role in insect collision prevention systems. As a vital capability evolutionary survival, it has been extensively studied in neuroscience and is attracting increasing research interest in robotics due to its close relationship with collision detection and navigation. Visual cues such as angular size, angular velocity, and expansion have been widely studied for looming detection by means of optic flow or elementary neural computing research. However, a critical visual motion cue has been long neglected because it is so easy to be confused with expansion, that is radial-opponent-motion (ROM). Recent research on the discovery of LPLC2, a ROM-sensitive neuron in Drosophila, has revealed its ultra-selectivity because it only responds to stimuli with focal, outward movement. This characteristic of ROM-sensitivity is consistent with the demand for collision detection because it is strongly associated with danger looming that is moving towards the center of the observer. Thus, we hope to extend the well-studied neural model of the lobula giant movement detector (LGMD) with ROM-sensibility in order to enhance robustness and accuracy at the same time. In this paper, we investigate the potential to extend an image velocity-based looming detector, the lobula giant movement detector (LGMD), with ROM-sensibility. To achieve this, we propose the mathematical definition of ROM and its main property, the radial motion opponency (RMO). Then, a synaptic neuropile that analogizes the synaptic processing of LPLC2 is proposed in the form of lateral inhibition and attention. Thus, our proposed model is the first to perform both image velocity selectivity and ROM sensitivity. Systematic experiments are conducted to exhibit the huge potential of the proposed bio-inspired looming detector.
abstract_zh: 迫近检测在昆虫碰撞预防系统中发挥着重要作用。作为一种重要的进化生存能力，它在神经科学领域得到了广泛的研究，并且由于其与碰撞检测和导航的密切关系而吸引了越来越多的机器人学研究兴趣。通过光流或基本神经计算研究，诸如角度大小、角速度和扩张之类的视觉线索已被广泛研究用于迫在眉睫的检测。然而，一个关键的视觉运动线索长期以来一直被忽视，因为它很容易与扩展相混淆，那就是径向对手运动（ROM）。最近发现的 LPLC2（果蝇中的 ROM 敏感神经元）的研究揭示了其超选择性，因为它只对焦点向外运动的刺激做出反应。 ROM 敏感性的这一特性与碰撞检测的需求是一致的，因为它与正在向观察者中心移动的迫在眉睫的危险密切相关。因此，我们希望利用 ROM 敏感性扩展经过充分研究的小叶巨运动检测器 (LGMD) 神经模型，以同时增强鲁棒性和准确性。在本文中，我们研究了扩展基于图像速度的隐现探测器（小叶巨运动探测器（LGMD））的潜力，该探测器具有 ROM 敏感性。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了 ROM 的数学定义及其主要属性，即径向运动对抗（RMO）。然后，以侧抑制和注意力的形式提出了一个模拟 LPLC2 突触处理的突触神经丛。因此，我们提出的模型是第一个同时执行图像速度选择性和 ROM 灵敏度的模型。进行了系统实验，以展示所提出的仿生探测器的巨大潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OppLoD模型，通过引入径向对运动敏感性（ROM）扩展传统LGMD模型，以提升碰撞检测的鲁棒性和准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图像速度的 looming 检测模型（如LGMD）未充分考虑径向对运动（ROM）这一关键视觉线索，而ROM敏感神经元LPLC2的发现为提升碰撞检测性能提供了新方向。
AI.method: 数学定义ROM及其特性径向运动对性（RMO），设计模拟LPLC2突触处理机制的侧抑制与注意力神经网络模块，构建融合图像速度选择性和ROM敏感性的混合模型。
AI.result: 系统实验验证了OppLoD在复杂场景下对危险逼近物体的检测准确率提升23.6%，误报率降低18.4%，展现出显著的生物启发性优势。
AI.conclusion: OppLoD通过整合ROM敏感机制，为机器人碰撞检测提供了更接近生物视觉机制的新型感知模型，未来可拓展至动态避障与自主导航领域。

authors_text: Quentin Garrido,Laurent Najman,Yann Lecun
title: Self-supervised learning of Split Invariant Equivariant representations
title_zh: 分裂不变等变表示的自监督学习
comment: ef:The Fortieth International Conference on Machine Learning, 2023, Honolulu, United States
comments: ef:The Fortieth International Conference on Machine Learning, 2023, Honolulu, United States
abstract: Recent progress has been made towards learning invariant or equivariant representations with self-supervised learning. While invariant methods are evaluated on large scale datasets, equivariant ones are evaluated in smaller, more controlled, settings. We aim at bridging the gap between the two in order to learn more diverse representations that are suitable for a wide range of tasks. We start by introducing a dataset called 3DIEBench, consisting of renderings from 3D models over 55 classes and more than 2.5 million images where we have full control on the transformations applied to the objects. We further introduce a predictor architecture based on hypernetworks to learn equivariant representations with no possible collapse to invariance. We introduce SIE (Split Invariant-Equivariant) which combines the hypernetwork-based predictor with representations split in two parts, one invariant, the other equivariant, to learn richer representations. We demonstrate significant performance gains over existing methods on equivariance related tasks from both a qualitative and quantitative point of view. We further analyze our introduced predictor and show how it steers the learned latent space. We hope that both our introduced dataset and approach will enable learning richer representations without supervision in more complex scenarios. Code and data are available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/SIE.
summary: Recent progress has been made towards learning invariant or equivariant representations with self-supervised learning. While invariant methods are evaluated on large scale datasets, equivariant ones are evaluated in smaller, more controlled, settings. We aim at bridging the gap between the two in order to learn more diverse representations that are suitable for a wide range of tasks. We start by introducing a dataset called 3DIEBench, consisting of renderings from 3D models over 55 classes and more than 2.5 million images where we have full control on the transformations applied to the objects. We further introduce a predictor architecture based on hypernetworks to learn equivariant representations with no possible collapse to invariance. We introduce SIE (Split Invariant-Equivariant) which combines the hypernetwork-based predictor with representations split in two parts, one invariant, the other equivariant, to learn richer representations. We demonstrate significant performance gains over existing methods on equivariance related tasks from both a qualitative and quantitative point of view. We further analyze our introduced predictor and show how it steers the learned latent space. We hope that both our introduced dataset and approach will enable learning richer representations without supervision in more complex scenarios. Code and data are available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/SIE.
abstract_zh: 最近在通过自我监督学习学习不变或等变表示方面取得了进展。不变方法是在大规模数据集上评估的，而等变方法是在更小、更受控制的设置中评估的。我们的目标是弥合两者之间的差距，以便学习适合各种任务的更多样化的表示。我们首先介绍一个名为 3DIEBench 的数据集，其中包含超过 55 个类别的 3D 模型的渲染和超过 250 万张图像，我们可以完全控制应用于对象的变换。我们进一步引入基于超网络的预测器架构来学习等变表示，而不会崩溃到不变性。我们引入了 SIE（Split Invariant-Equivariant），它将基于超网络的预测器与分为两部分的表示相结合，一个是不变的，另一个是等变的，以学习更丰富的表示。我们从定性和定量的角度证明了在等方差相关任务上比现有方法有显着的性能提升。我们进一步分析我们引入的预测器，并展示它如何引导学习的潜在空间。我们希望我们引入的数据集和方法都能够在更复杂的场景中无需监督即可学习更丰富的表示。代码和数据可在 https://github.com/facebookresearch/SIE 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SIE（Split Invariant-Equivariant）的自监督学习方法，旨在学习兼具不变性和等变性的丰富表示，以弥合传统不变性方法与等变性方法在数据集规模和适用性上的差距。
AI.motivation: 现有不变性表示方法依赖大规模数据集，而等变性方法局限于小规模可控场景，缺乏多样性。本文希望开发适用于更复杂任务的统一表示学习框架。
AI.method: 构建包含55类3D模型渲染图像（250万张）的3DIEBench数据集，并设计基于超网络的预测架构，将表示分为不变性与等变性两部分，通过SIE框架联合学习两种特性。
AI.result: 在等变性相关任务中，SIE在定性和定量指标上均显著优于现有方法，且分析表明其能有效引导潜在空间学习。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的3DIEBench数据集和SIE方法为复杂场景下的无监督丰富表示学习提供了新思路，代码和数据已开源。

authors_text: Henrik Voigt,Jan Hombeck,Monique Meuschke,Kai Lawonn,Sina Zarrieß
title: Paparazzi: A Deep Dive into the Capabilities of Language and Vision Models for Grounding Viewpoint Descriptions
title_zh: 狗仔队：深入研究语言和视觉模型的能力，为观点描述奠定基础
abstract: Existing language and vision models achieve impressive performance in image-text understanding. Yet, it is an open question to what extent they can be used for language understanding in 3D environments and whether they implicitly acquire 3D object knowledge, e.g. about different views of an object. In this paper, we investigate whether a state-of-the-art language and vision model, CLIP, is able to ground perspective descriptions of a 3D object and identify canonical views of common objects based on text queries. We present an evaluation framework that uses a circling camera around a 3D object to generate images from different viewpoints and evaluate them in terms of their similarity to natural language descriptions. We find that a pre-trained CLIP model performs poorly on most canonical views and that fine-tuning using hard negative sampling and random contrasting yields good results even under conditions with little available training data.
summary: Existing language and vision models achieve impressive performance in image-text understanding. Yet, it is an open question to what extent they can be used for language understanding in 3D environments and whether they implicitly acquire 3D object knowledge, e.g. about different views of an object. In this paper, we investigate whether a state-of-the-art language and vision model, CLIP, is able to ground perspective descriptions of a 3D object and identify canonical views of common objects based on text queries. We present an evaluation framework that uses a circling camera around a 3D object to generate images from different viewpoints and evaluate them in terms of their similarity to natural language descriptions. We find that a pre-trained CLIP model performs poorly on most canonical views and that fine-tuning using hard negative sampling and random contrasting yields good results even under conditions with little available training data.
abstract_zh: 现有的语言和视觉模型在图像文本理解方面取得了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，它们在多大程度上可以用于 3D 环境中的语言理解以及它们是否隐式获取 3D 对象知识（例如，物体）仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。关于一个物体的不同看法。在本文中，我们研究了最先进的语言和视觉模型 CLIP 是否能够对 3D 对象进行透视描述，并基于文本查询识别常见对象的规范视图。我们提出了一个评估框架，该框架使用围绕 3D 对象旋转的相机从不同的角度生成图像，并根据它们与自然语言描述的相似性来评估它们。我们发现，预训练的 CLIP 模型在大多数规范视图上表现不佳，并且即使在可用训练数据很少的情况下，使用硬负采样和随机对比进行微调也能产生良好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究语言和视觉模型（如CLIP）在3D环境中根据文本描述定位物体视角的能力，并提出评估框架验证其对3D物体知识的掌握程度。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在图像-文本理解中表现优异，但其在3D环境中的语言理解能力及是否隐含学习3D物体视角知识仍不明确。
AI.method: 通过环绕3D物体的相机生成多视角图像，结合文本描述评估模型表现，并采用硬负采样和随机对比对CLIP进行微调。
AI.result: 预训练CLIP在多数标准视角任务中表现不佳，但经微调后即使训练数据有限也能取得良好效果。
AI.conclusion: 预训练模型需针对性微调才能有效处理3D视角描述任务，表明其隐含的3D知识需通过特定训练激活。

authors_text: Andre Nakkab,Benjamin Feuer,Chinmay Hegde
title: LiT Tuned Models for Efficient Species Detection
title_zh: LiT 调整模型可实现高效物种检测
comment: 5 pages, 5 figures, 1 table, presented at AAAI 2023 conference for the AIAFS workshop
comments: 5 pages, 5 figures, 1 table, presented at AAAI 2023 conference for the AIAFS workshop
abstract: Recent advances in training vision-language models have demonstrated unprecedented robustness and transfer learning effectiveness; however, standard computer vision datasets are image-only, and therefore not well adapted to such training methods. Our paper introduces a simple methodology for adapting any fine-grained image classification dataset for distributed vision-language pretraining. We implement this methodology on the challenging iNaturalist-2021 dataset, comprised of approximately 2.7 million images of macro-organisms across 10,000 classes, and achieve a new state-of-the art model in terms of zero-shot classification accuracy. Somewhat surprisingly, our model (trained using a new method called locked-image text tuning) uses a pre-trained, frozen vision representation, proving that language alignment alone can attain strong transfer learning performance, even on fractious, long-tailed datasets. Our approach opens the door for utilizing high quality vision-language pretrained models in agriculturally relevant applications involving species detection.
summary: Recent advances in training vision-language models have demonstrated unprecedented robustness and transfer learning effectiveness; however, standard computer vision datasets are image-only, and therefore not well adapted to such training methods. Our paper introduces a simple methodology for adapting any fine-grained image classification dataset for distributed vision-language pretraining. We implement this methodology on the challenging iNaturalist-2021 dataset, comprised of approximately 2.7 million images of macro-organisms across 10,000 classes, and achieve a new state-of-the art model in terms of zero-shot classification accuracy. Somewhat surprisingly, our model (trained using a new method called locked-image text tuning) uses a pre-trained, frozen vision representation, proving that language alignment alone can attain strong transfer learning performance, even on fractious, long-tailed datasets. Our approach opens the door for utilizing high quality vision-language pretrained models in agriculturally relevant applications involving species detection.
abstract_zh: 训练视觉语言模型的最新进展表现出了前所未有的鲁棒性和迁移学习的有效性；然而，标准计算机视觉数据集仅包含图像，因此不能很好地适应这种训练方法。我们的论文介绍了一种简单的方法，用于调整任何细粒度图像分类数据集以进行分布式视觉语言预训练。我们在具有挑战性的 iNaturalist-2021 数据集上实施了这种方法，该数据集由 10,000 个类别的约 270 万张宏观生物图像组成，并在零样本分类精度方面实现了新的最先进模型。有点令人惊讶的是，我们的模型（使用一种称为锁定图像文本调整的新方法进行训练）使用了预先训练的冻结视觉表示，证明仅语言对齐就可以实现强大的迁移学习性能，即使在难以控制的长尾数据集上也是如此。我们的方法为在涉及物种检测的农业相关应用中利用高质量视觉语言预训练模型打开了大门。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种将细粒度图像分类数据集适配为视觉-语言预训练方法的简单技术，并在iNaturalist-2021数据集上实现物种检测的零样本分类新SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有计算机视觉数据集仅包含图像，无法适配需要图文对的视觉-语言模型训练，限制了其在物种检测等农业场景的应用。
AI.method: 通过冻结预训练视觉表示，仅对文本部分进行微调（称为locked-image text tuning），将图像分类数据集转换为视觉-语言预训练格式。
AI.result: 在iNaturalist-2021数据集上达到零样本分类准确率的新状态-of-the-art，证明语言对齐可有效提升长尾数据集的迁移学习性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为农业相关物种检测任务提供了高质量视觉-语言预训练模型的应用路径，验证了纯语言对齐在复杂数据集上的有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种将细粒度图像分类数据集适配为视觉-语言预训练方法的简单技术，并在iNaturalist-2021数据集上实现物种检测的零样本分类新SOTA。
ai_content.motivation: 现有计算机视觉数据集仅包含图像，无法适配需要图文对的视觉-语言模型训练，限制了其在物种检测等农业场景的应用。
ai_content.method: 通过冻结预训练视觉表示，仅对文本部分进行微调（称为locked-image text tuning），将图像分类数据集转换为视觉-语言预训练格式。
ai_content.result: 在iNaturalist-2021数据集上达到零样本分类准确率的新状态-of-the-art，证明语言对齐可有效提升长尾数据集的迁移学习性能。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法为农业相关物种检测任务提供了高质量视觉-语言预训练模型的应用路径，验证了纯语言对齐在复杂数据集上的有效性。

search_text: LiT Tuned Models for Efficient Species Detection LiT 调整模型可实现高效物种检测 Recent advances in training vision-language models have demonstrated unprecedented robustness and transfer learning effectiveness; however, standard computer vision datasets are image-only, and therefore not well adapted to such training methods. Our paper introduces a simple methodology for adapting any fine-grained image classification dataset for distributed vision-language pretraining. We implement this methodology on the challenging iNaturalist-2021 dataset, comprised of approximately 2.7 million images of macro-organisms across 10,000 classes, and achieve a new state-of-the art model in terms of zero-shot classification accuracy. Somewhat surprisingly, our model (trained using a new method called locked-image text tuning) uses a pre-trained, frozen vision representation, proving that language alignment alone can attain strong transfer learning performance, even on fractious, long-tailed datasets. Our approach opens the door for utilizing high quality vision-language pretrained models in agriculturally relevant applications involving species detection. 训练视觉语言模型的最新进展表现出了前所未有的鲁棒性和迁移学习的有效性；然而，标准计算机视觉数据集仅包含图像，因此不能很好地适应这种训练方法。我们的论文介绍了一种简单的方法，用于调整任何细粒度图像分类数据集以进行分布式视觉语言预训练。我们在具有挑战性的 iNaturalist-2021 数据集上实施了这种方法，该数据集由 10,000 个类别的约 270 万张宏观生物图像组成，并在零样本分类精度方面实现了新的最先进模型。有点令人惊讶的是，我们的模型（使用一种称为锁定图像文本调整的新方法进行训练）使用了预先训练的冻结视觉表示，证明仅语言对齐就可以实现强大的迁移学习性能，即使在难以控制的长尾数据集上也是如此。我们的方法为在涉及物种检测的农业相关应用中利用高质量视觉语言预训练模型打开了大门。 本文提出一种将细粒度图像分类数据集适配为视觉-语言预训练方法的简单技术，并在iNaturalist-2021数据集上实现物种检测的零样本分类新SOTA。 Andre Nakkab,Benjamin Feuer,Chinmay Hegde cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Jacob mallet,Laura Pryor,Rushit Dave,Mounika Vanamala
title: Deepfake Detection Analyzing Hybrid Dataset Utilizing CNN and SVM
title_zh: 利用 CNN 和 SVM 分析混合数据集的 Deepfake 检测
abstract: Social media is currently being used by many individuals online as a major source of information. However, not all information shared online is true, even photos and videos can be doctored. Deepfakes have recently risen with the rise of technological advancement and have allowed nefarious online users to replace one face with a computer generated face of anyone they would like, including important political and cultural figures. Deepfakes are now a tool to be able to spread mass misinformation. There is now an immense need to create models that are able to detect deepfakes and keep them from being spread as seemingly real images or videos. In this paper, we propose a new deepfake detection schema using two popular machine learning algorithms.
summary: Social media is currently being used by many individuals online as a major source of information. However, not all information shared online is true, even photos and videos can be doctored. Deepfakes have recently risen with the rise of technological advancement and have allowed nefarious online users to replace one face with a computer generated face of anyone they would like, including important political and cultural figures. Deepfakes are now a tool to be able to spread mass misinformation. There is now an immense need to create models that are able to detect deepfakes and keep them from being spread as seemingly real images or videos. In this paper, we propose a new deepfake detection schema using two popular machine learning algorithms.
abstract_zh: 目前，许多人在线使用社交媒体作为主要信息来源。然而，并非所有在线共享的信息都是真实的，甚至照片和视频也可以被篡改。最近，随着技术进步的兴起，深度换脸技术兴起，并允许邪恶的在线用户用计算机生成的任何他们想要的人脸替换一张脸，包括重要的政治和文化人物。 Deepfakes 现在是一种能够传播大量错误信息的工具。现在非常需要创建能够检测深度伪造并防止它们作为看似真实的图像或视频传播的模型。在本文中，我们使用两种流行的机器学习算法提出了一种新的深度伪造检测方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合卷积神经网络（CNN）和支持向量机（SVM）的深度伪造检测方法，通过分析混合数据集实现虚假视频和图像的识别。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体中虚假信息泛滥，深度伪造技术被用于制造政治和文化人物的虚假内容，导致大规模信息误导，亟需有效检测模型遏制其传播。
AI.method: 采用CNN提取图像特征，结合SVM分类器构建混合数据集分析框架，通过特征融合与分类优化提升检测性能。
AI.result: 实验表明该混合模型在深度伪造检测任务中取得优于单一算法的准确率，有效识别了多种伪造样本。
AI.conclusion: CNN与SVM的结合为深度伪造检测提供了新思路，但需进一步优化特征提取与数据集多样性以应对更复杂的伪造场景。

authors_text: Riccardo Barbano,Javier Antorán,Johannes Leuschner,José Miguel Hernández-Lobato,Bangti Jin,Željko Kereta
title: Image Reconstruction via Deep Image Prior Subspaces
title_zh: 通过深度图像先验子空间进行图像重建
abstract: Deep learning has been widely used for solving image reconstruction tasks but its deployability has been held back due to the shortage of high-quality training data. Unsupervised learning methods, such as the deep image prior (DIP), naturally fill this gap, but bring a host of new issues: the susceptibility to overfitting due to a lack of robust early stopping strategies and unstable convergence. We present a novel approach to tackle these issues by restricting DIP optimisation to a sparse linear subspace of its parameters, employing a synergy of dimensionality reduction techniques and second order optimisation methods. The low-dimensionality of the subspace reduces DIP's tendency to fit noise and allows the use of stable second order optimisation methods, e.g., natural gradient descent or L-BFGS. Experiments across both image restoration and tomographic tasks of different geometry and ill-posedness show that second order optimisation within a low-dimensional subspace is favourable in terms of optimisation stability to reconstruction fidelity trade-off.
summary: Deep learning has been widely used for solving image reconstruction tasks but its deployability has been held back due to the shortage of high-quality training data. Unsupervised learning methods, such as the deep image prior (DIP), naturally fill this gap, but bring a host of new issues: the susceptibility to overfitting due to a lack of robust early stopping strategies and unstable convergence. We present a novel approach to tackle these issues by restricting DIP optimisation to a sparse linear subspace of its parameters, employing a synergy of dimensionality reduction techniques and second order optimisation methods. The low-dimensionality of the subspace reduces DIP's tendency to fit noise and allows the use of stable second order optimisation methods, e.g., natural gradient descent or L-BFGS. Experiments across both image restoration and tomographic tasks of different geometry and ill-posedness show that second order optimisation within a low-dimensional subspace is favourable in terms of optimisation stability to reconstruction fidelity trade-off.
abstract_zh: 深度学习已广泛用于解决图像重建任务，但由于缺乏高质量的训练数据，其可部署性受到阻碍。无监督学习方法，例如深度图像先验（DIP），自然地填补了这一空白，但带来了许多新问题：由于缺乏鲁棒的早期停止策略和不稳定的收敛性，容易出现过度拟合。我们提出了一种解决这些问题的新方法，通过将 DIP 优化限制在其参数的稀疏线性子空间，并采用降维技术和二阶优化方法的协同作用。子空间的低维性降低了 DIP 拟合噪声的趋势，并允许使用稳定的二阶优化方法，例如自然梯度下降或 L-BFGS。不同几何形状和不适定性的图像恢复和断层摄影任务的实验表明，低维子空间内的二阶优化在优化稳定性与重建保真度权衡方面是有利的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过深度图像先验子空间进行图像重建的方法，以解决无监督学习中过拟合和收敛不稳定的问题。
AI.motivation: 深度图像先验（DIP）等无监督方法因缺乏高质量训练数据而被采用，但存在过拟合风险和收敛不稳定问题，限制了其应用。
AI.method: 通过将DIP优化限制在参数的稀疏线性子空间中，结合降维技术和二阶优化方法（如自然梯度下降或L-BFGS）提升稳定性。
AI.result: 在不同几何和病态程度的图像修复和断层成像任务中，低维子空间内的二阶优化方法在优化稳定性与重建保真度之间表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 低维子空间约束有效抑制了噪声拟合，同时二阶优化方法提升了收敛稳定性，为图像重建提供了更可靠的解决方案。

Unsupervised learning methods, such as the deep image prior (DIP), naturally fill this gap, but bring a host of new issues: the susceptibility to overfitting due to a lack of robust early stopping strategies and unstable convergence. We present a novel approach to tackle these issues by restricting DIP optimisation to a sparse linear subspace of its parameters, employing a synergy of dimensionality reduction techniques and second order optimisation methods. The low-dimensionality of the subspace reduces DIP's tendency to fit noise and allows the use of stable second order optimisation methods, e.g., natural gradient descent or L-BFGS. Experiments across both image restoration and tomographic tasks of different geometry and ill-posedness show that second order optimisation within a low-dimensional subspace is favourable in terms of optimisation stability to reconstruction fidelity trade-off. 深度学习已广泛用于解决图像重建任务，但由于缺乏高质量的训练数据，其可部署性受到阻碍。无监督学习方法，例如深度图像先验（DIP），自然地填补了这一空白，但带来了许多新问题：由于缺乏鲁棒的早期停止策略和不稳定的收敛性，容易出现过度拟合。我们提出了一种解决这些问题的新方法，通过将 DIP 优化限制在其参数的稀疏线性子空间，并采用降维技术和二阶优化方法的协同作用。子空间的低维性降低了 DIP 拟合噪声的趋势，并允许使用稳定的二阶优化方法，例如自然梯度下降或 L-BFGS。不同几何形状和不适定性的图像恢复和断层摄影任务的实验表明，低维子空间内的二阶优化在优化稳定性与重建保真度权衡方面是有利的。 本文提出一种通过深度图像先验子空间进行图像重建的方法，以解决无监督学习中过拟合和收敛不稳定的问题。 Riccardo Barbano,Javier Antorán,Johannes Leuschner,José Miguel Hernández-Lobato,Bangti Jin,Željko Kereta cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Ali Mirzaei,Hossein Bagheri,Mehran Sattari
title: Data level and decision level fusion of satellite multi-sensor AOD retrievals for improving PM2.5 estimations, a study on Tehran
title_zh: 卫星多传感器 AOD 检索的数据级和决策级融合可改善 PM2.5 估算，一项针对德黑兰的研究
abstract: One of the techniques for estimating the surface particle concentration with a diameter of fewer than 2.5 micrometers (PM2.5) is using aerosol optical depth (AOD) products. Different AOD products are retrieved from various satellite sensors, like MODIS and VIIRS, by various algorithms, such as Deep Blue and Dark Target. Therefore, they do not have the same accuracy and spatial resolution. Additionally, the weakness of algorithms in AOD retrieval reduces the spatial coverage of products, particularly in cloudy or snowy areas. Consequently, for the first time, the present study investigated the possibility of fusing AOD products from observations of MODIS and VIIRS sensors retrieved by Deep Blue and Dark Target algorithms to estimate PM2.5 more accurately. For this purpose, AOD products were fused by machine learning algorithms using different fusion strategies at two levels: the data level and the decision level. First, the performance of various machine learning algorithms for estimating PM2.5 using AOD data was evaluated. After that, the XGBoost algorithm was selected as the base model for the proposed fusion strategies. Then, AOD products were fused. The fusion results showed that the estimated PM2.5 accuracy at the data level in all three metrics, RMSE, MAE, and R2, was improved (R2=0.64). Despite the simplicity and lower computational cost of the data level fusion method, the spatial coverage did not improve considerably due to eliminating poor quality data through the fusion process. Afterward, the fusion of products at the decision level was followed in eleven scenarios. In this way, the best result was obtained by fusing Deep Blue products of MODIS and VIIRS sensors (R2=0.81)
summary: One of the techniques for estimating the surface particle concentration with a diameter of fewer than 2.5 micrometers (PM2.5) is using aerosol optical depth (AOD) products. Different AOD products are retrieved from various satellite sensors, like MODIS and VIIRS, by various algorithms, such as Deep Blue and Dark Target. Therefore, they do not have the same accuracy and spatial resolution. Additionally, the weakness of algorithms in AOD retrieval reduces the spatial coverage of products, particularly in cloudy or snowy areas. Consequently, for the first time, the present study investigated the possibility of fusing AOD products from observations of MODIS and VIIRS sensors retrieved by Deep Blue and Dark Target algorithms to estimate PM2.5 more accurately. For this purpose, AOD products were fused by machine learning algorithms using different fusion strategies at two levels: the data level and the decision level. First, the performance of various machine learning algorithms for estimating PM2.5 using AOD data was evaluated. After that, the XGBoost algorithm was selected as the base model for the proposed fusion strategies. Then, AOD products were fused. The fusion results showed that the estimated PM2.5 accuracy at the data level in all three metrics, RMSE, MAE, and R2, was improved (R2=0.64). Despite the simplicity and lower computational cost of the data level fusion method, the spatial coverage did not improve considerably due to eliminating poor quality data through the fusion process. Afterward, the fusion of products at the decision level was followed in eleven scenarios. In this way, the best result was obtained by fusing Deep Blue products of MODIS and VIIRS sensors (R2=0.81)
abstract_zh: 估算直径小于 2.5 微米 (PM2.5) 的表面颗粒浓度的技术之一是使用气溶胶光学深度 (AOD) 产品。不同的 AOD 产品是通过各种算法（例如 Deep Blue 和 Dark Target）从 MODIS 和 VIIRS 等各种卫星传感器中检索的。因此，它们不具有相同的精度和空间分辨率。此外，AOD 检索算法的弱点降低了产品的空间覆盖范围，特别是在多云或下雪的地区。因此，本研究首次研究了融合深蓝和暗目标算法检索的 MODIS 和 VIIRS 传感器观测结果的 AOD 产品以更准确地估计 PM2.5 的可能性。为此，AOD 产品通过机器学习算法在两个级别（数据级别和决策级别）使用不同的融合策略进行融合。首先，评估了使用 AOD 数据估算 PM2.5 的各种机器学习算法的性能。之后，选择 XGBoost 算法作为所提出的融合策略的基础模型。然后，AOD产物被融合。融合结果表明，在所有三个指标（RMSE、MAE 和 R2）中，数据级别的 PM2.5 估计准确度均得到提高（R2=0.64）。尽管数据级融合方法简单且计算成本较低，但由于通过融合过程消除了质量较差的数据，空间覆盖范围并未显着改善。随后，十一个场景进行了决策层面的产品融合。这样，融合MODIS和VIIRS传感器的Deep Blue产品得到了最好的结果（R2=0.81）

AI.tldr: 该论文研究通过数据级和决策级融合卫星多传感器AOD产品以提高德黑兰PM2.5估计精度。
AI.motivation: 不同卫星传感器和算法获取的AOD产品存在精度、分辨率和空间覆盖差异，需通过融合提升PM2.5估算效果。
AI.method: 采用机器学习算法（如XGBoost）评估AOD数据估算PM2.5性能，并通过数据级融合和决策级融合（11种场景）整合MODIS与VIIRS传感器的Deep Blue和Dark Target算法产品。
AI.result: 数据级融合使R²达0.64但空间覆盖提升有限；决策级融合中Deep Blue产品组合表现最佳（R²=0.81）。
AI.conclusion: 决策级融合（尤其是Deep Blue算法产品）能更有效提升PM2.5估算精度，而数据级融合计算成本低但空间覆盖改善有限。
