Consequently, for the first time, the present study investigated the possibility of fusing AOD products from observations of MODIS and VIIRS sensors retrieved by Deep Blue and Dark Target algorithms to estimate PM2.5 more accurately. For this purpose, AOD products were fused by machine learning algorithms using different fusion strategies at two levels: the data level and the decision level. Despite the simplicity and lower computational cost of the data level fusion method, the spatial coverage did not improve considerably due to eliminating poor quality data through the fusion process. Afterward, the fusion of products at the decision level was followed in eleven scenarios. In this way, the best result was obtained by fusing Deep Blue products of MODIS and VIIRS sensors (R2=0.81) 估算直径小于 2.5 微米 (PM2.5) 的表面颗粒浓度的技术之一是使用气溶胶光学深度 (AOD) 产品。不同的 AOD 产品是通过各种算法（例如 Deep Blue 和 Dark Target）从 MODIS 和 VIIRS 等各种卫星传感器中检索的。因此，它们不具有相同的精度和空间分辨率。此外，AOD 检索算法的弱点降低了产品的空间覆盖范围，特别是在多云或下雪的地区。因此，本研究首次研究了融合深蓝和暗目标算法检索的 MODIS 和 VIIRS 传感器观测结果的 AOD 产品以更准确地估计 PM2.5 的可能性。为此，AOD 产品通过机器学习算法在两个级别（数据级别和决策级别）使用不同的融合策略进行融合。首先，评估了使用 AOD 数据估算 PM2.5 的各种机器学习算法的性能。之后，选择 XGBoost 算法作为所提出的融合策略的基础模型。然后，AOD产物被融合。融合结果表明，在所有三个指标（RMSE、MAE 和 R2）中，数据级别的 PM2.5 估计准确度均得到提高（R2=0.64）。尽管数据级融合方法简单且计算成本较低，但由于通过融合过程消除了质量较差的数据，空间覆盖范围并未显着改善。随后，十一个场景进行了决策层面的产品融合。这样，融合MODIS和VIIRS传感器的Deep Blue产品得到了最好的结果（R2=0.81） 该论文研究通过数据级和决策级融合卫星多传感器AOD产品以提高德黑兰PM2.5估计精度。 Ali Mirzaei,Hossein Bagheri,Mehran Sattari cs.CV,eess.SP

authors_text: Sourav Saha,Trina Chakraborty,Rejwan Bin Sulaiman,Tithi Paul
title: A Comparative Analysis of CNN-Based Pretrained Models for the Detection and Prediction of Monkeypox
title_zh: 基于 CNN 的猴痘检测和预测预训练模型的比较分析
abstract: Monkeypox is a rare disease that raised concern among medical specialists following the convi-19 pandemic. It's concerning since monkeypox is difficult to diagnose early on because of symptoms that are similar to chickenpox and measles. Furthermore, because this is a rare condition, there is a knowledge gap among healthcare professionals. As a result, there is an urgent need for a novel technique to combat and anticipate the disease in the early phases of individual virus infection. Multiple CNN-based pre-trained models, including VGG-16, VGG-19, Restnet50, Inception-V3, Densnet, Xception, MobileNetV2, Alexnet, Lenet, and majority Voting, were employed in classification in this study. For this study, multiple data sets were combined, such as monkeypox vs chickenpox, monkeypox versus measles, monkeypox versus normal, and monkeypox versus all diseases. Majority voting performed 97% in monkeypox vs chickenpox, Xception achieved 79% in monkeypox against measles, MobileNetV2 scored 96% in monkeypox vs normal, and Lenet performed 80% in monkeypox versus all.
summary: Monkeypox is a rare disease that raised concern among medical specialists following the convi-19 pandemic. It's concerning since monkeypox is difficult to diagnose early on because of symptoms that are similar to chickenpox and measles. Furthermore, because this is a rare condition, there is a knowledge gap among healthcare professionals. As a result, there is an urgent need for a novel technique to combat and anticipate the disease in the early phases of individual virus infection. Multiple CNN-based pre-trained models, including VGG-16, VGG-19, Restnet50, Inception-V3, Densnet, Xception, MobileNetV2, Alexnet, Lenet, and majority Voting, were employed in classification in this study. For this study, multiple data sets were combined, such as monkeypox vs chickenpox, monkeypox versus measles, monkeypox versus normal, and monkeypox versus all diseases. Majority voting performed 97% in monkeypox vs chickenpox, Xception achieved 79% in monkeypox against measles, MobileNetV2 scored 96% in monkeypox vs normal, and Lenet performed 80% in monkeypox versus all.
abstract_zh: 猴痘是一种罕见疾病，在 convi-19 大流行后引起了医学专家的关注。这是令人担忧的，因为猴痘很难早期诊断，因为其症状与水痘和麻疹相似。此外，由于这是一种罕见的情况，医疗保健专业人员之间存在知识差距。因此，迫切需要一种新技术来对抗和预测个体病毒感染的早期阶段的疾病。本研究中的分类采用了多种基于 CNN 的预训练模型，包括 VGG-16、VGG-19、Restnet50、Inception-V3、Densnet、Xception、MobileNetV2、Alexnet、Lenet 和多数投票。在这项研究中，结合了多个数据集，例如猴痘与水痘、猴痘与麻疹、猴痘与正常人以及猴痘与所有疾病。多数投票在猴痘与水痘方面的得分为 97%，Xception 在猴痘与麻疹方面的得分为 79%，MobileNetV2 在猴痘与正常情况下的得分为 96%，Lenet 在猴痘与所有人之间的得分为 80%。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了多种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的预训练模型在猴痘检测与预测中的性能。
AI.motivation: 猴痘早期症状与水痘、麻疹相似且为罕见疾病，导致诊断困难，医疗人员知识不足，亟需有效检测技术。
AI.method: 采用VGG-16、ResNet50、Inception-V3等10种CNN预训练模型，结合多数据集（猴痘vs水痘、猴痘vs麻疹等）进行分类实验。
AI.result: Majority Voting在猴痘vs水痘中达97%准确率，MobileNetV2在猴痘vs正常中为96%，Xception和Lenet在特定数据集分别达到79%和80%。
AI.conclusion: 多数投票模型表现最佳，但需更多数据验证泛化能力，CNN预训练模型对猴痘检测具有应用潜力。

authors_text: Likun Yang,Xiaokun Feng,Xiaotang Chen,Shiyu Zhang,Kaiqi Huang
title: See Your Heart: Psychological states Interpretation through Visual Creations
title_zh: 看到你的心：通过视觉创作解读心理状态
abstract: In psychoanalysis, generating interpretations to one's psychological state through visual creations is facing significant demands. The two main tasks of existing studies in the field of computer vision, sentiment/emotion classification and affective captioning, can hardly satisfy the requirement of psychological interpreting. To meet the demands for psychoanalysis, we introduce a challenging task, \textbf{V}isual \textbf{E}motion \textbf{I}nterpretation \textbf{T}ask (VEIT). VEIT requires AI to generate reasonable interpretations of creator's psychological state through visual creations. To support the task, we present a multimodal dataset termed SpyIn (\textbf{S}and\textbf{p}la\textbf{y} \textbf{In}terpretation Dataset), which is psychological theory supported and professional annotated. Dataset analysis illustrates that SpyIn is not only able to support VEIT, but also more challenging compared with other captioning datasets. Building on SpyIn, we conduct experiments of several image captioning method, and propose a visual-semantic combined model which obtains a SOTA result on SpyIn. The results indicate that VEIT is a more challenging task requiring scene graph information and psychological knowledge. Our work also show a promise for AI to analyze and explain inner world of humanity through visual creations.

The results indicate that VEIT is a more challenging task requiring scene graph information and psychological knowledge. Our work also show a promise for AI to analyze and explain inner world of humanity through visual creations.
abstract_zh: 在精神分析中，通过视觉创作对一个人的心理状态进行解释面临着巨大的需求。计算机视觉领域现有研究的两个主要任务，情感/情感分类和情感字幕，很难满足心理解释的要求。为了满足精神分析的需求，我们引入了一项具有挑战性的任务，\textbf{V}isual \textbf{E}motion \textbf{I}nterpretation \textbf{T}ask (VEIT)。 VEIT要求人工智能通过视觉创作对创作者的心理状态产生合理的解释。为了支持这项任务，我们提出了一个名为 SpyIn 的多模态数据集（\textbf{S}and\textbf{p}la\textbf{y} \textbf{In}解释数据集），它是心理学理论支持和专业注释的。数据集分析表明，SpyIn 不仅能够支持 VEIT，而且与其他字幕数据集相比更具挑战性。在SpyIn的基础上，我们对几种图像描述方法进行了实验，并提出了一种视觉语义组合模型，该模型在SpyIn上获得了SOTA结果。结果表明，VEIT 是一项更具挑战性的任务，需要场景图信息和心理学知识。我们的工作还表明人工智能有望通过视觉创作来分析和解释人类的内心世界。

AI.tldr: 本文提出视觉情绪解释任务（VEIT），通过视觉创作分析创作者的心理状态，并构建心理理论支持的专业标注数据集SpyIn。
AI.motivation: 现有计算机视觉任务（情感分类和情感描述）无法满足心理分析中通过视觉创作解读心理状态的需求。
AI.method: 构建心理理论支持的多模态数据集SpyIn，并设计结合视觉-语义信息的模型解决VEIT任务。
AI.result: 提出的模型在SpyIn数据集上达到SOTA效果，验证了VEIT任务需要场景图信息和心理学知识的结合。
AI.conclusion: VEIT任务为AI通过视觉创作分析人类内心世界提供了新方向，需融合场景理解与心理学理论。

search_text: See Your Heart: Psychological states Interpretation through Visual Creations 看到你的心：通过视觉创作解读心理状态 In psychoanalysis, generating interpretations to one's psychological state through visual creations is facing significant demands. The two main tasks of existing studies in the field of computer vision, sentiment/emotion classification and affective captioning, can hardly satisfy the requirement of psychological interpreting. To meet the demands for psychoanalysis, we introduce a challenging task, \textbf{V}isual \textbf{E}motion \textbf{I}nterpretation \textbf{T}ask (VEIT). VEIT requires AI to generate reasonable interpretations of creator's psychological state through visual creations. To support the task, we present a multimodal dataset termed SpyIn (\textbf{S}and\textbf{p}la\textbf{y} \textbf{In}terpretation Dataset), which is psychological theory supported and professional annotated. Dataset analysis illustrates that SpyIn is not only able to support VEIT, but also more challenging compared with other captioning datasets. Building on SpyIn, we conduct experiments of several image captioning method, and propose a visual-semantic combined model which obtains a SOTA result on SpyIn. The results indicate that VEIT is a more challenging task requiring scene graph information and psychological knowledge. Our work also show a promise for AI to analyze and explain inner world of humanity through visual creations. 在精神分析中，通过视觉创作对一个人的心理状态进行解释面临着巨大的需求。计算机视觉领域现有研究的两个主要任务，情感/情感分类和情感字幕，很难满足心理解释的要求。为了满足精神分析的需求，我们引入了一项具有挑战性的任务，\textbf{V}isual \textbf{E}motion \textbf{I}nterpretation \textbf{T}ask (VEIT)。 VEIT要求人工智能通过视觉创作对创作者的心理状态产生合理的解释。为了支持这项任务，我们提出了一个名为 SpyIn 的多模态数据集（\textbf{S}and\textbf{p}la\textbf{y} \textbf{In}解释数据集），它是心理学理论支持和专业注释的。数据集分析表明，SpyIn 不仅能够支持 VEIT，而且与其他字幕数据集相比更具挑战性。在SpyIn的基础上，我们对几种图像描述方法进行了实验，并提出了一种视觉语义组合模型，该模型在SpyIn上获得了SOTA结果。结果表明，VEIT 是一项更具挑战性的任务，需要场景图信息和心理学知识。我们的工作还表明人工智能有望通过视觉创作来分析和解释人类的内心世界。 本文提出视觉情绪解释任务（VEIT），通过视觉创作分析创作者的心理状态，并构建心理理论支持的专业标注数据集SpyIn。 Likun Yang,Xiaokun Feng,Xiaotang Chen,Shiyu Zhang,Kaiqi Huang cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Hui Wang,Yueyang li,Haichi Luo
title: Semantic Feature Integration network for Fine-grained Visual Classification
title_zh: 用于细粒度视觉分类的语义特征集成网络
abstract: Fine-Grained Visual Classification (FGVC) is known as a challenging task due to subtle differences among subordinate categories. Many current FGVC approaches focus on identifying and locating discriminative regions by using the attention mechanism, but neglect the presence of unnecessary features that hinder the understanding of object structure. These unnecessary features, including 1) ambiguous parts resulting from the visual similarity in object appearances and 2) noninformative parts (e.g., background noise), can have a significant adverse impact on classification results. In this paper, we propose the Semantic Feature Integration network (SFI-Net) to address the above difficulties. By eliminating unnecessary features and reconstructing the semantic relations among discriminative features, our SFI-Net has achieved satisfying performance. The network consists of two modules: 1) the multi-level feature filter (MFF) module is proposed to remove unnecessary features with different receptive field, and then concatenate the preserved features on pixel level for subsequent disposal; 2) the semantic information reconstitution (SIR) module is presented to further establish semantic relations among discriminative features obtained from the MFF module. These two modules are carefully designed to be light-weighted and can be trained end-to-end in a weakly-supervised way. Extensive experiments on four challenging fine-grained benchmarks demonstrate that our proposed SFI-Net achieves the state-of-the-arts performance. Especially, the classification accuracy of our model on CUB-200-2011 and Stanford Dogs reaches 92.64% and 93.03%, respectively.
summary: Fine-Grained Visual Classification (FGVC) is known as a challenging task due to subtle differences among subordinate categories. Many current FGVC approaches focus on identifying and locating discriminative regions by using the attention mechanism, but neglect the presence of unnecessary features that hinder the understanding of object structure. These unnecessary features, including 1) ambiguous parts resulting from the visual similarity in object appearances and 2) noninformative parts (e.g., background noise), can have a significant adverse impact on classification results. In this paper, we propose the Semantic Feature Integration network (SFI-Net) to address the above difficulties. By eliminating unnecessary features and reconstructing the semantic relations among discriminative features, our SFI-Net has achieved satisfying performance. The network consists of two modules: 1) the multi-level feature filter (MFF) module is proposed to remove unnecessary features with different receptive field, and then concatenate the preserved features on pixel level for subsequent disposal; 2) the semantic information reconstitution (SIR) module is presented to further establish semantic relations among discriminative features obtained from the MFF module. These two modules are carefully designed to be light-weighted and can be trained end-to-end in a weakly-supervised way. Extensive experiments on four challenging fine-grained benchmarks demonstrate that our proposed SFI-Net achieves the state-of-the-arts performance. Especially, the classification accuracy of our model on CUB-200-2011 and Stanford Dogs reaches 92.64% and 93.03%, respectively.
abstract_zh: 由于从属类别之间存在细微差异，细粒度视觉分类（FGVC）被认为是一项具有挑战性的任务。当前的许多 FGVC 方法侧重于使用注意力机制来识别和定位判别区域，但忽略了阻碍对象结构理解的不必要特征的存在。这些不必要的特征，包括 1）由于对象外观的视觉相似性而产生的模糊部分和 2）非信息部分（例如背景噪声），可能会对分类结果产生显着的不利影响。在本文中，我们提出语义特征集成网络（SFI-Net）来解决上述困难。通过消除不必要的特征并重建判别特征之间的语义关系，我们的 SFI-Net 取得了令人满意的性能。该网络由两个模块组成：1）提出了多级特征过滤器（MFF）模块，以去除具有不同感受野的不必要特征，然后在像素级上连接保留的特征以进行后续处理； 2）提出语义信息重构（SIR）模块，以进一步建立从MFF模块获得的判别特征之间的语义关系。这两个模块经过精心设计，重量轻，可以以弱监督的方式进行端到端训练。对四个具有挑战性的细粒度基准的广泛实验表明，我们提出的 SFI-Net 实现了最先进的性能。特别是，我们的模型在 CUB-200-2011 和 Stanley Dogs 上的分类准确率分别达到 92.64% 和 93.03%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种语义特征集成网络（SFI-Net），用于解决细粒度视觉分类（FGVC）中因冗余特征导致的分类难题。
AI.motivation: 现有FGVC方法通过注意力机制定位判别区域，但忽略了模糊部分和背景噪声等冗余特征，这些特征会显著影响分类性能。
AI.method: 设计了多级特征过滤模块（MFF）去除冗余特征，并通过语义信息重构模块（SIR）建立判别特征间的语义关系，网络以轻量级结构实现端到端弱监督训练。
AI.result: 在CUB-200-2011和Stanford Dogs数据集上分别达到92.64%和93.03%的分类准确率，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: SFI-Net通过有效过滤冗余特征并重构语义关系，在细粒度分类任务中取得了显著性能提升。

authors_text: Jennifer Sleeman,David Chung,Anand Gnanadesikan,Jay Brett,Yannis Kevrekidis,Marisa Hughes,Thomas Haine,Marie-Aude Pradal,Renske Gelderloos,Chace Ashcraft,Caroline Tang,Anshu Saksena,Larry White
title: A Generative Adversarial Network for Climate Tipping Point Discovery (TIP-GAN)
title_zh: 气候临界点发现的生成对抗网络（TIP-GAN）
abstract: We propose a new Tipping Point Generative Adversarial Network (TIP-GAN) for better characterizing potential climate tipping points in Earth system models. We describe an adversarial game to explore the parameter space of these models, detect upcoming tipping points, and discover the drivers of tipping points. In this setup, a set of generators learn to construct model configurations that will invoke a climate tipping point. The discriminator learns to identify which generators are generating each model configuration and whether a given configuration will lead to a tipping point. The discriminator is trained using an oracle (a surrogate climate model) to test if a generated model configuration leads to a tipping point or not. We demonstrate the application of this GAN to invoke the collapse of the Atlantic Meridional Overturning Circulation (AMOC). We share experimental results of modifying the loss functions and the number of generators to exploit the area of uncertainty in model state space near a climate tipping point. In addition, we show that our trained discriminator can predict AMOC collapse with a high degree of accuracy without the use of the oracle. This approach could generalize to other tipping points, and could augment climate modeling research by directing users interested in studying tipping points to parameter sets likely to induce said tipping points in their computationally intensive climate models.
summary: We propose a new Tipping Point Generative Adversarial Network (TIP-GAN) for better characterizing potential climate tipping points in Earth system models. We describe an adversarial game to explore the parameter space of these models, detect upcoming tipping points, and discover the drivers of tipping points. In this setup, a set of generators learn to construct model configurations that will invoke a climate tipping point. The discriminator learns to identify which generators are generating each model configuration and whether a given configuration will lead to a tipping point. The discriminator is trained using an oracle (a surrogate climate model) to test if a generated model configuration leads to a tipping point or not. We demonstrate the application of this GAN to invoke the collapse of the Atlantic Meridional Overturning Circulation (AMOC). We share experimental results of modifying the loss functions and the number of generators to exploit the area of uncertainty in model state space near a climate tipping point. In addition, we show that our trained discriminator can predict AMOC collapse with a high degree of accuracy without the use of the oracle. This approach could generalize to other tipping points, and could augment climate modeling research by directing users interested in studying tipping points to parameter sets likely to induce said tipping points in their computationally intensive climate models.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的临界点生成对抗网络（TIP-GAN），以更好地描述地球系统模型中潜在的气候临界点。我们描述了一个对抗性游戏来探索这些模型的参数空间，检测即将到来的临界点，并发现临界点的驱动因素。在此设置中，一组生成器学习构建将调用气候临界点的模型配置。鉴别器学习识别哪些生成器正在生成每个模型配置以及给定的配置是否会导致临界点。使用预言机（替代气候模型）对鉴别器进行训练，以测试生成的模型配置是否会导致临界点。我们演示了该 GAN 的应用来引发大西洋经向翻转环流 (AMOC) 的崩溃。我们分享了修改损失函数和发电机数量的实验结果，以利用气候临界点附近模型状态空间中的不确定性区域。此外，我们还表明，经过训练的判别器可以在不使用预言机的情况下高精度预测 AMOC 崩溃。这种方法可以推广到其他临界点，并且可以通过将有兴趣研究临界点的用户引导到可能在其计算密集型气候模型中诱发所述临界点的参数集来增强气候建模研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种生成对抗网络（TIP-GAN），用于在地球系统模型中更准确地识别潜在气候临界点，并探索其驱动因素。
AI.motivation: 气候临界点的预测对理解气候变化至关重要，但传统模型难以高效探索参数空间并识别临界点。需开发新方法以提高临界点检测的准确性与效率。
AI.method: 构建对抗博弈框架：生成器学习生成触发气候临界点的模型配置，判别器通过代理气候模型（Oracle）判断配置是否导致临界点。通过调整损失函数和生成器数量，探索临界点附近的不确定性区域。
AI.result: 成功应用于模拟大西洋经向翻转环流（AMOC）崩溃，判别器无需Oracle即可高精度预测崩溃；方法可推广至其他临界点研究。
AI.conclusion: TIP-GAN能有效识别气候临界点，为气候建模提供高效参数筛选工具，助力研究者聚焦关键参数组合，提升计算资源利用效率。

search_text: A Generative Adversarial Network for Climate Tipping Point Discovery (TIP-GAN) 气候临界点发现的生成对抗网络（TIP-GAN） We propose a new Tipping Point Generative Adversarial Network (TIP-GAN) for better characterizing potential climate tipping points in Earth system models. We describe an adversarial game to explore the parameter space of these models, detect upcoming tipping points, and discover the drivers of tipping points. In this setup, a set of generators learn to construct model configurations that will invoke a climate tipping point. The discriminator learns to identify which generators are generating each model configuration and whether a given configuration will lead to a tipping point. The discriminator is trained using an oracle (a surrogate climate model) to test if a generated model configuration leads to a tipping point or not. We demonstrate the application of this GAN to invoke the collapse of the Atlantic Meridional Overturning Circulation (AMOC). We share experimental results of modifying the loss functions and the number of generators to exploit the area of uncertainty in model state space near a climate tipping point. In addition, we show that our trained discriminator can predict AMOC collapse with a high degree of accuracy without the use of the oracle. This approach could generalize to other tipping points, and could augment climate modeling research by directing users interested in studying tipping points to parameter sets likely to induce said tipping points in their computationally intensive climate models. 我们提出了一种新的临界点生成对抗网络（TIP-GAN），以更好地描述地球系统模型中潜在的气候临界点。我们描述了一个对抗性游戏来探索这些模型的参数空间，检测即将到来的临界点，并发现临界点的驱动因素。在此设置中，一组生成器学习构建将调用气候临界点的模型配置。鉴别器学习识别哪些生成器正在生成每个模型配置以及给定的配置是否会导致临界点。使用预言机（替代气候模型）对鉴别器进行训练，以测试生成的模型配置是否会导致临界点。我们演示了该 GAN 的应用来引发大西洋经向翻转环流 (AMOC) 的崩溃。我们分享了修改损失函数和发电机数量的实验结果，以利用气候临界点附近模型状态空间中的不确定性区域。此外，我们还表明，经过训练的判别器可以在不使用预言机的情况下高精度预测 AMOC 崩溃。这种方法可以推广到其他临界点，并且可以通过将有兴趣研究临界点的用户引导到可能在其计算密集型气候模型中诱发所述临界点的参数集来增强气候建模研究。 本文提出一种生成对抗网络（TIP-GAN），用于在地球系统模型中更准确地识别潜在气候临界点，并探索其驱动因素。 Jennifer Sleeman,David Chung,Anand Gnanadesikan,Jay Brett,Yannis Kevrekidis,Marisa Hughes,Thomas Haine,Marie-Aude Pradal,Renske Gelderloos,Chace Ashcraft,Caroline Tang,Anshu Saksena,Larry White cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Jiahao Huang,Angelica Aviles-Rivero,Carola-Bibiane Schonlieb,Guang Yang
title: ViGU: Vision GNN U-Net for Fast MRI
title_zh: ViGU：用于快速 MRI 的 Vision GNN U-Net
abstract: Deep learning models have been widely applied for fast MRI. The majority of existing deep learning models, e.g., convolutional neural networks, work on data with Euclidean or regular grids structures. However, high-dimensional features extracted from MR data could be encapsulated in non-Euclidean manifolds. This disparity between the go-to assumption of existing models and data requirements limits the flexibility to capture irregular anatomical features in MR data. In this work, we introduce a novel Vision GNN type network for fast MRI called Vision GNN U-Net (ViGU). More precisely, the pixel array is first embedded into patches and then converted into a graph. Secondly, a U-shape network is developed using several graph blocks in symmetrical encoder and decoder paths. Moreover, we show that the proposed ViGU can also benefit from Generative Adversarial Networks yielding to its variant ViGU-GAN. We demonstrate, through numerical and visual experiments, that the proposed ViGU and GAN variant outperform existing CNN and GAN-based methods. Moreover, we show that the proposed network readily competes with approaches based on Transformers while requiring a fraction of the computational cost. More importantly, the graph structure of the network reveals how the network extracts features from MR images, providing intuitive explainability.
summary: Deep learning models have been widely applied for fast MRI. The majority of existing deep learning models, e.g., convolutional neural networks, work on data with Euclidean or regular grids structures. However, high-dimensional features extracted from MR data could be encapsulated in non-Euclidean manifolds. This disparity between the go-to assumption of existing models and data requirements limits the flexibility to capture irregular anatomical features in MR data. In this work, we introduce a novel Vision GNN type network for fast MRI called Vision GNN U-Net (ViGU). More precisely, the pixel array is first embedded into patches and then converted into a graph. Secondly, a U-shape network is developed using several graph blocks in symmetrical encoder and decoder paths. Moreover, we show that the proposed ViGU can also benefit from Generative Adversarial Networks yielding to its variant ViGU-GAN. We demonstrate, through numerical and visual experiments, that the proposed ViGU and GAN variant outperform existing CNN and GAN-based methods. Moreover, we show that the proposed network readily competes with approaches based on Transformers while requiring a fraction of the computational cost. More importantly, the graph structure of the network reveals how the network extracts features from MR images, providing intuitive explainability.
abstract_zh: 深度学习模型已广泛应用于快速磁共振成像。大多数现有的深度学习模型（例如卷积神经网络）都适用于具有欧几里德或规则网格结构的数据。然而，从 MR 数据中提取的高维特征可以封装在非欧几里德流形中。现有模型的首选假设与数据要求之间的这种差异限制了捕获 MR 数据中不规则解剖特征的灵活性。在这项工作中，我们介绍了一种用于快速 MRI 的新型 Vision GNN 类型网络，称为 Vision GNN U-Net (ViGU)。更准确地说，像素阵列首先嵌入到补丁中，然后转换成图形。其次，使用对称编码器和解码器路径中的多个图块开发 U 形网络。此外，我们表明，所提出的 ViGU 还可以受益于生成对抗网络，从而产生其变体 ViGU-GAN。我们通过数值和视觉实验证明，所提出的 ViGU 和 GAN 变体优于现有的基于 CNN 和 GAN 的方法。此外，我们表明所提出的网络很容易与基于 Transformer 的方法竞争，同时只需要一小部分计算成本。更重要的是，网络的图结构揭示了网络如何从 MR 图像中提取特征，提供直观的可解释性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为ViGU的视觉图神经网络U-Net模型，用于加速磁共振成像（MRI）的重建过程。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型（如CNN）假设数据具有欧几里得结构，但MRI数据的高维特征可能存在于非欧几里得流形中，导致模型难以捕捉不规则解剖特征。
AI.method: 将像素数组嵌入为图结构，设计U型网络架构，结合图神经网络模块对称编码器和解码器路径，并引入生成对抗网络（GAN）变体ViGU-GAN。
AI.result: ViGU在数值和视觉实验中优于现有CNN和GAN方法，计算成本仅为Transformer的分数之一，且通过图结构提供直观的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: ViGU通过图结构有效捕捉MRI的非欧几里得特征，在性能和可解释性上优于现有方法，为快速MRI重建提供新思路。

However, high-dimensional features extracted from MR data could be encapsulated in non-Euclidean manifolds. Secondly, a U-shape network is developed using several graph blocks in symmetrical encoder and decoder paths. Moreover, we show that the proposed ViGU can also benefit from Generative Adversarial Networks yielding to its variant ViGU-GAN. We demonstrate, through numerical and visual experiments, that the proposed ViGU and GAN variant outperform existing CNN and GAN-based methods. Moreover, we show that the proposed network readily competes with approaches based on Transformers while requiring a fraction of the computational cost. authors_text: Weixun Luo,Xiaodan Xing,Guang Yang
title: Is Autoencoder Truly Applicable for 3D CT Super-Resolution?
title_zh: 自编码器真的适用于3D CT超分辨率吗？
abstract: Featured by a bottleneck structure, autoencoder (AE) and its variants have been largely applied in various medical image analysis tasks, such as segmentation, reconstruction and de-noising. Despite of their promising performances in aforementioned tasks, in this paper, we claim that AE models are not applicable to single image super-resolution (SISR) for 3D CT data. Our hypothesis is that the bottleneck architecture that resizes feature maps in AE models degrades the details of input images, thus can sabotage the performance of super-resolution. Although U-Net proposed skip connections that merge information from different levels, we claim that the degrading impact of feature resizing operations could hardly be removed by skip connections. By conducting large-scale ablation experiments and comparing the performance between models with and without the bottleneck design on a public CT lung dataset , we have discovered that AE models, including U-Net, have failed to achieve a compatible SISR result ($p<0.05$ by Student's t-test) compared to the baseline model. Our work is the first comparative study investigating the suitability of AE architecture for 3D CT SISR tasks and brings a rationale for researchers to re-think the choice of model architectures especially for 3D CT SISR tasks. The full implementation and trained models can be found at: https://github.com/Roldbach/Autoencoder-3D-CT-SISR
summary: Featured by a bottleneck structure, autoencoder (AE) and its variants have been largely applied in various medical image analysis tasks, such as segmentation, reconstruction and de-noising. Despite of their promising performances in aforementioned tasks, in this paper, we claim that AE models are not applicable to single image super-resolution (SISR) for 3D CT data. Our hypothesis is that the bottleneck architecture that resizes feature maps in AE models degrades the details of input images, thus can sabotage the performance of super-resolution. Although U-Net proposed skip connections that merge information from different levels, we claim that the degrading impact of feature resizing operations could hardly be removed by skip connections. By conducting large-scale ablation experiments and comparing the performance between models with and without the bottleneck design on a public CT lung dataset , we have discovered that AE models, including U-Net, have failed to achieve a compatible SISR result ($p<0.05$ by Student's t-test) compared to the baseline model. Our work is the first comparative study investigating the suitability of AE architecture for 3D CT SISR tasks and brings a rationale for researchers to re-think the choice of model architectures especially for 3D CT SISR tasks. The full implementation and trained models can be found at: https://github.com/Roldbach/Autoencoder-3D-CT-SISR
abstract_zh: 自编码器（AE）及其变体具有瓶颈结构的特点，已广泛应用于各种医学图像分析任务，例如分割、重建和去噪。尽管它们在上述任务中表现良好，但在本文中，我们声称 AE 模型不适用于 3D CT 数据的单图像超分辨率 (SISR)。我们的假设是，在 AE 模型中调整特征图大小的瓶颈架构会降低输入图像的细节，从而破坏超分辨率的性能。尽管 U-Net 提出了合并不同级别信息的跳跃连接，但我们声称特征调整大小操作的降级影响很难通过跳跃连接消除。通过在公共 CT 肺部数据集上进行大规模消融实验并比较有和没有瓶颈设计的模型之间的性能，我们发现与基线模型相比，包括 U-Net 在内的 AE 模型未能实现兼容的 SISR 结果（通过学生 t 检验，$p<0.05$）。我们的工作是第一个调查 AE 架构对 3D CT SISR 任务的适用性的比较研究，并为研究人员重新考虑模型架构的选择（特别是针对 3D CT SISR 任务）提供了依据。完整的实现和训练的模型可以在以下位置找到：https://github.com/Roldbach/Autoencoder-3D-CT-SISR

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了自编码器（AE）及其变体在3D CT图像超分辨率（SISR）任务中的适用性，并质疑其有效性。
AI.motivation: 尽管自编码器在医学图像分析中表现良好，但作者认为其瓶颈结构会降低图像细节，从而影响超分辨率效果，且跳过连接难以弥补此问题。
AI.method: 通过大规模消融实验，对比有无瓶颈设计的模型在公开CT肺部数据集上的性能，并使用Student's t检验验证结果显著性。
AI.result: 实验表明，包括U-Net在内的AE模型在SISR任务中未能达到基线模型效果（p<0.05）。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次比较了AE架构在3D CT SISR中的适用性，建议研究者重新考虑此类任务的模型选择。

search_text: Is Autoencoder Truly Applicable for 3D CT Super-Resolution? 自编码器真的适用于3D CT超分辨率吗？ Featured by a bottleneck structure, autoencoder (AE) and its variants have been largely applied in various medical image analysis tasks, such as segmentation, reconstruction and de-noising. Despite of their promising performances in aforementioned tasks, in this paper, we claim that AE models are not applicable to single image super-resolution (SISR) for 3D CT data. Our hypothesis is that the bottleneck architecture that resizes feature maps in AE models degrades the details of input images, thus can sabotage the performance of super-resolution. Although U-Net proposed skip connections that merge information from different levels, we claim that the degrading impact of feature resizing operations could hardly be removed by skip connections. By conducting large-scale ablation experiments and comparing the performance between models with and without the bottleneck design on a public CT lung dataset , we have discovered that AE models, including U-Net, have failed to achieve a compatible SISR result ($p<0.05$ by Student's t-test) compared to the baseline model. Our work is the first comparative study investigating the suitability of AE architecture for 3D CT SISR tasks and brings a rationale for researchers to re-think the choice of model architectures especially for 3D CT SISR tasks. The full implementation and trained models can be found at: https://github.com/Roldbach/Autoencoder-3D-CT-SISR 自编码器（AE）及其变体具有瓶颈结构的特点，已广泛应用于各种医学图像分析任务，例如分割、重建和去噪。尽管它们在上述任务中表现良好，但在本文中，我们声称 AE 模型不适用于 3D CT 数据的单图像超分辨率 (SISR)。我们的假设是，在 AE 模型中调整特征图大小的瓶颈架构会降低输入图像的细节，从而破坏超分辨率的性能。尽管 U-Net 提出了合并不同级别信息的跳跃连接，但我们声称特征调整大小操作的降级影响很难通过跳跃连接消除。通过在公共 CT 肺部数据集上进行大规模消融实验并比较有和没有瓶颈设计的模型之间的性能，我们发现与基线模型相比，包括 U-Net 在内的 AE 模型未能实现兼容的 SISR 结果（通过学生 t 检验，$p<0.05$）。我们的工作是第一个调查 AE 架构对 3D CT SISR 任务的适用性的比较研究，并为研究人员重新考虑模型架构的选择（特别是针对 3D CT SISR 任务）提供了依据。完整的实现和训练的模型可以在以下位置找到：https://github.com/Roldbach/Autoencoder-3D-CT-SISR 本文探讨了自编码器（AE）及其变体在3D CT图像超分辨率（SISR）任务中的适用性，并质疑其有效性。 Weixun Luo,Xiaodan Xing,Guang Yang eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Hamed Hani,Afsaneh Mojra
title: Thermal Analysis of Malignant Brain Tumors by Employing a Morphological Differentiation-Based Method in Conjunction with Artificial Neural Network
title_zh: 采用基于形态分化的方法结合人工神经网络对恶性脑肿瘤进行热分析
abstract: In this study, a morphological differentiation-based method has been introduced which employs temperature distribution on the tissue surface to detect brain tumor's malignancy. According to the common tumor CT scans, two different scenarios have been implemented to describe irregular shape of the malignant tumor. In the first scenario, tumor has been considered as a polygon base prism and in the second one, it has been considered as a star-shaped base prism. By increasing the number of sides of the polygon or wings of the star, degree of the malignancy has been increased. Constant heat generation has been considered for the tumor and finite element analysis has been conducted by the ABAQUS software linked with a PYTHON script on both tumor models to study temperature variations on the top tissue surface. This temperature distribution has been characterized by 10 parameters. In each scenario, 98 sets of these parameters has been used as inputs of a radial basis function neural network (RBFNN) and number of sides or wings has been selected to be the output. The RBFNN has been trained to identify malignancy of tumor based on its morphology. According to the RBFNN results, the proposed method has been capable of differentiating between benign and malignant tumors and estimating the degree of malignancy with high accuracy

According to the common tumor CT scans, two different scenarios have been implemented to describe irregular shape of the malignant tumor. In the first scenario, tumor has been considered as a polygon base prism and in the second one, it has been considered as a star-shaped base prism. By increasing the number of sides of the polygon or wings of the star, degree of the malignancy has been increased. Constant heat generation has been considered for the tumor and finite element analysis has been conducted by the ABAQUS software linked with a PYTHON script on both tumor models to study temperature variations on the top tissue surface. This temperature distribution has been characterized by 10 parameters. In each scenario, 98 sets of these parameters has been used as inputs of a radial basis function neural network (RBFNN) and number of sides or wings has been selected to be the output. According to the RBFNN results, the proposed method has been capable of differentiating between benign and malignant tumors and estimating the degree of malignancy with high accuracy
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，引入了一种基于形态分化的方法，利用组织表面的温度分布来检测脑肿瘤的恶性程度。根据常见的肿瘤CT扫描，采用两种不同的场景来描述恶性肿瘤的不规则形状。在第一种情况下，肿瘤被认为是多边形基棱柱，而在第二种情况中，肿瘤被认为是星形基棱柱。通过增加多边形的边数或恒星的翼数，恶性程度就会增加。考虑了肿瘤的恒定热量产生，并通过 ABAQUS 软件与两个肿瘤模型上的 PYTHON 脚本连接进行有限元分析，以研究顶部组织表面的温度变化。该温度分布由 10 个参数来表征。在每个场景中，98 组参数被用作径向基函数神经网络 (RBFNN) 的输入，并选择边或翼的数量作为输出。 RBFNN 经过训练可以根据肿瘤的形态来识别肿瘤的恶性程度。根据RBFNN结果，该方法能够区分良性和恶性肿瘤并高精度地估计恶性程度

AI.tldr: 基于形态差异与神经网络的脑肿瘤热分析方法，用于区分良恶性肿瘤并评估恶性程度
AI.motivation: 现有方法在肿瘤恶性程度检测上存在不足，需更精确的热分析与形态结合方法
AI.method: 构建多边形与星形基棱柱肿瘤模型，利用有限元分析模拟温度分布，提取10个参数输入RBFNN，通过训练区分良恶性肿瘤
AI.result: RBFNN成功区分良恶性肿瘤，准确评估恶性程度
AI.conclusion: 形态差异与热分析结合的方法有效提升肿瘤恶性程度检测的准确性

authors_text: Yunze Zang,Yifei Liu,Xuehong Chen,Anqi Li,Yichen Zhai,Shijie Li,Luling Liu,Chuanhai Zhu,Ruilin Chen,Shupeng Li,Na Jie
title: Crop mapping in the small sample/no sample case: an approach using a two-level cascade classifier and integrating domain knowledge
title_zh: 小样本/无样本情况下的作物制图：一种使用两级级联分类器并集成领域知识的方法
abstract: Mapping crops using remote sensing technology is important for food security and land management. Machine learning-based methods has become a popular approach for crop mapping in recent years. However, the key to machine learning, acquiring ample and accurate samples, is usually time-consuming and laborious. To solve this problem, a crop mapping method in the small sample/no sample case that integrating domain knowledge and using a cascaded classification framework that combine a weak classifier learned from samples with strong features and a strong classifier trained by samples with weak feature was proposed. First, based on the domain knowledge of various crops, a low-capacity classifier such as decision tree was applied to acquire those pixels with distinctive features and complete observation sequences as "strong feature" samples. Then, to improve the representativeness of these samples, sample augmentation strategy that artificially remove the observations of "strong feature" samples according to the average valid observation proportion in target area was applied. Finally, based on the original samples and augmented samples, a large-capacity classifier such as random forest was trained for crop mapping. The method achieved an overall accuracy of 82% in the MAP crop recognition competition held by Syngenta Group, China in 2021 (third prize, ranked fourth). This method integrates domain knowledge to overcome the difficulties of sample acquisition, providing a convenient, fast and accurate solution for crop mapping.
summary: Mapping crops using remote sensing technology is important for food security and land management. Machine learning-based methods has become a popular approach for crop mapping in recent years. However, the key to machine learning, acquiring ample and accurate samples, is usually time-consuming and laborious. To solve this problem, a crop mapping method in the small sample/no sample case that integrating domain knowledge and using a cascaded classification framework that combine a weak classifier learned from samples with strong features and a strong classifier trained by samples with weak feature was proposed. First, based on the domain knowledge of various crops, a low-capacity classifier such as decision tree was applied to acquire those pixels with distinctive features and complete observation sequences as "strong feature" samples. Then, to improve the representativeness of these samples, sample augmentation strategy that artificially remove the observations of "strong feature" samples according to the average valid observation proportion in target area was applied. Finally, based on the original samples and augmented samples, a large-capacity classifier such as random forest was trained for crop mapping. The method achieved an overall accuracy of 82% in the MAP crop recognition competition held by Syngenta Group, China in 2021 (third prize, ranked fourth). This method integrates domain knowledge to overcome the difficulties of sample acquisition, providing a convenient, fast and accurate solution for crop mapping.
abstract_zh: 使用遥感技术绘制农作物地图对于粮食安全和土地管理非常重要。近年来，基于机器学习的方法已成为农作物绘图的流行方法。然而，机器学习的关键是获取充足且准确的样本，通常是费时费力的。为了解决这一问题，提出了一种小样本/无样本情况下的作物映射方法，该方法集成领域知识并使用级联分类框架，该框架结合了从强特征样本学习的弱分类器和由弱特征样本训练的强分类器。首先，基于各种作物的领域知识，应用决策树等低容量分类器来获取那些具有鲜明特征和完整观察序列的像素作为“强特征”样本。然后，为了提高这些样本的代表性，采用样本增广策略，根据目标区域的平均有效观测比例，人为地去除“强特征”样本的观测。最后，基于原始样本和增强样本，训练随机森林等大容量分类器进行作物绘图。该方法在2021年中国先正达集团举办的MAP作物识别大赛中取得了82%的整体准确率（三等奖，排名第四）。该方法融合领域知识，克服了样本采集的困难，为作物制图提供了方便、快速、准确的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在小样本/无样本情况下结合领域知识的两级级联分类器作物制图方法。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习方法依赖大量样本进行作物分类，但样本获取耗时费力，亟需减少对样本的依赖。
AI.method: 首先利用决策树等低容量分类器结合作物领域知识提取强特征样本；通过人工去除强特征样本观测值进行样本增强；最后使用随机森林等高容量分类器进行作物制图。
AI.result: 在先正达集团MAP作物识别竞赛中取得82%整体精度（第三名、第四位）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过整合领域知识有效解决样本获取难题，为作物制图提供快速准确的解决方案。

Finally, based on the original samples and augmented samples, a large-capacity classifier such as random forest was trained for crop mapping. The method achieved an overall accuracy of 82% in the MAP crop recognition competition held by Syngenta Group, China in 2021 (third prize, ranked fourth). This method integrates domain knowledge to overcome the difficulties of sample acquisition, providing a convenient, fast and accurate solution for crop mapping. 使用遥感技术绘制农作物地图对于粮食安全和土地管理非常重要。近年来，基于机器学习的方法已成为农作物绘图的流行方法。然而，机器学习的关键是获取充足且准确的样本，通常是费时费力的。为了解决这一问题，提出了一种小样本/无样本情况下的作物映射方法，该方法集成领域知识并使用级联分类框架，该框架结合了从强特征样本学习的弱分类器和由弱特征样本训练的强分类器。首先，基于各种作物的领域知识，应用决策树等低容量分类器来获取那些具有鲜明特征和完整观察序列的像素作为“强特征”样本。然后，为了提高这些样本的代表性，采用样本增广策略，根据目标区域的平均有效观测比例，人为地去除“强特征”样本的观测。最后，基于原始样本和增强样本，训练随机森林等大容量分类器进行作物绘图。该方法在2021年中国先正达集团举办的MAP作物识别大赛中取得了82%的整体准确率（三等奖，排名第四）。该方法融合领域知识，克服了样本采集的困难，为作物制图提供了方便、快速、准确的解决方案。 本文提出一种在小样本/无样本情况下结合领域知识的两级级联分类器作物制图方法。 Yunze Zang,Yifei Liu,Xuehong Chen,Anqi Li,Yichen Zhai,Shijie Li,Luling Liu,Chuanhai Zhu,Ruilin Chen,Shupeng Li,Na Jie cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: M. Amine Mahmoudi,Aladine Chetouani,Fatma Boufera,Hedi Tabia
title: Kernel function impact on convolutional neural networks
title_zh: 核函数对卷积神经网络的影响
abstract: This paper investigates the usage of kernel functions at the different layers in a convolutional neural network. We carry out extensive studies of their impact on convolutional, pooling and fully-connected layers. We notice that the linear kernel may not be sufficiently effective to fit the input data distributions, whereas high order kernels prone to over-fitting. This leads to conclude that a trade-off between complexity and performance should be reached. We show how one can effectively leverage kernel functions, by introducing a more distortion aware pooling layers which reduces over-fitting while keeping track of the majority of the information fed into subsequent layers. We further propose Kernelized Dense Layers (KDL), which replace fully-connected layers, and capture higher order feature interactions. The experiments on conventional classification datasets i.e. MNIST, FASHION-MNIST and CIFAR-10, show that the proposed techniques improve the performance of the network compared to classical convolution, pooling and fully connected layers. Moreover, experiments on fine-grained classification i.e. facial expression databases, namely RAF-DB, FER2013 and ExpW demonstrate that the discriminative power of the network is boosted, since the proposed techniques improve the awareness to slight visual details and allows the network reaching state-of-the-art results.
summary: This paper investigates the usage of kernel functions at the different layers in a convolutional neural network. We carry out extensive studies of their impact on convolutional, pooling and fully-connected layers. We notice that the linear kernel may not be sufficiently effective to fit the input data distributions, whereas high order kernels prone to over-fitting. This leads to conclude that a trade-off between complexity and performance should be reached. We show how one can effectively leverage kernel functions, by introducing a more distortion aware pooling layers which reduces over-fitting while keeping track of the majority of the information fed into subsequent layers. We further propose Kernelized Dense Layers (KDL), which replace fully-connected layers, and capture higher order feature interactions. The experiments on conventional classification datasets i.e. MNIST, FASHION-MNIST and CIFAR-10, show that the proposed techniques improve the performance of the network compared to classical convolution, pooling and fully connected layers. Moreover, experiments on fine-grained classification i.e. facial expression databases, namely RAF-DB, FER2013 and ExpW demonstrate that the discriminative power of the network is boosted, since the proposed techniques improve the awareness to slight visual details and allows the network reaching state-of-the-art results.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了卷积神经网络中不同层的核函数的使用。我们对它们对卷积层、池化层和全连接层的影响进行了广泛的研究。我们注意到线性核可能不足以有效地拟合输入数据分布，而高阶核容易过度拟合。由此得出的结论是，应该在复杂性和性能之间进行权衡。我们展示了如何通过引入一种更能感知失真的池化层来有效地利用核函数，该池化层可以减少过度拟合，同时跟踪输入后续层的大部分信息。我们进一步提出核化密集层（KDL），它取代全连接层，并捕获更高阶的特征交互。在传统分类数据集 MNIST、FASHION-MNIST 和 CIFAR-10 上的实验表明，与经典卷积、池化和全连接层相比，所提出的技术提高了网络的性能。此外，细粒度分类（即面部表情数据库，即 RAF-DB、FER2013 和 ExpW）的实验表明，网络的判别能力得到了增强，因为所提出的技术提高了对轻微视觉细节的感知，并使网络达到最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了卷积神经网络中不同层使用核函数的影响，并提出了改进方法以提升网络性能。
AI.motivation: 传统线性核难以拟合输入数据分布，高阶核易过拟合，需在复杂度与性能间取得平衡。
AI.method: 引入了抗失真池化层以减少过拟合，并提出核化密集层（KDL）替代全连接层以捕捉高阶特征交互。
AI.result: 在MNIST、CIFAR-10等常规分类数据集及RAF-DB等细粒度表情数据集上均取得优于传统方法的性能，达到SOTA水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化核函数应用与网络结构设计，可在复杂度与性能间实现有效平衡，提升CNN的判别能力。

authors_text: Zheng Yu,Yikuan Li,Joseph Kim,Kaixuan Huang,Yuan Luo,Mengdi Wang
title: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Cost-Effective Medical Diagnosis
title_zh: 深度强化学习实现经济高效的医疗诊断
abstract: Dynamic diagnosis is desirable when medical tests are costly or time-consuming. In this work, we use reinforcement learning (RL) to find a dynamic policy that selects lab test panels sequentially based on previous observations, ensuring accurate testing at a low cost. Clinical diagnostic data are often highly imbalanced; therefore, we aim to maximize the $F_1$ score instead of the error rate. However, optimizing the non-concave $F_1$ score is not a classic RL problem, thus invalidates standard RL methods. To remedy this issue, we develop a reward shaping approach, leveraging properties of the $F_1$ score and duality of policy optimization, to provably find the set of all Pareto-optimal policies for budget-constrained $F_1$ score maximization. To handle the combinatorially complex state space, we propose a Semi-Model-based Deep Diagnosis Policy Optimization (SM-DDPO) framework that is compatible with end-to-end training and online learning. SM-DDPO is tested on diverse clinical tasks: ferritin abnormality detection, sepsis mortality prediction, and acute kidney injury diagnosis. Experiments with real-world data validate that SM-DDPO trains efficiently and identifies all Pareto-front solutions. Across all tasks, SM-DDPO is able to achieve state-of-the-art diagnosis accuracy (in some cases higher than conventional methods) with up to $85\%$ reduction in testing cost. The code is available at [https://github.com/Zheng321/Deep-Reinforcement-Learning-for-Cost-Effective-Medical-Diagnosis].
summary: Dynamic diagnosis is desirable when medical tests are costly or time-consuming. In this work, we use reinforcement learning (RL) to find a dynamic policy that selects lab test panels sequentially based on previous observations, ensuring accurate testing at a low cost. Clinical diagnostic data are often highly imbalanced; therefore, we aim to maximize the $F_1$ score instead of the error rate. However, optimizing the non-concave $F_1$ score is not a classic RL problem, thus invalidates standard RL methods. To remedy this issue, we develop a reward shaping approach, leveraging properties of the $F_1$ score and duality of policy optimization, to provably find the set of all Pareto-optimal policies for budget-constrained $F_1$ score maximization. To handle the combinatorially complex state space, we propose a Semi-Model-based Deep Diagnosis Policy Optimization (SM-DDPO) framework that is compatible with end-to-end training and online learning. SM-DDPO is tested on diverse clinical tasks: ferritin abnormality detection, sepsis mortality prediction, and acute kidney injury diagnosis. Experiments with real-world data validate that SM-DDPO trains efficiently and identifies all Pareto-front solutions. Across all tasks, SM-DDPO is able to achieve state-of-the-art diagnosis accuracy (in some cases higher than conventional methods) with up to $85\%$ reduction in testing cost. The code is available at [https://github.com/Zheng321/Deep-Reinforcement-Learning-for-Cost-Effective-Medical-Diagnosis].
abstract_zh: 当医学检查昂贵或耗时时，动态诊断是可取的。在这项工作中，我们使用强化学习（RL）来找到一种动态策略，根据之前的观察顺序选择实验室测试面板，确保以低成本进行准确的测试。临床诊断数据往往高度不平衡；因此，我们的目标是最大化 $F_1$ 分数而不是错误率。然而，优化非凹 $F_1$ 分数不是经典的 RL 问题，因此使标准 RL 方法失效。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一种奖励塑造方法，利用 $F_1$ 分数的属性和策略优化的二元性，以证明找到预算受限的 $F_1$ 分数最大化的所有帕累托最优策略集。为了处理组合复杂的状态空间，我们提出了一种与端到端训练和在线学习兼容的基于半模型的深度诊断策略优化（SM-DDPO）框架。 SM-DDPO 在多种临床任务上进行了测试：铁蛋白异常检测、脓毒症死亡率预测和急性肾损伤诊断。真实世界数据的实验验证了 SM-DDPO 可以有效地训练并识别所有帕累托前沿解决方案。在所有任务中，SM-DDPO 都能实现最先进的诊断准确性（在某些情况下高于传统方法），同时测试成本降低高达 85\%$。该代码可在 [https://github.com/Zheng321/Deep-Reinforcement-Learning-for-Cost-Effective-Medical-Diagnosis] 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的动态诊断策略，通过序列选择实验室检测面板以降低医疗诊断成本并保持准确性。
AI.motivation: 医疗检测成本高且数据不平衡，传统方法难以在有限预算下最大化诊断准确率（F1分数），而强化学习优化非凸目标存在挑战。
AI.method: 设计奖励重塑方法解决F1分数优化问题，结合对偶性理论与半模型驱动框架SM-DDPO，实现端到端训练与在线学习。
AI.result: 在铁蛋白异常检测、脓毒症死亡预测等任务中，SM-DDPO在保持诊断精度的同时减少高达85%的检测成本，部分场景超越传统方法。
AI.conclusion: SM-DDPO通过平衡成本与F1分数优化，为医疗诊断提供了高效、低成本的动态决策框架，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Randall Balestriero
title: Unsupervised Learning on a DIET: Datum IndEx as Target Free of Self-Supervision, Reconstruction, Projector Head
title_zh: 饮食中的无监督学习：以 Datum IndEx 为目标，无需自我监督、重构、投影仪头
abstract: Costly, noisy, and over-specialized, labels are to be set aside in favor of unsupervised learning if we hope to learn cheap, reliable, and transferable models. To that end, spectral embedding, self-supervised learning, or generative modeling have offered competitive solutions. Those methods however come with numerous challenges \textit{e.g.} estimating geodesic distances, specifying projector architectures and anti-collapse losses, or specifying decoder architectures and reconstruction losses. In contrast, we introduce a simple explainable alternative -- coined \textbf{DIET} -- to learn representations from unlabeled data, free of those challenges. \textbf{DIET} is blatantly simple: take one's favorite classification setup and use the \textbf{D}atum \textbf{I}nd\textbf{E}x as its \textbf{T}arget class, \textit{i.e. each sample is its own class}, no further changes needed. \textbf{DIET} works without a decoder/projector network, is not based on positive pairs nor reconstruction, introduces no hyper-parameters, and works out-of-the-box across datasets and architectures. Despite \textbf{DIET}'s simplicity, the learned representations are of high-quality and often on-par with the state-of-the-art \textit{e.g.} using a linear classifier on top of DIET's learned representation reaches $71.4\%$ on CIFAR100 with a Resnet101, $52.5\%$ on TinyImagenet with a Resnext50.
summary: Costly, noisy, and over-specialized, labels are to be set aside in favor of unsupervised learning if we hope to learn cheap, reliable, and transferable models. To that end, spectral embedding, self-supervised learning, or generative modeling have offered competitive solutions. Those methods however come with numerous challenges \textit{e.g.} estimating geodesic distances, specifying projector architectures and anti-collapse losses, or specifying decoder architectures and reconstruction losses. In contrast, we introduce a simple explainable alternative -- coined \textbf{DIET} -- to learn representations from unlabeled data, free of those challenges. \textbf{DIET} is blatantly simple: take one's favorite classification setup and use the \textbf{D}atum \textbf{I}nd\textbf{E}x as its \textbf{T}arget class, \textit{i.e. each sample is its own class}, no further changes needed. \textbf{DIET} works without a decoder/projector network, is not based on positive pairs nor reconstruction, introduces no hyper-parameters, and works out-of-the-box across datasets and architectures. Despite \textbf{DIET}'s simplicity, the learned representations are of high-quality and often on-par with the state-of-the-art \textit{e.g.} using a linear classifier on top of DIET's learned representation reaches $71.4\%$ on CIFAR100 with a Resnet101, $52.5\%$ on TinyImagenet with a Resnext50.
abstract_zh: 如果我们希望学习廉价、可靠和可转移的模型，那么昂贵、嘈杂和过度专业化的标签就应该被搁置，以支持无监督学习。为此，频谱嵌入、自我监督学习或生成建模提供了有竞争力的解决方案。然而，这些方法面临着许多挑战，例如估计测地距离、指定投影仪架构和抗塌陷损失，或指定解码器架构和重建损失。相比之下，我们引入了一个简单的可解释的替代方案——创造了 \textbf{DIET}——从未标记的数据中学习表示，从而摆脱了这些挑战。 \textbf{DIET} 非常简单：采用自己最喜欢的分类设置并使用 \textbf{D}atum \textbf{I}nd\textbf{E}x 作为其 \textbf{T} 目标类， \textit{i.e.每个样本都是它自己的类}，无需进一步更改。 \textbf{DIET} 无需解码器/投影仪网络即可工作，不基于正对或重建，不引入超参数，并且跨数据集和架构开箱即用。尽管 \textbf{DIET} 很简单，但学习到的表示是高质量的，并且通常与最先进的 \textit{e.g.} 相当，在 DIET 学习到的表示之上使用线性分类器，在使用 Resnet101 的 CIFAR100 上达到 $71.4\%$，在使用 Resnext50 的 TinyImagenet 上达到 $52.5\%$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需标签的无监督学习方法DIET，通过将数据点自身作为目标类别来学习高质量的表示。
AI.motivation: 传统无监督学习方法存在计算成本高、依赖复杂架构或超参数等问题，而标签数据昂贵且不可靠，因此需要更简单有效的替代方案。
AI.method: DIET方法直接使用数据点的索引作为目标类别，无需解码器、投影头或重建损失，仅需微调现有分类模型即可实现特征学习。
AI.result: 在CIFAR100和TinyImagenet数据集上，DIET的线性分类器准确率分别达到71.4%（ResNet101）和52.5%（ResNeXt50），表现与先进方法相当。
AI.conclusion: DIET通过极简设计解决了无监督学习中的复杂挑战，证明了无需自监督或重建的直接特征学习的有效性。

To that end, spectral embedding, self-supervised learning, or generative modeling have offered competitive solutions. Those methods however come with numerous challenges \textit{e.g.} estimating geodesic distances, specifying projector architectures and anti-collapse losses, or specifying decoder architectures and reconstruction losses. In contrast, we introduce a simple explainable alternative -- coined \textbf{DIET} -- to learn representations from unlabeled data, free of those challenges. \textbf{DIET} is blatantly simple: take one's favorite classification setup and use the \textbf{D}atum \textbf{I}nd\textbf{E}x as its \textbf{T}arget class, \textit{i.e. each sample is its own class}, no further changes needed. \textbf{DIET} works without a decoder/projector network, is not based on positive pairs nor reconstruction, introduces no hyper-parameters, and works out-of-the-box across datasets and architectures. Despite \textbf{DIET}'s simplicity, the learned representations are of high-quality and often on-par with the state-of-the-art \textit{e.g.} using a linear classifier on top of DIET's learned representation reaches $71.4\%$ on CIFAR100 with a Resnet101, $52.5\%$ on TinyImagenet with a Resnext50. 如果我们希望学习廉价、可靠和可转移的模型，那么昂贵、嘈杂和过度专业化的标签就应该被搁置，以支持无监督学习。为此，频谱嵌入、自我监督学习或生成建模提供了有竞争力的解决方案。然而，这些方法面临着许多挑战，例如估计测地距离、指定投影仪架构和抗塌陷损失，或指定解码器架构和重建损失。相比之下，我们引入了一个简单的可解释的替代方案——创造了 \textbf{DIET}——从未标记的数据中学习表示，从而摆脱了这些挑战。 \textbf{DIET} 非常简单：采用自己最喜欢的分类设置并使用 \textbf{D}atum \textbf{I}nd\textbf{E}x 作为其 \textbf{T} 目标类， \textit{i.e.每个样本都是它自己的类}，无需进一步更改。 \textbf{DIET} 无需解码器/投影仪网络即可工作，不基于正对或重建，不引入超参数，并且跨数据集和架构开箱即用。尽管 \textbf{DIET} 很简单，但学习到的表示是高质量的，并且通常与最先进的 \textit{e.g.} 相当，在 DIET 学习到的表示之上使用线性分类器，在使用 Resnet101 的 CIFAR100 上达到 $71.4\%$，在使用 Resnext50 的 TinyImagenet 上达到 $52.5\%$。 本文提出了一种无需标签的无监督学习方法DIET，通过将数据点自身作为目标类别来学习高质量的表示。 Randall Balestriero cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Beatrice Bevilacqua,Kyriacos Nikiforou,Borja Ibarz,Ioana Bica,Michela Paganini,Charles Blundell,Jovana Mitrovic,Petar Veličković
title: Neural Algorithmic Reasoning with Causal Regularisation
title_zh: 具有因果正则化的神经算法推理
abstract: Recent work on neural algorithmic reasoning has investigated the reasoning capabilities of neural networks, effectively demonstrating they can learn to execute classical algorithms on unseen data coming from the train distribution. However, the performance of existing neural reasoners significantly degrades on out-of-distribution (OOD) test data, where inputs have larger sizes. In this work, we make an important observation: there are many different inputs for which an algorithm will perform certain intermediate computations identically. This insight allows us to develop data augmentation procedures that, given an algorithm's intermediate trajectory, produce inputs for which the target algorithm would have exactly the same next trajectory step. We ensure invariance in the next-step prediction across such inputs, by employing a self-supervised objective derived by our observation, formalised in a causal graph. We prove that the resulting method, which we call Hint-ReLIC, improves the OOD generalisation capabilities of the reasoner. We evaluate our method on the CLRS algorithmic reasoning benchmark, where we show up to 3$\times$ improvements on the OOD test data.
summary: Recent work on neural algorithmic reasoning has investigated the reasoning capabilities of neural networks, effectively demonstrating they can learn to execute classical algorithms on unseen data coming from the train distribution. However, the performance of existing neural reasoners significantly degrades on out-of-distribution (OOD) test data, where inputs have larger sizes. In this work, we make an important observation: there are many different inputs for which an algorithm will perform certain intermediate computations identically. This insight allows us to develop data augmentation procedures that, given an algorithm's intermediate trajectory, produce inputs for which the target algorithm would have exactly the same next trajectory step. We ensure invariance in the next-step prediction across such inputs, by employing a self-supervised objective derived by our observation, formalised in a causal graph. We prove that the resulting method, which we call Hint-ReLIC, improves the OOD generalisation capabilities of the reasoner. We evaluate our method on the CLRS algorithmic reasoning benchmark, where we show up to 3$\times$ improvements on the OOD test data.
abstract_zh: 最近关于神经算法推理的工作研究了神经网络的推理能力，有效地证明了它们可以学习对来自列车分布的看不见的数据执行经典算法。然而，现有神经推理器的性能在输入尺寸较大的分布外 (OOD) 测试数据上显着降低。在这项工作中，我们做出了一个重要的观察：算法将针对许多不同的输入以相同的方式执行某些中间计算。这种见解使我们能够开发数据增强程序，在给定算法的中间轨迹的情况下，生成目标算法将具有完全相同的下一个轨迹步骤的输入。通过采用由我们的观察得出的自我监督目标（以因果图形式化），我们确保了这些输入的下一步预测的不变性。我们证明所得到的方法（我们称之为 Hint-ReLIC）提高了推理器的 OOD 泛化能力。我们在 CLRS 算法推理基准上评估我们的方法，在 OOD 测试数据上显示出高达 3$\times$ 的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Hint-ReLIC的方法，通过因果正则化提升神经网络在算法推理任务中的分布外（OOD）泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有神经推理器在处理超出训练分布的较大规模输入时性能显著下降，需解决算法推理中的分布外泛化问题。
AI.method: 基于算法中间计算步骤的不变性特性，设计数据增强策略生成保持相同轨迹的输入，并通过因果图构建自监督目标实现因果正则化。
AI.result: 在CLRS基准测试中，OOD测试数据性能提升最高达3倍。
AI.conclusion: 因果正则化方法通过利用算法不变性特性，有效提升了神经推理器的分布外泛化能力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Hint-ReLIC的方法，通过因果正则化提升神经网络在算法推理任务中的分布外（OOD）泛化能力。

However, the performance of existing neural reasoners significantly degrades on out-of-distribution (OOD) test data, where inputs have larger sizes. In this work, we make an important observation: there are many different inputs for which an algorithm will perform certain intermediate computations identically. This insight allows us to develop data augmentation procedures that, given an algorithm's intermediate trajectory, produce inputs for which the target algorithm would have exactly the same next trajectory step. We ensure invariance in the next-step prediction across such inputs, by employing a self-supervised objective derived by our observation, formalised in a causal graph. authors_text: Javier Poyatos,Daniel Molina,Aitor Martínez,Javier Del Ser,Francisco Herrera
title: Multiobjective Evolutionary Pruning of Deep Neural Networks with Transfer Learning for improving their Performance and Robustness
title_zh: 通过迁移学习对深度神经网络进行多目标进化修剪，以提高其性能和鲁棒性
abstract: Evolutionary Computation algorithms have been used to solve optimization problems in relation with architectural, hyper-parameter or training configuration, forging the field known today as Neural Architecture Search. These algorithms have been combined with other techniques such as the pruning of Neural Networks, which reduces the complexity of the network, and the Transfer Learning, which lets the import of knowledge from another problem related to the one at hand. The usage of several criteria to evaluate the quality of the evolutionary proposals is also a common case, in which the performance and complexity of the network are the most used criteria. This work proposes MO-EvoPruneDeepTL, a multi-objective evolutionary pruning algorithm. MO-EvoPruneDeepTL uses Transfer Learning to adapt the last layers of Deep Neural Networks, by replacing them with sparse layers evolved by a genetic algorithm, which guides the evolution based in the performance, complexity and robustness of the network, being the robustness a great quality indicator for the evolved models. We carry out different experiments with several datasets to assess the benefits of our proposal. Results show that our proposal achieves promising results in all the objectives, and direct relation are presented among them. The experiments also show that the most influential neurons help us explain which parts of the input images are the most relevant for the prediction of the pruned neural network. Lastly, by virtue of the diversity within the Pareto front of pruning patterns produced by the proposal, it is shown that an ensemble of differently pruned models improves the overall performance and robustness of the trained networks.
summary: Evolutionary Computation algorithms have been used to solve optimization problems in relation with architectural, hyper-parameter or training configuration, forging the field known today as Neural Architecture Search. These algorithms have been combined with other techniques such as the pruning of Neural Networks, which reduces the complexity of the network, and the Transfer Learning, which lets the import of knowledge from another problem related to the one at hand. The usage of several criteria to evaluate the quality of the evolutionary proposals is also a common case, in which the performance and complexity of the network are the most used criteria. This work proposes MO-EvoPruneDeepTL, a multi-objective evolutionary pruning algorithm. MO-EvoPruneDeepTL uses Transfer Learning to adapt the last layers of Deep Neural Networks, by replacing them with sparse layers evolved by a genetic algorithm, which guides the evolution based in the performance, complexity and robustness of the network, being the robustness a great quality indicator for the evolved models. We carry out different experiments with several datasets to assess the benefits of our proposal. Results show that our proposal achieves promising results in all the objectives, and direct relation are presented among them. The experiments also show that the most influential neurons help us explain which parts of the input images are the most relevant for the prediction of the pruned neural network. Lastly, by virtue of the diversity within the Pareto front of pruning patterns produced by the proposal, it is shown that an ensemble of differently pruned models improves the overall performance and robustness of the trained networks.
abstract_zh: 进化计算算法已被用来解决与架构、超参数或训练配置相关的优化问题，形成了今天称为神经架构搜索的领域。这些算法已与其他技术相结合，例如神经网络的修剪（降低了网络的复杂性）和迁移学习（可以从与当前问题相关的另一个问题中导入知识）。使用多个标准来评估进化提案的质量也是一种常见的情况，其中网络的性能和复杂性是最常用的标准。这项工作提出了 MO-EvoPruneDeepTL，一种多目标进化剪枝算法。 MO-EvoPruneDeepTL 使用迁移学习来适应深度神经网络的最后几层，将其替换为由遗传算法进化而来的稀疏层，遗传算法根据网络的性能、复杂性和鲁棒性指导进化，鲁棒性是进化模型的重要质量指标。我们使用多个数据集进行不同的实验，以评估我们建议的好处。结果表明，我们的建议在所有目标上都取得了可喜的结果，并且它们之间呈现出直接的关系。实验还表明，最有影响力的神经元帮助我们解释输入图像的哪些部分与剪枝神经网络的预测最相关。最后，凭借该提案产生的剪枝模式的帕累托前沿的多样性，表明不同剪枝模型的集合提高了训练网络的整体性能和鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合迁移学习的多目标进化算法MO-EvoPruneDeepTL，用于优化深度神经网络的性能、复杂度和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络剪枝方法难以同时平衡模型性能、复杂度与鲁棒性，且缺乏对关键神经元的解释性分析。
AI.method: 通过遗传算法进化稀疏层结构，利用迁移学习适配网络最后层，并基于性能、复杂度和鲁棒性多目标优化剪枝方案。
AI.result: 实验表明方法在多个数据集上均取得优异结果，关键神经元分析有效解释模型决策，不同剪枝模式的集成进一步提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多目标进化与迁移学习的结合，实现了网络剪枝的性能-鲁棒性协同优化，为模型压缩提供了新思路。

search_text: Multiobjective Evolutionary Pruning of Deep Neural Networks with Transfer Learning for improving their Performance and Robustness 通过迁移学习对深度神经网络进行多目标进化修剪，以提高其性能和鲁棒性 Evolutionary Computation algorithms have been used to solve optimization problems in relation with architectural, hyper-parameter or training configuration, forging the field known today as Neural Architecture Search. These algorithms have been combined with other techniques such as the pruning of Neural Networks, which reduces the complexity of the network, and the Transfer Learning, which lets the import of knowledge from another problem related to the one at hand. The usage of several criteria to evaluate the quality of the evolutionary proposals is also a common case, in which the performance and complexity of the network are the most used criteria. This work proposes MO-EvoPruneDeepTL, a multi-objective evolutionary pruning algorithm. MO-EvoPruneDeepTL uses Transfer Learning to adapt the last layers of Deep Neural Networks, by replacing them with sparse layers evolved by a genetic algorithm, which guides the evolution based in the performance, complexity and robustness of the network, being the robustness a great quality indicator for the evolved models. We carry out different experiments with several datasets to assess the benefits of our proposal. Results show that our proposal achieves promising results in all the objectives, and direct relation are presented among them. The experiments also show that the most influential neurons help us explain which parts of the input images are the most relevant for the prediction of the pruned neural network. Lastly, by virtue of the diversity within the Pareto front of pruning patterns produced by the proposal, it is shown that an ensemble of differently pruned models improves the overall performance and robustness of the trained networks. 进化计算算法已被用来解决与架构、超参数或训练配置相关的优化问题，形成了今天称为神经架构搜索的领域。这些算法已与其他技术相结合，例如神经网络的修剪（降低了网络的复杂性）和迁移学习（可以从与当前问题相关的另一个问题中导入知识）。使用多个标准来评估进化提案的质量也是一种常见的情况，其中网络的性能和复杂性是最常用的标准。这项工作提出了 MO-EvoPruneDeepTL，一种多目标进化剪枝算法。 MO-EvoPruneDeepTL 使用迁移学习来适应深度神经网络的最后几层，将其替换为由遗传算法进化而来的稀疏层，遗传算法根据网络的性能、复杂性和鲁棒性指导进化，鲁棒性是进化模型的重要质量指标。我们使用多个数据集进行不同的实验，以评估我们建议的好处。结果表明，我们的建议在所有目标上都取得了可喜的结果，并且它们之间呈现出直接的关系。实验还表明，最有影响力的神经元帮助我们解释输入图像的哪些部分与剪枝神经网络的预测最相关。最后，凭借该提案产生的剪枝模式的帕累托前沿的多样性，表明不同剪枝模型的集合提高了训练网络的整体性能和鲁棒性。 本文提出一种结合迁移学习的多目标进化算法MO-EvoPruneDeepTL，用于优化深度神经网络的性能、复杂度和鲁棒性。 Javier Poyatos,Daniel Molina,Aitor Martínez,Javier Del Ser,Francisco Herrera cs.NE,cs.AI

authors_text: Jason M. Altschuler,Sinho Chewi
title: Faster high-accuracy log-concave sampling via algorithmic warm starts
title_zh: 通过算法热启动实现更快的高精度对数凹采样
abstract: Understanding the complexity of sampling from a strongly log-concave and log-smooth distribution $π$ on $\mathbb{R}^d$ to high accuracy is a fundamental problem, both from a practical and theoretical standpoint. In practice, high-accuracy samplers such as the classical Metropolis-adjusted Langevin algorithm (MALA) remain the de facto gold standard; and in theory, via the proximal sampler reduction, it is understood that such samplers are key for sampling even beyond log-concavity (in particular, for distributions satisfying isoperimetric assumptions). In this work, we improve the dimension dependence of this sampling problem to $\tilde{O}(d^{1/2})$, whereas the previous best result for MALA was $\tilde{O}(d)$. This closes the long line of work on the complexity of MALA, and moreover leads to state-of-the-art guarantees for high-accuracy sampling under strong log-concavity and beyond (thanks to the aforementioned reduction). Our starting point is that the complexity of MALA improves to $\tilde{O}(d^{1/2})$, but only under a warm start (an initialization with constant Rényi divergence w.r.t. $π$). Previous algorithms took much longer to find a warm start than to use it, and closing this gap has remained an important open problem in the field. Our main technical contribution settles this problem by establishing the first $\tilde{O}(d^{1/2})$ Rényi mixing rates for the discretized underdamped Langevin diffusion. For this, we develop new differential-privacy-inspired techniques based on Rényi divergences with Orlicz--Wasserstein shifts, which allow us to sidestep longstanding challenges for proving fast convergence of hypocoercive differential equations.
summary: Understanding the complexity of sampling from a strongly log-concave and log-smooth distribution $π$ on $\mathbb{R}^d$ to high accuracy is a fundamental problem, both from a practical and theoretical standpoint. In practice, high-accuracy samplers such as the classical Metropolis-adjusted Langevin algorithm (MALA) remain the de facto gold standard; and in theory, via the proximal sampler reduction, it is understood that such samplers are key for sampling even beyond log-concavity (in particular, for distributions satisfying isoperimetric assumptions). In this work, we improve the dimension dependence of this sampling problem to $\tilde{O}(d^{1/2})$, whereas the previous best result for MALA was $\tilde{O}(d)$. This closes the long line of work on the complexity of MALA, and moreover leads to state-of-the-art guarantees for high-accuracy sampling under strong log-concavity and beyond (thanks to the aforementioned reduction). Our starting point is that the complexity of MALA improves to $\tilde{O}(d^{1/2})$, but only under a warm start (an initialization with constant Rényi divergence w.r.t. $π$). Previous algorithms took much longer to find a warm start than to use it, and closing this gap has remained an important open problem in the field. Our main technical contribution settles this problem by establishing the first $\tilde{O}(d^{1/2})$ Rényi mixing rates for the discretized underdamped Langevin diffusion. For this, we develop new differential-privacy-inspired techniques based on Rényi divergences with Orlicz--Wasserstein shifts, which allow us to sidestep longstanding challenges for proving fast convergence of hypocoercive differential equations.
abstract_zh: 从实践和理论的角度来看，从 $\mathbb{R}^d$ 上的强对数凹和对数平滑分布 $π$ 到高精度的采样复杂性是一个基本问题。在实践中，高精度采样器（例如经典的 Metropolis 调整 Langevin 算法 (MALA)）仍然是事实上的黄金标准；理论上，通过近端采样器减少，可以理解，此类采样器对于超越对数凹性的采样至关重要（特别是对于满足等周假设的分布）。在这项工作中，我们将此采样问题的维度依赖性改进为 $\tilde{O}(d^{1/2})$，而 MALA 之前的最佳结果是 $\tilde{O}(d)$。这结束了关于 MALA 复杂性的漫长工作，此外，还为强对数凹性及其他情况下的高精度采样提供了最先进的保证（由于上述的减少）。我们的出发点是，MALA 的复杂度提高到 $\tilde{O}(d^{1/2})$，但仅限于热启动（具有常数 Rényi 散度 w.r.t. $π$ 的初始化）。以前的算法找到热启动的时间比使用热启动的时间长得多，而缩小这一差距仍然是该领域的一个重要的开放问题。我们的主要技术贡献是通过为离散欠阻尼朗之万扩散建立第一个 $\tilde{O}(d^{1/2})$ Rényi 混合率来解决这个问题。为此，我们开发了基于 Rényi 散度和 Orlicz-Wasserstein 位移的新的受微分隐私启发的技术，这使我们能够避开证明低强制微分方程快速收敛的长期挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何更快地对强对数凹和对数光滑分布进行高精度采样。
AI.motivation: 提高MALA算法在高精度采样中的维度依赖关系，从$\tilde{O}(d)$改进到$\tilde{O}(d^{1/2})$，并解决热启动与利用热启动之间的效率差距这一长期开放问题。
AI.method: 提出基于Rényi散度与Orlicz-Wasserstein偏移的差分隐私启发技术，用于分析离散化欠阻尼Langevin扩散的Rényi混合速率。
AI.result: 首次建立了$\tilde{O}(d^{1/2})$的Rényi混合速率，将MALA的维度复杂度从$\tilde{O}(d)$改进到$\tilde{O}(d^{1/2})$。
AI.conclusion: 该工作解决了MALA复杂度的长期研究问题，并在强对数凹性及更广条件下实现了高精度采样的最先进保证。

authors_text: Jaesung Huh,Andrew Brown,Jee-weon Jung,Joon Son Chung,Arsha Nagrani,Daniel Garcia-Romero,Andrew Zisserman
title: VoxSRC 2022: The Fourth VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge
title_zh: VoxSRC 2022：第四届 VoxCeleb 演讲者识别挑战赛
abstract: This paper summarises the findings from the VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge 2022 (VoxSRC-22), which was held in conjunction with INTERSPEECH 2022. The goal of this challenge was to evaluate how well state-of-the-art speaker recognition systems can diarise and recognise speakers from speech obtained "in the wild". The challenge consisted of: (i) the provision of publicly available speaker recognition and diarisation data from YouTube videos together with ground truth annotation and standardised evaluation software; and (ii) a public challenge and hybrid workshop held at INTERSPEECH 2022. We describe the four tracks of our challenge along with the baselines, methods, and results. We conclude with a discussion on the new domain-transfer focus of VoxSRC-22, and on the progression of the challenge from the previous three editions.
summary: This paper summarises the findings from the VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge 2022 (VoxSRC-22), which was held in conjunction with INTERSPEECH 2022. The goal of this challenge was to evaluate how well state-of-the-art speaker recognition systems can diarise and recognise speakers from speech obtained "in the wild". The challenge consisted of: (i) the provision of publicly available speaker recognition and diarisation data from YouTube videos together with ground truth annotation and standardised evaluation software; and (ii) a public challenge and hybrid workshop held at INTERSPEECH 2022. We describe the four tracks of our challenge along with the baselines, methods, and results. We conclude with a discussion on the new domain-transfer focus of VoxSRC-22, and on the progression of the challenge from the previous three editions.
abstract_zh: 本文总结了 2022 年 VoxCeleb 说话人识别挑战赛 (VoxSRC-22) 的研究结果，该挑战赛与 INTERSPEECH 2022 同期举行。该挑战赛的目标是评估最先进的说话人识别系统如何从“野外”获得的语音中区分和识别说话人。挑战包括：(i) 提供公开的说话人识别和 YouTube 视频的分类数据以及地面实况注释和标准化评估软件； (ii) 在 INTERSPEECH 2022 上举办的公共挑战和混合研讨会。我们描述了挑战的四个轨道以及基线、方法和结果。最后，我们讨论了 VoxSRC-22 的新域转移焦点，以及前三个版本的挑战进展。

AI.tldr: 总结VoxSRC-2022挑战赛结果，评估先进说话人识别系统在野外语音中的分割与识别能力。
AI.motivation: 推动说话人识别技术在真实场景中的应用，促进算法在复杂环境下的鲁棒性提升。
AI.method: 通过提供YouTube视频数据集、标准评估工具及举办研讨会，设置四个赛道对比不同方法。
AI.result: 展示了各赛道的基线结果与方法对比，分析了领域迁移对模型性能的影响，并总结了挑战赛的演变趋势。
AI.conclusion: 强调领域适应性在说话人识别中的重要性，指出未来研究需关注跨领域泛化能力，并持续推动技术进步。

search_text: VoxSRC 2022: The Fourth VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge VoxSRC 2022：第四届 VoxCeleb 演讲者识别挑战赛 This paper summarises the findings from the VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge 2022 (VoxSRC-22), which was held in conjunction with INTERSPEECH 2022. The goal of this challenge was to evaluate how well state-of-the-art speaker recognition systems can diarise and recognise speakers from speech obtained "in the wild". The challenge consisted of: (i) the provision of publicly available speaker recognition and diarisation data from YouTube videos together with ground truth annotation and standardised evaluation software; and (ii) a public challenge and hybrid workshop held at INTERSPEECH 2022. We describe the four tracks of our challenge along with the baselines, methods, and results. We conclude with a discussion on the new domain-transfer focus of VoxSRC-22, and on the progression of the challenge from the previous three editions. 本文总结了 2022 年 VoxCeleb 说话人识别挑战赛 (VoxSRC-22) 的研究结果，该挑战赛与 INTERSPEECH 2022 同期举行。该挑战赛的目标是评估最先进的说话人识别系统如何从“野外”获得的语音中区分和识别说话人。挑战包括：(i) 提供公开的说话人识别和 YouTube 视频的分类数据以及地面实况注释和标准化评估软件； (ii) 在 INTERSPEECH 2022 上举办的公共挑战和混合研讨会。我们描述了挑战的四个轨道以及基线、方法和结果。最后，我们讨论了 VoxSRC-22 的新域转移焦点，以及前三个版本的挑战进展。 总结VoxSRC-2022挑战赛结果，评估先进说话人识别系统在野外语音中的分割与识别能力。 Jaesung Huh,Andrew Brown,Jee-weon Jung,Joon Son Chung,Arsha Nagrani,Daniel Garcia-Romero,Andrew Zisserman cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Joran van Apeldoorn,Sander Gribling,Harold Nieuwboer
title: Basic quantum subroutines: finding multiple marked elements and summing numbers
title_zh: 基本量子子例程：查找多个标记元素并对数字求和
abstract: We show how to find all $k$ marked elements in a list of size $N$ using the optimal number $O(\sqrt{N k})$ of quantum queries and only a polylogarithmic overhead in the gate complexity, in the setting where one has a small quantum memory. Previous algorithms either incurred a factor $k$ overhead in the gate complexity, or had an extra factor $\log(k)$ in the query complexity. We then consider the problem of finding a multiplicative $δ$-approximation of $s = \sum_{i=1}^N v_i$ where $v=(v_i) \in [0,1]^N$, given quantum query access to a binary description of $v$. We give an algorithm that does so, with probability at least $1-ρ$, using $O(\sqrt{N \log(1/ρ) / δ})$ quantum queries (under mild assumptions on $ρ$). This quadratically improves the dependence on $1/δ$ and $\log(1/ρ)$ compared to a straightforward application of amplitude estimation. To obtain the improved $\log(1/ρ)$ dependence we use the first result.
summary: We show how to find all $k$ marked elements in a list of size $N$ using the optimal number $O(\sqrt{N k})$ of quantum queries and only a polylogarithmic overhead in the gate complexity, in the setting where one has a small quantum memory. Previous algorithms either incurred a factor $k$ overhead in the gate complexity, or had an extra factor $\log(k)$ in the query complexity. We then consider the problem of finding a multiplicative $δ$-approximation of $s = \sum_{i=1}^N v_i$ where $v=(v_i) \in [0,1]^N$, given quantum query access to a binary description of $v$. We give an algorithm that does so, with probability at least $1-ρ$, using $O(\sqrt{N \log(1/ρ) / δ})$ quantum queries (under mild assumptions on $ρ$). This quadratically improves the dependence on $1/δ$ and $\log(1/ρ)$ compared to a straightforward application of amplitude estimation. To obtain the improved $\log(1/ρ)$ dependence we use the first result.
abstract_zh: 我们展示了如何在量子内存较小的情况下，使用最优数量 $O(\sqrt{N k})$ 的量子查询，并且仅在门复杂性中使用多对数开销，来查找大小为 $N$ 的列表中的所有 $k$ 标记元素。以前的算法要么在门复杂度上产生 $k$ 开销，要么在查询复杂度上产生 $\log(k)$ 额外因素。然后，我们考虑寻找 $s = \sum_{i=1}^N v_i$ 的乘法 $δ$ 近似值的问题，其中 $v=(v_i) \in [0,1]^N$，给定量子查询访问 $v$ 的二进制描述。我们给出了一种算法，使用 $O(\sqrt{N \log(1/ρ) / δ})$ 量子查询（在对 $ρ$ 的温和假设下），概率至少为 $1-ρ$。与直接应用幅度估计相比，这以二次方的方式改善了对 $1/δ$ 和 $\log(1/ρ)$ 的依赖性。为了获得改进的 $\log(1/ρ)$ 依赖性，我们使用第一个结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何在量子计算中高效地找到多个标记元素以及对一组数进行乘法近似求和的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的量子算法在处理多个标记元素或求和问题时，要么在门复杂度上引入了额外的因子，要么在查询复杂度上增加了对数因子。本文旨在改进这些算法的效率。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种在量子查询复杂度为 $O(\\sqrt{Nk})$ 的情况下找到所有 $k$ 个标记元素的方法，并在门复杂度上仅引入对数因子。此外，还提出了一种利用量子查询访问二进制描述的向量 $v$，以 $O(\\sqrt{N \\log(1/ρ)/δ})$ 的查询复杂度近似求和的方法。
AI.result: 本文的算法在查询复杂度上优于现有方法，同时在门复杂度上保持较低的开销，并且在求和问题上将对数因子的依赖性提高了。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出了更高效的量子子程序，用于找到多个标记元素和对数进行近似求和，显著提升了现有量子算法的效率。

authors_text: Michael E. Glinsky,Kathryn Maupin
title: Mallat Scattering Transformation based surrogate for MagnetoHydroDynamics
title_zh: 基于 Mallat 散射变换的磁流体动力学替代方案
comment: 12 pages, 20 figures, 3 animations, accepted for publication in Computational Mechanics
comments: 12 pages, 20 figures, 3 animations, accepted for publication in Computational Mechanics
abstract: A Machine and Deep Learning methodology is developed and applied to give a high fidelity, fast surrogate for 2D resistive MHD simulations of MagLIF implosions. The resistive MHD code GORGON is used to generate an ensemble of implosions with different liner aspect ratios, initial gas preheat temperatures (that is, different adiabats), and different liner perturbations. The liner density and magnetic field as functions of $x$, $y$, and $t$ were generated. The Mallat Scattering Transformation (MST) is taken of the logarithm of both fields and a Principal Components Analysis is done on the logarithm of the MST of both fields. The fields are projected onto the PCA vectors and a small number of these PCA vector components are kept. Singular Value Decompositions of the cross correlation of the input parameters to the output logarithm of the MST of the fields, and of the cross correlation of the SVD vector components to the PCA vector components are done. This allows the identification of the PCA vectors vis-a-vis the input parameters. Finally, a Multi Layer Perceptron neural network with ReLU activation and a simple three layer encoder/decoder architecture is trained on this dataset to predict the PCA vector components of the fields as a function of time. Details of the implosion, stagnation, and the disassembly are well captured. Examination of the PCA vectors and a permutation importance analysis of the MLP show definitive evidence of an inverse turbulent cascade into a dipole emergent behavior. The orientation of the dipole is set by the initial liner perturbation. The analysis is repeated with a version of the MST which includes phase, called Wavelet Phase Harmonics (WPH). While WPH do not give the physical insight of the MST, they can and are inverted to give field configurations as a function of time, including field-to-field correlations.
summary: A Machine and Deep Learning methodology is developed and applied to give a high fidelity, fast surrogate for 2D resistive MHD simulations of MagLIF implosions. The resistive MHD code GORGON is used to generate an ensemble of implosions with different liner aspect ratios, initial gas preheat temperatures (that is, different adiabats), and different liner perturbations. The liner density and magnetic field as functions of $x$, $y$, and $t$ were generated. The Mallat Scattering Transformation (MST) is taken of the logarithm of both fields and a Principal Components Analysis is done on the logarithm of the MST of both fields. The fields are projected onto the PCA vectors and a small number of these PCA vector components are kept. Singular Value Decompositions of the cross correlation of the input parameters to the output logarithm of the MST of the fields, and of the cross correlation of the SVD vector components to the PCA vector components are done. This allows the identification of the PCA vectors vis-a-vis the input parameters. Finally, a Multi Layer Perceptron neural network with ReLU activation and a simple three layer encoder/decoder architecture is trained on this dataset to predict the PCA vector components of the fields as a function of time. Details of the implosion, stagnation, and the disassembly are well captured. Examination of the PCA vectors and a permutation importance analysis of the MLP show definitive evidence of an inverse turbulent cascade into a dipole emergent behavior. The orientation of the dipole is set by the initial liner perturbation. The analysis is repeated with a version of the MST which includes phase, called Wavelet Phase Harmonics (WPH). While WPH do not give the physical insight of the MST, they can and are inverted to give field configurations as a function of time, including field-to-field correlations.
abstract_zh: 开发并应用了机器和深度学习方法，为 MagLIF 内爆的 2D 电阻 MHD 模拟提供高保真、快速的替代。电阻 MHD 代码 GORGON 用于生成具有不同内衬纵横比、初始气体预热温度（即不同绝热材料）和不同内衬扰动的内爆集合。生成了作为 $x$、$y$ 和 $t$ 函数的线性密度和磁场。 Mallat 散射变换 (MST) 取两个场的对数，并对两个场的 MST 对数进行主成分分析。这些场被投影到 PCA 向量上，并保留少量的这些 PCA 向量分量。完成输入参数与场的 MST 的输出对数的互相关以及 SVD 向量分量与 PCA 向量分量的互相关的奇异值分解。这允许识别相对于输入参数的 PCA 向量。最后，在此数据集上训练具有 ReLU 激活和简单三层编码器/解码器架构的多层感知器神经网络，以预测场的 PCA 向量分量作为时间的函数。内爆、停滞和分解的细节都被很好地捕捉到。对 PCA 向量的检查和 MLP 的排列重要性分析显示了逆湍流级​​联转化为偶极子涌现行为的明确证据。偶极子的方向由初始线性扰动设定。使用包含相位的 MST 版本重复进行分析，称为小波相位谐波 (WPH)。虽然 WPH 不能提供 MST 的物理洞察力，但它们可以并且可以反转以给出作为时间函数的场配置，包括场与场的相关性。

AI.tldr: 基于Mallat散射变换（MST）开发高保真快速代理模型，用于二维电阻磁流体动力学（MHD）模拟的MagLIF内爆。
AI.motivation: 传统MHD模拟计算成本高，需通过机器学习方法构建快速代理模型以提高效率并捕捉物理现象。
AI.method: 使用GORGON代码生成多组内爆数据，对磁场和密度场进行MST变换及PCA降维，结合SVD分析输入参数与PCA向量的关系，训练三层MLP网络预测PCA分量。
AI.result: 代理模型准确捕捉内爆、停滞及解体过程，PCA分析与置换重要性验证显示逆湍流级联形成偶极子结构，偶极子方向由初始扰动决定。
AI.conclusion: MST提供物理洞察力，而波相谐波（WPH）可逆向重构场配置，为MHD模拟提供高效替代方案。
