authors_text: Luca Castri,Sariah Mghames,Marc Hanheide,Nicola Bellotto
title: Enhancing Causal Discovery from Robot Sensor Data in Dynamic Scenarios
title_zh: 增强动态场景中机器人传感器数据的因果发现
comment: Published at 2023 Conference on Causal Learning and Reasoning (CLeaR)
comments: Published at 2023 Conference on Causal Learning and Reasoning (CLeaR)
abstract: Identifying the main features and learning the causal relationships of a dynamic system from time-series of sensor data are key problems in many real-world robot applications. In this paper, we propose an extension of a state-of-the-art causal discovery method, PCMCI, embedding an additional feature-selection module based on transfer entropy. Starting from a prefixed set of variables, the new algorithm reconstructs the causal model of the observed system by considering only its main features and neglecting those deemed unnecessary for understanding the evolution of the system. We first validate the method on a toy problem and on synthetic data of brain network, for which the ground-truth models are available, and then on a real-world robotics scenario using a large-scale time-series dataset of human trajectories. The experiments demonstrate that our solution outperforms the previous state-of-the-art technique in terms of accuracy and computational efficiency, allowing better and faster causal discovery of meaningful models from robot sensor data.
summary: Identifying the main features and learning the causal relationships of a dynamic system from time-series of sensor data are key problems in many real-world robot applications. In this paper, we propose an extension of a state-of-the-art causal discovery method, PCMCI, embedding an additional feature-selection module based on transfer entropy. Starting from a prefixed set of variables, the new algorithm reconstructs the causal model of the observed system by considering only its main features and neglecting those deemed unnecessary for understanding the evolution of the system. We first validate the method on a toy problem and on synthetic data of brain network, for which the ground-truth models are available, and then on a real-world robotics scenario using a large-scale time-series dataset of human trajectories. The experiments demonstrate that our solution outperforms the previous state-of-the-art technique in terms of accuracy and computational efficiency, allowing better and faster causal discovery of meaningful models from robot sensor data.
abstract_zh: 从传感器数据的时间序列中识别动态系统的主要特征并学习因果关系是许多现实世界机器人应用中的关键问题。在本文中，我们提出了最先进的因果发现方法 PCMCI 的扩展，嵌入了一个基于转移熵的附加特征选择模块。新算法从一组前缀变量开始，仅考虑其主要特征并忽略那些对于理解系统演化而言不必要的特征，从而重建观测系统的因果模型。我们首先在玩具问题和大脑网络的合成数据上验证该方法，对于这些数据，可以使用地面实况模型，然后使用人类轨迹的大规模时间序列数据集在现实世界的机器人场景中验证该方法。实验表明，我们的解决方案在准确性和计算效率方面优于以前最先进的技术，可以更好更快地从机器人传感器数据中发现有意义的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的因果发现方法，用于从动态场景的机器人传感器数据中更高效地识别系统因果关系。
AI.motivation: 现有因果发现方法在处理动态系统时存在准确率低或计算效率不足的问题，需通过特征筛选优化模型构建。
AI.method: 扩展PCMCI算法，嵌入基于转移熵的特征选择模块，从预设变量中筛选关键特征重建因果模型。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实机器人轨迹数据集上均优于现有方法，准确率提升且计算效率更高。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了机器人传感器数据因果发现的性能，为动态系统建模提供了更优解决方案。

search_text: Enhancing Causal Discovery from Robot Sensor Data in Dynamic Scenarios 增强动态场景中机器人传感器数据的因果发现 Identifying the main features and learning the causal relationships of a dynamic system from time-series of sensor data are key problems in many real-world robot applications. In this paper, we propose an extension of a state-of-the-art causal discovery method, PCMCI, embedding an additional feature-selection module based on transfer entropy. Starting from a prefixed set of variables, the new algorithm reconstructs the causal model of the observed system by considering only its main features and neglecting those deemed unnecessary for understanding the evolution of the system. We first validate the method on a toy problem and on synthetic data of brain network, for which the ground-truth models are available, and then on a real-world robotics scenario using a large-scale time-series dataset of human trajectories. The experiments demonstrate that our solution outperforms the previous state-of-the-art technique in terms of accuracy and computational efficiency, allowing better and faster causal discovery of meaningful models from robot sensor data. 从传感器数据的时间序列中识别动态系统的主要特征并学习因果关系是许多现实世界机器人应用中的关键问题。在本文中，我们提出了最先进的因果发现方法 PCMCI 的扩展，嵌入了一个基于转移熵的附加特征选择模块。新算法从一组前缀变量开始，仅考虑其主要特征并忽略那些对于理解系统演化而言不必要的特征，从而重建观测系统的因果模型。我们首先在玩具问题和大脑网络的合成数据上验证该方法，对于这些数据，可以使用地面实况模型，然后使用人类轨迹的大规模时间序列数据集在现实世界的机器人场景中验证该方法。实验表明，我们的解决方案在准确性和计算效率方面优于以前最先进的技术，可以更好更快地从机器人传感器数据中发现有意义的模型。 本文提出一种改进的因果发现方法，用于从动态场景的机器人传感器数据中更高效地识别系统因果关系。 Luca Castri,Sariah Mghames,Marc Hanheide,Nicola Bellotto cs.RO

authors_text: Eduard Poesina,Radu Tudor Ionescu,Josiane Mothe
title: iQPP: A Benchmark for Image Query Performance Prediction
title_zh: iQPP：图像查询性能预测的基准
abstract: To date, query performance prediction (QPP) in the context of content-based image retrieval remains a largely unexplored task, especially in the query-by-example scenario, where the query is an image. To boost the exploration of the QPP task in image retrieval, we propose the first benchmark for image query performance prediction (iQPP). First, we establish a set of four data sets (PASCAL VOC 2012, Caltech-101, ROxford5k and RParis6k) and estimate the ground-truth difficulty of each query as the average precision or the precision@k, using two state-of-the-art image retrieval models. Next, we propose and evaluate novel pre-retrieval and post-retrieval query performance predictors, comparing them with existing or adapted (from text to image) predictors. The empirical results show that most predictors do not generalize across evaluation scenarios. Our comprehensive experiments indicate that iQPP is a challenging benchmark, revealing an important research gap that needs to be addressed in future work. We release our code and data as open source at https://github.com/Eduard6421/iQPP, to foster future research.
summary: To date, query performance prediction (QPP) in the context of content-based image retrieval remains a largely unexplored task, especially in the query-by-example scenario, where the query is an image. To boost the exploration of the QPP task in image retrieval, we propose the first benchmark for image query performance prediction (iQPP). First, we establish a set of four data sets (PASCAL VOC 2012, Caltech-101, ROxford5k and RParis6k) and estimate the ground-truth difficulty of each query as the average precision or the precision@k, using two state-of-the-art image retrieval models. Next, we propose and evaluate novel pre-retrieval and post-retrieval query performance predictors, comparing them with existing or adapted (from text to image) predictors. The empirical results show that most predictors do not generalize across evaluation scenarios. Our comprehensive experiments indicate that iQPP is a challenging benchmark, revealing an important research gap that needs to be addressed in future work. We release our code and data as open source at https://github.com/Eduard6421/iQPP, to foster future research.
abstract_zh: 迄今为止，基于内容的图像检索背景下的查询性能预测（QPP）仍然是一项很大程度上未被探索的任务，特别是在查询是图像的示例查询场景中。为了促进图像检索中 QPP 任务的探索，我们提出了第一个图像查询性能预测（iQPP）基准。首先，我们建立一组四个数据集（PASCAL VOC 2012、Caltech-101、ROxford5k 和 RParis6k），并使用两个最先进的图像检索模型将每个查询的真实难度估计为平均精度或 precision@k。接下来，我们提出并评估新颖的检索前和检索后查询性能预测器，将它们与现有或改编的（从文本到图像）预测器进行比较。实证结果表明，大多数预测变量不能在评估场景中进行概括。我们的综合实验表明 iQPP 是一个具有挑战性的基准，揭示了未来工作中需要解决的重要研究差距。我们在 https://github.com/Eduard6421/iQPP 以开源方式发布代码和数据，以促进未来的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出iQPP基准，用于评估图像查询性能预测（QPP）任务，推动基于内容的图像检索领域研究。
AI.motivation: 当前图像检索中的查询性能预测（QPP）研究不足，尤其在以图像作为查询的场景下缺乏系统性探索。
AI.method: 构建四个数据集并利用两种先进模型评估查询难度；提出预检索与后检索预测方法，对比现有文本迁移预测模型。
AI.result: 多数预测器无法跨场景泛化，iQPP基准揭示了QPP任务在图像检索中的显著挑战与研究空白。
AI.conclusion: iQPP为未来研究提供重要方向，开源代码与数据可促进该领域方法创新与验证。

authors_text: Prajwal Singh,Pankaj Pandey,Krishna Miyapuram,Shanmuganathan Raman
title: EEG2IMAGE: Image Reconstruction from EEG Brain Signals
title_zh: EEG2IMAGE：根据脑电图信号重建图像
abstract: Reconstructing images using brain signals of imagined visuals may provide an augmented vision to the disabled, leading to the advancement of Brain-Computer Interface (BCI) technology. The recent progress in deep learning has boosted the study area of synthesizing images from brain signals using Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN). In this work, we have proposed a framework for synthesizing the images from the brain activity recorded by an electroencephalogram (EEG) using small-size EEG datasets. This brain activity is recorded from the subject's head scalp using EEG when they ask to visualize certain classes of Objects and English characters. We use a contrastive learning method in the proposed framework to extract features from EEG signals and synthesize the images from extracted features using conditional GAN. We modify the loss function to train the GAN, which enables it to synthesize 128x128 images using a small number of images. Further, we conduct ablation studies and experiments to show the effectiveness of our proposed framework over other state-of-the-art methods using the small EEG dataset.
summary: Reconstructing images using brain signals of imagined visuals may provide an augmented vision to the disabled, leading to the advancement of Brain-Computer Interface (BCI) technology. The recent progress in deep learning has boosted the study area of synthesizing images from brain signals using Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN). In this work, we have proposed a framework for synthesizing the images from the brain activity recorded by an electroencephalogram (EEG) using small-size EEG datasets. This brain activity is recorded from the subject's head scalp using EEG when they ask to visualize certain classes of Objects and English characters. We use a contrastive learning method in the proposed framework to extract features from EEG signals and synthesize the images from extracted features using conditional GAN. We modify the loss function to train the GAN, which enables it to synthesize 128x128 images using a small number of images. Further, we conduct ablation studies and experiments to show the effectiveness of our proposed framework over other state-of-the-art methods using the small EEG dataset.
abstract_zh: 使用想象视觉的大脑信号重建图像可以为残疾人提供增强的视力，从而促进脑机接口（BCI）技术的进步。深度学习的最新进展推动了使用生成对抗网络（GAN）从大脑信号合成图像的研究领域。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个框架，用于使用小型脑电图数据集合成脑电图（EEG）记录的大脑活动图像。当受试者要求想象某些类别的物体和英文字符时，使用脑电图从受试者的头皮记录这种大脑活动。我们在所提出的框架中使用对比学习方法从 EEG 信号中提取特征，并使用条件 GAN 从提取的特征中合成图像。我们修改损失函数来训练 GAN，使其能够使用少量图像合成 128x128 图像。此外，我们进行消融研究和实验，以证明我们提出的框架相对于使用小型脑电图数据集的其他最先进方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于小规模EEG数据集的图像重建框架，通过EEG脑信号合成图像。
AI.motivation: 利用想象视觉的脑信号重建图像可为残疾人提供增强视觉，推动脑机接口技术发展。
AI.method: 采用对比学习提取EEG特征，并通过改进损失函数的条件GAN合成128x128图像。
AI.result: 在小规模EEG数据集上验证了框架有效性，实验表明优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架能有效利用小规模EEG数据实现高质量图像合成，具有BCI应用潜力。

Further, we conduct ablation studies and experiments to show the effectiveness of our proposed framework over other state-of-the-art methods using the small EEG dataset. 使用想象视觉的大脑信号重建图像可以为残疾人提供增强的视力，从而促进脑机接口（BCI）技术的进步。深度学习的最新进展推动了使用生成对抗网络（GAN）从大脑信号合成图像的研究领域。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个框架，用于使用小型脑电图数据集合成脑电图（EEG）记录的大脑活动图像。当受试者要求想象某些类别的物体和英文字符时，使用脑电图从受试者的头皮记录这种大脑活动。我们在所提出的框架中使用对比学习方法从 EEG 信号中提取特征，并使用条件 GAN 从提取的特征中合成图像。我们修改损失函数来训练 GAN，使其能够使用少量图像合成 128x128 图像。此外，我们进行消融研究和实验，以证明我们提出的框架相对于使用小型脑电图数据集的其他最先进方法的有效性。 本文提出了一种基于小规模EEG数据集的图像重建框架，通过EEG脑信号合成图像。 Prajwal Singh,Pankaj Pandey,Krishna Miyapuram,Shanmuganathan Raman cs.HC,q-bio.NC

authors_text: Jiatao Gu,Alex Trevithick,Kai-En Lin,Josh Susskind,Christian Theobalt,Lingjie Liu,Ravi Ramamoorthi
title: NerfDiff: Single-image View Synthesis with NeRF-guided Distillation from 3D-aware Diffusion
title_zh: NerfDiff：使用 NeRF 引导的 3D 感知扩散蒸馏进行单图像视图合成
abstract: Novel view synthesis from a single image requires inferring occluded regions of objects and scenes whilst simultaneously maintaining semantic and physical consistency with the input. Existing approaches condition neural radiance fields (NeRF) on local image features, projecting points to the input image plane, and aggregating 2D features to perform volume rendering. However, under severe occlusion, this projection fails to resolve uncertainty, resulting in blurry renderings that lack details. In this work, we propose NerfDiff, which addresses this issue by distilling the knowledge of a 3D-aware conditional diffusion model (CDM) into NeRF through synthesizing and refining a set of virtual views at test time. We further propose a novel NeRF-guided distillation algorithm that simultaneously generates 3D consistent virtual views from the CDM samples, and finetunes the NeRF based on the improved virtual views. Our approach significantly outperforms existing NeRF-based and geometry-free approaches on challenging datasets, including ShapeNet, ABO, and Clevr3D.
summary: Novel view synthesis from a single image requires inferring occluded regions of objects and scenes whilst simultaneously maintaining semantic and physical consistency with the input. Existing approaches condition neural radiance fields (NeRF) on local image features, projecting points to the input image plane, and aggregating 2D features to perform volume rendering. However, under severe occlusion, this projection fails to resolve uncertainty, resulting in blurry renderings that lack details. In this work, we propose NerfDiff, which addresses this issue by distilling the knowledge of a 3D-aware conditional diffusion model (CDM) into NeRF through synthesizing and refining a set of virtual views at test time. We further propose a novel NeRF-guided distillation algorithm that simultaneously generates 3D consistent virtual views from the CDM samples, and finetunes the NeRF based on the improved virtual views. Our approach significantly outperforms existing NeRF-based and geometry-free approaches on challenging datasets, including ShapeNet, ABO, and Clevr3D.
abstract_zh: 从单个图像合成新颖的视图需要推断对象和场景的遮挡区域，同时保持与输入的语义和物理一致性。现有方法在局部图像特征上调节神经辐射场 (NeRF)，将点投影到输入图像平面，并聚合 2D 特征以执行体绘制。然而，在严重遮挡的情况下，这种投影无法解决不确定性，导致渲染结果模糊、缺乏细节。在这项工作中，我们提出了 NerfDiff，它通过在测试时合成和细化一组虚拟视图，将 3D 感知条件扩散模型 (CDM) 的知识提炼到 NeRF 中来解决这个问题。我们进一步提出了一种新颖的 NeRF 引导蒸馏算法，该算法同时从 CDM 样本生成 3D 一致的虚拟视图，并根据改进的虚拟视图微调 NeRF。我们的方法在具有挑战性的数据集（包括 ShapeNet、ABO 和 Clevr3D）上显着优于现有的基于 NeRF 和无几何的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NerfDiff方法，通过3D感知扩散模型的知识蒸馏解决单图像视图合成中的遮挡问题，生成更清晰的虚拟视图。
AI.motivation: 现有基于NeRF的方法在严重遮挡情况下无法准确投影3D点到图像平面，导致渲染结果模糊且缺乏细节。
AI.method: 设计NeRF引导的蒸馏算法，在测试时合成并优化虚拟视图，同时利用3D感知扩散模型生成样本并微调NeRF网络。
AI.result: 在ShapeNet、ABO和Clevr3D等数据集上显著优于现有NeRF和无几何方法，生成的视图细节更丰富且物理一致性更高。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合3D感知扩散模型与NeRF的蒸馏框架，有效提升了单图像视图合成在复杂遮挡场景下的表现。

authors_text: Anna Jenul,Henning Langen Stokmo,Stefan Schrunner,Mona-Elisabeth Revheim,Geir Olav Hjortland,Oliver Tomic
title: Towards Understanding the Survival of Patients with High-Grade Gastroenteropancreatic Neuroendocrine Neoplasms: An Investigation of Ensemble Feature Selection in the Prediction of Overall Survival
title_zh: 了解高级别胃肠胰神经内分泌肿瘤患者的生存情况：整体生存预测中集成特征选择的研究
abstract: Determining the most informative features for predicting the overall survival of patients diagnosed with high-grade gastroenteropancreatic neuroendocrine neoplasms is crucial to improve individual treatment plans for patients, as well as the biological understanding of the disease. Recently developed ensemble feature selectors like the Repeated Elastic Net Technique for Feature Selection (RENT) and the User-Guided Bayesian Framework for Feature Selection (UBayFS) allow the user to identify such features in datasets with low sample sizes. While RENT is purely data-driven, UBayFS is capable of integrating expert knowledge a priori in the feature selection process. In this work we compare both feature selectors on a dataset comprising of 63 patients and 134 features from multiple sources, including basic patient characteristics, baseline blood values, tumor histology, imaging, and treatment information. Our experiments involve data-driven and expert-driven setups, as well as combinations of both. We use findings from clinical literature as a source of expert knowledge. Our results demonstrate that both feature selectors allow accurate predictions, and that expert knowledge has a stabilizing effect on the feature set, while the impact on predictive performance is limited. The features WHO Performance Status, Albumin, Platelets, Ki-67, Tumor Morphology, Total MTV, Total TLG, and SUVmax are the most stable and predictive features in our study.
summary: Determining the most informative features for predicting the overall survival of patients diagnosed with high-grade gastroenteropancreatic neuroendocrine neoplasms is crucial to improve individual treatment plans for patients, as well as the biological understanding of the disease. Recently developed ensemble feature selectors like the Repeated Elastic Net Technique for Feature Selection (RENT) and the User-Guided Bayesian Framework for Feature Selection (UBayFS) allow the user to identify such features in datasets with low sample sizes. While RENT is purely data-driven, UBayFS is capable of integrating expert knowledge a priori in the feature selection process. In this work we compare both feature selectors on a dataset comprising of 63 patients and 134 features from multiple sources, including basic patient characteristics, baseline blood values, tumor histology, imaging, and treatment information. Our experiments involve data-driven and expert-driven setups, as well as combinations of both. We use findings from clinical literature as a source of expert knowledge. Our results demonstrate that both feature selectors allow accurate predictions, and that expert knowledge has a stabilizing effect on the feature set, while the impact on predictive performance is limited. The features WHO Performance Status, Albumin, Platelets, Ki-67, Tumor Morphology, Total MTV, Total TLG, and SUVmax are the most stable and predictive features in our study.
abstract_zh: 确定预测被诊断患有高级别胃肠胰神经内分泌肿瘤的患者的总体生存率的最具信息性的特征对于改善患者的个体化治疗计划以及对该疾病的生物学理解至关重要。最近开发的集成特征选择器，例如重复弹性网络特征选择技术 (RENT) 和用户引导贝叶斯特征选择框架 (UBayFS)，允许用户在低样本量的数据集中识别此类特征。虽然 RENT 纯粹是数据驱动的，但 UBayFS 能够在功能选择过程中先验地整合专家知识。在这项工作中，我们在包含 63 名患者和来自多个来源的 134 个特征的数据集上比较了两个特征选择器，包括患者基本特征、基线血液值、肿瘤组织学、成像和治疗信息。我们的实验涉及数据驱动和专家驱动的设置，以及两者的组合。我们使用临床文献的发现作为专业知识的来源。我们的结果表明，两种特征选择器都可以进行准确的预测，并且专家知识对特征集具有稳定作用，而对预测性能的影响有限。 WHO 体能状态、白蛋白、血小板、Ki-67、肿瘤形态学、总 MTV、总 TLG 和 SUVmax 等特征是我们研究中最稳定和最具预测性的特征。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了两种集成特征选择方法（RENT和UBayFS）在预测高分化胃肠胰神经内分泌肿瘤患者总生存期中的应用，旨在识别关键生物标志物。
AI.motivation: 确定关键预测特征对优化患者治疗方案和理解疾病生物学机制至关重要，尤其在小样本数据集中需借助集成特征选择方法提升预测准确性。
AI.method: 基于包含63例患者、134个特征的多源数据集（涵盖临床指标、影像学等），对比数据驱动（RENT）与融合专家知识（UBayFS）两种方法，结合临床文献验证特征稳定性。
AI.result: 两种方法均实现有效预测，专家知识提升特征稳定性但对预测性能影响有限，WHO体能状态、白蛋白、Ki-67等8个特征被证实为最稳定且具有预测价值的指标。
AI.conclusion: 集成特征选择方法可有效识别生存预测关键特征，专家知识在特征稳定性中作用显著，但需进一步探索更优的多源数据融合策略以提升预测性能。

authors_text: Christian Antić
title: Generalization-baed similarity
title_zh: 基于泛化的相似性
abstract: Detecting and exploiting similarities between seemingly distant objects is without doubt an important human ability. This paper develops \textit{from the ground up} an abstract algebraic and qualitative notion of similarity based on the observation that sets of generalizations encode important properties of elements. We show that similarity defined in this way has appealing mathematical properties. As we construct our notion of similarity from first principles using only elementary concepts of universal algebra, to convince the reader of its plausibility, we show that it can model fundamental relations occurring in mathematics and be naturally embedded into first-order logic via model-theoretic types. Finally, we sketch some potential applications to theoretical computer science and artificial intelligence.
summary: Detecting and exploiting similarities between seemingly distant objects is without doubt an important human ability. This paper develops \textit{from the ground up} an abstract algebraic and qualitative notion of similarity based on the observation that sets of generalizations encode important properties of elements. We show that similarity defined in this way has appealing mathematical properties. As we construct our notion of similarity from first principles using only elementary concepts of universal algebra, to convince the reader of its plausibility, we show that it can model fundamental relations occurring in mathematics and be naturally embedded into first-order logic via model-theoretic types. Finally, we sketch some potential applications to theoretical computer science and artificial intelligence.
abstract_zh: 检测和利用看似遥远的物体之间的相似性无疑是人类的一项重要能力。本文基于对泛化集编码元素重要属性的观察，开发了 \textit{从头开始} 一种抽象的代数和定性的相似性概念。我们证明以这种方式定义的相似性具有吸引人的数学特性。当我们仅使用泛代数的基本概念从第一原理构建相似性概念时，为了让读者相信其合理性，我们证明它可以对数学中发生的基本关系进行建模，并通过模型理论类型自然地嵌入到一阶逻辑中。最后，我们概述了理论计算机科学和人工智能的一些潜在应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于泛化的抽象代数相似性概念，并验证其数学性质及在理论计算机科学和人工智能中的应用潜力。
AI.motivation: 检测和利用不同对象间的相似性是人类重要能力，但需要更严谨的数学框架来定义和处理这种相似性。
AI.method: 从通用代数基础概念出发，构建基于泛化集合的相似性定义，并通过模型论类型将其嵌入一阶逻辑进行验证。
AI.result: 证明该相似性具有优良数学性质，能表征数学中的基本关系，并为理论计算机科学和AI提供潜在应用方向。
AI.conclusion: 提出的相似性理论兼具数学严谨性与应用价值，为跨领域问题解决提供了新的抽象工具。

authors_text: Zihan Zhao,Yu Wang,Yanfeng Wang
title: Knowledge-aware Bayesian Co-attention for Multimodal Emotion Recognition
title_zh: 用于多模态情感识别的知识感知贝叶斯共同关注
abstract: Multimodal emotion recognition is a challenging research area that aims to fuse different modalities to predict human emotion. However, most existing models that are based on attention mechanisms have difficulty in learning emotionally relevant parts on their own. To solve this problem, we propose to incorporate external emotion-related knowledge in the co-attention based fusion of pre-trained models. To effectively incorporate this knowledge, we enhance the co-attention model with a Bayesian attention module (BAM) where a prior distribution is estimated using the emotion-related knowledge. Experimental results on the IEMOCAP dataset show that the proposed approach can outperform several state-of-the-art approaches by at least 0.7% unweighted accuracy (UA).
summary: Multimodal emotion recognition is a challenging research area that aims to fuse different modalities to predict human emotion. However, most existing models that are based on attention mechanisms have difficulty in learning emotionally relevant parts on their own. To solve this problem, we propose to incorporate external emotion-related knowledge in the co-attention based fusion of pre-trained models. To effectively incorporate this knowledge, we enhance the co-attention model with a Bayesian attention module (BAM) where a prior distribution is estimated using the emotion-related knowledge. Experimental results on the IEMOCAP dataset show that the proposed approach can outperform several state-of-the-art approaches by at least 0.7% unweighted accuracy (UA).
abstract_zh: 多模态情感识别是一个具有挑战性的研究领域，旨在融合不同的模态来预测人类情感。然而，大多数基于注意力机制的现有模型很难自行学习情感相关部分。为了解决这个问题，我们建议将外部情感相关知识纳入预训练模型的基于共同注意的融合中。为了有效地整合这些知识，我们使用贝叶斯注意模块（BAM）增强了共同注意模型，其中使用情感相关知识来估计先验分布。 IEMOCAP 数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的方法可以比几种最先进的方法至少高出 0.7% 的未加权准确率 (UA)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合外部情感知识的贝叶斯共注意力模型，用于提升多模态情感识别的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于注意力机制的多模态情感识别模型难以自主学习与情感相关的关键特征，需引入外部知识辅助优化。
AI.method: 在预训练模型的共注意力融合框架中引入贝叶斯注意力模块（BAM），利用情感相关知识估计先验分布以增强特征对齐。
AI.result: 在IEMOCAP数据集上，该方法在未加权准确率（UA）指标上较现有最佳方法提升至少0.7%。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合外部情感知识与贝叶斯建模，有效提升了多模态情感识别模型对关键情感特征的捕捉能力。

authors_text: Luke Haliburton,Svenja Yvonne Schött,Linda Hirsch,Robin Welsch,Albrecht Schmidt
title: Feeling the Temperature of the Room: Unobtrusive Thermal Display of Engagement during Group Communication
title_zh: 感受房间的温度：群体交流时不显眼的热力展示
abstract: Thermal signals have been explored in HCI for emotion-elicitation and enhancing two-person communication, showing that temperature invokes social and emotional signals in individuals. Yet, extending these findings to group communication is missing. We investigated how thermal signals can be used to communicate group affective states in a hybrid meeting scenario to help people feel connected over a distance. We conducted a lab study (N=20 participants) and explored wrist-worn thermal feedback to communicate audience emotions. Our results show that thermal feedback is an effective method of conveying audience engagement without increasing workload and can help a presenter feel more in tune with the audience. We outline design implications for real-world wearable social thermal feedback systems for both virtual and in-person communication that support group affect communication and social connectedness. Thermal feedback has the potential to connect people across distances and facilitate more effective and dynamic communication in multiple contexts.
summary: Thermal signals have been explored in HCI for emotion-elicitation and enhancing two-person communication, showing that temperature invokes social and emotional signals in individuals. Yet, extending these findings to group communication is missing. We investigated how thermal signals can be used to communicate group affective states in a hybrid meeting scenario to help people feel connected over a distance. We conducted a lab study (N=20 participants) and explored wrist-worn thermal feedback to communicate audience emotions. Our results show that thermal feedback is an effective method of conveying audience engagement without increasing workload and can help a presenter feel more in tune with the audience. We outline design implications for real-world wearable social thermal feedback systems for both virtual and in-person communication that support group affect communication and social connectedness. Thermal feedback has the potential to connect people across distances and facilitate more effective and dynamic communication in multiple contexts.
abstract_zh: 热信号在人机交互中被探索用于情感激发和增强两人交流，表明温度会激发个体的社交和情感信号。然而，目前还没有将这些发现扩展到群体沟通。我们研究了如何使用热信号在混合会议场景中传达群体情感状态，以帮助人们感受到远距离的联系。我们进行了一项实验室研究（N=20 名参与者），并探索腕戴式热反馈来传达观众的情绪。我们的结果表明，热反馈是一种在不增加工作量的情况下传达观众参与度的有效方法，并且可以帮助演示者感觉与观众更加融洽。我们概述了现实世界可穿戴社交热反馈系统的设计含义，用于支持群体影响沟通和社交联系的虚拟和面对面交流。热反馈有潜力将远距离的人们联系起来，并促进在多种环境下更有效和动态的沟通。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究如何通过热反馈技术在群体交流中传达情感状态，以增强远程沟通中的社会连接感。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多集中于两人互动中的热信号应用，缺乏在群体沟通场景中的探索，而远程会议中人们常因距离感而难以感知群体情绪。
AI.method: 通过实验室研究（20名参与者），采用手腕佩戴式热反馈设备，在混合会议场景中测试热信号对观众情绪的传达效果。
AI.result: 热反馈能有效传递观众参与度，且未增加认知负担，帮助演讲者更敏锐感知群体情绪。
AI.conclusion: 热反馈技术可作为跨距离沟通的工具，提升虚拟与面对面场景中的群体情感交流效率。

authors_text: Maxime Darrin,Guillaume Staerman,Eduardo Dadalto Câmara Gomes,Jackie CK Cheung,Pablo Piantanida,Pierre Colombo
title: Unsupervised Layer-wise Score Aggregation for Textual OOD Detection
title_zh: 用于文本 OOD 检测的无监督逐层评分聚合
abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is a rapidly growing field due to new robustness and security requirements driven by an increased number of AI-based systems. Existing OOD textual detectors often rely on an anomaly score (e.g., Mahalanobis distance) computed on the embedding output of the last layer of the encoder. In this work, we observe that OOD detection performance varies greatly depending on the task and layer output. More importantly, we show that the usual choice (the last layer) is rarely the best one for OOD detection and that far better results could be achieved if the best layer were picked. To leverage this observation, we propose a data-driven, unsupervised method to combine layer-wise anomaly scores. In addition, we extend classical textual OOD benchmarks by including classification tasks with a greater number of classes (up to 77), which reflects more realistic settings. On this augmented benchmark, we show that the proposed post-aggregation methods achieve robust and consistent results while removing manual feature selection altogether. Their performance achieves near oracle's best layer performance.
summary: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is a rapidly growing field due to new robustness and security requirements driven by an increased number of AI-based systems. Existing OOD textual detectors often rely on an anomaly score (e.g., Mahalanobis distance) computed on the embedding output of the last layer of the encoder. In this work, we observe that OOD detection performance varies greatly depending on the task and layer output. More importantly, we show that the usual choice (the last layer) is rarely the best one for OOD detection and that far better results could be achieved if the best layer were picked. To leverage this observation, we propose a data-driven, unsupervised method to combine layer-wise anomaly scores. In addition, we extend classical textual OOD benchmarks by including classification tasks with a greater number of classes (up to 77), which reflects more realistic settings. On this augmented benchmark, we show that the proposed post-aggregation methods achieve robust and consistent results while removing manual feature selection altogether. Their performance achieves near oracle's best layer performance.
abstract_zh: 由于基于人工智能的系统数量的增加推动了新的鲁棒性和安全性要求，分布外 (OOD) 检测是一个快速发展的领域。现有的 OOD 文本检测器通常依赖于根据编码器最后一层的嵌入输出计算的异常分数（例如马哈拉诺比斯距离）。在这项工作中，我们观察到 OOD 检测性能根据任务和层输出的不同而有很大差异。更重要的是，我们表明，通常的选择（最后一层）很少是 OOD 检测的最佳选择，并且如果选择最佳层，可以获得更好的结果。为了利用这一观察结果，我们提出了一种数据驱动的无监督方法来组合分层异常分数。此外，我们还通过包含更多类别（最多 77 个）的分类任务来扩展经典文本 OOD 基准，这反映了更现实的设置。在此增强基准上，我们表明所提出的聚合后方法可实现稳健且一致的结果，同时完全消除手动特征选择。它们的性能接近 Oracle 的最佳层性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督的层间分数聚合方法，用于改进文本的分布外检测（OOD Detection）。
AI.motivation: 现有文本OOD检测方法通常仅依赖编码器最后一层的嵌入输出计算异常分数，但实际中不同任务和层的检测性能差异显著，且最后一层并非总是最优选择。
AI.method: 提出数据驱动的无监督层间分数聚合方法，结合多层异常分数，并扩展文本OOD基准至包含最多77类的现实场景任务。
AI.result: 在扩展的基准测试中，聚合方法实现了与最优层选择接近的稳定检测性能，且无需人工特征选择。
AI.conclusion: 层间分数聚合能有效提升文本OOD检测性能，且在复杂多类任务中表现出鲁棒性与一致性。

authors_text: Chen Ju,Haicheng Wang,Jinxiang Liu,Chaofan Ma,Ya Zhang,Peisen Zhao,Jianlong Chang,Qi Tian
title: Constraint and Union for Partially-Supervised Temporal Sentence Grounding
title_zh: 部分监督时间句子接地的约束和联合
abstract: Temporal sentence grounding aims to detect the event timestamps described by the natural language query from given untrimmed videos. The existing fully-supervised setting achieves great performance but requires expensive annotation costs; while the weakly-supervised setting adopts cheap labels but performs poorly. To pursue high performance with less annotation cost, this paper introduces an intermediate partially-supervised setting, i.e., only short-clip or even single-frame labels are available during training. To take full advantage of partial labels, we propose a novel quadruple constraint pipeline to comprehensively shape event-query aligned representations, covering intra- and inter-samples, uni- and multi-modalities. The former raises intra-cluster compactness and inter-cluster separability; while the latter enables event-background separation and event-query gather. To achieve more powerful performance with explicit grounding optimization, we further introduce a partial-full union framework, i.e., bridging with an additional fully-supervised branch, to enjoy its impressive grounding bonus, and be robust to partial annotations. Extensive experiments and ablations on Charades-STA and ActivityNet Captions demonstrate the significance of partial supervision and our superior performance.
summary: Temporal sentence grounding aims to detect the event timestamps described by the natural language query from given untrimmed videos. The existing fully-supervised setting achieves great performance but requires expensive annotation costs; while the weakly-supervised setting adopts cheap labels but performs poorly. To pursue high performance with less annotation cost, this paper introduces an intermediate partially-supervised setting, i.e., only short-clip or even single-frame labels are available during training. To take full advantage of partial labels, we propose a novel quadruple constraint pipeline to comprehensively shape event-query aligned representations, covering intra- and inter-samples, uni- and multi-modalities. The former raises intra-cluster compactness and inter-cluster separability; while the latter enables event-background separation and event-query gather. To achieve more powerful performance with explicit grounding optimization, we further introduce a partial-full union framework, i.e., bridging with an additional fully-supervised branch, to enjoy its impressive grounding bonus, and be robust to partial annotations. Extensive experiments and ablations on Charades-STA and ActivityNet Captions demonstrate the significance of partial supervision and our superior performance.
abstract_zh: 时间句子基础旨在检测给定的未修剪视频中自然语言查询所描述的事件时间戳。现有的完全监督设置实现了出色的性能，但需要昂贵的注释成本；而弱监督环境采用廉价标签但表现不佳。为了以更少的注释成本追求高性能，本文引入了中间部分监督设置，即在训练过程中仅提供短剪辑甚至单帧标签。为了充分利用部分标签，我们提出了一种新颖的四重约束管道来全面塑造事件查询对齐表示，涵盖样本内和样本间、单模态和多模态。前者提高了簇内紧凑性和簇间可分离性；而后者可以实现事件背景分离和事件查询聚集。为了通过显式基础优化实现更强大的性能，我们进一步引入了部分全联合框架，即与额外的完全监督分支桥接，以享受其令人印象深刻的基础优势，并对部分注释具有鲁棒性。对 Charades-STA 和 ActivityNet Captions 的大量实验和消融证明了部分监督的重要性和我们卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种部分监督的时序句子定位方法，通过有限标注数据提升视频事件时间戳检测性能。
AI.motivation: 全监督方法标注成本高，弱监督方法性能差，需探索在有限标注下兼顾性能与成本的中间方案。
AI.method: 设计四重约束框架强化多模态对齐，结合部分监督与全监督分支的联合优化框架。
AI.result: 在Charades-STA和ActivityNet Captions数据集上验证了部分监督有效性及方法优越性。
AI.conclusion: 部分监督设置具有实际意义，所提方法通过多约束联合优化显著提升了时序定位性能。

authors_text: Selim Engin,Volkan Isler
title: Neural Optimal Control using Learned System Dynamics
title_zh: 使用学习系统动力学的神经最优控制
abstract: We study the problem of generating control laws for systems with unknown dynamics. Our approach is to represent the controller and the value function with neural networks, and to train them using loss functions adapted from the Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) equations. In the absence of a known dynamics model, our method first learns the state transitions from data collected by interacting with the system in an offline process. The learned transition function is then integrated to the HJB equations and used to forward simulate the control signals produced by our controller in a feedback loop. In contrast to trajectory optimization methods that optimize the controller for a single initial state, our controller can generate near-optimal control signals for initial states from a large portion of the state space. Compared to recent model-based reinforcement learning algorithms, we show that our method is more sample efficient and trains faster by an order of magnitude. We demonstrate our method in a number of tasks, including the control of a quadrotor with 12 state variables.
summary: We study the problem of generating control laws for systems with unknown dynamics. Our approach is to represent the controller and the value function with neural networks, and to train them using loss functions adapted from the Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) equations. In the absence of a known dynamics model, our method first learns the state transitions from data collected by interacting with the system in an offline process. The learned transition function is then integrated to the HJB equations and used to forward simulate the control signals produced by our controller in a feedback loop. In contrast to trajectory optimization methods that optimize the controller for a single initial state, our controller can generate near-optimal control signals for initial states from a large portion of the state space. Compared to recent model-based reinforcement learning algorithms, we show that our method is more sample efficient and trains faster by an order of magnitude. We demonstrate our method in a number of tasks, including the control of a quadrotor with 12 state variables.
abstract_zh: 我们研究为未知动态的系统生成控制律的问题。我们的方法是用神经网络表示控制器和价值函数，并使用改编自 Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) 方程的损失函数来训练它们。在缺乏已知动态模型的情况下，我们的方法首先从离线过程中与系统交互收集的数据中学习状态转换。然后将学习到的转换函数集成到 HJB 方程中，并用于正向模拟反馈环路中控制器产生的控制信号。与针对单个初始状态优化控制器的轨迹优化方法相比，我们的控制器可以从大部分状态空间生成接近最优的初始状态控制信号。与最近基于模型的强化学习算法相比，我们表明我们的方法样本效率更高，并且训练速度快了一个数量级。我们在许多任务中演示了我们的方法，包括控制具有 12 个状态变量的四旋翼飞行器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网络的最优控制方法，通过学习系统动力学生成控制策略。
AI.motivation: 针对未知动力学系统的控制问题，传统方法依赖先验模型或效率低下，需开发数据驱动的高效控制方案。
AI.method: 利用神经网络表示控制器和价值函数，结合汉密尔顿-雅可比-贝尔曼方程设计损失函数；通过离线数据学习状态转移模型，并将其整合到控制信号的反馈仿真中。
AI.result: 相比轨迹优化和模型强化学习方法，该方法样本效率提升一个数量级，在12维四旋翼控制任务中验证有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为未知动力学系统提供了高效近优控制框架，在样本效率和训练速度上优于现有技术。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网络的最优控制方法，通过学习系统动力学生成控制策略。
ai_content.motivation: 针对未知动力学系统的控制问题，传统方法依赖先验模型或效率低下，需开发数据驱动的高效控制方案。
ai_content.method: 利用神经网络表示控制器和价值函数，结合汉密尔顿-雅可比-贝尔曼方程设计损失函数；通过离线数据学习状态转移模型，并将其整合到控制信号的反馈仿真中。
ai_content.result: 相比轨迹优化和模型强化学习方法，该方法样本效率提升一个数量级，在12维四旋翼控制任务中验证有效性。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法为未知动力学系统提供了高效近优控制框架，在样本效率和训练速度上优于现有技术。

search_text: Neural Optimal Control using Learned System Dynamics 使用学习系统动力学的神经最优控制 We study the problem of generating control laws for systems with unknown dynamics. Our approach is to represent the controller and the value function with neural networks, and to train them using loss functions adapted from the Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) equations. In the absence of a known dynamics model, our method first learns the state transitions from data collected by interacting with the system in an offline process. The learned transition function is then integrated to the HJB equations and used to forward simulate the control signals produced by our controller in a feedback loop. In contrast to trajectory optimization methods that optimize the controller for a single initial state, our controller can generate near-optimal control signals for initial states from a large portion of the state space. Compared to recent model-based reinforcement learning algorithms, we show that our method is more sample efficient and trains faster by an order of magnitude. We demonstrate our method in a number of tasks, including the control of a quadrotor with 12 state variables. 我们研究为未知动态的系统生成控制律的问题。我们的方法是用神经网络表示控制器和价值函数，并使用改编自 Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) 方程的损失函数来训练它们。在缺乏已知动态模型的情况下，我们的方法首先从离线过程中与系统交互收集的数据中学习状态转换。然后将学习到的转换函数集成到 HJB 方程中，并用于正向模拟反馈环路中控制器产生的控制信号。与针对单个初始状态优化控制器的轨迹优化方法相比，我们的控制器可以从大部分状态空间生成接近最优的初始状态控制信号。与最近基于模型的强化学习算法相比，我们表明我们的方法样本效率更高，并且训练速度快了一个数量级。我们在许多任务中演示了我们的方法，包括控制具有 12 个状态变量的四旋翼飞行器。 本文提出一种基于神经网络的最优控制方法，通过学习系统动力学生成控制策略。 Selim Engin,Volkan Isler cs.RO

authors_text: Pedro Miguel Sánchez Sánchez,Alberto Huertas Celdrán,Ning Xie,Gérôme Bovet,Gregorio Martínez Pérez,Burkhard Stiller
title: FederatedTrust: A Solution for Trustworthy Federated Learning
title_zh: FederatedTrust：值得信赖的联邦学习解决方案
abstract: The rapid expansion of the Internet of Things (IoT) and Edge Computing has presented challenges for centralized Machine and Deep Learning (ML/DL) methods due to the presence of distributed data silos that hold sensitive information. To address concerns regarding data privacy, collaborative and privacy-preserving ML/DL techniques like Federated Learning (FL) have emerged. However, ensuring data privacy and performance alone is insufficient since there is a growing need to establish trust in model predictions. Existing literature has proposed various approaches on trustworthy ML/DL (excluding data privacy), identifying robustness, fairness, explainability, and accountability as important pillars. Nevertheless, further research is required to identify trustworthiness pillars and evaluation metrics specifically relevant to FL models, as well as to develop solutions that can compute the trustworthiness level of FL models. This work examines the existing requirements for evaluating trustworthiness in FL and introduces a comprehensive taxonomy consisting of six pillars (privacy, robustness, fairness, explainability, accountability, and federation), along with over 30 metrics for computing the trustworthiness of FL models. Subsequently, an algorithm named FederatedTrust is designed based on the pillars and metrics identified in the taxonomy to compute the trustworthiness score of FL models. A prototype of FederatedTrust is implemented and integrated into the learning process of FederatedScope, a well-established FL framework. Finally, five experiments are conducted using different configurations of FederatedScope to demonstrate the utility of FederatedTrust in computing the trustworthiness of FL models. Three experiments employ the FEMNIST dataset, and two utilize the N-BaIoT dataset considering a real-world IoT security use case.
summary: The rapid expansion of the Internet of Things (IoT) and Edge Computing has presented challenges for centralized Machine and Deep Learning (ML/DL) methods due to the presence of distributed data silos that hold sensitive information. To address concerns regarding data privacy, collaborative and privacy-preserving ML/DL techniques like Federated Learning (FL) have emerged. However, ensuring data privacy and performance alone is insufficient since there is a growing need to establish trust in model predictions. Existing literature has proposed various approaches on trustworthy ML/DL (excluding data privacy), identifying robustness, fairness, explainability, and accountability as important pillars. Nevertheless, further research is required to identify trustworthiness pillars and evaluation metrics specifically relevant to FL models, as well as to develop solutions that can compute the trustworthiness level of FL models. This work examines the existing requirements for evaluating trustworthiness in FL and introduces a comprehensive taxonomy consisting of six pillars (privacy, robustness, fairness, explainability, accountability, and federation), along with over 30 metrics for computing the trustworthiness of FL models. Subsequently, an algorithm named FederatedTrust is designed based on the pillars and metrics identified in the taxonomy to compute the trustworthiness score of FL models. A prototype of FederatedTrust is implemented and integrated into the learning process of FederatedScope, a well-established FL framework. Finally, five experiments are conducted using different configurations of FederatedScope to demonstrate the utility of FederatedTrust in computing the trustworthiness of FL models. Three experiments employ the FEMNIST dataset, and two utilize the N-BaIoT dataset considering a real-world IoT security use case.
abstract_zh: 由于保存敏感信息的分布式数据孤岛的存在，物联网 (IoT) 和边缘计算的快速扩张给集中式机器和深度学习 (ML/DL) 方法带来了挑战。为了解决有关数据隐私的问题，出现了联邦学习 (FL) 等协作和隐私保护的 ML/DL 技术。然而，仅确保数据隐私和性能是不够的，因为人们越来越需要建立对模型预测的信任。现有文献提出了各种关于可信 ML/DL（不包括数据隐私）的方法，将稳健性、公平性、可解释性和问责制作为重要支柱。然而，还需要进一步的研究来确定与 FL 模型特别相关的可信度支柱和评估指标，并开发可以计算 FL 模型可信度级别的解决方案。这项工作研究了评估 FL 可信度的现有要求，并引入了由六大支柱（隐私、鲁棒性、公平性、可解释性、问责制和联合）组成的综合分类法，以及用于计算 FL 模型可信度的 30 多个指标。随后，根据分类法中确定的支柱和指标设计了名为 FederatedTrust 的算法，以计算 FL 模型的可信度分数。 FederatedTrust 的原型已实现并集成到 FederatedScope（一个完善的 FL 框架）的学习过程中。最后，使用 FederatedScope 的不同配置进行了五个实验，以证明 FederatedTrust 在计算 FL 模型可信度方面的实用性。考虑到现实世界的物联网安全用例，三个实验使用 FEMNIST 数据集，两个实验使用 N-BaIoT 数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FederatedTrust框架，通过构建包含六个可信度支柱（隐私、鲁棒性、公平性、可解释性、责任性和联邦性）及30多个指标的分类体系，评估联邦学习模型的可信度。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习方法虽关注数据隐私与性能，但缺乏针对模型预测可信度的系统性评估体系，尤其在物联网等实际应用场景中亟需解决模型可信度问题。
AI.method: 设计包含六维可信度指标的分类体系，开发FederatedTrust算法计算模型可信度得分，并将其集成至FederatedScope框架中，通过FEMNIST和N-BaIoT数据集进行多组实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明FederatedTrust能有效量化不同配置下联邦学习模型的可信度，验证了该方法在隐私保护与模型可靠性评估中的实用性。
AI.conclusion: FederatedTrust为联邦学习模型提供了系统化的可信度评估方案，为构建可信赖的分布式机器学习系统提供了理论支持与技术实现路径。

authors_text: Jiamu Sheng,Jiayuan Fan,Peng Ye,Jianjian Cao
title: JNDMix: JND-Based Data Augmentation for No-reference Image Quality Assessment
title_zh: JNDMix：基于 JND 的数据增强，用于无参考图像质量评估
comment: Accepted by 48th IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP 2023)
comments: Accepted by 48th IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP 2023)
abstract: Despite substantial progress in no-reference image quality assessment (NR-IQA), previous training models often suffer from over-fitting due to the limited scale of used datasets, resulting in model performance bottlenecks. To tackle this challenge, we explore the potential of leveraging data augmentation to improve data efficiency and enhance model robustness. However, most existing data augmentation methods incur a serious issue, namely that it alters the image quality and leads to training images mismatching with their original labels. Additionally, although only a few data augmentation methods are available for NR-IQA task, their ability to enrich dataset diversity is still insufficient. To address these issues, we propose a effective and general data augmentation based on just noticeable difference (JND) noise mixing for NR-IQA task, named JNDMix. In detail, we randomly inject the JND noise, imperceptible to the human visual system (HVS), into the training image without any adjustment to its label. Extensive experiments demonstrate that JNDMix significantly improves the performance and data efficiency of various state-of-the-art NR-IQA models and the commonly used baseline models, as well as the generalization ability. More importantly, JNDMix facilitates MANIQA to achieve the state-of-the-art performance on LIVEC and KonIQ-10k.
summary: Despite substantial progress in no-reference image quality assessment (NR-IQA), previous training models often suffer from over-fitting due to the limited scale of used datasets, resulting in model performance bottlenecks. To tackle this challenge, we explore the potential of leveraging data augmentation to improve data efficiency and enhance model robustness. However, most existing data augmentation methods incur a serious issue, namely that it alters the image quality and leads to training images mismatching with their original labels. Additionally, although only a few data augmentation methods are available for NR-IQA task, their ability to enrich dataset diversity is still insufficient. To address these issues, we propose a effective and general data augmentation based on just noticeable difference (JND) noise mixing for NR-IQA task, named JNDMix. In detail, we randomly inject the JND noise, imperceptible to the human visual system (HVS), into the training image without any adjustment to its label. Extensive experiments demonstrate that JNDMix significantly improves the performance and data efficiency of various state-of-the-art NR-IQA models and the commonly used baseline models, as well as the generalization ability. More importantly, JNDMix facilitates MANIQA to achieve the state-of-the-art performance on LIVEC and KonIQ-10k.
abstract_zh: 尽管无参考图像质量评估（NR-IQA）取得了实质性进展，但由于使用的数据集规模有限，以前的训练模型经常出现过度拟合，导致模型性能瓶颈。为了应对这一挑战，我们探索利用数据增强来提高数据效率和增强模型稳健性的潜力。然而，大多数现有的数据增强方法都会遇到一个严重的问题，即它会改变图像质量并导致训练图像与其原始标签不匹配。此外，尽管只有少数数据增强方法可用于 NR-IQA 任务，但它们丰富数据集多样性的能力仍然不足。为了解决这些问题，我们针对 NR-IQA 任务提出了一种基于可察觉差异 (JND) 噪声混合的有效且通用的数据增强方法，名为 JNDMix。具体来说，我们将人类视觉系统（HVS）无法察觉的 JND 噪声随机注入到训练图像中，而不对其标签进行任何调整。大量实验表明，JNDMix 显着提高了各种最先进的 NR-IQA 模型和常用基线模型的性能和数据效率以及泛化能力。更重要的是，JNDMix 帮助 MANIQA 在 LIVEC 和 KonIQ-10k 上实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉不可感知噪声的无参考图像质量评估数据增强方法JNDMix，以解决现有方法因数据集规模有限导致的过拟合问题。
AI.motivation: 现有NR-IQA模型因数据集规模受限易出现过拟合，传统数据增强方法会破坏图像质量标签匹配性，且现有增强手段难以有效提升数据多样性。
AI.method: 通过向训练图像注入人眼不可察觉的JND噪声实现数据增强，在保持原始标签不变的前提下提升数据多样性与模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明JNDMix显著提升多种先进NR-IQA模型及基线模型的性能与数据效率，使MANIQA在LIVEC和KonIQ-10k数据集上达到SOTA水平。
AI.conclusion: JNDMix通过引入视觉不可感知噪声有效解决了NR-IQA任务中的数据增强难题，同时提升了模型泛化能力与评估性能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉不可感知噪声的无参考图像质量评估数据增强方法JNDMix，以解决现有方法因数据集规模有限导致的过拟合问题。

search_text: JNDMix: JND-Based Data Augmentation for No-reference Image Quality Assessment JNDMix：基于 JND 的数据增强，用于无参考图像质量评估 Despite substantial progress in no-reference image quality assessment (NR-IQA), previous training models often suffer from over-fitting due to the limited scale of used datasets, resulting in model performance bottlenecks. To tackle this challenge, we explore the potential of leveraging data augmentation to improve data efficiency and enhance model robustness. However, most existing data augmentation methods incur a serious issue, namely that it alters the image quality and leads to training images mismatching with their original labels. Additionally, although only a few data augmentation methods are available for NR-IQA task, their ability to enrich dataset diversity is still insufficient. To address these issues, we propose a effective and general data augmentation based on just noticeable difference (JND) noise mixing for NR-IQA task, named JNDMix. In detail, we randomly inject the JND noise, imperceptible to the human visual system (HVS), into the training image without any adjustment to its label. Extensive experiments demonstrate that JNDMix significantly improves the performance and data efficiency of various state-of-the-art NR-IQA models and the commonly used baseline models, as well as the generalization ability. More importantly, JNDMix facilitates MANIQA to achieve the state-of-the-art performance on LIVEC and KonIQ-10k. 尽管无参考图像质量评估（NR-IQA）取得了实质性进展，但由于使用的数据集规模有限，以前的训练模型经常出现过度拟合，导致模型性能瓶颈。为了应对这一挑战，我们探索利用数据增强来提高数据效率和增强模型稳健性的潜力。然而，大多数现有的数据增强方法都会遇到一个严重的问题，即它会改变图像质量并导致训练图像与其原始标签不匹配。此外，尽管只有少数数据增强方法可用于 NR-IQA 任务，但它们丰富数据集多样性的能力仍然不足。为了解决这些问题，我们针对 NR-IQA 任务提出了一种基于可察觉差异 (JND) 噪声混合的有效且通用的数据增强方法，名为 JNDMix。具体来说，我们将人类视觉系统（HVS）无法察觉的 JND 噪声随机注入到训练图像中，而不对其标签进行任何调整。大量实验表明，JNDMix 显着提高了各种最先进的 NR-IQA 模型和常用基线模型的性能和数据效率以及泛化能力。更重要的是，JNDMix 帮助 MANIQA 在 LIVEC 和 KonIQ-10k 上实现最先进的性能。 本文提出一种基于视觉不可感知噪声的无参考图像质量评估数据增强方法JNDMix，以解决现有方法因数据集规模有限导致的过拟合问题。 Jiamu Sheng,Jiayuan Fan,Peng Ye,Jianjian Cao cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Hemin Ali Qadir,Ilangko Balasingham,Younghak Shin
title: Simple U-net Based Synthetic Polyp Image Generation: Polyp to Negative and Negative to Polyp
title_zh: 基于简单 U-net 的合成息肉图像生成：息肉到阴性以及阴性到息肉
abstract: Synthetic polyp generation is a good alternative to overcome the privacy problem of medical data and the lack of various polyp samples. In this study, we propose a deep learning-based polyp image generation framework that generates synthetic polyp images that are similar to real ones. We suggest a framework that converts a given polyp image into a negative image (image without a polyp) using a simple conditional GAN architecture and then converts the negative image into a new-looking polyp image using the same network. In addition, by using the controllable polyp masks, polyps with various characteristics can be generated from one input condition. The generated polyp images can be used directly as training images for polyp detection and segmentation without additional labeling. To quantitatively assess the quality of generated synthetic polyps, we use public polyp image and video datasets combined with the generated synthetic images to examine the performance improvement of several detection and segmentation models. Experimental results show that we obtain performance gains when the generated polyp images are added to the training set.
summary: Synthetic polyp generation is a good alternative to overcome the privacy problem of medical data and the lack of various polyp samples. In this study, we propose a deep learning-based polyp image generation framework that generates synthetic polyp images that are similar to real ones. We suggest a framework that converts a given polyp image into a negative image (image without a polyp) using a simple conditional GAN architecture and then converts the negative image into a new-looking polyp image using the same network. In addition, by using the controllable polyp masks, polyps with various characteristics can be generated from one input condition. The generated polyp images can be used directly as training images for polyp detection and segmentation without additional labeling. To quantitatively assess the quality of generated synthetic polyps, we use public polyp image and video datasets combined with the generated synthetic images to examine the performance improvement of several detection and segmentation models. Experimental results show that we obtain performance gains when the generated polyp images are added to the training set.
abstract_zh: 合成息肉生成是克服医疗数据隐私问题和缺乏各种息肉样本的良好替代方案。在本研究中，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的息肉图像生成框架，该框架可生成与真实息肉图像相似的合成息肉图像。我们提出了一个框架，使用简单的条件 GAN 架构将给定的息肉图像转换为负图像（没有息肉的图像），然后使用相同的网络将负图像转换为新的息肉图像。此外，通过使用可控息肉掩模，可以根据一种输入条件生成具有各种特征的息肉。生成的息肉图像可以直接用作息肉检测和分割的训练图像，无需额外标记。为了定量评估生成的合成息肉的质量，我们使用公共息肉图像和视频数据集与生成的合成图像相结合来检查几种检测和分割模型的性能改进。实验结果表明，当将生成的息肉图像添加到训练集中时，我们获得了性能提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于简单条件GAN的框架，通过将息肉图像转换为负图像再生成新的息肉图像，以生成逼真的合成息肉图像用于医学图像检测和分割任务。
AI.motivation: 医疗数据存在隐私问题且息肉样本不足，合成高质量息肉图像可缓解数据不足问题并提升检测模型性能。
AI.method: 采用条件GAN架构，通过息肉到负图像（无息肉图像）的转换和负图像到新息肉图像的逆向生成过程，并结合可控息肉掩膜生成多样化息肉图像。
AI.result: 实验表明，将生成的合成息肉图像加入训练集后，多种检测和分割模型的性能均得到提升。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能有效生成高质量合成息肉图像，为医学图像分析提供无需额外标注的数据支持。

authors_text: Soham Rohit Chitnis,Sidong Liu,Tirtharaj Dash,Tanmay Tulsidas Verlekar,Antonio Di Ieva,Shlomo Berkovsky,Lovekesh Vig,Ashwin Srinivasan
title: Domain-Specific Pre-training Improves Confidence in Whole Slide Image Classification
title_zh: 特定领域的预训练提高了整个幻灯片图像分类的信心
abstract: Whole Slide Images (WSIs) or histopathology images are used in digital pathology. WSIs pose great challenges to deep learning models for clinical diagnosis, owing to their size and lack of pixel-level annotations. With the recent advancements in computational pathology, newer multiple-instance learning-based models have been proposed. Multiple-instance learning for WSIs necessitates creating patches and uses the encoding of these patches for diagnosis. These models use generic pre-trained models (ResNet-50 pre-trained on ImageNet) for patch encoding. The recently proposed KimiaNet, a DenseNet121 model pre-trained on TCGA slides, is a domain-specific pre-trained model. This paper shows the effect of domain-specific pre-training on WSI classification. To investigate the effect of domain-specific pre-training, we considered the current state-of-the-art multiple-instance learning models, 1) CLAM, an attention-based model, and 2) TransMIL, a self-attention-based model, and evaluated the models' confidence and predictive performance in detecting primary brain tumors - gliomas. Domain-specific pre-training improves the confidence of the models and also achieves a new state-of-the-art performance of WSI-based glioma subtype classification, showing a high clinical applicability in assisting glioma diagnosis. We will publicly share our code and experimental results at https://github.com/soham-chitnis10/WSI-domain-specific.
summary: Whole Slide Images (WSIs) or histopathology images are used in digital pathology. WSIs pose great challenges to deep learning models for clinical diagnosis, owing to their size and lack of pixel-level annotations. With the recent advancements in computational pathology, newer multiple-instance learning-based models have been proposed. Multiple-instance learning for WSIs necessitates creating patches and uses the encoding of these patches for diagnosis. These models use generic pre-trained models (ResNet-50 pre-trained on ImageNet) for patch encoding. The recently proposed KimiaNet, a DenseNet121 model pre-trained on TCGA slides, is a domain-specific pre-trained model. This paper shows the effect of domain-specific pre-training on WSI classification. To investigate the effect of domain-specific pre-training, we considered the current state-of-the-art multiple-instance learning models, 1) CLAM, an attention-based model, and 2) TransMIL, a self-attention-based model, and evaluated the models' confidence and predictive performance in detecting primary brain tumors - gliomas. Domain-specific pre-training improves the confidence of the models and also achieves a new state-of-the-art performance of WSI-based glioma subtype classification, showing a high clinical applicability in assisting glioma diagnosis. We will publicly share our code and experimental results at https://github.com/soham-chitnis10/WSI-domain-specific.
abstract_zh: 全切片图像 (WSI) 或组织病理学图像用于数字病理学。由于 WSI 的大小和缺乏像素级注释，WSI 对临床诊断的深度学习模型提出了巨大的挑战。随着计算病理学的最新进展，提出了更新的基于多实例学习的模型。 WSI 的多实例学习需要创建补丁并使用这些补丁的编码进行诊断。这些模型使用通用的预训练模型（在 ImageNet 上预训练的 ResNet-50）进行补丁编码。最近提出的 KimiaNet 是在 TCGA 幻灯片上预训练的 DenseNet121 模型，是特定领域的预训练模型。本文展示了特定领域预训练对 WSI 分类的影响。为了研究特定领域预训练的效果，我们考虑了当前最先进的多实例学习模型，1）CLAM，一种基于注意力的模型，2）TransMIL，一种基于自我注意力的模型，并评估了模型在检测原发性脑肿瘤（神经胶质瘤）方面的置信度和预测性能。特定领域的预训练提高了模型的置信度，并实现了基于 WSI 的神经胶质瘤亚型分类的新的最先进性能，在辅助神经胶质瘤诊断方面表现出高度的临床适用性。我们将在 https://github.com/soham-chitnis10/WSI-domain-specific 公开分享我们的代码和实验结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究领域特定预训练对全切片图像（WSI）分类模型置信度的影响，通过对比通用预训练模型和领域特定预训练模型在胶质瘤亚型分类中的表现。
AI.motivation: 全切片图像因尺寸大且缺乏像素级标注，给深度学习模型的临床诊断带来挑战。现有方法依赖通用预训练模型（如ImageNet上的ResNet-50），但领域特定预训练模型（如TCGA数据集上的KimiaNet）可能更适应病理图像特征。
AI.method: 采用基于多实例学习的CLAM（注意力机制）和TransMIL（自注意力机制）模型，分别使用通用预训练模型和领域特定预训练模型（KimiaNet）进行胶质瘤分类实验，评估模型置信度与预测性能。
AI.result: 领域特定预训练显著提升模型置信度，并在WSI胶质瘤亚型分类中达到新的最先进水平，显示出良好的临床辅助诊断潜力。
AI.conclusion: 领域特定预训练能有效增强WSI分类模型的可靠性与性能，为病理诊断提供更精准的工具，相关代码与实验结果已公开共享。

result: 领域特定预训练显著提升模型置信度，并在WSI胶质瘤亚型分类中达到新的最先进水平，显示出良好的临床辅助诊断潜力。
conclusion: 领域特定预训练能有效增强WSI分类模型的可靠性与性能，为病理诊断提供更精准的工具，相关代码与实验结果已公开共享。
search_text: Domain-Specific Pre-training Improves Confidence in Whole Slide Image Classification 特定领域的预训练提高了整个幻灯片图像分类的信心 Whole Slide Images (WSIs) or histopathology images are used in digital pathology. WSIs pose great challenges to deep learning models for clinical diagnosis, owing to their size and lack of pixel-level annotations. With the recent advancements in computational pathology, newer multiple-instance learning-based models have been proposed. Multiple-instance learning for WSIs necessitates creating patches and uses the encoding of these patches for diagnosis. These models use generic pre-trained models (ResNet-50 pre-trained on ImageNet) for patch encoding. The recently proposed KimiaNet, a DenseNet121 model pre-trained on TCGA slides, is a domain-specific pre-trained model. This paper shows the effect of domain-specific pre-training on WSI classification. To investigate the effect of domain-specific pre-training, we considered the current state-of-the-art multiple-instance learning models, 1) CLAM, an attention-based model, and 2) TransMIL, a self-attention-based model, and evaluated the models' confidence and predictive performance in detecting primary brain tumors - gliomas. Domain-specific pre-training improves the confidence of the models and also achieves a new state-of-the-art performance of WSI-based glioma subtype classification, showing a high clinical applicability in assisting glioma diagnosis. We will publicly share our code and experimental results at https://github.com/soham-chitnis10/WSI-domain-specific. 全切片图像 (WSI) 或组织病理学图像用于数字病理学。由于 WSI 的大小和缺乏像素级注释，WSI 对临床诊断的深度学习模型提出了巨大的挑战。随着计算病理学的最新进展，提出了更新的基于多实例学习的模型。 WSI 的多实例学习需要创建补丁并使用这些补丁的编码进行诊断。这些模型使用通用的预训练模型（在 ImageNet 上预训练的 ResNet-50）进行补丁编码。最近提出的 KimiaNet 是在 TCGA 幻灯片上预训练的 DenseNet121 模型，是特定领域的预训练模型。本文展示了特定领域预训练对 WSI 分类的影响。为了研究特定领域预训练的效果，我们考虑了当前最先进的多实例学习模型，1）CLAM，一种基于注意力的模型，2）TransMIL，一种基于自我注意力的模型，并评估了模型在检测原发性脑肿瘤（神经胶质瘤）方面的置信度和预测性能。特定领域的预训练提高了模型的置信度，并实现了基于 WSI 的神经胶质瘤亚型分类的新的最先进性能，在辅助神经胶质瘤诊断方面表现出高度的临床适用性。我们将在 https://github.com/soham-chitnis10/WSI-domain-specific 公开分享我们的代码和实验结果。 本文研究领域特定预训练对全切片图像（WSI）分类模型置信度的影响，通过对比通用预训练模型和领域特定预训练模型在胶质瘤亚型分类中的表现。 Soham Rohit Chitnis,Sidong Liu,Tirtharaj Dash,Tanmay Tulsidas Verlekar,Antonio Di Ieva,Shlomo Berkovsky,Lovekesh Vig,Ashwin Srinivasan cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Sagar Malhotra,Luciano Serafini
title: Weighted First Order Model Counting with Directed Acyclic Graph Axioms
title_zh: 使用有向无环图公理的加权一阶模型计数
abstract: Statistical Relational Learning (SRL) integrates First-Order Logic (FOL) and probability theory for learning and inference over relational data. Probabilistic inference and learning in many SRL models can be reduced to Weighted First Order Model Counting (WFOMC). However, WFOMC is known to be intractable ($\mathrm{\#P_1-}$ complete). Hence, logical fragments that admit polynomial time WFOMC are of significant interest. Such fragments are called domain liftable. Recent line of works have shown the two-variable fragment of FOL, extended with counting quantifiers ($\mathrm{C^2}$) to be domain-liftable. However, many properties of real-world data can not be modelled in $\mathrm{C^2}$. In fact many ubiquitous properties of real-world data are inexressible in FOL. Acyclicity is one such property, found in citation networks, genealogy data, temporal data e.t.c. In this paper we aim to address this problem by investigating the domain liftability of directed acyclicity constraints. We show that the fragment $\mathrm{C^2}$ with a Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) axiom, i.e., a predicate in the language is axiomatized to represent a DAG, is domain-liftable. We present a method based on principle of inclusion-exclusion for WFOMC of $\mathrm{C^2}$ formulas extended with DAG axioms.
summary: Statistical Relational Learning (SRL) integrates First-Order Logic (FOL) and probability theory for learning and inference over relational data. Probabilistic inference and learning in many SRL models can be reduced to Weighted First Order Model Counting (WFOMC). However, WFOMC is known to be intractable ($\mathrm{\#P_1-}$ complete). Hence, logical fragments that admit polynomial time WFOMC are of significant interest. Such fragments are called domain liftable. Recent line of works have shown the two-variable fragment of FOL, extended with counting quantifiers ($\mathrm{C^2}$) to be domain-liftable. However, many properties of real-world data can not be modelled in $\mathrm{C^2}$. In fact many ubiquitous properties of real-world data are inexressible in FOL. Acyclicity is one such property, found in citation networks, genealogy data, temporal data e.t.c. In this paper we aim to address this problem by investigating the domain liftability of directed acyclicity constraints. We show that the fragment $\mathrm{C^2}$ with a Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) axiom, i.e., a predicate in the language is axiomatized to represent a DAG, is domain-liftable. We present a method based on principle of inclusion-exclusion for WFOMC of $\mathrm{C^2}$ formulas extended with DAG axioms.
abstract_zh: 统计关系学习 (SRL) 集成了一阶逻辑 (FOL) 和概率论，用于关系数据的学习和推理。许多 SRL 模型中的概率推理和学习可以简化为加权一阶模型计数 (WFOMC)。然而，众所周知，WFOMC 很棘手（$\mathrm{\#P_1-}$ 完成）。因此，允许多项式时间 WFOMC 的逻辑片段具有重要意义。此类片段称为可提升域。最近的一系列工作表明，FOL 的二变量片段通过计数量词 ($\mathrm{C^2}$) 进行了扩展，可以进行域提升。然而，现实世界数据的许多属性无法在 $\mathrm{C^2}$ 中建模。事实上，现实世界数据的许多普遍属性在 FOL 中是无法表达的。非循环性就是这样一种属性，存在于引文网络、谱系数据、时间数据等中。在本文中，我们旨在通过研究有向非循环约束的域可提升性来解决这个问题。我们证明带有有向无环图（DAG）公理的片段 $\mathrm{C^2}$ 是域可提升的，即语言中的谓词被公理化以表示 DAG。我们提出了一种基于 DAG 公理扩展的 $\mathrm{C^2}$ 公式的 WFOMC 包含排除原理的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在二阶逻辑片段C²中引入有向无环图（DAG）公理后，加权一阶模型计数（WFOMC）的可扩展性问题，并提出一种基于容斥原理的计算方法。
AI.motivation: 现实世界数据中的许多属性（如引用网络、家谱的无环性）无法用传统C²片段表达，而现有WFOMC计算在引入DAG约束后变得不可行。
AI.method: 提出基于容斥原理的算法，针对包含DAG公理的C²公式进行WFOMC计算，通过分解图结构实现多项式时间求解。
AI.result: 证明扩展后的C²片段（含DAG公理）具有领域可扩展性，且所提方法能在多项式时间内完成WFOMC计算。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入DAG公理并设计容斥算法，有效解决了现实数据中无环性约束的WFOMC计算难题，扩展了可高效处理的逻辑片段范围。

authors_text: Masud Fahim,Ilona Söchting,Luca Ferranti,Juho Kannala,Jani Boutellier
title: TBPos: Dataset for Large-Scale Precision Visual Localization
title_zh: TBPos：大规模精确视觉定位数据集
abstract: Image based localization is a classical computer vision challenge, with several well-known datasets. Generally, datasets consist of a visual 3D database that captures the modeled scenery, as well as query images whose 3D pose is to be discovered. Usually the query images have been acquired with a camera that differs from the imaging hardware used to collect the 3D database; consequently, it is hard to acquire accurate ground truth poses between query images and the 3D database. As the accuracy of visual localization algorithms constantly improves, precise ground truth becomes increasingly important. This paper proposes TBPos, a novel large-scale visual dataset for image based positioning, which provides query images with fully accurate ground truth poses: both the database images and the query images have been derived from the same laser scanner data. In the experimental part of the paper, the proposed dataset is evaluated by means of an image-based localization pipeline.
summary: Image based localization is a classical computer vision challenge, with several well-known datasets. Generally, datasets consist of a visual 3D database that captures the modeled scenery, as well as query images whose 3D pose is to be discovered. Usually the query images have been acquired with a camera that differs from the imaging hardware used to collect the 3D database; consequently, it is hard to acquire accurate ground truth poses between query images and the 3D database. As the accuracy of visual localization algorithms constantly improves, precise ground truth becomes increasingly important. This paper proposes TBPos, a novel large-scale visual dataset for image based positioning, which provides query images with fully accurate ground truth poses: both the database images and the query images have been derived from the same laser scanner data. In the experimental part of the paper, the proposed dataset is evaluated by means of an image-based localization pipeline.
abstract_zh: 基于图像的定位是一个经典的计算机视觉挑战，有几个众所周知的数据集。一般来说，数据集由捕获建模场景的视觉 3D 数据库以及要发现其 3D 姿势的查询图像组成。通常，查询图像是通过与用于收集 3D 数据库的成像硬件不同的相机获取的；因此，很难在查询图像和 3D 数据库之间获取准确的地面真实姿势。随着视觉定位算法的准确性不断提高，精确的地面实况变得越来越重要。本文提出了 TBPos，一种用于基于图像的定位的新型大规模视觉数据集，它为查询图像提供完全准确的地面真实姿态：数据库图像和查询图像都来自相同的激光扫描仪数据。在本文的实验部分，所提出的数据集通过基于图像的定位管道进行评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TBPos数据集，用于大规模精确视觉定位，通过统一的激光扫描数据生成高精度的地面真实姿态。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集因相机硬件差异导致查询图像与3D数据库的地面真实姿态不准确，而高精度定位算法需要更精确的基准数据。
AI.method: 构建TBPos数据集，使数据库图像和查询图像均源自相同激光扫描数据，确保姿态一致性，并通过图像定位流程验证数据集有效性。
AI.result: 实验验证了TBPos数据集能够支持高精度视觉定位算法的评估，证明其地面真实姿态的准确性。
AI.conclusion: TBPos填补了精确视觉定位领域高质量基准数据的空白，为算法研究提供了可靠基准。

authors_text: Mingyue Cheng,Qi Liu,Zhiding Liu,Zhi Li,Yucong Luo,Enhong Chen
title: FormerTime: Hierarchical Multi-Scale Representations for Multivariate Time Series Classification
title_zh: PreviousTime：多元时间序列分类的分层多尺度表示
comment: Accepted by WWW'23 as a conference paper
comments: Accepted by WWW'23 as a conference paper
abstract: Deep learning-based algorithms, e.g., convolutional networks, have significantly facilitated multivariate time series classification (MTSC) task. Nevertheless, they suffer from the limitation in modeling long-range dependence due to the nature of convolution operations. Recent advancements have shown the potential of transformers to capture long-range dependence. However, it would incur severe issues, such as fixed scale representations, temporal-invariant and quadratic time complexity, with transformers directly applicable to the MTSC task because of the distinct properties of time series data. To tackle these issues, we propose FormerTime, an hierarchical representation model for improving the classification capacity for the MTSC task. In the proposed FormerTime, we employ a hierarchical network architecture to perform multi-scale feature maps. Besides, a novel transformer encoder is further designed, in which an efficient temporal reduction attention layer and a well-informed contextual positional encoding generating strategy are developed. To sum up, FormerTime exhibits three aspects of merits: (1) learning hierarchical multi-scale representations from time series data, (2) inheriting the strength of both transformers and convolutional networks, and (3) tacking the efficiency challenges incurred by the self-attention mechanism. Extensive experiments performed on $10$ publicly available datasets from UEA archive verify the superiorities of the FormerTime compared to previous competitive baselines.
summary: Deep learning-based algorithms, e.g., convolutional networks, have significantly facilitated multivariate time series classification (MTSC) task. Nevertheless, they suffer from the limitation in modeling long-range dependence due to the nature of convolution operations. Extensive experiments performed on $10$ publicly available datasets from UEA archive verify the superiorities of the FormerTime compared to previous competitive baselines.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的算法，例如卷积网络，极大地促进了多元时间序列分类（MTSC）任务。然而，由于卷积运算的性质，它们在建模长程依赖性方面受到限制。最近的进展表明 Transformer 具有捕获远程依赖性的潜力。然而，由于时间序列数据的独特属性，将转换器直接应用于 MTSC 任务会带来严重的问题，例如固定尺度表示、时间不变和二次时间复杂度。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了FormerTime，一种分层表示模型，用于提高 MTSC 任务的分类能力。在提出的FormerTime中，我们采用分层网络架构来执行多尺度特征图。此外，还设计了一种新颖的变换器编码器，其中开发了有效的时间缩减注意层和消息灵通的上下文位置编码生成策略。综上所述，FormerTime 具有三个方面的优点：（1）从时间序列数据中学习分层多尺度表示，（2）继承了 Transformer 和卷积网络的优点，（3）解决了自注意力机制带来的效率挑战。在 UEA 档案中的 10 美元公开可用数据集上进行的广泛实验验证了与以前的竞争基线相比，FormerTime 的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FormerTime模型，通过分层多尺度表示方法提升多变量时间序列分类任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积网络难以建模长距离依赖，而直接应用Transformer存在固定尺度表示、时间不变性及二次时间复杂度等问题。
AI.method: 设计分层网络架构实现多尺度特征映射，并开发包含高效时序缩减注意力层和上下文感知位置编码策略的新型Transformer编码器。
AI.result: 在UEA档案库10个公开数据集上的实验验证了FormerTime相比现有方法的优越性。
AI.conclusion: FormerTime融合Transformer与卷积网络优势，解决了自注意力机制的效率问题，有效提升了多变量时间序列分类能力。

authors_text: Surbhi Madan,Monika Gahalawat,Tanaya Guha,Roland Goecke,Ramanathan Subramanian
title: Explainable Human-centered Traits from Head Motion and Facial Expression Dynamics
title_zh: 从头部运动和面部表情动力学可解释的以人为中心的特征
abstract: We explore the efficacy of multimodal behavioral cues for explainable prediction of personality and interview-specific traits. We utilize elementary head-motion units named kinemes, atomic facial movements termed action units and speech features to estimate these human-centered traits. Empirical results confirm that kinemes and action units enable discovery of multiple trait-specific behaviors while also enabling explainability in support of the predictions. For fusing cues, we explore decision and feature-level fusion, and an additive attention-based fusion strategy which quantifies the relative importance of the three modalities for trait prediction. Examining various long-short term memory (LSTM) architectures for classification and regression on the MIT Interview and First Impressions Candidate Screening (FICS) datasets, we note that: (1) Multimodal approaches outperform unimodal counterparts; (2) Efficient trait predictions and plausible explanations are achieved with both unimodal and multimodal approaches, and (3) Following the thin-slice approach, effective trait prediction is achieved even from two-second behavioral snippets.
summary: We explore the efficacy of multimodal behavioral cues for explainable prediction of personality and interview-specific traits. We utilize elementary head-motion units named kinemes, atomic facial movements termed action units and speech features to estimate these human-centered traits. Empirical results confirm that kinemes and action units enable discovery of multiple trait-specific behaviors while also enabling explainability in support of the predictions. For fusing cues, we explore decision and feature-level fusion, and an additive attention-based fusion strategy which quantifies the relative importance of the three modalities for trait prediction. Examining various long-short term memory (LSTM) architectures for classification and regression on the MIT Interview and First Impressions Candidate Screening (FICS) datasets, we note that: (1) Multimodal approaches outperform unimodal counterparts; (2) Efficient trait predictions and plausible explanations are achieved with both unimodal and multimodal approaches, and (3) Following the thin-slice approach, effective trait prediction is achieved even from two-second behavioral snippets.
abstract_zh: 我们探索多模式行为线索对于人格和面试特定特征的可解释预测的功效。我们利用称为运动单位的基本头部运动单位、称为动作单位的原子面部运动和语音特征来估计这些以人为中心的特征。经验结果证实，运动素和动作单元能够发现多种特定特征的行为，同时还能够支持预测的可解释性。对于融合线索，我们探索决策和特征级融合，以及基于附加注意力的融合策略，该策略量化了特征预测的三种模式的相对重要性。在 MIT 面试和第一印象候选人筛选 (FICS) 数据集上检查各种用于分类和回归的长短期记忆 (LSTM) 架构，我们注意到：(1) 多模态方法优于单模态方法； （2）通过单模态和多模态方法实现有效的特征预测和合理的解释，以及（3）遵循薄切片方法，甚至可以从两秒的行为片段中实现有效的特征预测。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究利用头部运动和面部表情动态信息，通过多模态数据融合实现对人格和面试相关特质的可解释预测。
AI.motivation: 传统单模态方法在人格特质预测中存在局限性，需探索多模态行为线索的融合策略以提升预测准确性与可解释性。
AI.method: 提出基于kinemes（头部运动单元）、action units（面部动作单元）和语音特征的多模态融合方法，采用决策级、特征级融合及注意力机制量化模态重要性，并使用LSTM模型进行分类与回归分析。
AI.result: 多模态方法优于单模态方法；两种方法均能实现高效预测与合理解释；基于2秒行为片段的thin-slice方法可有效预测特质。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合显著提升特质预测性能与可解释性，短时行为片段即可实现有效预测，为实际应用场景提供可行方案。

authors_text: Xiaojian Yuan,Kejiang Chen,Jie Zhang,Weiming Zhang,Nenghai Yu,Yang Zhang
title: Pseudo Label-Guided Model Inversion Attack via Conditional Generative Adversarial Network
title_zh: 通过条件生成对抗网络的伪标签引导模型反转攻击
abstract: Model inversion (MI) attacks have raised increasing concerns about privacy, which can reconstruct training data from public models. Indeed, MI attacks can be formalized as an optimization problem that seeks private data in a certain space. Recent MI attacks leverage a generative adversarial network (GAN) as an image prior to narrow the search space, and can successfully reconstruct even the high-dimensional data (e.g., face images). However, these generative MI attacks do not fully exploit the potential capabilities of the target model, still leading to a vague and coupled search space, i.e., different classes of images are coupled in the search space. Besides, the widely used cross-entropy loss in these attacks suffers from gradient vanishing. To address these problems, we propose Pseudo Label-Guided MI (PLG-MI) attack via conditional GAN (cGAN). At first, a top-n selection strategy is proposed to provide pseudo-labels for public data, and use pseudo-labels to guide the training of the cGAN. In this way, the search space is decoupled for different classes of images. Then a max-margin loss is introduced to improve the search process on the subspace of a target class. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our PLG-MI attack significantly improves the attack success rate and visual quality for various datasets and models, notably, 2~3 $\times$ better than state-of-the-art attacks under large distributional shifts. Our code is available at: https://github.com/LetheSec/PLG-MI-Attack.
summary: Model inversion (MI) attacks have raised increasing concerns about privacy, which can reconstruct training data from public models. Indeed, MI attacks can be formalized as an optimization problem that seeks private data in a certain space. Recent MI attacks leverage a generative adversarial network (GAN) as an image prior to narrow the search space, and can successfully reconstruct even the high-dimensional data (e.g., face images). However, these generative MI attacks do not fully exploit the potential capabilities of the target model, still leading to a vague and coupled search space, i.e., different classes of images are coupled in the search space. Besides, the widely used cross-entropy loss in these attacks suffers from gradient vanishing. To address these problems, we propose Pseudo Label-Guided MI (PLG-MI) attack via conditional GAN (cGAN). At first, a top-n selection strategy is proposed to provide pseudo-labels for public data, and use pseudo-labels to guide the training of the cGAN. In this way, the search space is decoupled for different classes of images. Then a max-margin loss is introduced to improve the search process on the subspace of a target class. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our PLG-MI attack significantly improves the attack success rate and visual quality for various datasets and models, notably, 2~3 $\times$ better than state-of-the-art attacks under large distributional shifts. Our code is available at: https://github.com/LetheSec/PLG-MI-Attack.
abstract_zh: 模型反转（MI）攻击引起了人们对隐私的日益关注，因为它可以从公共模型中重建训练数据。事实上，MI 攻击可以形式化为在特定空间中寻找私有数据的优化问题。最近的 MI 攻击利用生成对抗网络（GAN）作为缩小搜索空间之前的图像，甚至可以成功重建高维数据（例如人脸图像）。然而，这些生成式 MI 攻击并没有充分利用目标模型的潜在能力，仍然导致搜索空间模糊且耦合，即不同类别的图像在搜索空间中耦合。此外，这些攻击中广泛使用的交叉熵损失会遭受梯度消失的问题。为了解决这些问题，我们提出通过条件 GAN (cGAN) 进行伪标签引导 MI (PLG-MI) 攻击。首先，提出了top-n选择策略，为公共数据提供伪标签，并使用伪标签来指导cGAN的训练。通过这种方式，不同类别图像的搜索空间是解耦的。然后引入最大边缘损失来改进目标类子空间上的搜索过程。大量实验表明，我们的 PLG-MI 攻击显着提高了各种数据集和模型的攻击成功率和视觉质量，特别是在大分布变化下比最先进的攻击好 2~3 $\times$。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/LetheSec/PLG-MI-Attack。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于条件生成对抗网络（cGAN）的伪标签引导模型反演攻击方法（PLG-MI），旨在提高从公共模型中重建训练数据的准确性与效率。
AI.motivation: 现有模型反演攻击存在搜索空间耦合（不同类别图像混杂）及交叉熵损失函数梯度消失的问题，导致攻击效果受限。
AI.method: 通过顶部n选择策略为公开数据生成伪标签，引导cGAN训练以解耦搜索空间；引入最大间隔损失优化目标类别子空间的搜索过程。
AI.result: 在多种数据集和模型上，PLG-MI攻击成功率和视觉质量显著提升，尤其在分布偏移较大时比现有方法提高2~3倍。
AI.conclusion: PLG-MI通过伪标签引导与损失函数改进，有效解决了模型反演攻击中的关键问题，代码已开源。
