search_text: Pseudo Label-Guided Model Inversion Attack via Conditional Generative Adversarial Network 通过条件生成对抗网络的伪标签引导模型反转攻击 Model inversion (MI) attacks have raised increasing concerns about privacy, which can reconstruct training data from public models. Indeed, MI attacks can be formalized as an optimization problem that seeks private data in a certain space. Recent MI attacks leverage a generative adversarial network (GAN) as an image prior to narrow the search space, and can successfully reconstruct even the high-dimensional data (e.g., face images). However, these generative MI attacks do not fully exploit the potential capabilities of the target model, still leading to a vague and coupled search space, i.e., different classes of images are coupled in the search space. Besides, the widely used cross-entropy loss in these attacks suffers from gradient vanishing. To address these problems, we propose Pseudo Label-Guided MI (PLG-MI) attack via conditional GAN (cGAN). At first, a top-n selection strategy is proposed to provide pseudo-labels for public data, and use pseudo-labels to guide the training of the cGAN. In this way, the search space is decoupled for different classes of images. Then a max-margin loss is introduced to improve the search process on the subspace of a target class. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our PLG-MI attack significantly improves the attack success rate and visual quality for various datasets and models, notably, 2~3 $\times$ better than state-of-the-art attacks under large distributional shifts. Our code is available at: https://github.com/LetheSec/PLG-MI-Attack. 模型反转（MI）攻击引起了人们对隐私的日益关注，因为它可以从公共模型中重建训练数据。事实上，MI 攻击可以形式化为在特定空间中寻找私有数据的优化问题。最近的 MI 攻击利用生成对抗网络（GAN）作为缩小搜索空间之前的图像，甚至可以成功重建高维数据（例如人脸图像）。然而，这些生成式 MI 攻击并没有充分利用目标模型的潜在能力，仍然导致搜索空间模糊且耦合，即不同类别的图像在搜索空间中耦合。此外，这些攻击中广泛使用的交叉熵损失会遭受梯度消失的问题。为了解决这些问题，我们提出通过条件 GAN (cGAN) 进行伪标签引导 MI (PLG-MI) 攻击。首先，提出了top-n选择策略，为公共数据提供伪标签，并使用伪标签来指导cGAN的训练。通过这种方式，不同类别图像的搜索空间是解耦的。然后引入最大边缘损失来改进目标类子空间上的搜索过程。大量实验表明，我们的 PLG-MI 攻击显着提高了各种数据集和模型的攻击成功率和视觉质量，特别是在大分布变化下比最先进的攻击好 2~3 $\times$。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/LetheSec/PLG-MI-Attack。 本文提出一种基于条件生成对抗网络（cGAN）的伪标签引导模型反演攻击方法（PLG-MI），旨在提高从公共模型中重建训练数据的准确性与效率。 Xiaojian Yuan,Kejiang Chen,Jie Zhang,Weiming Zhang,Nenghai Yu,Yang Zhang cs.CV,cs.CR,cs.LG

authors_text: Xiaoyu Zhao,Xiaoqian Chen,Zhiqiang Gong,Weien Zhou,Wen Yao,Yunyang Zhang
title: RecFNO: a resolution-invariant flow and heat field reconstruction method from sparse observations via Fourier neural operator
title_zh: RecFNO：通过傅里叶神经算子从稀疏观测中重建分辨率不变的流动和热场方法
abstract: Perception of the full state is an essential technology to support the monitoring, analysis, and design of physical systems, one of whose challenges is to recover global field from sparse observations. Well-known for brilliant approximation ability, deep neural networks have been attractive to data-driven flow and heat field reconstruction studies. However, limited by network structure, existing researches mostly learn the reconstruction mapping in finite-dimensional space and has poor transferability to variable resolution of outputs. In this paper, we extend the new paradigm of neural operator and propose an end-to-end physical field reconstruction method with both excellent performance and mesh transferability named RecFNO. The proposed method aims to learn the mapping from sparse observations to flow and heat field in infinite-dimensional space, contributing to a more powerful nonlinear fitting capacity and resolution-invariant characteristic. Firstly, according to different usage scenarios, we develop three types of embeddings to model the sparse observation inputs: MLP, mask, and Voronoi embedding. The MLP embedding is propitious to more sparse input, while the others benefit from spatial information preservation and perform better with the increase of observation data. Then, we adopt stacked Fourier layers to reconstruct physical field in Fourier space that regularizes the overall recovered field by Fourier modes superposition. Benefiting from the operator in infinite-dimensional space, the proposed method obtains remarkable accuracy and better resolution transferability among meshes. The experiments conducted on fluid mechanics and thermology problems show that the proposed method outperforms existing POD-based and CNN-based methods in most cases and has the capacity to achieve zero-shot super-resolution.
summary: Perception of the full state is an essential technology to support the monitoring, analysis, and design of physical systems, one of whose challenges is to recover global field from sparse observations. Well-known for brilliant approximation ability, deep neural networks have been attractive to data-driven flow and heat field reconstruction studies. However, limited by network structure, existing researches mostly learn the reconstruction mapping in finite-dimensional space and has poor transferability to variable resolution of outputs. In this paper, we extend the new paradigm of neural operator and propose an end-to-end physical field reconstruction method with both excellent performance and mesh transferability named RecFNO. The proposed method aims to learn the mapping from sparse observations to flow and heat field in infinite-dimensional space, contributing to a more powerful nonlinear fitting capacity and resolution-invariant characteristic. Firstly, according to different usage scenarios, we develop three types of embeddings to model the sparse observation inputs: MLP, mask, and Voronoi embedding. The MLP embedding is propitious to more sparse input, while the others benefit from spatial information preservation and perform better with the increase of observation data. Then, we adopt stacked Fourier layers to reconstruct physical field in Fourier space that regularizes the overall recovered field by Fourier modes superposition. Benefiting from the operator in infinite-dimensional space, the proposed method obtains remarkable accuracy and better resolution transferability among meshes. The experiments conducted on fluid mechanics and thermology problems show that the proposed method outperforms existing POD-based and CNN-based methods in most cases and has the capacity to achieve zero-shot super-resolution.
abstract_zh: 完整状态的感知是支持物理系统监测、分析和设计的一项重要技术，其挑战之一是从稀疏观测中恢复全局场。深度神经网络以其卓越的逼近能力而闻名，它对数据驱动的流动和热场重建研究很有吸引力。然而，受网络结构的限制，现有研究大多学习有限维空间中的重建映射，对输出的可变分辨率的可迁移性较差。在本文中，我们扩展了神经算子的新范式，提出了一种具有优异性能和网格可迁移性的端到端物理场重建方法，名为RecFNO。该方法旨在学习稀疏观测到无限维空间中的流场和热场的映射，从而获得更强大的非线性拟合能力和分辨率不变特性。首先，根据不同的使用场景，我们开发了三种类型的嵌入来对稀疏观测输入进行建模：MLP、mask 和 Voronoi 嵌入。 MLP 嵌入有利于更稀疏的输入，而其他嵌入则受益于空间信息保存，并且随着观测数据的增加而表现更好。然后，我们采用堆叠傅里叶层来重建傅里叶空间中的物理场，通过傅里叶模式叠加来正则整个恢复场。得益于无限维空间中的算子，该方法获得了显着的精度和网格间更好的分辨率可传递性。针对流体力学和热学问题的实验表明，该方法在大多数情况下优于现有的基于POD和基于CNN的方法，并且具有实现零样本超分辨率的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为RecFNO的分辨率不变流场和热场重建方法，通过傅里叶神经算子从稀疏观测中恢复物理场。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法受限于有限维空间映射，难以适应不同分辨率输出，导致重建精度和跨网格迁移能力不足。
AI.method: 基于无限维空间神经算子框架，设计MLP、mask和Voronoi三种嵌入方式处理稀疏输入，并采用堆叠傅里叶层在频域进行物理场重建。
AI.result: 在流体力学与热学问题实验中，RecFNO在多数情况下优于POD和CNN基方法，且具备零样本超分辨率能力。
AI.conclusion: RecFNO通过无限维映射和频域正则化，实现了高精度物理场重建与跨分辨率迁移，为复杂系统监测提供新方法。

authors_text: Zhiyuan Li,Hailong Li,Anca L. Ralescu,Jonathan R. Dillman,Nehal A. Parikh,Lili He
title: A Novel Collaborative Self-Supervised Learning Method for Radiomic Data
title_zh: 一种新颖的放射组学数据协作自监督学习方法
abstract: The computer-aided disease diagnosis from radiomic data is important in many medical applications. However, developing such a technique relies on annotating radiological images, which is a time-consuming, labor-intensive, and expensive process. In this work, we present the first novel collaborative self-supervised learning method to solve the challenge of insufficient labeled radiomic data, whose characteristics are different from text and image data. To achieve this, we present two collaborative pretext tasks that explore the latent pathological or biological relationships between regions of interest and the similarity and dissimilarity information between subjects. Our method collaboratively learns the robust latent feature representations from radiomic data in a self-supervised manner to reduce human annotation efforts, which benefits the disease diagnosis. We compared our proposed method with other state-of-the-art self-supervised learning methods on a simulation study and two independent datasets. Extensive experimental results demonstrated that our method outperforms other self-supervised learning methods on both classification and regression tasks. With further refinement, our method shows the potential advantage in automatic disease diagnosis with large-scale unlabeled data available.
summary: The computer-aided disease diagnosis from radiomic data is important in many medical applications. However, developing such a technique relies on annotating radiological images, which is a time-consuming, labor-intensive, and expensive process. In this work, we present the first novel collaborative self-supervised learning method to solve the challenge of insufficient labeled radiomic data, whose characteristics are different from text and image data. To achieve this, we present two collaborative pretext tasks that explore the latent pathological or biological relationships between regions of interest and the similarity and dissimilarity information between subjects. Our method collaboratively learns the robust latent feature representations from radiomic data in a self-supervised manner to reduce human annotation efforts, which benefits the disease diagnosis. We compared our proposed method with other state-of-the-art self-supervised learning methods on a simulation study and two independent datasets. Extensive experimental results demonstrated that our method outperforms other self-supervised learning methods on both classification and regression tasks. With further refinement, our method shows the potential advantage in automatic disease diagnosis with large-scale unlabeled data available.
abstract_zh: 根据放射组学数据进行计算机辅助疾病诊断在许多医学应用中非常重要。然而，开发这种技术依赖于对放射图像进行注释，这是一个耗时、费力且昂贵的过程。在这项工作中，我们提出了第一个新颖的协作自监督学习方法，以解决标记放射组学数据不足的挑战，其特征不同于文本和图像数据。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了两个协作借口任务，探索感兴趣区域之间潜在的病理或生物学关系以及受试者之间的相似性和相异性信息。我们的方法以自我监督的方式从放射组学数据中协作学习强大的潜在特征表示，以减少人类注释工作，这有利于疾病诊断。我们在模拟研究和两个独立数据集上将我们提出的方法与其他最先进的自监督学习方法进行了比较。大量的实验结果表明，我们的方法在分类和回归任务上都优于其他自监督学习方法。经过进一步完善，我们的方法显示了利用大规模未标记数据进行自动疾病诊断的潜在优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种协作自监督学习方法，解决放射组学数据标注不足的问题，通过挖掘区域病理关系和样本相似性信息提升疾病诊断性能。
AI.motivation: 放射组学数据分析依赖耗时昂贵的标注数据，现有自监督方法难以适配其特殊的数据特性，需开发新型学习框架以降低标注依赖。
AI.method: 设计两个协作预训练任务：1）挖掘感兴趣区域间的潜在病理生物学关联；2）学习样本间的相似性与差异性信息，通过自监督方式提取鲁棒特征表示。
AI.result: 在模拟数据和两个独立数据集上，该方法在分类和回归任务中均优于现有自监督学习方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过协作自监督学习有效利用未标注数据，在放射组学疾病诊断中展现出显著优势，未来可扩展至大规模数据场景。

search_text: A Novel Collaborative Self-Supervised Learning Method for Radiomic Data 一种新颖的放射组学数据协作自监督学习方法 The computer-aided disease diagnosis from radiomic data is important in many medical applications. However, developing such a technique relies on annotating radiological images, which is a time-consuming, labor-intensive, and expensive process. In this work, we present the first novel collaborative self-supervised learning method to solve the challenge of insufficient labeled radiomic data, whose characteristics are different from text and image data. To achieve this, we present two collaborative pretext tasks that explore the latent pathological or biological relationships between regions of interest and the similarity and dissimilarity information between subjects. Our method collaboratively learns the robust latent feature representations from radiomic data in a self-supervised manner to reduce human annotation efforts, which benefits the disease diagnosis. We compared our proposed method with other state-of-the-art self-supervised learning methods on a simulation study and two independent datasets. Extensive experimental results demonstrated that our method outperforms other self-supervised learning methods on both classification and regression tasks. With further refinement, our method shows the potential advantage in automatic disease diagnosis with large-scale unlabeled data available. 根据放射组学数据进行计算机辅助疾病诊断在许多医学应用中非常重要。然而，开发这种技术依赖于对放射图像进行注释，这是一个耗时、费力且昂贵的过程。在这项工作中，我们提出了第一个新颖的协作自监督学习方法，以解决标记放射组学数据不足的挑战，其特征不同于文本和图像数据。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了两个协作借口任务，探索感兴趣区域之间潜在的病理或生物学关系以及受试者之间的相似性和相异性信息。我们的方法以自我监督的方式从放射组学数据中协作学习强大的潜在特征表示，以减少人类注释工作，这有利于疾病诊断。我们在模拟研究和两个独立数据集上将我们提出的方法与其他最先进的自监督学习方法进行了比较。大量的实验结果表明，我们的方法在分类和回归任务上都优于其他自监督学习方法。经过进一步完善，我们的方法显示了利用大规模未标记数据进行自动疾病诊断的潜在优势。 本文提出一种协作自监督学习方法，解决放射组学数据标注不足的问题，通过挖掘区域病理关系和样本相似性信息提升疾病诊断性能。 Zhiyuan Li,Hailong Li,Anca L. authors_text: Ahmed Said Donmez,Onur Unlu,Muhammed O. Sayin
title: Logit-Q Dynamics for Efficient Learning in Stochastic Teams
title_zh: 用于随机团队高效学习的 Logit-Q 动力学
abstract: We present a new family of logit-Q dynamics for efficient learning in stochastic games by combining the log-linear learning (also known as logit dynamics) for the repeated play of normal-form games with Q-learning for unknown Markov decision processes within the auxiliary stage-game framework. In this framework, we view stochastic games as agents repeatedly playing some stage game associated with the current state of the underlying game while the agents' Q-functions determine the payoffs of these stage games. We show that the logit-Q dynamics presented reach (near) efficient equilibrium in stochastic teams with unknown dynamics and quantify the approximation error. We also show the rationality of the logit-Q dynamics against agents following pure stationary strategies and the convergence of the dynamics in stochastic games where the stage-payoffs induce potential games, yet only a single agent controls the state transitions beyond stochastic teams. The key idea is to approximate the dynamics with a fictional scenario where the Q-function estimates are stationary over epochs whose lengths grow at a sufficiently slow rate. We then couple the dynamics in the main and fictional scenarios to show that these two scenarios become more and more similar across epochs due to the vanishing step size and growing epoch lengths.
summary: We present a new family of logit-Q dynamics for efficient learning in stochastic games by combining the log-linear learning (also known as logit dynamics) for the repeated play of normal-form games with Q-learning for unknown Markov decision processes within the auxiliary stage-game framework. In this framework, we view stochastic games as agents repeatedly playing some stage game associated with the current state of the underlying game while the agents' Q-functions determine the payoffs of these stage games. We show that the logit-Q dynamics presented reach (near) efficient equilibrium in stochastic teams with unknown dynamics and quantify the approximation error. We also show the rationality of the logit-Q dynamics against agents following pure stationary strategies and the convergence of the dynamics in stochastic games where the stage-payoffs induce potential games, yet only a single agent controls the state transitions beyond stochastic teams. The key idea is to approximate the dynamics with a fictional scenario where the Q-function estimates are stationary over epochs whose lengths grow at a sufficiently slow rate. We then couple the dynamics in the main and fictional scenarios to show that these two scenarios become more and more similar across epochs due to the vanishing step size and growing epoch lengths.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个新的 logit-Q 动力学系列，用于在随机博弈中进行高效学习，通过将用于重复玩正常形式博弈的对数线性学习（也称为 logit 动力学）与辅助阶段博弈框架内用于未知马尔可夫决策过程的 Q 学习相结合。在这个框架中，我们将随机博弈视为智能体重复玩与底层博弈当前状态相关的某个阶段博弈，而智能体的 Q 函数决定这些阶段博弈的收益。我们表明，logit-Q 动力学在具有未知动力学的随机团队中达到（接近）有效平衡，并量化了近似误差。我们还展示了 logit-Q 动力学相对于遵循纯平稳策略的代理的合理性，以及随机博弈中动态的收敛性，其中阶段收益引发潜在博弈，但只有单个代理控制随机团队之外的状态转换。关键思想是用一个虚构的场景来近似动态，其中 Q 函数估计在长度以足够慢的速度增长的时期内是固定的。然后，我们将主要场景和虚构场景中的动态结合起来，以表明由于步长消失和历元长度不断增长，这两种场景在历元之间变得越来越相似。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合对数线性学习与Q学习的新型Logit-Q动态方法，用于解决具有未知动态的随机团队中的高效学习问题。
AI.motivation: 在随机博弈中，当动态未知且需达到高效均衡时，传统方法可能面临收敛性与效率挑战，需设计适应复杂环境的学习动态。
AI.method: 通过辅助阶段博弈框架，将对数线性学习与Q学习结合，利用虚构场景中静态Q函数近似动态，并通过耦合主场景与虚构场景证明其收敛性。
AI.result: 证明Logit-Q动态可达到近似高效均衡，量化逼近误差，并在阶段收益诱导潜在博弈的随机博弈中展示收敛性及对纯策略的理性性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为未知动态随机团队提供了高效学习框架，通过静态近似与动态耦合机制实现均衡收敛，为后续研究奠定基础。

authors_text: Asal Nesar Noubari,Wolfgang Wörndl
title: Dynamic Adaptation of User Preferences and Results in a Destination Recommender System
title_zh: 目的地推荐系统中用户偏好和结果的动态适应
comment: in WSDM 2023 Workshop on Interactive Recommender System (IRS)
comments: in WSDM 2023 Workshop on Interactive Recommender System (IRS)
abstract: Studying human factors has gained a lot of interest in recommender systems research recently. User experience plays a vital role in tourism recommender systems since user satisfaction is the main factor that guarantees the success of such recommender systems. In this work, we have designed and implemented a destination recommender system in which the recommendations adapt instantly based on the user preferences. The recommendations can be explored on a world map with additional information. This interface addresses common visualization challenges in recommender systems, such as transparency, justification, controllability, explorability, the cold-start problem, and context awareness. We have conducted a user study to evaluate different aspects of this recommender system from the users' perspective.
summary: Studying human factors has gained a lot of interest in recommender systems research recently. User experience plays a vital role in tourism recommender systems since user satisfaction is the main factor that guarantees the success of such recommender systems. In this work, we have designed and implemented a destination recommender system in which the recommendations adapt instantly based on the user preferences. The recommendations can be explored on a world map with additional information. This interface addresses common visualization challenges in recommender systems, such as transparency, justification, controllability, explorability, the cold-start problem, and context awareness. We have conducted a user study to evaluate different aspects of this recommender system from the users' perspective.
abstract_zh: 最近，研究人为因素在推荐系统研究中引起了很大的兴趣。用户体验在旅游推荐系统中起着至关重要的作用，因为用户满意度是保证此类推荐系统成功的主要因素。在这项工作中，我们设计并实现了一个目的地推荐系统，其中推荐会根据用户偏好立即调整。可以在带有附加信息的世界地图上探索这些建议。该界面解决了推荐系统中常见的可视化挑战，例如透明度、合理性、可控性、可探索性、冷启动问题和上下文感知。我们进行了一项用户研究，从用户的角度评估该推荐系统的不同方面。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并实现了一个根据用户偏好动态调整推荐结果的目的地推荐系统，并通过可视化界面解决推荐系统中的常见问题。
AI.motivation: 用户满意度是旅游推荐系统成功的关键，而现有系统在透明度、冷启动问题和上下文感知等方面存在不足，需改进用户体验。
AI.method: 构建支持实时偏好调整的推荐系统，结合世界地图可视化界面展示推荐结果，并通过用户研究评估系统表现。
AI.result: 用户研究验证了系统在提升可视化透明度、可控性和探索性方面的有效性，同时缓解了冷启动问题。
AI.conclusion: 动态适应用户偏好的推荐系统结合可视化界面能显著提升用户满意度，为旅游推荐领域提供了可行的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文设计并实现了一个根据用户偏好动态调整推荐结果的目的地推荐系统，并通过可视化界面解决推荐系统中的常见问题。
ai_content.motivation: 用户满意度是旅游推荐系统成功的关键，而现有系统在透明度、冷启动问题和上下文感知等方面存在不足，需改进用户体验。
ai_content.method: 构建支持实时偏好调整的推荐系统，结合世界地图可视化界面展示推荐结果，并通过用户研究评估系统表现。
ai_content.result: 用户研究验证了系统在提升可视化透明度、可控性和探索性方面的有效性，同时缓解了冷启动问题。
ai_content.conclusion: 动态适应用户偏好的推荐系统结合可视化界面能显著提升用户满意度，为旅游推荐领域提供了可行的解决方案。

search_text: Dynamic Adaptation of User Preferences and Results in a Destination Recommender System 目的地推荐系统中用户偏好和结果的动态适应 Studying human factors has gained a lot of interest in recommender systems research recently. User experience plays a vital role in tourism recommender systems since user satisfaction is the main factor that guarantees the success of such recommender systems. In this work, we have designed and implemented a destination recommender system in which the recommendations adapt instantly based on the user preferences. The recommendations can be explored on a world map with additional information. This interface addresses common visualization challenges in recommender systems, such as transparency, justification, controllability, explorability, the cold-start problem, and context awareness. We have conducted a user study to evaluate different aspects of this recommender system from the users' perspective. 最近，研究人为因素在推荐系统研究中引起了很大的兴趣。用户体验在旅游推荐系统中起着至关重要的作用，因为用户满意度是保证此类推荐系统成功的主要因素。在这项工作中，我们设计并实现了一个目的地推荐系统，其中推荐会根据用户偏好立即调整。可以在带有附加信息的世界地图上探索这些建议。该界面解决了推荐系统中常见的可视化挑战，例如透明度、合理性、可控性、可探索性、冷启动问题和上下文感知。我们进行了一项用户研究，从用户的角度评估该推荐系统的不同方面。 本文设计并实现了一个根据用户偏好动态调整推荐结果的目的地推荐系统，并通过可视化界面解决推荐系统中的常见问题。 Asal Nesar Noubari,Wolfgang Wörndl cs.IR,cs.HC

authors_text: Jinsheng Yang,Yuanhai Shao,ChunNa Li
title: CNTS: Cooperative Network for Time Series
title_zh: CNTS：时间序列合作网络
abstract: The use of deep learning techniques in detecting anomalies in time series data has been an active area of research with a long history of development and a variety of approaches. In particular, reconstruction-based unsupervised anomaly detection methods have gained popularity due to their intuitive assumptions and low computational requirements. However, these methods are often susceptible to outliers and do not effectively model anomalies, leading to suboptimal results. This paper presents a novel approach for unsupervised anomaly detection, called the Cooperative Network Time Series (CNTS) approach. The CNTS system consists of two components: a detector and a reconstructor. The detector is responsible for directly detecting anomalies, while the reconstructor provides reconstruction information to the detector and updates its learning based on anomalous information received from the detector. The central aspect of CNTS is a multi-objective optimization problem, which is solved through a cooperative solution strategy. Experiments on three real-world datasets demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of CNTS and confirm the cooperative effectiveness of the detector and reconstructor. The source code for this study is publicly available on GitHub.
summary: The use of deep learning techniques in detecting anomalies in time series data has been an active area of research with a long history of development and a variety of approaches. In particular, reconstruction-based unsupervised anomaly detection methods have gained popularity due to their intuitive assumptions and low computational requirements. However, these methods are often susceptible to outliers and do not effectively model anomalies, leading to suboptimal results. This paper presents a novel approach for unsupervised anomaly detection, called the Cooperative Network Time Series (CNTS) approach. The CNTS system consists of two components: a detector and a reconstructor. The detector is responsible for directly detecting anomalies, while the reconstructor provides reconstruction information to the detector and updates its learning based on anomalous information received from the detector. The central aspect of CNTS is a multi-objective optimization problem, which is solved through a cooperative solution strategy. Experiments on three real-world datasets demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of CNTS and confirm the cooperative effectiveness of the detector and reconstructor. The source code for this study is publicly available on GitHub.
abstract_zh: 使用深度学习技术检测时间序列数据中的异常一直是一个活跃的研究领域，具有悠久的发展历史和多种方法。特别是，基于重建的无监督异常检测方法由于其直观的假设和低计算要求而受到欢迎。然而，这些方法通常容易受到异常值的影响，并且不能有效地对异常进行建模，从而导致结果不理想。本文提出了一种新的无监督异常检测方法，称为合作网络时间序列（CNTS）方法。 CNTS系统由两个部分组成：探测器和重建器。检测器负责直接检测异常，而重建器向检测器提供重建信息，并根据从检测器接收到的异常信息更新其学习。 CNTS 的核心是多目标优化问题，通过协作解决策略来解决。对三个真实世界数据集的实验证明了 CNTS 的最先进性能，并证实了检测器和重建器的协作有效性。这项研究的源代码可在 GitHub 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CNTS（合作网络时间序列）的无监督异常检测方法，通过检测器和重建器的协同工作提升时间序列异常检测效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于重建的无监督异常检测方法易受离群值影响且无法有效建模异常，导致检测效果不佳。
AI.method: 设计包含检测器和重建器的双组件架构，通过多目标优化问题的协同求解策略实现检测与重建的联合学习。
AI.result: 在三个真实数据集上的实验验证了CNTS的先进性能，证明了检测器与重建器的协同有效性。
AI.conclusion: CNTS通过协同机制提升了时间序列异常检测能力，源代码已开源。

authors_text: Joakim Blikstad,Sagnik Mukhopadhyay,Danupon Nanongkai,Ta-Wei Tu
title: Fast Algorithms via Dynamic-Oracle Matroids
title_zh: 通过 Dynamic-Oracle Matroid 的快速算法
comment: To appear at STOC 2023. Abstract shortened to meet arXiv requirement
comments: To appear at STOC 2023. Abstract shortened to meet arXiv requirement
abstract: We initiate the study of matroid problems in a new oracle model called dynamic oracle. Our algorithms in this model lead to new bounds for some classic problems, and a "unified" algorithm whose performance matches previous results developed in various papers. We also show a lower bound that answers some open problems from a few decades ago. Concretely, our results are as follows. * We show an algorithm with $\tilde{O}_k(n+r\sqrt{r})$ dynamic-rank-query and time complexities for the matroid union problem over $k$ matroids. This implies the following consequences. (i) An improvement over the $\tilde{O}_k(n\sqrt{r})$ bound implied by [Chakrabarty-Lee-Sidford-Singla-Wong FOCS'19] for matroid union in the traditional rank-query model. (ii) An $\tilde{O}_k(|E|+|V|\sqrt{|V|})$-time algorithm for the $k$-disjoint spanning tree problem. This improves the $\tilde{O}_k(|V|\sqrt{|E|})$ bounds of Gabow-Westermann [STOC'88] and Gabow [STOC'91]. * We show a matroid intersection algorithm with $\tilde{O}(n\sqrt{r})$ dynamic-rank-query and time complexities. This implies new bounds for some problems and bounds that match the classic ones obtained in various papers, e.g. colorful spanning tree [Gabow-Stallmann ICALP'85], graphic matroid intersection [Gabow-Xu FOCS'89], simple scheduling matroid intersection [Xu-Gabow ISAAC'94], and Hopcroft-Karp combinatorial bipartite matching. More importantly, this is done via a "unified" algorithm in the sense that an improvement over our dynamic-rank-query algorithm would imply improved bounds for all the above problems simultaneously. * We show simple super-linear ($Ω(n\log n)$) query lower bounds for matroid intersection in our dynamic-rank-oracle and the traditional independence-query models; the latter improves the previous $\log_2(3)n - o(n)$ bound by Harvey [SODA'08] and answers an open problem raised by, e.g., Welsh [1976] and CLSSW [FOCS'19].

Concretely, our results are as follows. * We show an algorithm with $\tilde{O}_k(n+r\sqrt{r})$ dynamic-rank-query and time complexities for the matroid union problem over $k$ matroids. This implies the following consequences. (i) An improvement over the $\tilde{O}_k(n\sqrt{r})$ bound implied by [Chakrabarty-Lee-Sidford-Singla-Wong FOCS'19] for matroid union in the traditional rank-query model. (ii) An $\tilde{O}_k(|E|+|V|\sqrt{|V|})$-time algorithm for the $k$-disjoint spanning tree problem. This improves the $\tilde{O}_k(|V|\sqrt{|E|})$ bounds of Gabow-Westermann [STOC'88] and Gabow [STOC'91]. * We show a matroid intersection algorithm with $\tilde{O}(n\sqrt{r})$ dynamic-rank-query and time complexities. This implies new bounds for some problems and bounds that match the classic ones obtained in various papers, e.g. colorful spanning tree [Gabow-Stallmann ICALP'85], graphic matroid intersection [Gabow-Xu FOCS'89], simple scheduling matroid intersection [Xu-Gabow ISAAC'94], and Hopcroft-Karp combinatorial bipartite matching. abstract_zh: 我们在称为动态预言的新预言模型中开始了拟阵问题的研究。我们在这个模型中的算法为一些经典问题带来了新的界限，并且“统一”算法的性能与以前在各种论文中开发的结果相匹配。我们还展示了一个下界，可以回答几十年前的一些悬而未决的问题。具体来说，我们的结果如下。 * 我们展示了一种具有 $\tilde{O}_k(n+r\sqrt{r})$ 动态排名查询和时间复杂度的算法，用于解决 $k$ 拟阵上的拟阵并集问题。这意味着以下后果。 (i) 对传统排名查询模型中拟阵并集 [Chakrabarty-Lee-Sidford-Singla-Wong FOCS'19] 隐含的 $\tilde{O}_k(n\sqrt{r})$ 界限的改进。 (ii) 用于 $k$ 不相交生成树问题的 $\tilde{O}_k(|E|+|V|\sqrt{|V|})$ 时间算法。这改进了 Gabow-Westermann [STOC'88] 和 Gabow [STOC'91] 的 $\tilde{O}_k(|V|\sqrt{|E|})$ 界限。 * 我们展示了一种具有 $\tilde{O}(n\sqrt{r})$ 动态排名查询和时间复杂度的拟阵交集算法。这意味着某些问题的新界限和与各种论文中获得的经典界限相匹配的界限，例如彩色生成树 [Gabow-Stallmann ICALP'85]、图形拟阵交集 [Gabow-Xu FOCS'89]、简单调度拟阵交集 [Xu-Gabow ISAAC'94] 和 Hopcroft-Karp 组合二分匹配。更重要的是，这是通过“统一”算法完成的，因为对我们的动态排名查询算法的改进将意味着同时改进所有上述问题的界限。 * 我们展示了动态排序预言机和传统独立查询模型中拟阵交集的简单超线性 ($Ω(n\log n)$) 查询下界；后者改进了之前由 Harvey [SODA'08] 约束的 $\log_2(3)n - o(n)$ 并回答了 Welsh [1976] 和 CLSSW [FOCS'19] 提出的开放问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的动态预言机模型，用于解决 matroid 问题，并在此模型下设计了多项经典问题的高效算法。
AI.motivation: 传统 matroid 算法在 rank-query 模型下存在性能瓶颈，且缺乏统一的解决方案，需探索更高效的模型与方法。
AI.method: 通过引入动态预言机模型，设计针对 matroid 联合、交集等问题的算法，并结合复杂度分析与下界证明进行验证。
AI.result: 提出动态 rank-query 模型下的算法，改进了 matroid 联合与 k-边不交生成树问题的复杂度；统一了多种 matroid 交集问题的算法，并证明了新的查询下界。
AI.conclusion: 动态预言机模型为 matroid 问题提供了更优的算法框架，同时解决了长期未决的复杂度下界问题。

search_text: Fast Algorithms via Dynamic-Oracle Matroids 通过 Dynamic-Oracle Matroid 的快速算法 We initiate the study of matroid problems in a new oracle model called dynamic oracle. Our algorithms in this model lead to new bounds for some classic problems, and a "unified" algorithm whose performance matches previous results developed in various papers. We also show a lower bound that answers some open problems from a few decades ago. Concretely, our results are as follows. * We show an algorithm with $\tilde{O}_k(n+r\sqrt{r})$ dynamic-rank-query and time complexities for the matroid union problem over $k$ matroids. This implies the following consequences. (i) An improvement over the $\tilde{O}_k(n\sqrt{r})$ bound implied by [Chakrabarty-Lee-Sidford-Singla-Wong FOCS'19] for matroid union in the traditional rank-query model. (ii) An $\tilde{O}_k(|E|+|V|\sqrt{|V|})$-time algorithm for the $k$-disjoint spanning tree problem. This improves the $\tilde{O}_k(|V|\sqrt{|E|})$ bounds of Gabow-Westermann [STOC'88] and Gabow [STOC'91]. * We show a matroid intersection algorithm with $\tilde{O}(n\sqrt{r})$ dynamic-rank-query and time complexities. This implies new bounds for some problems and bounds that match the classic ones obtained in various papers, e.g. colorful spanning tree [Gabow-Stallmann ICALP'85], graphic matroid intersection [Gabow-Xu FOCS'89], simple scheduling matroid intersection [Xu-Gabow ISAAC'94], and Hopcroft-Karp combinatorial bipartite matching. More importantly, this is done via a "unified" algorithm in the sense that an improvement over our dynamic-rank-query algorithm would imply improved bounds for all the above problems simultaneously. * We show simple super-linear ($Ω(n\log n)$) query lower bounds for matroid intersection in our dynamic-rank-oracle and the traditional independence-query models; the latter improves the previous $\log_2(3)n - o(n)$ bound by Harvey [SODA'08] and answers an open problem raised by, e.g., Welsh [1976] and CLSSW [FOCS'19]. 我们在称为动态预言的新预言模型中开始了拟阵问题的研究。我们在这个模型中的算法为一些经典问题带来了新的界限，并且“统一”算法的性能与以前在各种论文中开发的结果相匹配。我们还展示了一个下界，可以回答几十年前的一些悬而未决的问题。具体来说，我们的结果如下。 * 我们展示了一种具有 $\tilde{O}_k(n+r\sqrt{r})$ 动态排名查询和时间复杂度的算法，用于解决 $k$ 拟阵上的拟阵并集问题。这意味着以下后果。 (i) 对传统排名查询模型中拟阵并集 [Chakrabarty-Lee-Sidford-Singla-Wong FOCS'19] 隐含的 $\tilde{O}_k(n\sqrt{r})$ 界限的改进。 (ii) 用于 $k$ 不相交生成树问题的 $\tilde{O}_k(|E|+|V|\sqrt{|V|})$ 时间算法。这改进了 Gabow-Westermann [STOC'88] 和 Gabow [STOC'91] 的 $\tilde{O}_k(|V|\sqrt{|E|})$ 界限。 * 我们展示了一种具有 $\tilde{O}(n\sqrt{r})$ 动态排名查询和时间复杂度的拟阵交集算法。这意味着某些问题的新界限和与各种论文中获得的经典界限相匹配的界限，例如彩色生成树 [Gabow-Stallmann ICALP'85]、图形拟阵交集 [Gabow-Xu FOCS'89]、简单调度拟阵交集 [Xu-Gabow ISAAC'94] 和 Hopcroft-Karp 组合二分匹配。更重要的是，这是通过“统一”算法完成的，因为对我们的动态排名查询算法的改进将意味着同时改进所有上述问题的界限。 * 我们展示了动态排序预言机和传统独立查询模型中拟阵交集的简单超线性 ($Ω(n\log n)$) 查询下界；后者改进了之前由 Harvey [SODA'08] 约束的 $\log_2(3)n - o(n)$ 并回答了 Welsh [1976] 和 CLSSW [FOCS'19] 提出的开放问题。 本文提出了一种新的动态预言机模型，用于解决 matroid 问题，并在此模型下设计了多项经典问题的高效算法。 Joakim Blikstad,Sagnik Mukhopadhyay,Danupon Nanongkai,Ta-Wei Tu cs.DS,cs.CC

authors_text: Lilian Ngweta,Subha Maity,Alex Gittens,Yuekai Sun,Mikhail Yurochkin
title: Simple Disentanglement of Style and Content in Visual Representations
title_zh: 视觉表现中风格和内容的简单解开
abstract: Learning visual representations with interpretable features, i.e., disentangled representations, remains a challenging problem. Existing methods demonstrate some success but are hard to apply to large-scale vision datasets like ImageNet. In this work, we propose a simple post-processing framework to disentangle content and style in learned representations from pre-trained vision models. We model the pre-trained features probabilistically as linearly entangled combinations of the latent content and style factors and develop a simple disentanglement algorithm based on the probabilistic model. We show that the method provably disentangles content and style features and verify its efficacy empirically. Our post-processed features yield significant domain generalization performance improvements when the distribution shift occurs due to style changes or style-related spurious correlations.
summary: Learning visual representations with interpretable features, i.e., disentangled representations, remains a challenging problem. Existing methods demonstrate some success but are hard to apply to large-scale vision datasets like ImageNet. In this work, we propose a simple post-processing framework to disentangle content and style in learned representations from pre-trained vision models. We model the pre-trained features probabilistically as linearly entangled combinations of the latent content and style factors and develop a simple disentanglement algorithm based on the probabilistic model. We show that the method provably disentangles content and style features and verify its efficacy empirically. Our post-processed features yield significant domain generalization performance improvements when the distribution shift occurs due to style changes or style-related spurious correlations.
abstract_zh: 学习具有可解释特征的视觉表示，即解开的表示，仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。现有方法取得了一些成功，但很难应用于 ImageNet 等大规模视觉数据集。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个简单的后处理框架，用于从预训练的视觉模型中分离出学习表示中的内容和风格。我们将预先训练的特征概率建模为潜在内容和风格因素的线性纠缠组合，并基于概率模型开发一种简单的解缠算法。我们证明该方法可以理清内容和风格特征，并通过经验验证其有效性。当由于风格变化或与风格相关的虚假相关性而发生分布变化时，我们的后处理特征会产生显着的领域泛化性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种简单后处理框架，用于从预训练视觉模型中分离内容和风格特征。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以在大规模数据集（如ImageNet）上有效分离内容和风格，且缺乏对分布偏移的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 将预训练特征建模为内容与风格潜在因子的线性组合，基于概率模型设计简单分离算法。
AI.result: 实验验证方法可有效分离特征，并在风格变化或相关伪相关性导致的分布偏移场景下提升领域泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为视觉表征的可解释性提供了有效工具，且适用于大规模预训练模型的后处理优化。

authors_text: Chaewon Park,Minhyeok Lee,Suhwan Cho,Donghyeong Kim,Sangyoun Lee
title: Two-stream Decoder Feature Normality Estimating Network for Industrial Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 用于工业异常检测的双流解码器特征正态性估计网络
comment: Accepted to IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP) 2023
comments: Accepted to IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP) 2023
abstract: Image reconstruction-based anomaly detection has recently been in the spotlight because of the difficulty of constructing anomaly datasets. These approaches work by learning to model normal features without seeing abnormal samples during training and then discriminating anomalies at test time based on the reconstructive errors. However, these models have limitations in reconstructing the abnormal samples due to their indiscriminate conveyance of features. Moreover, these approaches are not explicitly optimized for distinguishable anomalies. To address these problems, we propose a two-stream decoder network (TSDN), designed to learn both normal and abnormal features. Additionally, we propose a feature normality estimator (FNE) to eliminate abnormal features and prevent high-quality reconstruction of abnormal regions. Evaluation on a standard benchmark demonstrated performance better than state-of-the-art models.
summary: Image reconstruction-based anomaly detection has recently been in the spotlight because of the difficulty of constructing anomaly datasets. These approaches work by learning to model normal features without seeing abnormal samples during training and then discriminating anomalies at test time based on the reconstructive errors. However, these models have limitations in reconstructing the abnormal samples due to their indiscriminate conveyance of features. Moreover, these approaches are not explicitly optimized for distinguishable anomalies. To address these problems, we propose a two-stream decoder network (TSDN), designed to learn both normal and abnormal features. Additionally, we propose a feature normality estimator (FNE) to eliminate abnormal features and prevent high-quality reconstruction of abnormal regions. Evaluation on a standard benchmark demonstrated performance better than state-of-the-art models.
abstract_zh: 由于构建异常数据集的困难，基于图像重建的异常检测最近受到关注。这些方法的工作原理是在训练期间学习对正常特征进行建模，而不会在训练期间看到异常样本，然后在测试时根据重建误差来区分异常。然而，由于这些模型不加区别地传递特征，因此在重建异常样本方面存在局限性。此外，这些方法没有针对可区分的异常进行明确优化。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种双流解码器网络（TSDN），旨在学习正常和异常特征。此外，我们提出了一种特征正态估计器（FNE）来消除异常特征并防止异常区域的高质量重建。标准基准的评估表明其性能优于最先进的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双流解码器特征正常性估计网络（TSDN），用于工业异常检测，通过学习正常和异常特征并消除异常特征以提高检测效果。
AI.motivation: 基于图像重建的异常检测方法在训练时无法接触异常样本，导致难以区分异常特征且重建效果不佳，现有模型对此优化不足。
AI.method: 设计双流解码器网络（TSDN）学习正常与异常特征，并引入特征正常性估计器（FNE）过滤异常特征，防止异常区域的高质量重建。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中，该方法性能优于现有最先进模型。
AI.conclusion: TSDN与FNE结合有效解决了异常特征重建与区分问题，提升了工业异常检测的准确性。

authors_text: Jules Sinsel,Anniek Jansen,Sara Colombo
title: Facebook Data Shield: Increasing Awareness and Control over Data used by Newsfeed-Generating Algorithms
title_zh: Facebook Data Shield：提高对新闻源生成算法使用的数据的认识和控制
comment: ef:In Proceedings of the Seventeenth International Conference on Tangible, Embedded, and Embodied Interaction (TEI 2023). Association for Computing Machinery, New York, NY, USA, Article 46, 1-6
comments: ef:In Proceedings of the Seventeenth International Conference on Tangible, Embedded, and Embodied Interaction (TEI 2023). Association for Computing Machinery, New York, NY, USA, Article 46, 1-6
abstract: Social media platforms newsfeeds are generated by AI algorithms, which select and order posts based on user data. However, users are often unaware of what data is collected and employed for this aim, neither can they control it. To open up discussions on what data users are willing to feed the newsfeed algorithm with, we created the Facebook Data Shield, a human-size interactive installation where users can see and control what type of data is collected. By pressing buttons, data categories and/or data variables can be (de)activated. An outer rim with lights gives feedback to users about the level of personalization of the resulting newsfeed. We performed a preliminary study to get insights into what data users are willing to share, their preferred level of control, and the effect of such an installation on users' awareness. Based on our findings, we discuss implications for design and future work.
summary: Social media platforms newsfeeds are generated by AI algorithms, which select and order posts based on user data. However, users are often unaware of what data is collected and employed for this aim, neither can they control it. To open up discussions on what data users are willing to feed the newsfeed algorithm with, we created the Facebook Data Shield, a human-size interactive installation where users can see and control what type of data is collected. By pressing buttons, data categories and/or data variables can be (de)activated. An outer rim with lights gives feedback to users about the level of personalization of the resulting newsfeed. We performed a preliminary study to get insights into what data users are willing to share, their preferred level of control, and the effect of such an installation on users' awareness. Based on our findings, we discuss implications for design and future work.
abstract_zh: 社交媒体平台的新闻源由人工智能算法生成，该算法根据用户数据选择和排序帖子。然而，用户通常不知道为此目的收集和使用了哪些数据，他们也无法控制它。为了展开关于用户愿意向新闻源算法提供哪些数据的讨论，我们创建了 Facebook Data Shield，这是一个人体大小的交互式装置，用户可以在其中查看和控制收集的数据类型。通过按下按钮，可以激活（停用）数据类别和/或数据变量。带灯的外缘向用户提供有关生成的新闻源的个性化程度的反馈。我们进行了一项初步研究，以了解用户愿意共享哪些数据、他们首选的控制级别以及此类安装对用户意识的影响。根据我们的发现，我们讨论了对设计和未来工作的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一个名为Facebook Data Shield的互动装置，旨在提高用户对新闻推送算法所使用数据的意识和控制能力。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体用户通常不了解其数据被新闻推送算法使用的具体情况，也缺乏控制权，因此需要通过互动方式增强用户的数据意识。
AI.method: 开发了一个可交互的实体装置，允许用户通过按钮激活或停用数据类别，并通过灯光反馈新闻推送的个性化程度，同时进行初步用户研究。
AI.result: 初步研究发现用户对数据共享的意愿存在差异，且装置能有效提升用户对数据使用的认知水平。
AI.conclusion: 该装置为设计数据透明性工具提供了参考，未来需进一步探索用户控制机制与算法伦理的结合方式。

search_text: Facebook Data Shield: Increasing Awareness and Control over Data used by Newsfeed-Generating Algorithms Facebook Data Shield：提高对新闻源生成算法使用的数据的认识和控制 Social media platforms newsfeeds are generated by AI algorithms, which select and order posts based on user data. However, users are often unaware of what data is collected and employed for this aim, neither can they control it. To open up discussions on what data users are willing to feed the newsfeed algorithm with, we created the Facebook Data Shield, a human-size interactive installation where users can see and control what type of data is collected. By pressing buttons, data categories and/or data variables can be (de)activated. An outer rim with lights gives feedback to users about the level of personalization of the resulting newsfeed. We performed a preliminary study to get insights into what data users are willing to share, their preferred level of control, and the effect of such an installation on users' awareness. Based on our findings, we discuss implications for design and future work. 社交媒体平台的新闻源由人工智能算法生成，该算法根据用户数据选择和排序帖子。然而，用户通常不知道为此目的收集和使用了哪些数据，他们也无法控制它。为了展开关于用户愿意向新闻源算法提供哪些数据的讨论，我们创建了 Facebook Data Shield，这是一个人体大小的交互式装置，用户可以在其中查看和控制收集的数据类型。通过按下按钮，可以激活（停用）数据类别和/或数据变量。带灯的外缘向用户提供有关生成的新闻源的个性化程度的反馈。我们进行了一项初步研究，以了解用户愿意共享哪些数据、他们首选的控制级别以及此类安装对用户意识的影响。根据我们的发现，我们讨论了对设计和未来工作的影响。 本文设计了一个名为Facebook Data Shield的互动装置，旨在提高用户对新闻推送算法所使用数据的意识和控制能力。 Jules Sinsel,Anniek Jansen,Sara Colombo cs.HC

authors_text: Jialun Cai,Hong Liu,Runwei Ding,Wenhao Li,Jianbing Wu,Miaoju Ban
title: HTNet: Human Topology Aware Network for 3D Human Pose Estimation
title_zh: HTNet：用于 3D 人体姿势估计的人体拓扑感知网络
abstract: 3D human pose estimation errors would propagate along the human body topology and accumulate at the end joints of limbs. Inspired by the backtracking mechanism in automatic control systems, we design an Intra-Part Constraint module that utilizes the parent nodes as the reference to build topological constraints for end joints at the part level. Further considering the hierarchy of the human topology, joint-level and body-level dependencies are captured via graph convolutional networks and self-attentions, respectively. Based on these designs, we propose a novel Human Topology aware Network (HTNet), which adopts a channel-split progressive strategy to sequentially learn the structural priors of the human topology from multiple semantic levels: joint, part, and body. Extensive experiments show that the proposed method improves the estimation accuracy by 18.7% on the end joints of limbs and achieves state-of-the-art results on Human3.6M and MPI-INF-3DHP datasets. Code is available at https://github.com/vefalun/HTNet.
summary: 3D human pose estimation errors would propagate along the human body topology and accumulate at the end joints of limbs. Inspired by the backtracking mechanism in automatic control systems, we design an Intra-Part Constraint module that utilizes the parent nodes as the reference to build topological constraints for end joints at the part level. Further considering the hierarchy of the human topology, joint-level and body-level dependencies are captured via graph convolutional networks and self-attentions, respectively. Based on these designs, we propose a novel Human Topology aware Network (HTNet), which adopts a channel-split progressive strategy to sequentially learn the structural priors of the human topology from multiple semantic levels: joint, part, and body. Extensive experiments show that the proposed method improves the estimation accuracy by 18.7% on the end joints of limbs and achieves state-of-the-art results on Human3.6M and MPI-INF-3DHP datasets. Code is available at https://github.com/vefalun/HTNet.
abstract_zh: 3D 人体姿势估计误差会沿着人体拓扑传播并在四肢末端关节处累积。受自动控制系统中回溯机制的启发，我们设计了一个零件内约束模块，该模块利用父节点作为参考来构建零件级别末端关节的拓扑约束。进一步考虑人体拓扑的层次结构，分别通过图卷积网络和自注意力捕获关节级和身体级依赖性。基于这些设计，我们提出了一种新颖的人体拓扑感知网络（HTNet），它采用通道分割渐进策略，从多个语义级别（关节、部分和身体）顺序学习人体拓扑的结构先验。大量实验表明，该方法将四肢末端关节的估计精度提高了18.7%，并在Human3.6M和MPI-INF-3DHP数据集上取得了state-of-the-art的结果。代码可在 https://github.com/vefalun/HTNet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HTNet，一种基于人体拓扑结构感知的3D人体姿态估计网络，通过多层级语义约束提升末端关节估计精度。
AI.motivation: 传统3D姿态估计方法存在误差沿人体拓扑结构累积至末端关节的问题，需通过拓扑约束机制改善末端关节精度。
AI.method: 设计Intra-Part Constraint模块利用父节点约束末端关节，结合图卷积网络（GCN）与自注意力机制分别建模关节级和身体级依赖关系，采用通道分割渐进策略从关节、部分、身体多层级学习拓扑先验。
AI.result: 在Human3.6M和MPI-INF-3DHP数据集上达到SOTA结果，肢体末端关节估计精度提升18.7%。
AI.conclusion: HTNet通过多层次拓扑约束机制有效缓解了3D姿态估计中的误差累积问题，验证了人体拓扑结构先验对姿态估计的关键作用。

Inspired by the backtracking mechanism in automatic control systems, we design an Intra-Part Constraint module that utilizes the parent nodes as the reference to build topological constraints for end joints at the part level. Based on these designs, we propose a novel Human Topology aware Network (HTNet), which adopts a channel-split progressive strategy to sequentially learn the structural priors of the human topology from multiple semantic levels: joint, part, and body. authors_text: Zhong Liu,Ran Li,Shuwei Shao,Xingming Wu,Weihai Chen
title: Self-Supervised Monocular Depth Estimation with Self-Reference Distillation and Disparity Offset Refinement
title_zh: 具有自参考蒸馏和视差偏移细化的自监督单目深度估计
abstract: Monocular depth estimation plays a fundamental role in computer vision. Due to the costly acquisition of depth ground truth, self-supervised methods that leverage adjacent frames to establish a supervisory signal have emerged as the most promising paradigms. In this work, we propose two novel ideas to improve self-supervised monocular depth estimation: 1) self-reference distillation and 2) disparity offset refinement. Specifically, we use a parameter-optimized model as the teacher updated as the training epochs to provide additional supervision during the training process. The teacher model has the same structure as the student model, with weights inherited from the historical student model. In addition, a multiview check is introduced to filter out the outliers produced by the teacher model. Furthermore, we leverage the contextual consistency between high-scale and low-scale features to obtain multiscale disparity offsets, which are used to refine the disparity output incrementally by aligning disparity information at different scales. The experimental results on the KITTI and Make3D datasets show that our method outperforms previous state-of-the-art competitors.
summary: Monocular depth estimation plays a fundamental role in computer vision. Due to the costly acquisition of depth ground truth, self-supervised methods that leverage adjacent frames to establish a supervisory signal have emerged as the most promising paradigms. In this work, we propose two novel ideas to improve self-supervised monocular depth estimation: 1) self-reference distillation and 2) disparity offset refinement. Specifically, we use a parameter-optimized model as the teacher updated as the training epochs to provide additional supervision during the training process. The teacher model has the same structure as the student model, with weights inherited from the historical student model. In addition, a multiview check is introduced to filter out the outliers produced by the teacher model. Furthermore, we leverage the contextual consistency between high-scale and low-scale features to obtain multiscale disparity offsets, which are used to refine the disparity output incrementally by aligning disparity information at different scales. The experimental results on the KITTI and Make3D datasets show that our method outperforms previous state-of-the-art competitors.
abstract_zh: 单目深度估计在计算机视觉中起着基础作用。由于获取深度地面实况的成本高昂，利用相邻帧建立监督信号的自监督方法已成为最有前途的范例。在这项工作中，我们提出了两个新颖的想法来改进自监督单目深度估计：1）自参考蒸馏和2）视差偏移细化。具体来说，我们使用参数优化模型，作为训练时期更新的教师，以在训练过程中提供额外的监督。教师模型与学生模型具有相同的结构，其权重继承自历史学生模型。此外，还引入了多视图检查来过滤掉教师模型产生的异常值。此外，我们利用高尺度和低尺度特征之间的上下文一致性来获得多尺度视差偏移，这些偏移用于通过对齐不同尺度的视差信息来逐步细化视差输出。 KITTI 和 Make3D 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的方法优于以前最先进的竞争对手。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自参考蒸馏和视差偏移优化的自监督单目深度估计方法，旨在提升无需真实深度标签的深度预测性能。
AI.motivation: 由于深度标签获取成本高昂，现有自监督方法依赖相邻帧生成监督信号，但存在预测精度不足和异常值干扰等问题，亟需更有效的优化策略。
AI.method: 1) 自参考蒸馏：通过历史学生模型参数初始化教师模型，利用其提供额外监督并引入多视角检查过滤异常值；2) 视差偏移优化：结合高低尺度特征一致性，分层对齐多尺度视差信息以逐步优化输出。
AI.result: 在KITTI和Make3D数据集上，该方法在深度估计任务中超越了现有最先进的自监督算法。
AI.conclusion: 通过自参考蒸馏与视差偏移优化的协同作用，本文方法有效提升了自监督单目深度估计的精度，为减少对人工标注数据的依赖提供了新思路。

Due to the costly acquisition of depth ground truth, self-supervised methods that leverage adjacent frames to establish a supervisory signal have emerged as the most promising paradigms. In this work, we propose two novel ideas to improve self-supervised monocular depth estimation: 1) self-reference distillation and 2) disparity offset refinement. Specifically, we use a parameter-optimized model as the teacher updated as the training epochs to provide additional supervision during the training process. The teacher model has the same structure as the student model, with weights inherited from the historical student model. In addition, a multiview check is introduced to filter out the outliers produced by the teacher model. Furthermore, we leverage the contextual consistency between high-scale and low-scale features to obtain multiscale disparity offsets, which are used to refine the disparity output incrementally by aligning disparity information at different scales. The experimental results on the KITTI and Make3D datasets show that our method outperforms previous state-of-the-art competitors. 单目深度估计在计算机视觉中起着基础作用。由于获取深度地面实况的成本高昂，利用相邻帧建立监督信号的自监督方法已成为最有前途的范例。在这项工作中，我们提出了两个新颖的想法来改进自监督单目深度估计：1）自参考蒸馏和2）视差偏移细化。具体来说，我们使用参数优化模型，作为训练时期更新的教师，以在训练过程中提供额外的监督。教师模型与学生模型具有相同的结构，其权重继承自历史学生模型。此外，还引入了多视图检查来过滤掉教师模型产生的异常值。此外，我们利用高尺度和低尺度特征之间的上下文一致性来获得多尺度视差偏移，这些偏移用于通过对齐不同尺度的视差信息来逐步细化视差输出。 KITTI 和 Make3D 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的方法优于以前最先进的竞争对手。 本文提出了一种基于自参考蒸馏和视差偏移优化的自监督单目深度估计方法，旨在提升无需真实深度标签的深度预测性能。 Zhong Liu,Ran Li,Shuwei Shao,Xingming Wu,Weihai Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Fali Li,Wenjuan Lei,Yuwei Wang,Xingjian Lu,Shengbin Li,Feng Xu,Zidong He,Jinyun Liu,Huali Yang,Yuanzhao Wu,Jie Shang,Yiwei Liu,Run-Wei Li
title: Ultra-conformable Liquid Metal Particle Monolayer on Air/water Interface for Substrate-free E-tattoo
title_zh: 空气/水界面上的超适形液态金属颗粒单层，用于无基材电子纹身
abstract: Gallium-based liquid metal is getting increased attention in conformal flexible electronics for its high electrical conductivity, intrinsic deformability and biocompatibility. A series of flexible devices are developed based on the micro-particles of liquid metal. But it is still challenging to fabricate conformal liquid metal film with a large area and high uniformity. Interfacial self-assembly is a competitive candidate method. Traditional interfacial self-assembly methods have difficulties assembling liquid metal particles because the floating state of the high-density microparticles could be easily disturbed by gravity. Here, we realized the multi-size universal self-assembly (MUS) for liquid metal particles with various diameters (0~500μm). By introducing a simple z-axis undisturbed interfacial material releasing strategy, the interference of gravitational energy on the stability of floating particles is avoided. Benefits from this, the ultra-conformable monolayer film, with large area (>100 cm2) and high floating yield (50%~90%), can be fabricated by liquid metal particles. Furthermore, the monolayer can be conformally transferred to any interesting complex surface such as human skin and plant leaf, to fabricate substrate-free flexible devices. Without interference from the mechanical response of traditional substrate, the liquid metal e-tattoo is more user-friendly and can realize feel-less continuous monitoring.
summary: Gallium-based liquid metal is getting increased attention in conformal flexible electronics for its high electrical conductivity, intrinsic deformability and biocompatibility. A series of flexible devices are developed based on the micro-particles of liquid metal. But it is still challenging to fabricate conformal liquid metal film with a large area and high uniformity. Interfacial self-assembly is a competitive candidate method. Traditional interfacial self-assembly methods have difficulties assembling liquid metal particles because the floating state of the high-density microparticles could be easily disturbed by gravity. Here, we realized the multi-size universal self-assembly (MUS) for liquid metal particles with various diameters (0~500μm). By introducing a simple z-axis undisturbed interfacial material releasing strategy, the interference of gravitational energy on the stability of floating particles is avoided. Benefits from this, the ultra-conformable monolayer film, with large area (>100 cm2) and high floating yield (50%~90%), can be fabricated by liquid metal particles. Furthermore, the monolayer can be conformally transferred to any interesting complex surface such as human skin and plant leaf, to fabricate substrate-free flexible devices. Without interference from the mechanical response of traditional substrate, the liquid metal e-tattoo is more user-friendly and can realize feel-less continuous monitoring.
abstract_zh: 镓基液态金属因其高导电性、固有的可变形性和生物相容性而在保形柔性电子器件中受到越来越多的关注。基于液态金属微粒子开发了一系列柔性器件。但制备大面积、高均匀性的共形液态金属薄膜仍然具有挑战性。界面自组装是一种有竞争力的候选方法。传统的界面自组装方法在组装液态金属颗粒时存在困难，因为高密度微粒的漂浮状态很容易受到重力的干扰。在这里，我们实现了各种直径（0~500μm）液态金属颗粒的多尺寸通用自组装（MUS）。通过引入简单的z轴原状界面材料释放策略，避免了重力能对漂浮颗粒稳定性的干扰。受益于此，液态金属颗粒可以制备大面积（>100 cm2）和高浮动产率（50%~90%）的超适形单层薄膜。此外，单层膜可以共形转移到任何有趣的复杂表面，例如人体皮肤和植物叶子，以制造无基材的柔性器件。液态金属电子纹身不受传统基材机械响应的干扰，更加人性化，可以实现无感连续监测。

AI.tldr: 开发无需基底的电子纹身技术，通过液态金属颗粒在气水界面自组装形成超贴合单层膜。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以制备大面积高均匀性液态金属薄膜，且重力干扰导致高密度微粒浮力稳定性差，限制了柔性电子器件的发展。
AI.method: 提出多尺寸通用自组装（MUS）方法，通过z轴无干扰界面释放策略消除重力对浮力粒子的影响，实现液态金属颗粒的大面积自组装。
AI.result: 成功制备出面积超100cm²、产率50%-90%的超贴合单层膜，可转移至皮肤、叶片等复杂表面，实现无基底柔性器件的连续监测。
AI.conclusion: 该方法克服了重力干扰难题，为高均匀性液态金属薄膜制备及柔性电子器件的贴合性提升提供了新思路。

authors_text: Haopeng Kuang,Dingkang Yang,Shunli Wang,Xiaoying Wang,Lihua Zhang
title: Towards Simultaneous Segmentation of Liver Tumors and Intrahepatic Vessels via Cross-attention Mechanism
title_zh: 通过交叉注意力机制同时分割肝脏肿瘤和肝内血管
abstract: Accurate visualization of liver tumors and their surrounding blood vessels is essential for noninvasive diagnosis and prognosis prediction of tumors. In medical image segmentation, there is still a lack of in-depth research on the simultaneous segmentation of liver tumors and peritumoral blood vessels. To this end, we collect the first liver tumor, and vessel segmentation benchmark datasets containing 52 portal vein phase computed tomography images with liver, liver tumor, and vessel annotations. In this case, we propose a 3D U-shaped Cross-Attention Network (UCA-Net) that utilizes a tailored cross-attention mechanism instead of the traditional skip connection to effectively model the encoder and decoder feature. Specifically, the UCA-Net uses a channel-wise cross-attention module to reduce the semantic gap between encoder and decoder and a slice-wise cross-attention module to enhance the contextual semantic learning ability among distinct slices. Experimental results show that the proposed UCA-Net can accurately segment 3D medical images and achieve state-of-the-art performance on the liver tumor and intrahepatic vessel segmentation task.
summary: Accurate visualization of liver tumors and their surrounding blood vessels is essential for noninvasive diagnosis and prognosis prediction of tumors. In medical image segmentation, there is still a lack of in-depth research on the simultaneous segmentation of liver tumors and peritumoral blood vessels. To this end, we collect the first liver tumor, and vessel segmentation benchmark datasets containing 52 portal vein phase computed tomography images with liver, liver tumor, and vessel annotations. In this case, we propose a 3D U-shaped Cross-Attention Network (UCA-Net) that utilizes a tailored cross-attention mechanism instead of the traditional skip connection to effectively model the encoder and decoder feature. Specifically, the UCA-Net uses a channel-wise cross-attention module to reduce the semantic gap between encoder and decoder and a slice-wise cross-attention module to enhance the contextual semantic learning ability among distinct slices. Experimental results show that the proposed UCA-Net can accurately segment 3D medical images and achieve state-of-the-art performance on the liver tumor and intrahepatic vessel segmentation task.
abstract_zh: 肝脏肿瘤及其周围血管的准确可视化对于肿瘤的无创诊断和预后预测至关重要。在医学图像分割中，目前还缺乏对肝脏肿瘤和瘤周血管同时分割的深入研究。为此，我们收集了第一个肝脏肿瘤和血管分割基准数据集，其中包含 52 个门静脉阶段计算机断层扫描图像，以及肝脏、肝脏肿瘤和血管注释。在这种情况下，我们提出了一种 3D U 形交叉注意网络（UCA-Net），它利用定制的交叉注意机制而不是传统的跳跃连接来有效地建模编码器和解码器特征。具体来说，UCA-Net 使用通道方式交叉注意模块来减少编码器和解码器之间的语义差距，并使用切片方式交叉注意模块来增强不同切片之间的上下文语义学习能力。实验结果表明，所提出的 UCA-Net 可以准确地分割 3D 医学图像，并在肝脏肿瘤和肝内血管分割任务上实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于交叉注意力机制的3D U型网络（UCA-Net），用于同时分割肝肿瘤和肝内血管。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在同时分割肝肿瘤与周围血管方面存在不足，需更精准的分割技术以支持诊断和预后评估。
AI.method: 设计3D U型交叉注意力网络（UCA-Net），采用通道级交叉注意力模块缩小编码器与解码器的语义差距，并利用切片级模块增强跨切片的上下文语义学习。
AI.result: 在包含52例CT图像的基准数据集上，UCA-Net实现肝肿瘤及血管分割的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过交叉注意力机制有效融合多尺度特征，提升3D医学图像分割精度，为肝肿瘤诊断提供新方法。

authors_text: Tae-Min Choi,Jong-Hwan Kim
title: Incremental Few-Shot Object Detection via Simple Fine-Tuning Approach
title_zh: 通过简单的微调方法进行增量少样本目标检测
abstract: In this paper, we explore incremental few-shot object detection (iFSD), which incrementally learns novel classes using only a few examples without revisiting base classes. Previous iFSD works achieved the desired results by applying meta-learning. However, meta-learning approaches show insufficient performance that is difficult to apply to practical problems. In this light, we propose a simple fine-tuning-based approach, the Incremental Two-stage Fine-tuning Approach (iTFA) for iFSD, which contains three steps: 1) base training using abundant base classes with the class-agnostic box regressor, 2) separation of the RoI feature extractor and classifier into the base and novel class branches for preserving base knowledge, and 3) fine-tuning the novel branch using only a few novel class examples. We evaluate our iTFA on the real-world datasets PASCAL VOC, COCO, and LVIS. iTFA achieves competitive performance in COCO and shows a 30% higher AP accuracy than meta-learning methods in the LVIS dataset. Experimental results show the effectiveness and applicability of our proposed method.
summary: In this paper, we explore incremental few-shot object detection (iFSD), which incrementally learns novel classes using only a few examples without revisiting base classes. Previous iFSD works achieved the desired results by applying meta-learning. However, meta-learning approaches show insufficient performance that is difficult to apply to practical problems. In this light, we propose a simple fine-tuning-based approach, the Incremental Two-stage Fine-tuning Approach (iTFA) for iFSD, which contains three steps: 1) base training using abundant base classes with the class-agnostic box regressor, 2) separation of the RoI feature extractor and classifier into the base and novel class branches for preserving base knowledge, and 3) fine-tuning the novel branch using only a few novel class examples. We evaluate our iTFA on the real-world datasets PASCAL VOC, COCO, and LVIS. iTFA achieves competitive performance in COCO and shows a 30% higher AP accuracy than meta-learning methods in the LVIS dataset. Experimental results show the effectiveness and applicability of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们探索增量少样本目标检测（iFSD），它仅使用几个示例来增量学习新类，而无需重新访问基类。之前的 iFSD 工作通过应用元学习取得了预期的结果。然而，元学习方法表现不足，难以应用于实际问题。有鉴于此，我们提出了一种简单的基于微调的方法，即 iFSD 的增量两阶段微调方法（iTFA），它包含三个步骤：1）使用丰富的基类和类无关框回归器进行基础训练，2）将 RoI 特征提取器和分类器分离为基类和新类分支以保留基础知识，3）仅使用一些新类示例对新分支进行微调。我们在现实世界数据集 PASCAL VOC、COCO 和 LVIS 上评估我们的 iTFA。 iTFA 在 COCO 中实现了具有竞争力的性能，并且在 LVIS 数据集中显示出比元学习方法高 30% 的 AP 准确率。实验结果表明了我们提出的方法的有效性和适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于简单微调的增量少样本目标检测方法（iTFA），解决在不遗忘已有知识的情况下仅用少量样本学习新类别的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有元学习方法在增量少样本目标检测中表现不足，难以满足实际应用需求，需探索更高效且实用的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出增量两阶段微调方法（iTFA），包含三步骤：1）使用基础类数据训练类无关框回归器；2）分离RoI特征提取器和分类器为基类与新类分支；3）仅用少量新类样本微调新类分支。
AI.result: 在COCO数据集上取得竞争力结果，在LVIS数据集上较元学习方法提升30%的AP准确率，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: iTFA通过分阶段微调有效平衡新旧知识学习，为实际场景中的增量少样本目标检测提供了可行方案。

search_text: Incremental Few-Shot Object Detection via Simple Fine-Tuning Approach 通过简单的微调方法进行增量少样本目标检测 In this paper, we explore incremental few-shot object detection (iFSD), which incrementally learns novel classes using only a few examples without revisiting base classes. Previous iFSD works achieved the desired results by applying meta-learning. However, meta-learning approaches show insufficient performance that is difficult to apply to practical problems. In this light, we propose a simple fine-tuning-based approach, the Incremental Two-stage Fine-tuning Approach (iTFA) for iFSD, which contains three steps: 1) base training using abundant base classes with the class-agnostic box regressor, 2) separation of the RoI feature extractor and classifier into the base and novel class branches for preserving base knowledge, and 3) fine-tuning the novel branch using only a few novel class examples. We evaluate our iTFA on the real-world datasets PASCAL VOC, COCO, and LVIS. iTFA achieves competitive performance in COCO and shows a 30% higher AP accuracy than meta-learning methods in the LVIS dataset. Experimental results show the effectiveness and applicability of our proposed method. 在本文中，我们探索增量少样本目标检测（iFSD），它仅使用几个示例来增量学习新类，而无需重新访问基类。之前的 iFSD 工作通过应用元学习取得了预期的结果。然而，元学习方法表现不足，难以应用于实际问题。有鉴于此，我们提出了一种简单的基于微调的方法，即 iFSD 的增量两阶段微调方法（iTFA），它包含三个步骤：1）使用丰富的基类和类无关框回归器进行基础训练，2）将 RoI 特征提取器和分类器分离为基类和新类分支以保留基础知识，3）仅使用一些新类示例对新分支进行微调。我们在现实世界数据集 PASCAL VOC、COCO 和 LVIS 上评估我们的 iTFA。 iTFA 在 COCO 中实现了具有竞争力的性能，并且在 LVIS 数据集中显示出比元学习方法高 30% 的 AP 准确率。实验结果表明了我们提出的方法的有效性和适用性。 本文提出一种基于简单微调的增量少样本目标检测方法（iTFA），解决在不遗忘已有知识的情况下仅用少量样本学习新类别的问题。 Tae-Min Choi,Jong-Hwan Kim cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Lianghua Huang,Di Chen,Yu Liu,Yujun Shen,Deli Zhao,Jingren Zhou
title: Composer: Creative and Controllable Image Synthesis with Composable Conditions
title_zh: Composer：具有可组合条件的创意可控图像合成
abstract: Recent large-scale generative models learned on big data are capable of synthesizing incredible images yet suffer from limited controllability. This work offers a new generation paradigm that allows flexible control of the output image, such as spatial layout and palette, while maintaining the synthesis quality and model creativity. With compositionality as the core idea, we first decompose an image into representative factors, and then train a diffusion model with all these factors as the conditions to recompose the input. At the inference stage, the rich intermediate representations work as composable elements, leading to a huge design space (i.e., exponentially proportional to the number of decomposed factors) for customizable content creation. It is noteworthy that our approach, which we call Composer, supports various levels of conditions, such as text description as the global information, depth map and sketch as the local guidance, color histogram for low-level details, etc. Besides improving controllability, we confirm that Composer serves as a general framework and facilitates a wide range of classical generative tasks without retraining. Code and models will be made available.
summary: Recent large-scale generative models learned on big data are capable of synthesizing incredible images yet suffer from limited controllability. This work offers a new generation paradigm that allows flexible control of the output image, such as spatial layout and palette, while maintaining the synthesis quality and model creativity. With compositionality as the core idea, we first decompose an image into representative factors, and then train a diffusion model with all these factors as the conditions to recompose the input. At the inference stage, the rich intermediate representations work as composable elements, leading to a huge design space (i.e., exponentially proportional to the number of decomposed factors) for customizable content creation. It is noteworthy that our approach, which we call Composer, supports various levels of conditions, such as text description as the global information, depth map and sketch as the local guidance, color histogram for low-level details, etc. Besides improving controllability, we confirm that Composer serves as a general framework and facilitates a wide range of classical generative tasks without retraining. Code and models will be made available.
abstract_zh: 最近在大数据上学习的大规模生成模型能够合成令人难以置信的图像，但可控性有限。这项工作提供了新一代范例，允许灵活控制输出图像，例如空间布局和调色板，同时保持合成质量和模型创造力。以组合性为核心思想，我们首先将图像分解为代表因素，然后以所有这些因素为条件训练扩散模型来重构输入。在推理阶段，丰富的中间表示作为可组​​合元素，为可定制的内容创建提供了巨大的设计空间（即与分解因子的数量成指数比例）。值得注意的是，我们的方法（我们称之为 Composer）支持各种级别的条件，例如作为全局信息的文本描述、作为局部指导的深度图和草图、用于低级细节的颜色直方图等。除了提高可控性之外，我们确认 Composer 可以作为通用框架，并在无需重新训练的情况下促进各种经典生成任务。将提供代码和模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Composer的新型图像合成框架，通过可组合的条件实现灵活控制，同时保持生成质量与创造力。
AI.motivation: 现有大规模生成模型虽能合成高质量图像，但可控性不足。本文旨在提供一种支持多层级条件控制的通用框架，提升图像生成的定制化能力。
AI.method: 将图像分解为可表示的因素，训练扩散模型以这些因素为条件进行重组。推理阶段利用中间表示作为可组合元素，支持文本、深度图、草图等多层级条件输入。
AI.result: Composer实现了灵活的图像控制，支持多种条件组合，且无需重新训练即可完成多种经典生成任务，代码和模型将开源。
AI.conclusion: Composer通过可组合条件范式，为可控图像合成提供了新思路，显著扩展了内容创作的设计空间与应用范围。

authors_text: Mehrdad Ranjbar-Khadivi,Shahin Akbarpour,Mohammad-Reza Feizi-Derakhshi,Babak Anari
title: Persian topic detection based on Human Word association and graph embedding
title_zh: 基于人类单词关联和图嵌入的波斯语主题检测
abstract: In this paper, we propose a framework to detect topics in social media based on Human Word Association. Identifying topics discussed in these media has become a critical and significant challenge. Most of the work done in this area is in English, but much has been done in the Persian language, especially microblogs written in Persian. Also, the existing works focused more on exploring frequent patterns or semantic relationships and ignored the structural methods of language. In this paper, a topic detection framework using HWA, a method for Human Word Association, is proposed. This method uses the concept of imitation of mental ability for word association. This method also calculates the Associative Gravity Force that shows how words are related. Using this parameter, a graph can be generated. The topics can be extracted by embedding this graph and using clustering methods. This approach has been applied to a Persian language dataset collected from Telegram. Several experimental studies have been performed to evaluate the proposed framework's performance. Experimental results show that this approach works better than other topic detection methods.
summary: In this paper, we propose a framework to detect topics in social media based on Human Word Association. Identifying topics discussed in these media has become a critical and significant challenge. Most of the work done in this area is in English, but much has been done in the Persian language, especially microblogs written in Persian. Also, the existing works focused more on exploring frequent patterns or semantic relationships and ignored the structural methods of language. In this paper, a topic detection framework using HWA, a method for Human Word Association, is proposed. This method uses the concept of imitation of mental ability for word association. This method also calculates the Associative Gravity Force that shows how words are related. Using this parameter, a graph can be generated. The topics can be extracted by embedding this graph and using clustering methods. This approach has been applied to a Persian language dataset collected from Telegram. Several experimental studies have been performed to evaluate the proposed framework's performance. Experimental results show that this approach works better than other topic detection methods.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一个基于人类单词关联来检测社交媒体中的主题的框架。识别这些媒体中讨论的主题已成为一项关键且重大的挑战。这方面的大部分工作都是用英语完成的，但也有很多是用波斯语完成的，特别是用波斯语写的微博。此外，现有的工作更多地侧重于探索频繁模式或语义关系，而忽略了语言的结构方法。本文提出了一种使用 HWA（一种人类单词关联方法）的主题检测框架。该方法利用模仿心理能力的概念进行单词联想。此方法还计算显示单词如何相关的关联重力。使用此参数，可以生成图表。可以通过嵌入该图并使用聚类方法来提取主题。这种方法已应用于从 Telegram 收集的波斯语数据集。已经进行了多项实验研究来评估所提出的框架的性能。实验结果表明，该方法比其他主题检测方法效果更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于人类词语联想和图嵌入的波斯语社交媒体主题检测框架。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多集中于英语主题检测，波斯语研究不足且现有方法忽视语言结构特征。
AI.method: 利用人类词语联想（HWA）模拟认知机制，通过关联引力计算构建词语关系图，结合图嵌入与聚类算法提取主题。
AI.result: 在Telegram波斯语数据集实验中，该方法性能优于其他主题检测技术。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过结合认知模拟与结构化图分析，有效提升了波斯语社交媒体主题检测效果。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于人类词语联想和图嵌入的波斯语社交媒体主题检测框架。
motivation: 现有研究多集中于英语主题检测，波斯语研究不足且现有方法忽视语言结构特征。
method: 利用人类词语联想（HWA）模拟认知机制，通过关联引力计算构建词语关系图，结合图嵌入与聚类算法提取主题。

search_text: Persian topic detection based on Human Word association and graph embedding 基于人类单词关联和图嵌入的波斯语主题检测 In this paper, we propose a framework to detect topics in social media based on Human Word Association. Identifying topics discussed in these media has become a critical and significant challenge. Most of the work done in this area is in English, but much has been done in the Persian language, especially microblogs written in Persian. Also, the existing works focused more on exploring frequent patterns or semantic relationships and ignored the structural methods of language. In this paper, a topic detection framework using HWA, a method for Human Word Association, is proposed. This method uses the concept of imitation of mental ability for word association. This method also calculates the Associative Gravity Force that shows how words are related. Using this parameter, a graph can be generated. The topics can be extracted by embedding this graph and using clustering methods. This approach has been applied to a Persian language dataset collected from Telegram. Several experimental studies have been performed to evaluate the proposed framework's performance. Experimental results show that this approach works better than other topic detection methods. 在本文中，我们提出了一个基于人类单词关联来检测社交媒体中的主题的框架。识别这些媒体中讨论的主题已成为一项关键且重大的挑战。这方面的大部分工作都是用英语完成的，但也有很多是用波斯语完成的，特别是用波斯语写的微博。此外，现有的工作更多地侧重于探索频繁模式或语义关系，而忽略了语言的结构方法。本文提出了一种使用 HWA（一种人类单词关联方法）的主题检测框架。该方法利用模仿心理能力的概念进行单词联想。此方法还计算显示单词如何相关的关联重力。使用此参数，可以生成图表。可以通过嵌入该图并使用聚类方法来提取主题。这种方法已应用于从 Telegram 收集的波斯语数据集。已经进行了多项实验研究来评估所提出的框架的性能。实验结果表明，该方法比其他主题检测方法效果更好。 本文提出一种基于人类词语联想和图嵌入的波斯语社交媒体主题检测框架。 Mehrdad Ranjbar-Khadivi,Shahin Akbarpour,Mohammad-Reza Feizi-Derakhshi,Babak Anari cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.SI

authors_text: Tao Huang,Kai Chen,Bin Li,Yun-Hui Liu,Qi Dou
title: Demonstration-Guided Reinforcement Learning with Efficient Exploration for Task Automation of Surgical Robot
title_zh: 演示引导强化学习与手术机器人任务自动化的高效探索
abstract: Task automation of surgical robot has the potentials to improve surgical efficiency. Recent reinforcement learning (RL) based approaches provide scalable solutions to surgical automation, but typically require extensive data collection to solve a task if no prior knowledge is given. This issue is known as the exploration challenge, which can be alleviated by providing expert demonstrations to an RL agent. Yet, how to make effective use of demonstration data to improve exploration efficiency still remains an open challenge. In this work, we introduce Demonstration-guided EXploration (DEX), an efficient reinforcement learning algorithm that aims to overcome the exploration problem with expert demonstrations for surgical automation. To effectively exploit demonstrations, our method estimates expert-like behaviors with higher values to facilitate productive interactions, and adopts non-parametric regression to enable such guidance at states unobserved in demonstration data. Extensive experiments on $10$ surgical manipulation tasks from SurRoL, a comprehensive surgical simulation platform, demonstrate significant improvements in the exploration efficiency and task success rates of our method. Moreover, we also deploy the learned policies to the da Vinci Research Kit (dVRK) platform to show the effectiveness on the real robot. Code is available at https://github.com/med-air/DEX.
summary: Task automation of surgical robot has the potentials to improve surgical efficiency. Recent reinforcement learning (RL) based approaches provide scalable solutions to surgical automation, but typically require extensive data collection to solve a task if no prior knowledge is given. This issue is known as the exploration challenge, which can be alleviated by providing expert demonstrations to an RL agent. Yet, how to make effective use of demonstration data to improve exploration efficiency still remains an open challenge. In this work, we introduce Demonstration-guided EXploration (DEX), an efficient reinforcement learning algorithm that aims to overcome the exploration problem with expert demonstrations for surgical automation. To effectively exploit demonstrations, our method estimates expert-like behaviors with higher values to facilitate productive interactions, and adopts non-parametric regression to enable such guidance at states unobserved in demonstration data. Extensive experiments on $10$ surgical manipulation tasks from SurRoL, a comprehensive surgical simulation platform, demonstrate significant improvements in the exploration efficiency and task success rates of our method. Moreover, we also deploy the learned policies to the da Vinci Research Kit (dVRK) platform to show the effectiveness on the real robot. Code is available at https://github.com/med-air/DEX.
abstract_zh: 手术机器人的任务自动化具有提高手术效率的潜力。最近基于强化学习 (RL) 的方法为手术自动化提供了可扩展的解决方案，但如果没有提供先验知识，通常需要大量数据收集来解决任务。这个问题被称为探索挑战，可以通过向 RL 代理提供专家演示来缓解。然而，如何有效利用示范数据来提高勘探效率仍然是一个开放的挑战。在这项工作中，我们引入了演示引导探索（DEX），这是一种有效的强化学习算法，旨在通过专家演示克服手术自动化的探索问题。为了有效地利用演示，我们的方法以更高的值估计类似专家的行为，以促进富有成效的交互，并采用非参数回归以在演示数据中未观察到的状态下实现此类指导。 SurRoL（一个综合性手术模拟平台）对 10 美元的手术操作任务进行了广泛的实验，证明了我们的方法在探索效率和任务成功率方面的显着提高。此外，我们还将学习到的策略部署到达芬奇研究套件（dVRK）平台上，以展示在真实机器人上的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/med-air/DEX 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于专家演示的高效强化学习算法DEX，用于解决手术机器人任务自动化的探索难题。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习方法在手术机器人任务自动化中面临数据收集成本高、探索效率低的问题，而现有方法未能有效利用专家演示数据提升探索效率。
AI.method: DEX通过估计专家行为的高价值策略引导智能体交互，并采用非参数回归技术将演示指导扩展到未观测状态，从而提升探索效率。
AI.result: 在SurRoL平台的10项手术任务中，DEX显著提高了探索效率和任务成功率，并在dVRK真实机器人平台验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: DEX通过有效利用专家演示数据，成功解决了手术机器人任务自动化中的探索挑战，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Moon Ye-Bin,Dongmin Choi,Yongjin Kwon,Junsik Kim,Tae-Hyun Oh
title: ENInst: Enhancing Weakly-supervised Low-shot Instance Segmentation
title_zh: ENInst：增强弱监督的低样本实例分割
abstract: We address a weakly-supervised low-shot instance segmentation, an annotation-efficient training method to deal with novel classes effectively. Since it is an under-explored problem, we first investigate the difficulty of the problem and identify the performance bottleneck by conducting systematic analyses of model components and individual sub-tasks with a simple baseline model. Based on the analyses, we propose ENInst with sub-task enhancement methods: instance-wise mask refinement for enhancing pixel localization quality and novel classifier composition for improving classification accuracy. Our proposed method lifts the overall performance by enhancing the performance of each sub-task. We demonstrate that our ENInst is 7.5 times more efficient in achieving comparable performance to the existing fully-supervised few-shot models and even outperforms them at times.
summary: We address a weakly-supervised low-shot instance segmentation, an annotation-efficient training method to deal with novel classes effectively. Since it is an under-explored problem, we first investigate the difficulty of the problem and identify the performance bottleneck by conducting systematic analyses of model components and individual sub-tasks with a simple baseline model. Based on the analyses, we propose ENInst with sub-task enhancement methods: instance-wise mask refinement for enhancing pixel localization quality and novel classifier composition for improving classification accuracy. Our proposed method lifts the overall performance by enhancing the performance of each sub-task. We demonstrate that our ENInst is 7.5 times more efficient in achieving comparable performance to the existing fully-supervised few-shot models and even outperforms them at times.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了弱监督的低样本实例分割，这是一种有效处理新类别的注释高效训练方法。由于这是一个尚未探索的问题，我们首先通过使用简单的基线模型对模型组件和各个子任务进行系统分析来调查问题的难度并确定性能瓶颈。基于分析，我们提出了具有子任务增强方法的 ENInst：用于增强像素定位质量的实例级掩模细化和用于提高分类精度的新颖分类器组合。我们提出的方法通过增强每个子任务的性能来提高整体性能。我们证明，我们的 ENInst 在实现与现有完全监督的少样本模型相当的性能方面效率提高了 7.5 倍，有时甚至超越它们。

AI.tldr: 提出ENInst方法，解决弱监督少样本实例分割问题，提升模型性能与效率。
AI.motivation: 弱监督少样本实例分割效率低、性能不足，需更高效的方法提升准确率与标注效率。
AI.method: 通过实例级掩码优化提升像素定位精度，结合新型分类器增强分类准确率，优化各子任务性能。
AI.result: ENInst在保持性能的同时，效率提升7.5倍，部分场景下超越现有全监督少样本模型。
AI.conclusion: 证明弱监督少样本分割的有效性，为高效模型训练提供新思路。

authors_text: He Jiang,Mujtaba Asad,Jingjing Liu,Haoxiang Zhang,Deqiang Cheng
title: Metropolis Theorem and Its Applications in Single Image Detail Enhancement
title_zh: Metropolis定理及其在单幅图像细节增强中的应用
abstract: Traditional image detail enhancement is local filter-based or global filter-based. In both approaches, the original image is first divided into the base layer and the detail layer, and then the enhanced image is obtained by amplifying the detail layer. Our method is different, and its innovation lies in the special way to get the image detail layer. The detail layer in our method is obtained by updating the residual features, and the updating mechanism is usually based on searching and matching similar patches. However, due to the diversity of image texture features, perfect matching is often not possible. In this paper, the process of searching and matching is treated as a thermodynamic process, where the Metropolis theorem can minimize the internal energy and get the global optimal solution of this task, that is, to find a more suitable feature for a better detail enhancement performance. Extensive experiments have proven that our algorithm can achieve better results in quantitative metrics testing and visual effects evaluation. The source code can be obtained from the link.
summary: Traditional image detail enhancement is local filter-based or global filter-based. In both approaches, the original image is first divided into the base layer and the detail layer, and then the enhanced image is obtained by amplifying the detail layer. Our method is different, and its innovation lies in the special way to get the image detail layer. The detail layer in our method is obtained by updating the residual features, and the updating mechanism is usually based on searching and matching similar patches. However, due to the diversity of image texture features, perfect matching is often not possible. In this paper, the process of searching and matching is treated as a thermodynamic process, where the Metropolis theorem can minimize the internal energy and get the global optimal solution of this task, that is, to find a more suitable feature for a better detail enhancement performance. Extensive experiments have proven that our algorithm can achieve better results in quantitative metrics testing and visual effects evaluation. The source code can be obtained from the link.
abstract_zh: 传统的图像细节增强是基于局部滤波器或基于全局滤波器的。在这两种方法中，首先将原始图像分为基础层和细节层，然后通过放大细节层来获得增强图像。我们的方法有所不同，其创新之处在于获取图像细节层的特殊方式。我们方法中的细节层是通过更新残差特征获得的，更新机制通常基于搜索和匹配相似的补丁。然而，由于图像纹理特征的多样性，完美匹配往往是不可能的。本文将搜索和匹配的过程视为一个热力学过程，其中Metropolis定理可以最小化内能并得到该任务的全局最优解，即找到更合适的特征以获得更好的细节增强性能。大量的实验证明我们的算法在定量指标测试和视觉效果评估方面能够取得更好的结果。源代码可以从链接中获取。

AI.method: 将相似块搜索匹配过程建模为热力学系统，利用Metropolis定理通过能量最小化寻找全局最优特征匹配方案。
AI.result: 实验表明该算法在定量指标和视觉评估中均优于现有方法，源代码已公开。
AI.conclusion: Metropolis定理为图像细节增强提供了新的优化框架，有效解决了纹理多样性带来的匹配难题。

search_text: Metropolis Theorem and Its Applications in Single Image Detail Enhancement Metropolis定理及其在单幅图像细节增强中的应用 Traditional image detail enhancement is local filter-based or global filter-based. In both approaches, the original image is first divided into the base layer and the detail layer, and then the enhanced image is obtained by amplifying the detail layer. Our method is different, and its innovation lies in the special way to get the image detail layer. The detail layer in our method is obtained by updating the residual features, and the updating mechanism is usually based on searching and matching similar patches. However, due to the diversity of image texture features, perfect matching is often not possible. In this paper, the process of searching and matching is treated as a thermodynamic process, where the Metropolis theorem can minimize the internal energy and get the global optimal solution of this task, that is, to find a more suitable feature for a better detail enhancement performance. Extensive experiments have proven that our algorithm can achieve better results in quantitative metrics testing and visual effects evaluation.
